tldr: 本文提出将图像解析为抽象意义表示（AMR）的视觉语义解析方法，以提升视觉场景理解的语义表达能力。
motivation: 场景图虽能捕捉空间关系，但依赖昂贵的人工标注且语义表达有限，而AMR作为自然语言处理中的语义表示框架，能更高效地捕捉高层语义概念。
method: 通过复用文本到AMR的解析器，将图像转化为视觉AMR图，并构建元AMR图整合多描述信息。
result: 实验验证了图像到AMR解析的可行性，证明该方法能有效生成高层语义表示并统一多源描述信息。
conclusion: 视觉AMR解析为场景理解提供了新方向，未来需进一步优化解析器并探索更丰富的语义表示形式。
search_text: Visual Semantic Parsing: From Images to Abstract Meaning Representation 视觉语义解析：从图像到抽象意义表示 The success of scene graphs for visual scene understanding has brought attention to the benefits of abstracting a visual input (e.g., image) into a structured representation, where entities (people and objects) are nodes connected by edges specifying their relations. Building these representations, however, requires expensive manual annotation in the form of images paired with their scene graphs or frames. These formalisms remain limited in the nature of entities and relations they can capture. In this paper, we propose to leverage a widely-used meaning representation in the field of natural language processing, the Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR), to address these shortcomings. Compared to scene graphs, which largely emphasize spatial relationships, our visual AMR graphs are more linguistically informed, with a focus on higher-level semantic concepts extrapolated from visual input. Moreover, they allow us to generate meta-AMR graphs to unify information contained in multiple image descriptions under one representation. Through extensive experimentation and analysis, we demonstrate that we can re-purpose an existing text-to-AMR parser to parse images into AMRs. Our findings point to important future research directions for improved scene understanding. 用于视觉场景理解的场景图的成功引起了人们对将视觉输入（例如图像）抽象为结构化表示的好处的关注，其中实体（人和物体）是通过指定其关系的边连接的节点。然而，构建这些表示需要以与其场景图或帧配对的图像形式进行昂贵的手动注释。这些形式主义在它们可以捕获的实体和关系的性质方面仍然有限。在本文中，我们建议利用自然语言处理领域广泛使用的含义表示，即抽象含义表示（AMR）来解决这些缺点。与主要强调空间关系的场景图相比，我们的视觉 AMR 图在语言上更具信息性，重点关注从视觉输入推断出的更高级别的语义概念。此外，它们允许我们生成元 AMR 图，以将多个图像描述中包含的信息统一在一种表示下。通过广泛的实验和分析，我们证明我们可以重新利用现有的文本到 AMR 解析器，将图像解析为 AMR。我们的研究结果指出了改善场景理解的重要未来研究方向。 本文提出将图像解析为抽象意义表示（AMR）的视觉语义解析方法，以提升视觉场景理解的语义表达能力。 Mohamed Ashraf Abdelsalam,Zhan Shi,Federico Fancellu,Kalliopi Basioti,Dhaivat J. Bhatt,Vladimir Pavlovic,Afsaneh Fazly cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Kentaro Seki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Takaaki Saeki,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Text-to-speech synthesis from dark data with evaluation-in-the-loop data selection
title_zh: 通过循环评估数据选择从暗数据进行文本到语音合成
abstract: This paper proposes a method for selecting training data for text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis from dark data. TTS models are typically trained on high-quality speech corpora that cost much time and money for data collection, which makes it very challenging to increase speaker variation. In contrast, there is a large amount of data whose availability is unknown (a.k.a, "dark data"), such as YouTube videos. To utilize data other than TTS corpora, previous studies have selected speech data from the corpora on the basis of acoustic quality. However, considering that TTS models robust to data noise have been proposed, we should select data on the basis of its importance as training data to the given TTS model, not the quality of speech itself. Our method with a loop of training and evaluation selects training data on the basis of the automatically predicted quality of synthetic speech of a given TTS model. Results of evaluations using YouTube data reveal that our method outperforms the conventional acoustic-quality-based method.
summary: This paper proposes a method for selecting training data for text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis from dark data. TTS models are typically trained on high-quality speech corpora that cost much time and money for data collection, which makes it very challenging to increase speaker variation. In contrast, there is a large amount of data whose availability is unknown (a.k.a, "dark data"), such as YouTube videos. To utilize data other than TTS corpora, previous studies have selected speech data from the corpora on the basis of acoustic quality. However, considering that TTS models robust to data noise have been proposed, we should select data on the basis of its importance as training data to the given TTS model, not the quality of speech itself. Our method with a loop of training and evaluation selects training data on the basis of the automatically predicted quality of synthetic speech of a given TTS model. Results of evaluations using YouTube data reveal that our method outperforms the conventional acoustic-quality-based method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从暗数据中选择用于文本到语音（TTS）合成的训练数据的方法。 TTS 模型通常在高质量语音语料库上进行训练，这需要花费大量时间和金钱来收集数据，这使得增加说话者变化变得非常具有挑战性。相比之下，有大量数据的可用性未知（又称“暗数据”），例如 YouTube 视频。为了利用 TTS 语料库以外的数据，之前的研究都是根据音质从语料库中选择语音数据。然而，考虑到已经提出了对数据噪声具有鲁棒性的 TTS 模型，我们应该根据其作为给定 TTS 模型的训练数据的重要性来选择数据，而不是语音本身的质量。我们的方法具有训练和评估循环，根据给定 TTS 模型自动预测的合成语音质量来选择训练数据。使用 YouTube 数据的评估结果表明，我们的方法优于传统的基于声学质量的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种从暗数据中选择训练数据的方法，用于文本到语音合成
AI.motivation: 传统TTS训练依赖昂贵的高质量语料库，而暗数据（如YouTube视频）未被有效利用。现有方法基于语音质量筛选数据，但未考虑数据对模型训练的重要性
AI.method: 通过训练与评估循环，基于给定TTS模型合成语音的自动预测质量选择训练数据
AI.result: 在YouTube数据集上的评估显示，该方法优于传统基于语音质量的数据选择方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效利用暗数据提升TTS模型性能，为数据选择提供新思路

authors_text: Qixin Hu,Junfei Xiao,Yixiong Chen,Shuwen Sun,Jie-Neng Chen,Alan Yuille,Zongwei Zhou
title: Synthetic Tumors Make AI Segment Tumors Better
title_zh: 合成肿瘤使 AI 分段肿瘤变得更好
comment: NeurIPS Workshop on Medical Imaging Meets NeurIPS, 2022
comments: NeurIPS Workshop on Medical Imaging Meets NeurIPS, 2022
abstract: We develop a novel strategy to generate synthetic tumors. Unlike existing works, the tumors generated by our strategy have two intriguing advantages: (1) realistic in shape and texture, which even medical professionals can confuse with real tumors; (2) effective for AI model training, which can perform liver tumor segmentation similarly to a model trained on real tumors - this result is unprecedented because no existing work, using synthetic tumors only, has thus far reached a similar or even close performance to the model trained on real tumors. This result also implies that manual efforts for developing per-voxel annotation of tumors (which took years to create) can be considerably reduced for training AI models in the future. Moreover, our synthetic tumors have the potential to improve the success rate of small tumor detection by automatically generating enormous examples of small (or tiny) synthetic tumors.
summary: We develop a novel strategy to generate synthetic tumors. Unlike existing works, the tumors generated by our strategy have two intriguing advantages: (1) realistic in shape and texture, which even medical professionals can confuse with real tumors; (2) effective for AI model training, which can perform liver tumor segmentation similarly to a model trained on real tumors - this result is unprecedented because no existing work, using synthetic tumors only, has thus far reached a similar or even close performance to the model trained on real tumors. This result also implies that manual efforts for developing per-voxel annotation of tumors (which took years to create) can be considerably reduced for training AI models in the future. Moreover, our synthetic tumors have the potential to improve the success rate of small tumor detection by automatically generating enormous examples of small (or tiny) synthetic tumors.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种生成合成肿瘤的新策略。与现有作品不同，我们的策略生成的肿瘤有两个有趣的优点：（1）形状和纹理逼真，即使是医学专业人士也可能与真实的肿瘤混淆； （2）对AI模型训练有效，它可以像在真实肿瘤上训练的模型一样执行肝脏肿瘤分割——这个结果是前所未有的，因为迄今为止还没有仅使用合成肿瘤的现有工作达到与在真实肿瘤上训练的模型相似甚至接近的性能。这一结果还意味着，在未来训练人工智能模型时，可以大大减少开发肿瘤每体素注释的手动工作（需要数年时间才能创建）。此外，我们的合成肿瘤有潜力通过自动生成大量小（或微小）合成肿瘤的例子来提高小肿瘤检测的成功率。

AI.tldr: 开发生成逼真合成肿瘤的新方法，用于提升AI模型的肿瘤分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有合成肿瘤缺乏真实感且难以有效训练AI模型，而手动标注真实肿瘤数据耗时耗力，亟需高效替代方案。
AI.method: 设计生成策略创造形状与纹理高度逼真的合成肿瘤，并利用其训练AI模型进行肝脏肿瘤分割。
AI.result: 合成肿瘤训练的模型分割性能媲美真实数据训练模型，首次实现无需真实数据的高精度分割，同时降低标注成本并提升小肿瘤检测率。
AI.conclusion: 合成肿瘤可有效替代真实数据训练AI模型，显著减少人工标注依赖，未来或成医学影像分析的重要工具。

authors_text: Weihua Hu,Kaidi Cao,Kexin Huang,Edward W Huang,Karthik Subbian,Kenji Kawaguchi,Jure Leskovec
title: TuneUp: A Simple Improved Training Strategy for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: TuneUp：一种简单改进的图神经网络训练策略
abstract: Despite recent advances in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), their training strategies remain largely under-explored. The conventional training strategy learns over all nodes in the original graph(s) equally, which can be sub-optimal as certain nodes are often more difficult to learn than others. Here we present TuneUp, a simple curriculum-based training strategy for improving the predictive performance of GNNs. TuneUp trains a GNN in two stages. In the first stage, TuneUp applies conventional training to obtain a strong base GNN. The base GNN tends to perform well on head nodes (nodes with large degrees) but less so on tail nodes (nodes with small degrees). Therefore, the second stage of TuneUp focuses on improving prediction on the difficult tail nodes by further training the base GNN on synthetically generated tail node data. We theoretically analyze TuneUp and show it provably improves generalization performance on tail nodes. TuneUp is simple to implement and applicable to a broad range of GNN architectures and prediction tasks. Extensive evaluation of TuneUp on five diverse GNN architectures, three types of prediction tasks, and both transductive and inductive settings shows that TuneUp significantly improves the performance of the base GNN on tail nodes, while often even improving the performance on head nodes. Altogether, TuneUp produces up to 57.6% and 92.2% relative predictive performance improvement in the transductive and the challenging inductive settings, respectively.
summary: Despite recent advances in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), their training strategies remain largely under-explored. The conventional training strategy learns over all nodes in the original graph(s) equally, which can be sub-optimal as certain nodes are often more difficult to learn than others. Here we present TuneUp, a simple curriculum-based training strategy for improving the predictive performance of GNNs. TuneUp trains a GNN in two stages. In the first stage, TuneUp applies conventional training to obtain a strong base GNN. The base GNN tends to perform well on head nodes (nodes with large degrees) but less so on tail nodes (nodes with small degrees). Therefore, the second stage of TuneUp focuses on improving prediction on the difficult tail nodes by further training the base GNN on synthetically generated tail node data. We theoretically analyze TuneUp and show it provably improves generalization performance on tail nodes. TuneUp is simple to implement and applicable to a broad range of GNN architectures and prediction tasks. Extensive evaluation of TuneUp on five diverse GNN architectures, three types of prediction tasks, and both transductive and inductive settings shows that TuneUp significantly improves the performance of the base GNN on tail nodes, while often even improving the performance on head nodes. Altogether, TuneUp produces up to 57.6% and 92.2% relative predictive performance improvement in the transductive and the challenging inductive settings, respectively.
abstract_zh: 尽管图神经网络（GNN）最近取得了进展，但它们的训练策略在很大程度上仍未得到充分探索。传统的训练策略平等地学习原始图中的所有节点，这可能不是最优的，因为某些节点通常比其他节点更难学习。在这里，我们提出了 TuneUp，一种基于课程的简单培训策略，用于提高 GNN 的预测性能。 TuneUp 分两个阶段训练 GNN。在第一阶段，TuneUp 应用常规训练来获得强大的基础 GNN。基础 GNN 在头节点（度数较大的节点）上往往表现良好，但在尾节点（度数较小的节点）上表现较差。因此，TuneUp 的第二阶段侧重于通过在综合生成的尾节点数据上进一步训练基础 GNN 来改进对困难尾节点的预测。我们从理论上分析了 TuneUp，并证明它可以提高尾部节点的泛化性能。 TuneUp 易于实现，适用于广泛的 GNN 架构和预测任务。对 TuneUp 对五种不同的 GNN 架构、三种类型的预测任务以及传导和归纳设置的广泛评估表明，TuneUp 显着提高了基础 GNN 在尾节点上的性能，同时甚至常常提高了头节点上的性能。总而言之，TuneUp 在传导和具有挑战性的感应设置中分别实现了高达 57.6% 和 92.2% 的相对预测性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TuneUp，一种基于课程学习的图神经网络（GNN）训练策略，旨在通过分阶段训练提升模型在尾节点（低度节点）上的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GNN训练策略对图中所有节点平等处理，但尾节点因结构复杂度高而学习困难，导致模型性能受限。需设计针对性训练方法以优化尾节点表现。
AI.method: TuneUp采用两阶段训练：第一阶段通过常规训练获得基础GNN模型；第二阶段生成合成尾节点数据，针对性强化训练以提升尾节点预测能力，并提供理论分析证明其泛化性能提升。
AI.result: 在五种GNN架构、三种预测任务及两种设置（transductive/inductive）中，TuneUp使尾节点性能提升显著，相对提升达57.6%（transductive）和92.2%（inductive），且常伴随头节点性能改善。
AI.conclusion: TuneUp是一种简单高效的GNN训练改进策略，通过分阶段聚焦尾节点学习，显著提升模型整体性能，适用于多种架构与任务，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: TuneUp: A Simple Improved Training Strategy for Graph Neural Networks TuneUp：一种简单改进的图神经网络训练策略 Despite recent advances in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), their training strategies remain largely under-explored. The conventional training strategy learns over all nodes in the original graph(s) equally, which can be sub-optimal as certain nodes are often more difficult to learn than others. Here we present TuneUp, a simple curriculum-based training strategy for improving the predictive performance of GNNs. TuneUp trains a GNN in two stages. In the first stage, TuneUp applies conventional training to obtain a strong base GNN. The base GNN tends to perform well on head nodes (nodes with large degrees) but less so on tail nodes (nodes with small degrees). Therefore, the second stage of TuneUp focuses on improving prediction on the difficult tail nodes by further training the base GNN on synthetically generated tail node data. We theoretically analyze TuneUp and show it provably improves generalization performance on tail nodes. TuneUp is simple to implement and applicable to a broad range of GNN architectures and prediction tasks. Extensive evaluation of TuneUp on five diverse GNN architectures, three types of prediction tasks, and both transductive and inductive settings shows that TuneUp significantly improves the performance of the base GNN on tail nodes, while often even improving the performance on head nodes. Altogether, TuneUp produces up to 57.6% and 92.2% relative predictive performance improvement in the transductive and the challenging inductive settings, respectively. 尽管图神经网络（GNN）最近取得了进展，但它们的训练策略在很大程度上仍未得到充分探索。传统的训练策略平等地学习原始图中的所有节点，这可能不是最优的，因为某些节点通常比其他节点更难学习。在这里，我们提出了 TuneUp，一种基于课程的简单培训策略，用于提高 GNN 的预测性能。 TuneUp 分两个阶段训练 GNN。在第一阶段，TuneUp 应用常规训练来获得强大的基础 GNN。基础 GNN 在头节点（度数较大的节点）上往往表现良好，但在尾节点（度数较小的节点）上表现较差。因此，TuneUp 的第二阶段侧重于通过在综合生成的尾节点数据上进一步训练基础 GNN 来改进对困难尾节点的预测。我们从理论上分析了 TuneUp，并证明它可以提高尾部节点的泛化性能。 TuneUp 易于实现，适用于广泛的 GNN 架构和预测任务。对 TuneUp 对五种不同的 GNN 架构、三种类型的预测任务以及传导和归纳设置的广泛评估表明，TuneUp 显着提高了基础 GNN 在尾节点上的性能，同时甚至常常提高了头节点上的性能。总而言之，TuneUp 在传导和具有挑战性的感应设置中分别实现了高达 57.6% 和 92.2% 的相对预测性能改进。 本文提出TuneUp，一种基于课程学习的图神经网络（GNN）训练策略，旨在通过分阶段训练提升模型在尾节点（低度节点）上的预测性能。 Weihua Hu,Kaidi Cao,Kexin Huang,Edward W Huang,Karthik Subbian,Kenji Kawaguchi,Jure Leskovec stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sven Lilge,Timothy D. Barfoot,Jessica Burgner-Kahrs
title: Continuum Robot State Estimation Using Gaussian Process Regression on $SE(3)$
title_zh: 在 $SE(3)$ 上使用高斯过程回归进行连续体机器人状态估计
comment: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR). 26 pages, 18 figures
comments: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR). 26 pages, 18 figures
abstract: Continuum robots have the potential to enable new applications in medicine, inspection, and countless other areas due to their unique shape, compliance, and size. Excellent progess has been made in the mechanical design and dynamic modelling of continuum robots, to the point that there are some canonical designs, although new concepts continue to be explored. In this paper, we turn to the problem of state estimation for continuum robots that can been modelled with the common Cosserat rod model. Sensing for continuum robots might comprise external camera observations, embedded tracking coils or strain gauges. We repurpose a Gaussian process (GP) regression approach to state estimation, initially developed for continuous-time trajectory estimation in $SE(3)$. In our case, the continuous variable is not time but arclength and we show how to estimate the continuous shape (and strain) of the robot (along with associated uncertainties) given discrete, noisy measurements of both pose and strain along the length. We demonstrate our approach quantitatively through simulations as well as through experiments. Our evaluations show that accurate and continuous estimates of a continuum robot's shape can be achieved, resulting in average end-effector errors between the estimated and ground truth shape as low as 3.5mm and 0.016$^\circ$ in simulation or 3.3mm and 0.035$^\circ$ for unloaded configurations and 6.2mm and 0.041$^\circ$ for loaded ones during experiments, when using discrete pose measurements.

Excellent progess has been made in the mechanical design and dynamic modelling of continuum robots, to the point that there are some canonical designs, although new concepts continue to be explored. In this paper, we turn to the problem of state estimation for continuum robots that can been modelled with the common Cosserat rod model. Sensing for continuum robots might comprise external camera observations, embedded tracking coils or strain gauges. We repurpose a Gaussian process (GP) regression approach to state estimation, initially developed for continuous-time trajectory estimation in $SE(3)$. In our case, the continuous variable is not time but arclength and we show how to estimate the continuous shape (and strain) of the robot (along with associated uncertainties) given discrete, noisy measurements of both pose and strain along the length. We demonstrate our approach quantitatively through simulations as well as through experiments. Our evaluations show that accurate and continuous estimates of a continuum robot's shape can be achieved, resulting in average end-effector errors between the estimated and ground truth shape as low as 3.5mm and 0.016$^\circ$ in simulation or 3.3mm and 0.035$^\circ$ for unloaded configurations and 6.2mm and 0.041$^\circ$ for loaded ones during experiments, when using discrete pose measurements.
abstract_zh: 由于其独特的形状、合规性和尺寸，Continuum 机器人有潜力在医学、检查和无数其他领域实现新的应用。连续体机器人的机械设计和动态建模已经取得了出色的进展，尽管新概念仍在不断探索，但已经出现了一些规范设计。在本文中，我们转向连续体机器人的状态估计问题，该问题可以使用常见的 Cosserat 杆模型进行建模。连续体机器人的传感可能包括外部摄像机观察、嵌入式跟踪线圈或应变仪。我们重新利用高斯过程 (GP) 回归方法进行状态估计，该方法最初是为 $SE(3)$ 中的连续时间轨迹估计而开发的。在我们的例子中，连续变量不是时间而是弧长，我们展示了如何在给定沿长度方向的姿态和应变的离散、噪声测量的情况下估计机器人的连续形状（和应变）（以及相关的不确定性）。我们通过模拟和实验定量地展示了我们的方法。我们的评估表明，可以实现对连续体机器人形状的准确和连续估计，从而在使用离散姿态测量时，模拟中估计形状与地面真实形状之间的平均末端执行器误差低至 3.5mm 和 0.016$^\circ$，或者在实验期间，卸载配置为 3.3mm 和 0.035$^\circ$，加载配置为 6.2mm 和 0.041$^\circ$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程回归（GP）的方法，用于在SE(3)空间中对连续体机器人的状态（形状和应变）进行估计，通过弧长作为连续变量处理离散的位姿和应变测量数据。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人因其柔性和紧凑性在医疗和检测等领域有广泛应用，但其状态估计仍面临挑战，需处理外部传感器或嵌入式传感器的噪声测量数据以实现高精度建模。
AI.method: 将原本用于SE(3)连续时间轨迹估计的高斯过程回归方法改编为以弧长为连续变量，结合离散的位姿和应变测量数据，估计机器人连续形状及不确定性。
AI.result: 仿真和实验结果显示，该方法在无负载情况下平均末端误差低至3.5mm和0.016°（仿真）或3.3mm和0.035°（实验），负载情况下误差为6.2mm和0.041°，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了连续体机器人形状的高精度连续估计，为医疗等精密控制场景提供了可靠的技术支持，且对噪声和测量误差具有鲁棒性。

In our case, the continuous variable is not time but arclength and we show how to estimate the continuous shape (and strain) of the robot (along with associated uncertainties) given discrete, noisy measurements of both pose and strain along the length. We demonstrate our approach quantitatively through simulations as well as through experiments. Our evaluations show that accurate and continuous estimates of a continuum robot's shape can be achieved, resulting in average end-effector errors between the estimated and ground truth shape as low as 3.5mm and 0.016$^\circ$ in simulation or 3.3mm and 0.035$^\circ$ for unloaded configurations and 6.2mm and 0.041$^\circ$ for loaded ones during experiments, when using discrete pose measurements. 由于其独特的形状、合规性和尺寸，Continuum 机器人有潜力在医学、检查和无数其他领域实现新的应用。连续体机器人的机械设计和动态建模已经取得了出色的进展，尽管新概念仍在不断探索，但已经出现了一些规范设计。在本文中，我们转向连续体机器人的状态估计问题，该问题可以使用常见的 Cosserat 杆模型进行建模。连续体机器人的传感可能包括外部摄像机观察、嵌入式跟踪线圈或应变仪。我们重新利用高斯过程 (GP) 回归方法进行状态估计，该方法最初是为 $SE(3)$ 中的连续时间轨迹估计而开发的。在我们的例子中，连续变量不是时间而是弧长，我们展示了如何在给定沿长度方向的姿态和应变的离散、噪声测量的情况下估计机器人的连续形状（和应变）（以及相关的不确定性）。我们通过模拟和实验定量地展示了我们的方法。我们的评估表明，可以实现对连续体机器人形状的准确和连续估计，从而在使用离散姿态测量时，模拟中估计形状与地面真实形状之间的平均末端执行器误差低至 3.5mm 和 0.016$^\circ$，或者在实验期间，卸载配置为 3.3mm 和 0.035$^\circ$，加载配置为 6.2mm 和 0.041$^\circ$。 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程回归（GP）的方法，用于在SE(3)空间中对连续体机器人的状态（形状和应变）进行估计，通过弧长作为连续变量处理离散的位姿和应变测量数据。 Sven Lilge,Timothy D. Barfoot,Jessica Burgner-Kahrs cs.RO

authors_text: Lingzhi Li,Zhen Shen,Zhongshu Wang,Li Shen,Ping Tan
title: Streaming Radiance Fields for 3D Video Synthesis
title_zh: 用于 3D 视频合成的流式辐射场
abstract: We present an explicit-grid based method for efficiently reconstructing streaming radiance fields for novel view synthesis of real world dynamic scenes. Instead of training a single model that combines all the frames, we formulate the dynamic modeling problem with an incremental learning paradigm in which per-frame model difference is trained to complement the adaption of a base model on the current frame. By exploiting the simple yet effective tuning strategy with narrow bands, the proposed method realizes a feasible framework for handling video sequences on-the-fly with high training efficiency. The storage overhead induced by using explicit grid representations can be significantly reduced through the use of model difference based compression. We also introduce an efficient strategy to further accelerate model optimization for each frame. Experiments on challenging video sequences demonstrate that our approach is capable of achieving a training speed of 15 seconds per-frame with competitive rendering quality, which attains $1000 \times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art implicit methods. Code is available at https://github.com/AlgoHunt/StreamRF.
summary: We present an explicit-grid based method for efficiently reconstructing streaming radiance fields for novel view synthesis of real world dynamic scenes. Instead of training a single model that combines all the frames, we formulate the dynamic modeling problem with an incremental learning paradigm in which per-frame model difference is trained to complement the adaption of a base model on the current frame. By exploiting the simple yet effective tuning strategy with narrow bands, the proposed method realizes a feasible framework for handling video sequences on-the-fly with high training efficiency. The storage overhead induced by using explicit grid representations can be significantly reduced through the use of model difference based compression. We also introduce an efficient strategy to further accelerate model optimization for each frame. Experiments on challenging video sequences demonstrate that our approach is capable of achieving a training speed of 15 seconds per-frame with competitive rendering quality, which attains $1000 \times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art implicit methods. Code is available at https://github.com/AlgoHunt/StreamRF.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于显式网格的方法，用于有效地重建流辐射场，以实现现实世界动态场景的新颖视图合成。我们不是训练组合所有帧的单个模型，而是用增量学习范式来制定动态建模问题，其中训练每帧模型差异以补充基本模型对当前帧的适应。通过利用简单而有效的窄带调整策略，所提出的方法实现了一种可行的框架，用于以高训练效率即时处理视频序列。通过使用基于模型差异的压缩，可以显着减少使用显式网格表示引起的存储开销。我们还引入了一种有效的策略来进一步加速每一帧的模型优化。对具有挑战性的视频序列进行的实验表明，我们的方法能够以具有竞争力的渲染质量实现每帧 15 秒的训练速度，与最先进的隐式方法相比，速度提高了 1000 美元。代码可在 https://github.com/AlgoHunt/StreamRF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显式网格的方法，用于高效重建动态场景的流式辐射场，以实现真实世界动态场景的新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过训练单一模型处理所有帧效率低下，而本文旨在通过增量学习框架实现视频序列的实时处理，降低存储开销并提升训练效率。
AI.method: 采用增量学习范式，通过训练每帧模型差异来补充基模型的适应性，结合窄带调优策略和显式网格压缩技术，加速每帧模型优化。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的视频序列实验中，实现每帧15秒的训练速度，较现有隐式方法快1000倍，且渲染质量具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模型差异压缩和增量学习有效平衡了训练速度与渲染质量，为实时动态场景重建提供了可行框架。

authors_text: Yixuan Weng,Bin Li
title: Visual Answer Localization with Cross-modal Mutual Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 具有跨模式相互知识转移的视觉答案本地化
abstract: The goal of visual answering localization (VAL) in the video is to obtain a relevant and concise time clip from a video as the answer to the given natural language question. Early methods are based on the interaction modelling between video and text to predict the visual answer by the visual predictor. Later, using the textual predictor with subtitles for the VAL proves to be more precise. However, these existing methods still have cross-modal knowledge deviations from visual frames or textual subtitles. In this paper, we propose a cross-modal mutual knowledge transfer span localization (MutualSL) method to reduce the knowledge deviation. MutualSL has both visual predictor and textual predictor, where we expect the prediction results of these both to be consistent, so as to promote semantic knowledge understanding between cross-modalities. On this basis, we design a one-way dynamic loss function to dynamically adjust the proportion of knowledge transfer. We have conducted extensive experiments on three public datasets for evaluation. The experimental results show that our method outperforms other competitive state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, demonstrating its effectiveness.
summary: The goal of visual answering localization (VAL) in the video is to obtain a relevant and concise time clip from a video as the answer to the given natural language question. Early methods are based on the interaction modelling between video and text to predict the visual answer by the visual predictor. Later, using the textual predictor with subtitles for the VAL proves to be more precise. However, these existing methods still have cross-modal knowledge deviations from visual frames or textual subtitles. In this paper, we propose a cross-modal mutual knowledge transfer span localization (MutualSL) method to reduce the knowledge deviation. MutualSL has both visual predictor and textual predictor, where we expect the prediction results of these both to be consistent, so as to promote semantic knowledge understanding between cross-modalities. On this basis, we design a one-way dynamic loss function to dynamically adjust the proportion of knowledge transfer. We have conducted extensive experiments on three public datasets for evaluation. The experimental results show that our method outperforms other competitive state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, demonstrating its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 视频中视觉回答定位（VAL）的目标是从视频中获取相关且简洁的时间片段作为给定自然语言问题的答案。早期的方法基于视频和文本之间的交互建模，通过视觉预测器来预测视觉答案。后来，事实证明，使用带字幕的文本预测器进行 VAL 更为精确。然而，这些现有方法仍然存在与视觉框架或文本字幕的跨模态知识偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种跨模态相互知识转移跨度定位（MutualSL）方法来减少知识偏差。 MutualSL同时具有视觉预测器和文本预测器，我们期望两者的预测结果保持一致，以促进跨模态之间的语义知识理解。在此基础上，我们设计了一种单向动态损失函数来动态调整知识转移的比例。我们对三个公共数据集进行了广泛的实验以进行评估。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于其他竞争性的最先进（SOTA）方法，证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态互知识迁移方法MutualSL，用于视频中视觉答案定位（VAL）任务，通过减少视觉与文本模态间的知识偏差提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有VAL方法在视觉帧或字幕的跨模态知识理解中存在偏差，导致预测结果不一致，需通过模态间知识对齐提升语义理解准确性。
AI.method: 设计MutualSL框架，包含视觉预测器与文本预测器，通过强制预测结果一致性促进跨模态语义对齐，并引入动态单向损失函数调节知识迁移比例。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，MutualSL优于现有SOTA方法，验证了其减少跨模态偏差的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态互知识迁移机制能有效对齐视觉与文本语义，为VAL任务提供更精确的定位解决方案。

authors_text: Arman Goshtasbi,Ali Sadeghi
title: A Bioinspired Stiffness Tunable Sucker for Passive Adaptation and Firm Attachment to Angular Substrates
title_zh: 一种仿生刚度可调节吸盘，用于被动适应并牢固地附着在有角度的基材上
abstract: The ability to adapt and conform to angular and uneven surfaces improves the suction cup's performance in grasping and manipulation. However, in most cases, the adaptation costs lack of required stiffness for manipulation after surface attachment; thus, the ideal scenario is to have compliance during adaptation and stiffness after attachment to the surface. Nevertheless, most stiffness modulation techniques in suction cups require additional actuation. This article presents a new stiffness tunable suction cup that adapts to steep angular surfaces. Using granular jamming as a vacuum driven stiffness modulation provides a sensorless for activating the mechanism. Thus, the design is composed of a conventional active suction pad connected to a granular stalk, emulating a hinge behavior that is compliant during adaptation and has high stiffness after attachment is ensured. During the experiment, the suction cup can adapt to angles up to 85 degrees with force lower than 0.5 N. We also investigated the effect of granular stalk's length on the adaptation and how this design performs compared to passive adaptation without stiffness modulation.
summary: The ability to adapt and conform to angular and uneven surfaces improves the suction cup's performance in grasping and manipulation. However, in most cases, the adaptation costs lack of required stiffness for manipulation after surface attachment; thus, the ideal scenario is to have compliance during adaptation and stiffness after attachment to the surface. Nevertheless, most stiffness modulation techniques in suction cups require additional actuation. This article presents a new stiffness tunable suction cup that adapts to steep angular surfaces. Using granular jamming as a vacuum driven stiffness modulation provides a sensorless for activating the mechanism. Thus, the design is composed of a conventional active suction pad connected to a granular stalk, emulating a hinge behavior that is compliant during adaptation and has high stiffness after attachment is ensured. During the experiment, the suction cup can adapt to angles up to 85 degrees with force lower than 0.5 N. We also investigated the effect of granular stalk's length on the adaptation and how this design performs compared to passive adaptation without stiffness modulation.
abstract_zh: 适应和顺应有角度和不平坦表面的能力提高了吸盘在抓取和操纵方面的性能。然而，在大多数情况下，适应成本缺乏表面附着后操作所需的刚度；因此，理想的情况是在适应过程中具有柔顺性，在附着到表面后具有刚度。然而，吸盘中的大多数刚度调节技术都需要额外的驱动。本文介绍了一种新型刚度可调吸盘，可适应陡峭的角度表面。使用颗粒干扰作为真空驱动的刚度调制提供了用于激活该机构的无传感器。因此，该设计由连接到粒状茎的传统主动吸盘组成，模拟铰链行为，该铰链行为在适应过程中是顺应的，并且在确保连接后具有高刚度。在实验过程中，吸盘可以以低于 0.5 N 的力适应高达 85 度的角度。我们还研究了颗粒茎长度对适应的影响，以及与没有刚度调制的被动适应相比，该设计的表现如何。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仿生可调刚度的吸盘设计，用于在附着于角形表面时实现被动适应和牢固附着。
AI.motivation: 传统吸盘在适应复杂表面后缺乏必要的刚度以维持抓取稳定性，而现有刚度调节技术通常需要额外驱动。
AI.method: 采用颗粒阻尼技术结合真空驱动实现无传感器刚度调节，设计包含传统吸盘与颗粒状茎部结构，模拟铰链行为。
AI.result: 实验表明该吸盘可适应85度角形表面且适应力低于0.5N，并验证了颗粒茎部长度对适应性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过被动刚度调节机制，在保证表面适应性的同时实现了附着后的高刚度，提升了复杂表面抓取性能。

search_text: A Bioinspired Stiffness Tunable Sucker for Passive Adaptation and Firm Attachment to Angular Substrates 一种仿生刚度可调节吸盘，用于被动适应并牢固地附着在有角度的基材上 The ability to adapt and conform to angular and uneven surfaces improves the suction cup's performance in grasping and manipulation. However, in most cases, the adaptation costs lack of required stiffness for manipulation after surface attachment; thus, the ideal scenario is to have compliance during adaptation and stiffness after attachment to the surface. Nevertheless, most stiffness modulation techniques in suction cups require additional actuation. This article presents a new stiffness tunable suction cup that adapts to steep angular surfaces. Using granular jamming as a vacuum driven stiffness modulation provides a sensorless for activating the mechanism. Thus, the design is composed of a conventional active suction pad connected to a granular stalk, emulating a hinge behavior that is compliant during adaptation and has high stiffness after attachment is ensured. During the experiment, the suction cup can adapt to angles up to 85 degrees with force lower than 0.5 N. We also investigated the effect of granular stalk's length on the adaptation and how this design performs compared to passive adaptation without stiffness modulation. 适应和顺应有角度和不平坦表面的能力提高了吸盘在抓取和操纵方面的性能。然而，在大多数情况下，适应成本缺乏表面附着后操作所需的刚度；因此，理想的情况是在适应过程中具有柔顺性，在附着到表面后具有刚度。然而，吸盘中的大多数刚度调节技术都需要额外的驱动。本文介绍了一种新型刚度可调吸盘，可适应陡峭的角度表面。使用颗粒干扰作为真空驱动的刚度调制提供了用于激活该机构的无传感器。因此，该设计由连接到粒状茎的传统主动吸盘组成，模拟铰链行为，该铰链行为在适应过程中是顺应的，并且在确保连接后具有高刚度。在实验过程中，吸盘可以以低于 0.5 N 的力适应高达 85 度的角度。我们还研究了颗粒茎长度对适应的影响，以及与没有刚度调制的被动适应相比，该设计的表现如何。 本文提出了一种仿生可调刚度的吸盘设计，用于在附着于角形表面时实现被动适应和牢固附着。 Arman Goshtasbi,Ali Sadeghi cs.RO

authors_text: Pradyumna Reddy,Paul Guerrero,Niloy J. Mitra
title: Search for Concepts: Discovering Visual Concepts Using Direct Optimization
title_zh: 搜索概念：使用直接优化发现视觉概念
abstract: Finding an unsupervised decomposition of an image into individual objects is a key step to leverage compositionality and to perform symbolic reasoning. Traditionally, this problem is solved using amortized inference, which does not generalize beyond the scope of the training data, may sometimes miss correct decompositions, and requires large amounts of training data. We propose finding a decomposition using direct, unamortized optimization, via a combination of a gradient-based optimization for differentiable object properties and global search for non-differentiable properties. We show that using direct optimization is more generalizable, misses fewer correct decompositions, and typically requires less data than methods based on amortized inference. This highlights a weakness of the current prevalent practice of using amortized inference that can potentially be improved by integrating more direct optimization elements.
summary: Finding an unsupervised decomposition of an image into individual objects is a key step to leverage compositionality and to perform symbolic reasoning. Traditionally, this problem is solved using amortized inference, which does not generalize beyond the scope of the training data, may sometimes miss correct decompositions, and requires large amounts of training data. We propose finding a decomposition using direct, unamortized optimization, via a combination of a gradient-based optimization for differentiable object properties and global search for non-differentiable properties. We show that using direct optimization is more generalizable, misses fewer correct decompositions, and typically requires less data than methods based on amortized inference. This highlights a weakness of the current prevalent practice of using amortized inference that can potentially be improved by integrating more direct optimization elements.
abstract_zh: 找到将图像无监督地分解为单个对象是利用组合性和执行符号推理的关键步骤。传统上，这个问题是使用平摊推理来解决的，这种推理不会超出训练数据的范围，有时可能会错过正确的分解，并且需要大量的训练数据。我们建议通过结合可微对象属性的基于梯度的优化和不可微属性的全局搜索，使用直接的、未摊销的优化来找到分解。我们表明，与基于摊销推理的方法相比，使用直接优化更具通用性，错过的正确分解更少，并且通常需要更少的数据。这凸显了当前使用摊销推理的普遍做法的一个弱点，可以通过集成更直接的优化元素来改进这一弱点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于直接优化的方法，用于无监督图像分解以发现视觉概念。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖于amortized inference，存在泛化能力差、可能遗漏正确分解及需要大量训练数据的缺陷。
AI.method: 结合梯度优化（处理可微属性）与全局搜索（处理不可微属性）的直接优化框架，替代传统 amortized inference。
AI.result: 直接优化方法在泛化性、分解准确率及数据效率上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流的amortized inference存在局限性，引入直接优化元素可有效提升性能。

authors_text: Koustubh Phalak,Junde Li,Swaroop Ghosh
title: Approximate Quantum Random Access Memory Architectures
title_zh: 近似量子随机存取存储器架构
abstract: Quantum supremacy in many applications using well-known quantum algorithms rely on availability of data in quantum format. Quantum Random Access Memory (QRAM), an equivalent of classical Random Access Memory (RAM), fulfills this requirement. However, the existing QRAM proposals either require qutrit technology and/or incur access challenges. We propose an approximate Parametric Quantum Circuit (PQC) based QRAM which takes address lines as input and gives out the corresponding data in these address lines as the output. We present two applications of the proposed PQC-based QRAM namely, storage of binary data and storage of machine learning (ML) dataset for classification.
summary: Quantum supremacy in many applications using well-known quantum algorithms rely on availability of data in quantum format. Quantum Random Access Memory (QRAM), an equivalent of classical Random Access Memory (RAM), fulfills this requirement. However, the existing QRAM proposals either require qutrit technology and/or incur access challenges. We propose an approximate Parametric Quantum Circuit (PQC) based QRAM which takes address lines as input and gives out the corresponding data in these address lines as the output. We present two applications of the proposed PQC-based QRAM namely, storage of binary data and storage of machine learning (ML) dataset for classification.
abstract_zh: 在许多使用众所周知的量子算法的应用中，量子霸权依赖于量子格式数据的可用性。量子随机存取存储器（QRAM）相当于经典随机存取存储器（RAM），可以满足这一要求。然而，现有的 QRAM 提案要么需要 qutrit 技术，要么会带来访问挑战。 We propose an approximate Parametric Quantum Circuit (PQC) based QRAM which takes address lines as input and gives out the corresponding data in these address lines as the output. We present two applications of the proposed PQC-based QRAM namely, storage of binary data and storage of machine learning (ML) dataset for classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参数化量子电路（PQC）的近似量子随机存取存储器（QRAM）架构，用于解决现有QRAM技术的局限性，并展示了其在二进制数据存储和机器学习数据集分类中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有QRAM方案依赖qutrit技术或存在访问效率问题，难以满足量子计算应用中对量子数据存储的高效需求。
AI.method: 设计了一种参数化量子电路（PQC）架构，通过地址线输入直接输出对应数据，无需qutrit技术，简化了量子存储访问过程。
AI.result: 实现了两种应用场景：二进制数据存储及机器学习数据集的量子化存储，验证了该QRAM架构在分类任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该近似QRAM架构克服了传统方案的限制，在无需qutrit的情况下提供了高效的量子数据访问方法，为量子计算应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mozes van de Kar,Mengzhou Xia,Danqi Chen,Mikel Artetxe
title: Don't Prompt, Search! Mining-based Zero-Shot Learning with Language Models
title_zh: 不要提示，搜索！基于挖掘的语言模型零样本学习
abstract: Masked language models like BERT can perform text classification in a zero-shot fashion by reformulating downstream tasks as text infilling. However, this approach is highly sensitive to the template used to prompt the model, yet practitioners are blind when designing them in strict zero-shot settings. In this paper, we propose an alternative mining-based approach for zero-shot learning. Instead of prompting language models, we use regular expressions to mine labeled examples from unlabeled corpora, which can optionally be filtered through prompting, and used to finetune a pretrained model. Our method is more flexible and interpretable than prompting, and outperforms it on a wide range of tasks when using comparable templates. Our results suggest that the success of prompting can partly be explained by the model being exposed to similar examples during pretraining, which can be directly retrieved through regular expressions.
summary: Masked language models like BERT can perform text classification in a zero-shot fashion by reformulating downstream tasks as text infilling. However, this approach is highly sensitive to the template used to prompt the model, yet practitioners are blind when designing them in strict zero-shot settings. In this paper, we propose an alternative mining-based approach for zero-shot learning. Instead of prompting language models, we use regular expressions to mine labeled examples from unlabeled corpora, which can optionally be filtered through prompting, and used to finetune a pretrained model. Our method is more flexible and interpretable than prompting, and outperforms it on a wide range of tasks when using comparable templates. Our results suggest that the success of prompting can partly be explained by the model being exposed to similar examples during pretraining, which can be directly retrieved through regular expressions.

search_text: Don't Prompt, Search! Mining-based Zero-Shot Learning with Language Models 不要提示，搜索！基于挖掘的语言模型零样本学习 Masked language models like BERT can perform text classification in a zero-shot fashion by reformulating downstream tasks as text infilling. However, this approach is highly sensitive to the template used to prompt the model, yet practitioners are blind when designing them in strict zero-shot settings. In this paper, we propose an alternative mining-based approach for zero-shot learning. Instead of prompting language models, we use regular expressions to mine labeled examples from unlabeled corpora, which can optionally be filtered through prompting, and used to finetune a pretrained model. Our method is more flexible and interpretable than prompting, and outperforms it on a wide range of tasks when using comparable templates. Our results suggest that the success of prompting can partly be explained by the model being exposed to similar examples during pretraining, which can be directly retrieved through regular expressions. Masked language models like BERT can perform text classification in a zero-shot fashion by reformulating downstream tasks as text infilling.然而，这种方法对用于提示模型的模板高度敏感，而实践者在严格的零样本设置下设计时却是盲目的。 In this paper, we propose an alternative mining-based approach for zero-shot learning.我们不使用提示语言模型，而是使用正则表达式从未标记的语料库中挖掘标记的示例，可以选择通过提示进行过滤，并用于微调预训练的模型。 Our method is more flexible and interpretable than prompting, and outperforms it on a wide range of tasks when using comparable templates.我们的结果表明，提示的成功可以部分解释为模型在预训练期间接触到类似的示例，这些示例可以通过正则表达式直接检索。 提出一种基于正则表达式挖掘的零样本学习方法，替代传统提示方法进行文本分类。 Mozes van de Kar,Mengzhou Xia,Danqi Chen,Mikel Artetxe cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Trisha Mittal,Zakaria Aldeneh,Masha Fedzechkina,Anurag Ranjan,Barry-John Theobald
title: Naturalistic Head Motion Generation from Speech
title_zh: 从语音生成自然头部运动
abstract: Synthesizing natural head motion to accompany speech for an embodied conversational agent is necessary for providing a rich interactive experience. Most prior works assess the quality of generated head motion by comparing them against a single ground-truth using an objective metric. Yet there are many plausible head motion sequences to accompany a speech utterance. In this work, we study the variation in the perceptual quality of head motions sampled from a generative model. We show that, despite providing more diverse head motions, the generative model produces motions with varying degrees of perceptual quality. We finally show that objective metrics commonly used in previous research do not accurately reflect the perceptual quality of generated head motions. These results open an interesting avenue for future work to investigate better objective metrics that correlate with human perception of quality.
summary: Synthesizing natural head motion to accompany speech for an embodied conversational agent is necessary for providing a rich interactive experience. Most prior works assess the quality of generated head motion by comparing them against a single ground-truth using an objective metric. Yet there are many plausible head motion sequences to accompany a speech utterance. In this work, we study the variation in the perceptual quality of head motions sampled from a generative model. We show that, despite providing more diverse head motions, the generative model produces motions with varying degrees of perceptual quality. We finally show that objective metrics commonly used in previous research do not accurately reflect the perceptual quality of generated head motions. These results open an interesting avenue for future work to investigate better objective metrics that correlate with human perception of quality.
abstract_zh: 为具体的对话代理合成自然的头部运动来伴随语音对于提供丰富的交互体验是必要的。大多数先前的工作都是通过使用客观指标将生成的头部运动与单个真实情况进行比较来评估生成的头部运动的质量。然而，有许多可能的头部运动序列伴随着言语的表达。在这项工作中，我们研究了从生成模型中采样的头部运动的感知质量的变化。我们表明，尽管提供了更多样化的头部运动，但生成模型产生的运动具有不同程度的感知质量。我们最终表明，先前研究中常用的客观指标并不能准确反映生成的头部运动的感知质量。这些结果为未来的工作开辟了一条有趣的途径，以研究与人类质量感知相关的更好的客观指标。

AI.tldr: 从语音生成自然的头部运动以增强具身对话代理的交互体验
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖单一客观指标评估头部运动质量，但实际存在多种合理序列，需更符合人类感知的评估方法
AI.method: 通过分析生成模型采样的头部运动的感知质量变化，并验证传统客观指标的有效性
AI.result: 生成模型产生多样化但感知质量参差的头部运动，传统客观指标无法准确反映其感知质量
AI.conclusion: 需开发更符合人类感知质量的客观评估指标，以改进生成模型的评估方法

ai_content.conclusion: 需开发更符合人类感知质量的客观评估指标，以改进生成模型的评估方法

authors_text: Botond Fazekas,Dmitrii Lachinov,Guilherme Aresta,Julia Mai,Ursula Schmidt-Erfurth,Hrvoje Bogunovic
title: Segmentation of Bruch's Membrane in retinal OCT with AMD using anatomical priors and uncertainty quantification
title_zh: 使用解剖先验和不确定性量化在 AMD 视网膜 OCT 中分割布鲁赫膜
abstract: Bruch's membrane (BM) segmentation on optical coherence tomography (OCT) is a pivotal step for the diagnosis and follow-up of age-related macular degeneration (AMD), one of the leading causes of blindness in the developed world. Automated BM segmentation methods exist, but they usually do not account for the anatomical coherence of the results, neither provide feedback on the confidence of the prediction. These factors limit the applicability of these systems in real-world scenarios. With this in mind, we propose an end-to-end deep learning method for automated BM segmentation in AMD patients. An Attention U-Net is trained to output a probability density function of the BM position, while taking into account the natural curvature of the surface. Besides the surface position, the method also estimates an A-scan wise uncertainty measure of the segmentation output. Subsequently, the A-scans with high uncertainty are interpolated using thin plate splines (TPS). We tested our method with ablation studies on an internal dataset with 138 patients covering all three AMD stages, and achieved a mean absolute localization error of 4.10 um. In addition, the proposed segmentation method was compared against the state-of-the-art methods and showed a superior performance on an external publicly available dataset from a different patient cohort and OCT device, demonstrating strong generalization ability.
summary: Bruch's membrane (BM) segmentation on optical coherence tomography (OCT) is a pivotal step for the diagnosis and follow-up of age-related macular degeneration (AMD), one of the leading causes of blindness in the developed world. Automated BM segmentation methods exist, but they usually do not account for the anatomical coherence of the results, neither provide feedback on the confidence of the prediction. These factors limit the applicability of these systems in real-world scenarios. With this in mind, we propose an end-to-end deep learning method for automated BM segmentation in AMD patients. An Attention U-Net is trained to output a probability density function of the BM position, while taking into account the natural curvature of the surface. Besides the surface position, the method also estimates an A-scan wise uncertainty measure of the segmentation output. Subsequently, the A-scans with high uncertainty are interpolated using thin plate splines (TPS). We tested our method with ablation studies on an internal dataset with 138 patients covering all three AMD stages, and achieved a mean absolute localization error of 4.10 um. In addition, the proposed segmentation method was compared against the state-of-the-art methods and showed a superior performance on an external publicly available dataset from a different patient cohort and OCT device, demonstrating strong generalization ability.
abstract_zh: Bruch 在光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 上的膜 (BM) 分割是年龄相关性黄斑变性 (AMD) 诊断和随访的关键步骤，AMD 是发达国家失明的主要原因之一。存在自动 BM 分割方法，但它们通常不考虑结果的解剖一致性，也不提供有关预测置信度的反馈。这些因素限制了这些系统在现实场景中的适用性。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一种用于 AMD 患者的自动化 BM 分割的端到端深度学习方法。训练 Attention U-Net 来输出 BM 位置的概率密度函数，同时考虑表面的自然曲率。除了表面位置之外，该方法还估计分割输出的 A 扫描不确定性测量。随后，使用薄板样条 (TPS) 对具有高不确定性的 A 扫描进行插值。我们通过消融研究对涵盖所有三个 AMD 阶段的 138 名患者进行的内部数据集测试了我们的方法，并实现了 4.10 um 的平均绝对定位误差。此外，将所提出的分割方法与最先进的方法进行了比较，并在来自不同患者队列和 OCT 设备的外部公开数据集上显示出优越的性能，表现出强大的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合解剖学先验知识和不确定性量化的深度学习方法，用于自动分割AMD患者的视网膜OCT图像中的Bruch膜。
AI.motivation: 现有自动分割方法未考虑解剖结构的连贯性，且无法提供分割结果的置信度反馈，限制了其在真实场景中的应用。
AI.method: 基于Attention U-Net网络输出Bruch膜位置的概率密度函数，并结合表面曲率特性；通过薄板样条插值处理高不确定性的A扫描数据。
AI.result: 在138例患者数据集上实现4.10微米的平均定位误差，且在外部公开数据集上优于现有方法，表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合解剖先验与不确定性量化，显著提升了分割精度与临床实用性，为AMD诊断提供了可靠工具。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过融合解剖先验与不确定性量化，显著提升了分割精度与临床实用性，为AMD诊断提供了可靠工具。

In addition, the proposed segmentation method was compared against the state-of-the-art methods and showed a superior performance on an external publicly available dataset from a different patient cohort and OCT device, demonstrating strong generalization ability. authors_text: Zihao Wu,Huy Tran,Hamed Pirsiavash,Soheil Kolouri
title: Is Multi-Task Learning an Upper Bound for Continual Learning?
title_zh: 多任务学习是持续学习的上限吗？
abstract: Continual and multi-task learning are common machine learning approaches to learning from multiple tasks. The existing works in the literature often assume multi-task learning as a sensible performance upper bound for various continual learning algorithms. While this assumption is empirically verified for different continual learning benchmarks, it is not rigorously justified. Moreover, it is imaginable that when learning from multiple tasks, a small subset of these tasks could behave as adversarial tasks reducing the overall learning performance in a multi-task setting. In contrast, continual learning approaches can avoid the performance drop caused by such adversarial tasks to preserve their performance on the rest of the tasks, leading to better performance than a multi-task learner. This paper proposes a novel continual self-supervised learning setting, where each task corresponds to learning an invariant representation for a specific class of data augmentations. In this setting, we show that continual learning often beats multi-task learning on various benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100.

The existing works in the literature often assume multi-task learning as a sensible performance upper bound for various continual learning algorithms. Moreover, it is imaginable that when learning from multiple tasks, a small subset of these tasks could behave as adversarial tasks reducing the overall learning performance in a multi-task setting. In contrast, continual learning approaches can avoid the performance drop caused by such adversarial tasks to preserve their performance on the rest of the tasks, leading to better performance than a multi-task learner. This paper proposes a novel continual self-supervised learning setting, where each task corresponds to learning an invariant representation for a specific class of data augmentations. In this setting, we show that continual learning often beats multi-task learning on various benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100.
abstract_zh: 持续学习和多任务学习是从多个任务中学习的常见机器学习方法。 The existing works in the literature often assume multi-task learning as a sensible performance upper bound for various continual learning algorithms.虽然这一假设在不同的持续学习基准上得到了实证验证，但它并没有得到严格的证明。 Moreover, it is imaginable that when learning from multiple tasks, a small subset of these tasks could behave as adversarial tasks reducing the overall learning performance in a multi-task setting. In contrast, continual learning approaches can avoid the performance drop caused by such adversarial tasks to preserve their performance on the rest of the tasks, leading to better performance than a multi-task learner. This paper proposes a novel continual self-supervised learning setting, where each task corresponds to learning an invariant representation for a specific class of data augmentations. In this setting, we show that continual learning often beats multi-task learning on various benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100.

AI.tldr: 探讨持续学习是否在性能上超越多任务学习，并提出新的持续自监督学习框架进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设多任务学习是持续学习的性能上限，但缺乏理论支持且对抗性任务可能损害多任务性能，而持续学习能有效避免此问题。
AI.method: 提出持续自监督学习设置，每个任务对应学习特定数据增强的不变表示，并在多个基准数据集进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明持续学习在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100等数据集上表现优于多任务学习。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习不一定是多任务学习的下界，其性能可能更优，挑战了传统假设。

authors_text: Sizhen Bian,Vitor Fortes Rey,Siyu Yuan,Paul Lukowicz
title: The Contribution of Human Body Capacitance/Body-Area Electric Field To Individual and Collaborative Activity Recognition
title_zh: 人体电容/身体区域电场对个体和协作活动识别的贡献
abstract: The current dominated wearable body motion sensor is IMU. This work presented an alternative wearable motion-sensing approach: human body capacitance (HBC, also commonly defined as body-area electric field). While being less robust in tracking the posture and trajectory, HBC has two properties that make it an attractive. First, the deployment of the sensing node on the being tracked body part is not a requirement for HBC sensing approach. Second, HBC is sensitive to the body's interaction with its surroundings, including both touching and being in the immediate proximity of people and objects. We first described the sensing principle for HBC, sensor architecture and implementation, and methods for evaluation. We then presented two case studies demonstrating the usefulness of HBC as a complement/alternative to IMUs. First, we explored the exercise recognition and repetition counting of seven machine-free leg-only exercises and eleven general gym workouts with the signal source of HBC and IMU. The HBC sensing shows significant advantages over the IMU signals in classification(0.89 vs 0.78 in F-score) and counting(0.982 vs 0.938 in accuracy) of the leg-only exercises. For the general gym workouts, HBC only shows recognition improvement for certain workouts like adductor where legs alone complete the movement. And it also supplies better results over the IMU for workouts counting(0.800 vs. 0.756 when wearing the sensors on the wrist). In the second case, we tried to recognize actions related to manipulating objects and physical collaboration between users by using a wrist-worn HBC sensing unit. We detected collaboration between the users with 0.69 F-score when receiving data from a single user and 0.78 when receiving data from both users. The capacitive sensor can improve the recognition of collaborative activities with an F-score over a single wrist accelerometer approach by 16\%.

Second, HBC is sensitive to the body's interaction with its surroundings, including both touching and being in the immediate proximity of people and objects. We first described the sensing principle for HBC, sensor architecture and implementation, and methods for evaluation. We then presented two case studies demonstrating the usefulness of HBC as a complement/alternative to IMUs. First, we explored the exercise recognition and repetition counting of seven machine-free leg-only exercises and eleven general gym workouts with the signal source of HBC and IMU. The HBC sensing shows significant advantages over the IMU signals in classification(0.89 vs 0.78 in F-score) and counting(0.982 vs 0.938 in accuracy) of the leg-only exercises. For the general gym workouts, HBC only shows recognition improvement for certain workouts like adductor where legs alone complete the movement. And it also supplies better results over the IMU for workouts counting(0.800 vs. 0.756 when wearing the sensors on the wrist). In the second case, we tried to recognize actions related to manipulating objects and physical collaboration between users by using a wrist-worn HBC sensing unit. abstract_zh: 目前占主导地位的可穿戴式身体运动传感器是IMU。这项工作提出了另一种可穿戴运动传感方法：人体电容（HBC，通常也定义为身体区域电场）。虽然 HBC 在跟踪姿势和轨迹方面不太稳健，但它有两个特性使其具有吸引力。首先，HBC 传感方法不需要将传感节点部署在被跟踪的身体部位。其次，HBC 对身体与周围环境的相互作用很敏感，包括触摸和接近人和物体。我们首先描述了 HBC 的传感原理、传感器架构和实现以及评估方法。然后，我们提出了两个案例研究，证明 HBC 作为 IMU 的补充/替代品的有用性。首先，我们利用 HBC 和 IMU 信号源探索了 7 种无机器腿部练习和 11 种普通健身房锻炼的运动识别和重复计数。 HBC 传感在仅腿部练习的分类（F 分数为 0.89 比 0.78）和计数（准确度为 0.982 比 0.938）方面显示出比 IMU 信号显着的优势。对于一般的健身房锻炼，HBC 仅显示某些锻炼的识别能力提高，例如仅由腿部完成运动的内收肌。在锻炼计数方面，它还比 IMU 提供更好的结果（将传感器佩戴在手腕上时为 0.800 与 0.756）。在第二种情况下，我们尝试使用腕戴式 HBC 传感单元来识别与操作对象和用户之间的物理协作相关的动作。我们检测到用户之间的协作，当从单个用户接收数据时，F 分数为 0.69；当从两个用户接收数据时，F 分数为 0.78。电容式传感器可以将协作活动的识别率提高 16%，其 F 分数比单手腕加速度计方法高出 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人体电容（HBC）的新型可穿戴运动感知方法，用于个体和协作活动识别，并与传统惯性测量单元（IMU）进行对比验证。
AI.motivation: 传统IMU传感器在姿势和轨迹跟踪上存在局限性，而HBC无需直接部署在被跟踪部位，且能感知人体与周围环境的交互，具有潜在优势。
AI.method: 通过描述HBC的传感原理、传感器架构及评估方法，设计了两个案例研究：1）对比HBC与IMU在腿部运动和健身房训练中的识别效果；2）利用腕戴HBC传感器识别物体操作和协作行为。
AI.result: HBC在腿部运动分类（F-score 0.89 vs 0.78）和计数（准确率0.982 vs 0.938）上优于IMU；协作活动检测F-score达0.78（双用户数据），比单用户加速度计提升16%。
AI.conclusion: HBC可作为IMU的补充或替代方案，尤其适用于传感器部署受限及需感知环境交互的场景，如协作活动识别。

authors_text: Hanxue Liang,Zhiwen Fan,Rishov Sarkar,Ziyu Jiang,Tianlong Chen,Kai Zou,Yu Cheng,Cong Hao,Zhangyang Wang
title: M$^3$ViT: Mixture-of-Experts Vision Transformer for Efficient Multi-task Learning with Model-Accelerator Co-design
title_zh: M$^3$ViT：专家混合视觉转换器，通过模型加速器协同设计实现高效多任务学习
abstract: Multi-task learning (MTL) encapsulates multiple learned tasks in a single model and often lets those tasks learn better jointly. However, when deploying MTL onto those real-world systems that are often resource-constrained or latency-sensitive, two prominent challenges arise: (i) during training, simultaneously optimizing all tasks is often difficult due to gradient conflicts across tasks; (ii) at inference, current MTL regimes have to activate nearly the entire model even to just execute a single task. Yet most real systems demand only one or two tasks at each moment, and switch between tasks as needed: therefore such all tasks activated inference is also highly inefficient and non-scalable. In this paper, we present a model-accelerator co-design framework to enable efficient on-device MTL. Our framework, dubbed M$^3$ViT, customizes mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers into a vision transformer (ViT) backbone for MTL, and sparsely activates task-specific experts during training. Then at inference with any task of interest, the same design allows for activating only the task-corresponding sparse expert pathway, instead of the full model. Our new model design is further enhanced by hardware-level innovations, in particular, a novel computation reordering scheme tailored for memory-constrained MTL that achieves zero-overhead switching between tasks and can scale to any number of experts. When executing single-task inference, M$^{3}$ViT achieves higher accuracies than encoder-focused MTL methods, while significantly reducing 88% inference FLOPs. When implemented on a hardware platform of one Xilinx ZCU104 FPGA, our co-design framework reduces the memory requirement by 2.4 times, while achieving energy efficiency up to 9.23 times higher than a comparable FPGA baseline. Code is available at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/M3ViT.
summary: Multi-task learning (MTL) encapsulates multiple learned tasks in a single model and often lets those tasks learn better jointly. However, when deploying MTL onto those real-world systems that are often resource-constrained or latency-sensitive, two prominent challenges arise: (i) during training, simultaneously optimizing all tasks is often difficult due to gradient conflicts across tasks; (ii) at inference, current MTL regimes have to activate nearly the entire model even to just execute a single task. Yet most real systems demand only one or two tasks at each moment, and switch between tasks as needed: therefore such all tasks activated inference is also highly inefficient and non-scalable. In this paper, we present a model-accelerator co-design framework to enable efficient on-device MTL. Our framework, dubbed M$^3$ViT, customizes mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers into a vision transformer (ViT) backbone for MTL, and sparsely activates task-specific experts during training. Then at inference with any task of interest, the same design allows for activating only the task-corresponding sparse expert pathway, instead of the full model. Our new model design is further enhanced by hardware-level innovations, in particular, a novel computation reordering scheme tailored for memory-constrained MTL that achieves zero-overhead switching between tasks and can scale to any number of experts. When executing single-task inference, M$^{3}$ViT achieves higher accuracies than encoder-focused MTL methods, while significantly reducing 88% inference FLOPs. When implemented on a hardware platform of one Xilinx ZCU104 FPGA, our co-design framework reduces the memory requirement by 2.4 times, while achieving energy efficiency up to 9.23 times higher than a comparable FPGA baseline. Code is available at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/M3ViT.
abstract_zh: Multi-task learning (MTL) encapsulates multiple learned tasks in a single model and often lets those tasks learn better jointly.然而，当将 MTL 部署到那些通常资源受限或延迟敏感的现实系统上时，会出现两个突出的挑战：（i）在训练过程中，由于任务之间的梯度冲突，同时优化所有任务通常很困难； (ii) at inference, current MTL regimes have to activate nearly the entire model even to just execute a single task.然而，大多数真实的系统在每个时刻只需要一两个任务，并根据需要在任务之间切换：因此这种所有任务激活的推理也是非常低效且不可扩展的。 In this paper, we present a model-accelerator co-design framework to enable efficient on-device MTL.我们的框架被称为 M$^3$ViT，将专家混合 (MoE) 层定制为 MTL 的视觉变换器 (ViT) 主干，并在训练期间稀疏地激活特定于任务的专家。然后，在推理任何感兴趣的任务时，相同的设计允许仅激活任务对应的稀疏专家路径，而不是完整的模型。我们的新模型设计通过硬件级创新得到进一步增强，特别是针对内存受限 MTL 量身定制的新颖计算重新排序方案，可实现任务之间的零开销切换，并可扩展到任意数量的专家。在执行单任务推理时，M$^{3}$ViT 比以编码器为中心的 MTL 方法实现了更高的精度，同时显着降低了 88% 的推理 FLOP。当在 Xilinx ZCU104 FPGA 的硬件平台上实施时，我们的协同设计框架将内存需求降低了 2.4 倍，同时能效比同类 FPGA 基准高出 9.23 倍。 Code is available at: https://github.com/VITA-Group/M3ViT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M$^3$ViT框架，通过模型与加速器协同设计，实现高效的多任务视觉Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习在训练时面临梯度冲突，推理时需激活完整模型导致效率低下，难以满足实际系统对资源和延迟的要求。
AI.method: 将专家混合（MoE）机制集成到视觉Transformer（ViT）中，训练时稀疏激活任务专家，推理时仅激活对应任务路径，并结合硬件计算重排方案优化内存与能效。
AI.result: 单任务推理精度优于编码器多任务方法，减少88%计算量；在FPGA上内存需求降低2.4倍，能效提升9.23倍。
AI.conclusion: 模型-硬件协同设计有效解决了多任务学习的效率瓶颈，为边缘设备部署提供了高精度、低资源消耗的解决方案。

authors_text: Simar Kareer,Naoki Yokoyama,Dhruv Batra,Sehoon Ha,Joanne Truong
title: ViNL: Visual Navigation and Locomotion Over Obstacles
title_zh: ViNL：视觉导航和越过障碍物的运动
abstract: We present Visual Navigation and Locomotion over obstacles (ViNL), which enables a quadrupedal robot to navigate unseen apartments while stepping over small obstacles that lie in its path (e.g., shoes, toys, cables), similar to how humans and pets lift their feet over objects as they walk. ViNL consists of: (1) a visual navigation policy that outputs linear and angular velocity commands that guides the robot to a goal coordinate in unfamiliar indoor environments; and (2) a visual locomotion policy that controls the robot's joints to avoid stepping on obstacles while following provided velocity commands. Both the policies are entirely "model-free", i.e. sensors-to-actions neural networks trained end-to-end. The two are trained independently in two entirely different simulators and then seamlessly co-deployed by feeding the velocity commands from the navigator to the locomotor, entirely "zero-shot" (without any co-training). While prior works have developed learning methods for visual navigation or visual locomotion, to the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully learned approach that leverages vision to accomplish both (1) intelligent navigation in new environments, and (2) intelligent visual locomotion that aims to traverse cluttered environments without disrupting obstacles. On the task of navigation to distant goals in unknown environments, ViNL using just egocentric vision significantly outperforms prior work on robust locomotion using privileged terrain maps (+32.8% success and -4.42 collisions per meter). Additionally, we ablate our locomotion policy to show that each aspect of our approach helps reduce obstacle collisions. Videos and code at http://www.joannetruong.com/projects/vinl.html
summary: We present Visual Navigation and Locomotion over obstacles (ViNL), which enables a quadrupedal robot to navigate unseen apartments while stepping over small obstacles that lie in its path (e.g., shoes, toys, cables), similar to how humans and pets lift their feet over objects as they walk. ViNL consists of: (1) a visual navigation policy that outputs linear and angular velocity commands that guides the robot to a goal coordinate in unfamiliar indoor environments; and (2) a visual locomotion policy that controls the robot's joints to avoid stepping on obstacles while following provided velocity commands. Both the policies are entirely "model-free", i.e. sensors-to-actions neural networks trained end-to-end. The two are trained independently in two entirely different simulators and then seamlessly co-deployed by feeding the velocity commands from the navigator to the locomotor, entirely "zero-shot" (without any co-training). While prior works have developed learning methods for visual navigation or visual locomotion, to the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully learned approach that leverages vision to accomplish both (1) intelligent navigation in new environments, and (2) intelligent visual locomotion that aims to traverse cluttered environments without disrupting obstacles. On the task of navigation to distant goals in unknown environments, ViNL using just egocentric vision significantly outperforms prior work on robust locomotion using privileged terrain maps (+32.8% success and -4.42 collisions per meter). Additionally, we ablate our locomotion policy to show that each aspect of our approach helps reduce obstacle collisions. Videos and code at http://www.joannetruong.com/projects/vinl.html
abstract_zh: 我们展示了越过障碍物的视觉导航和运动（ViNL），它使四足机器人能够在看不见的公寓中导航，同时跨过其路径上的小障碍物（例如鞋子、玩具、电缆），类似于人类和宠物在行走时将脚抬过物体的方式。 ViNL 包括：（1）视觉导航策略，输出线速度和角速度命令，引导机器人在不熟悉的室内环境中到达目标坐标； （2）视觉运动策略，控制机器人的关节，以避免在遵循提供的速度命令时踩到障碍物。这两种策略都是完全“无模型”的，即端到端训练的传感器到动作神经网络。两者在两个完全不同的模拟器中独立训练，然后通过将速度命令从导航器馈送到运动机来无缝地共同部署，完全“零射击”（没有任何协同训练）。虽然之前的工作已经开发了视觉导航或视觉运动的学习方法，但据我们所知，这是第一个完全学习的方法，利用视觉来实现（1）新环境中的智能导航，以及（2）智能视觉运动，旨在穿越杂乱的环境而不破坏障碍物。在未知环境中导航到遥远目标的任务中，仅使用自我中心视觉的 ViNL 显着优于先前使用特权地形图进行稳健运动的工作（+32.8% 成功率和每米 -4.42 次碰撞）。此外，我们取消了我们的运动策略，以表明我们方法的每个方面都有助于减少障碍物碰撞。视频和代码位于 http://www.joannetruong.com/projects/vinl.html

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViNL系统，使四足机器人能够通过视觉在陌生室内环境中导航并跨越障碍物。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别解决了视觉导航或避障问题，但缺乏结合视觉同时实现智能导航与避障的端到端方法。
AI.method: 设计两个模型自由的神经网络策略：1) 视觉导航策略生成速度指令引导机器人到达目标；2) 视觉运动策略控制关节避障。两者分别在不同模拟器中独立训练后零样本协同部署。
AI.result: 在未知环境导航任务中，ViNL相比使用地形图的方法成功率提升32.8%，碰撞率降低4.42次/米，消融实验验证各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: ViNL是首个通过视觉同时实现新环境导航与复杂地形避障的端到端学习方法，为机器人自主移动提供新范式。

tldr: 本文提出ViNL系统，使四足机器人能够通过视觉在陌生室内环境中导航并跨越障碍物。
motivation: 现有研究分别解决了视觉导航或避障问题，但缺乏结合视觉同时实现智能导航与避障的端到端方法。
method: 设计两个模型自由的神经网络策略：1) 视觉导航策略生成速度指令引导机器人到达目标；2) 视觉运动策略控制关节避障。两者分别在不同模拟器中独立训练后零样本协同部署。
result: 在未知环境导航任务中，ViNL相比使用地形图的方法成功率提升32.8%，碰撞率降低4.42次/米，消融实验验证各模块有效性。
conclusion: ViNL是首个通过视觉同时实现新环境导航与复杂地形避障的端到端学习方法，为机器人自主移动提供新范式。
search_text: ViNL: Visual Navigation and Locomotion Over Obstacles ViNL：视觉导航和越过障碍物的运动 We present Visual Navigation and Locomotion over obstacles (ViNL), which enables a quadrupedal robot to navigate unseen apartments while stepping over small obstacles that lie in its path (e.g., shoes, toys, cables), similar to how humans and pets lift their feet over objects as they walk. ViNL consists of: (1) a visual navigation policy that outputs linear and angular velocity commands that guides the robot to a goal coordinate in unfamiliar indoor environments; and (2) a visual locomotion policy that controls the robot's joints to avoid stepping on obstacles while following provided velocity commands. Both the policies are entirely "model-free", i.e. sensors-to-actions neural networks trained end-to-end. The two are trained independently in two entirely different simulators and then seamlessly co-deployed by feeding the velocity commands from the navigator to the locomotor, entirely "zero-shot" (without any co-training). While prior works have developed learning methods for visual navigation or visual locomotion, to the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully learned approach that leverages vision to accomplish both (1) intelligent navigation in new environments, and (2) intelligent visual locomotion that aims to traverse cluttered environments without disrupting obstacles. On the task of navigation to distant goals in unknown environments, ViNL using just egocentric vision significantly outperforms prior work on robust locomotion using privileged terrain maps (+32.8% success and -4.42 collisions per meter). Additionally, we ablate our locomotion policy to show that each aspect of our approach helps reduce obstacle collisions. Videos and code at http://www.joannetruong.com/projects/vinl.html 我们展示了越过障碍物的视觉导航和运动（ViNL），它使四足机器人能够在看不见的公寓中导航，同时跨过其路径上的小障碍物（例如鞋子、玩具、电缆），类似于人类和宠物在行走时将脚抬过物体的方式。 ViNL 包括：（1）视觉导航策略，输出线速度和角速度命令，引导机器人在不熟悉的室内环境中到达目标坐标； （2）视觉运动策略，控制机器人的关节，以避免在遵循提供的速度命令时踩到障碍物。这两种策略都是完全“无模型”的，即端到端训练的传感器到动作神经网络。两者在两个完全不同的模拟器中独立训练，然后通过将速度命令从导航器馈送到运动机来无缝地共同部署，完全“零射击”（没有任何协同训练）。虽然之前的工作已经开发了视觉导航或视觉运动的学习方法，但据我们所知，这是第一个完全学习的方法，利用视觉来实现（1）新环境中的智能导航，以及（2）智能视觉运动，旨在穿越杂乱的环境而不破坏障碍物。在未知环境中导航到遥远目标的任务中，仅使用自我中心视觉的 ViNL 显着优于先前使用特权地形图进行稳健运动的工作（+32.8% 成功率和每米 -4.42 次碰撞）。此外，我们取消了我们的运动策略，以表明我们方法的每个方面都有助于减少障碍物碰撞。视频和代码位于 http://www.joannetruong.com/projects/vinl.html 本文提出ViNL系统，使四足机器人能够通过视觉在陌生室内环境中导航并跨越障碍物。 Simar Kareer,Naoki Yokoyama,Dhruv Batra,Sehoon Ha,Joanne Truong cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Haozhe Liu,Wentian Zhang,Jinheng Xie,Haoqian Wu,Bing Li,Ziqi Zhang,Yuexiang Li,Yawen Huang,Bernard Ghanem,Yefeng Zheng
title: Decoupled Mixup for Generalized Visual Recognition
title_zh: 用于广义视觉识别的解耦混合
comment: Accepted by ECCV'2022 Workshop: Causality in Vision
comments: Accepted by ECCV'2022 Workshop: Causality in Vision
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated remarkable performance when the training and testing data are from the same distribution. However, such trained CNN models often largely degrade on testing data which is unseen and Out-Of-the-Distribution (OOD). To address this issue, we propose a novel "Decoupled-Mixup" method to train CNN models for OOD visual recognition. Different from previous work combining pairs of images homogeneously, our method decouples each image into discriminative and noise-prone regions, and then heterogeneously combines these regions of image pairs to train CNN models. Since the observation is that noise-prone regions such as textural and clutter backgrounds are adverse to the generalization ability of CNN models during training, we enhance features from discriminative regions and suppress noise-prone ones when combining an image pair. To further improve the generalization ability of trained models, we propose to disentangle discriminative and noise-prone regions in frequency-based and context-based fashions. Experiment results show the high generalization performance of our method on testing data that are composed of unseen contexts, where our method achieves 85.76\% top-1 accuracy in Track-1 and 79.92\% in Track-2 in the NICO Challenge. The source code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/NICOChallenge-OOD-Classification.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated remarkable performance when the training and testing data are from the same distribution. However, such trained CNN models often largely degrade on testing data which is unseen and Out-Of-the-Distribution (OOD). To address this issue, we propose a novel "Decoupled-Mixup" method to train CNN models for OOD visual recognition. Different from previous work combining pairs of images homogeneously, our method decouples each image into discriminative and noise-prone regions, and then heterogeneously combines these regions of image pairs to train CNN models. Since the observation is that noise-prone regions such as textural and clutter backgrounds are adverse to the generalization ability of CNN models during training, we enhance features from discriminative regions and suppress noise-prone ones when combining an image pair. To further improve the generalization ability of trained models, we propose to disentangle discriminative and noise-prone regions in frequency-based and context-based fashions. Experiment results show the high generalization performance of our method on testing data that are composed of unseen contexts, where our method achieves 85.76\% top-1 accuracy in Track-1 and 79.92\% in Track-2 in the NICO Challenge. The source code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/NICOChallenge-OOD-Classification.
abstract_zh: 当训练和测试数据来自同一分布时，卷积神经网络（CNN）表现出了卓越的性能。然而，这种经过训练的 CNN 模型通常会在看不见的分布外 (OOD) 测试数据上大幅降低性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的“解耦混合”方法来训练用于 OOD 视觉识别的 CNN 模型。与之前将图像对均匀组合的工作不同，我们的方法将每个图像解耦为有区别的和容易产生噪声的区域，然后异构地组合图像对的这些区域来训练 CNN 模型。由于观察发现，纹理和杂波背景等容易产生噪声的区域不利于 CNN 模型在训练期间的泛化能力，因此我们在组合图像对时增强判别区域的特征并抑制容易产生噪声的区域。为了进一步提高训练模型的泛化能力，我们建议以基于频率和基于上下文的方式解开有区别的区域和容易产生噪声的区域。实验结果表明，我们的方法对由未见过的上下文组成的测试数据具有较高的泛化性能，在 NICO 挑战赛中，我们的方法在 Track-1 中达到了 85.76% top-1 准确率，在 Track-2 中达到了 79.92% 准确率。源代码可在 https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/NICOChallenge-OOD-Classification 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Decoupled-Mixup的新方法，用于提升卷积神经网络在未见过的分布（OOD）数据上的泛化能力，解决传统方法在视觉识别任务中遇到的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Mixup方法在训练时均匀混合图像对，但噪声区域（如纹理和杂乱背景）会损害模型泛化能力。本文旨在通过区分并处理图像中的判别区域和噪声区域，提升模型对OOD数据的适应性。
AI.method: 将图像解耦为判别区域和噪声区域，异构混合图像对的对应区域。增强判别区域特征并抑制噪声区域，同时通过频域和上下文信息进一步分离两类区域。
AI.result: 在NICO挑战赛中，本文方法在Track-1和Track-2上分别达到85.76%和79.92%的Top-1准确率，验证了其在未见过上下文数据中的优越泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: Decoupled-Mixup通过区分处理图像区域，有效提升了模型对OOD数据的鲁棒性，为通用视觉识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Han Liu,Michelle K. Sigona,Thomas J. Manuel,Li Min Chen,Benoit M. Dawant,Charles F. Caskey
title: Evaluation of Synthetically Generated CT for use in Transcranial Focused Ultrasound Procedures
title_zh: 经颅聚焦超声手术中使用的合成 CT 的评估
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.10136
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.10136
abstract: Transcranial focused ultrasound (tFUS) is a therapeutic ultrasound method that focuses sound through the skull to a small region noninvasively and often under MRI guidance. CT imaging is used to estimate the acoustic properties that vary between individual skulls to enable effective focusing during tFUS procedures, exposing patients to potentially harmful radiation. A method to estimate acoustic parameters in the skull without the need for CT would be desirable. Here, we synthesized CT images from routinely acquired T1-weighted MRI by using a 3D patch-based conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) and evaluated the performance of synthesized CT (sCT) images for treatment planning with tFUS. We compared the performance of sCT to real CT (rCT) images for tFUS planning using Kranion and simulations using the acoustic toolbox, k-Wave. Simulations were performed for 3 tFUS scenarios: 1) no aberration correction, 2) correction with phases calculated from Kranion, and 3) phase shifts calculated from time-reversal. From Kranion, skull density ratio, skull thickness, and number of active elements between rCT and sCT had Pearson's Correlation Coefficients of 0.94, 0.92, and 0.98, respectively. Among 20 targets, differences in simulated peak pressure between rCT and sCT were largest without phase correction (12.4$\pm$8.1%) and smallest with Kranion phases (7.3$\pm$6.0%). The distance between peak focal locations between rCT and sCT was less than 1.3 mm for all simulation cases. Real and synthetically generated skulls had comparable image similarity, skull measurements, and acoustic simulation metrics. Our work demonstrates the feasibility of replacing real CTs with the MR-synthesized CT for tFUS planning. Source code and a docker image with the trained model are available at https://github.com/han-liu/SynCT_TcMRgFUS

abstract_zh: 经颅聚焦超声 (tFUS) 是一种治疗性超声方法，通常在 MRI 引导下，将声音通过颅骨非侵入性地聚焦到一个小区域。 CT 成像用于估计个体头骨之间差异的声学特性，以便在 tFUS 手术期间实现有效聚焦，从而使患者暴露在潜在有害的辐射下。需要一种无需 CT 即可估计颅骨声学参数的方法。在这里，我们使用基于 3D 补丁的条件生成对抗网络 (cGAN) 从常规采集的 T1 加权 MRI 中合成 CT 图像，并评估合成 CT (sCT) 图像用于 tFUS 治疗计划的性能。我们使用 Kranion 比较了 sCT 与真实 CT (rCT) 图像的性能，以进行 tFUS 规划，并使用声学工具箱 k-Wave 进行模拟。对 3 种 tFUS 场景进行了仿真：1) 无像差校正，2) 使用 Kranion 计算的相位进行校正，以及 3) 根据时间反转计算的相移。来自 Kranion 的颅骨密度比、颅骨厚度以及 rCT 和 sCT 之间的活性元素数量的 Pearson 相关系数分别为 0.94、0.92 和 0.98。在 20 个目标中，rCT 和 sCT 之间的模拟峰值压力差异在无相位校正时最大 (12.4$\pm$8.1%)，在 Kranion 相位时最小 (7.3$\pm$6.0%)。对于所有模拟情况，rCT 和 sCT 之间的峰值焦点位置之间的距离均小于 1.3 mm。真实和合成生成的头骨具有可比的图像相似性、头骨测量值和声学模拟指标。我们的工作证明了用 MR 合成 CT 代替真实 CT 进行 tFUS 规划的可行性。源代码和带有经过训练的模型的 docker 镜像可在 https://github.com/han-liu/SynCT_TcMRgFUS 获取

AI.tldr: 评估合成CT在经颅聚焦超声治疗中的可行性，以替代传统CT减少辐射风险。
AI.motivation: 传统CT用于经颅聚焦超声（tFUS）治疗计划会暴露患者于辐射，需寻找无辐射的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用3D patch-based cGAN从T1加权MRI生成合成CT（sCT），并通过Kranion和k-Wave工具与真实CT（rCT）进行声学性能对比。
AI.result: sCT与rCT在颅骨密度比、厚度及焦点位置误差等指标上高度相关（皮尔逊系数>0.92），最大压力差异为12.4±8.1%。
AI.conclusion: 合成CT可有效替代真实CT用于tFUS治疗计划，降低辐射风险且保持精度。
