search_text: Evaluation of Synthetically Generated CT for use in Transcranial Focused Ultrasound Procedures 经颅聚焦超声手术中使用的合成 CT 的评估 Transcranial focused ultrasound (tFUS) is a therapeutic ultrasound method that focuses sound through the skull to a small region noninvasively and often under MRI guidance. CT imaging is used to estimate the acoustic properties that vary between individual skulls to enable effective focusing during tFUS procedures, exposing patients to potentially harmful radiation. A method to estimate acoustic parameters in the skull without the need for CT would be desirable. Here, we synthesized CT images from routinely acquired T1-weighted MRI by using a 3D patch-based conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) and evaluated the performance of synthesized CT (sCT) images for treatment planning with tFUS. We compared the performance of sCT to real CT (rCT) images for tFUS planning using Kranion and simulations using the acoustic toolbox, k-Wave. Simulations were performed for 3 tFUS scenarios: 1) no aberration correction, 2) correction with phases calculated from Kranion, and 3) phase shifts calculated from time-reversal. From Kranion, skull density ratio, skull thickness, and number of active elements between rCT and sCT had Pearson's Correlation Coefficients of 0.94, 0.92, and 0.98, respectively. Among 20 targets, differences in simulated peak pressure between rCT and sCT were largest without phase correction (12.4$\pm$8.1%) and smallest with Kranion phases (7.3$\pm$6.0%). The distance between peak focal locations between rCT and sCT was less than 1.3 mm for all simulation cases. Real and synthetically generated skulls had comparable image similarity, skull measurements, and acoustic simulation metrics. Our work demonstrates the feasibility of replacing real CTs with the MR-synthesized CT for tFUS planning. Source code and a docker image with the trained model are available at https://github.com/han-liu/SynCT_TcMRgFUS 经颅聚焦超声 (tFUS) 是一种治疗性超声方法，通常在 MRI 引导下，将声音通过颅骨非侵入性地聚焦到一个小区域。 CT 成像用于估计个体头骨之间差异的声学特性，以便在 tFUS 手术期间实现有效聚焦，从而使患者暴露在潜在有害的辐射下。需要一种无需 CT 即可估计颅骨声学参数的方法。在这里，我们使用基于 3D 补丁的条件生成对抗网络 (cGAN) 从常规采集的 T1 加权 MRI 中合成 CT 图像，并评估合成 CT (sCT) 图像用于 tFUS 治疗计划的性能。我们使用 Kranion 比较了 sCT 与真实 CT (rCT) 图像的性能，以进行 tFUS 规划，并使用声学工具箱 k-Wave 进行模拟。对 3 种 tFUS 场景进行了仿真：1) 无像差校正，2) 使用 Kranion 计算的相位进行校正，以及 3) 根据时间反转计算的相移。来自 Kranion 的颅骨密度比、颅骨厚度以及 rCT 和 sCT 之间的活性元素数量的 Pearson 相关系数分别为 0.94、0.92 和 0.98。在 20 个目标中，rCT 和 sCT 之间的模拟峰值压力差异在无相位校正时最大 (12.4$\pm$8.1%)，在 Kranion 相位时最小 (7.3$\pm$6.0%)。对于所有模拟情况，rCT 和 sCT 之间的峰值焦点位置之间的距离均小于 1.3 mm。真实和合成生成的头骨具有可比的图像相似性、头骨测量值和声学模拟指标。我们的工作证明了用 MR 合成 CT 代替真实 CT 进行 tFUS 规划的可行性。源代码和带有经过训练的模型的 docker 镜像可在 https://github.com/han-liu/SynCT_TcMRgFUS 获取 评估合成CT在经颅聚焦超声治疗中的可行性，以替代传统CT减少辐射风险。 Han Liu,Michelle K. Sigona,Thomas J. Manuel,Li Min Chen,Benoit M. Dawant,Charles F. Caskey eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Amine Bendahmane,Redouane Tlemsani
title: Unknown area exploration for robots with energy constraints using a modified Butterfly Optimization Algorithm
title_zh: 使用改进的蝴蝶优化算法对具有能量约束的机器人未知区域进行探索
abstract: Butterfly Optimization Algorithm (BOA) is a recent metaheuristic that has been used in several optimization problems. In this paper, we propose a new version of the algorithm (xBOA) based on the crossover operator and compare its results to the original BOA and 3 other variants recently introduced in the literature. We also proposed a framework for solving the unknown area exploration problem with energy constraints using metaheuristics in both single- and multi-robot scenarios. This framework allowed us to benchmark the performances of different metaheuristics for the robotics exploration problem. We conducted several experiments to validate this framework and used it to compare the effectiveness of xBOA with wellknown metaheuristics used in the literature through 5 evaluation criteria. Although BOA and xBOA are not optimal in all these criteria, we found that BOA can be a good alternative to many metaheuristics in terms of the exploration time, while xBOA is more robust to local optima; has better fitness convergence; and achieves better exploration rates than the original BOA and its other variants.
summary: Butterfly Optimization Algorithm (BOA) is a recent metaheuristic that has been used in several optimization problems. In this paper, we propose a new version of the algorithm (xBOA) based on the crossover operator and compare its results to the original BOA and 3 other variants recently introduced in the literature. We also proposed a framework for solving the unknown area exploration problem with energy constraints using metaheuristics in both single- and multi-robot scenarios. This framework allowed us to benchmark the performances of different metaheuristics for the robotics exploration problem. We conducted several experiments to validate this framework and used it to compare the effectiveness of xBOA with wellknown metaheuristics used in the literature through 5 evaluation criteria. Although BOA and xBOA are not optimal in all these criteria, we found that BOA can be a good alternative to many metaheuristics in terms of the exploration time, while xBOA is more robust to local optima; has better fitness convergence; and achieves better exploration rates than the original BOA and its other variants.
abstract_zh: 蝴蝶优化算法 (BOA) 是一种最新的元启发式算法，已用于多个优化问题。在本文中，我们提出了基于交叉算子的新版本算法 (xBOA)，并将其结果与原始 BOA 和文献中最近引入的其他 3 个变体进行了比较。我们还提出了一个框架，用于在单机器人和多机器人场景中使用元启发式解决具有能量约束的未知区域探索问题。这个框架使我们能够对机器人探索问题的不同元启发法的性能进行基准测试。我们进行了多次实验来验证该框架，并通过 5 个评估标准将 xBOA 与文献中使用的众所周知的元启发法的有效性进行比较。尽管 BOA 和 xBOA 在所有这些标准中都不是最优的，但我们发现，就探索时间而言，BOA 可以成为许多元启发式算法的良好替代方案，而 xBOA 对局部最优更稳健；具有更好的适应度收敛性；并获得比原始 BOA 及其其他变体更好的勘探率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的蝴蝶优化算法（xBOA），用于解决具有能量约束的机器人未知区域探索问题，并通过单机器人和多机器人场景的框架进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有优化算法在机器人探索任务中存在收敛速度慢、易陷入局部最优等问题，需改进算法以适应能量约束下的高效探索需求。
AI.method: 基于交叉算子改进蝴蝶优化算法（xBOA），设计包含单/多机器人场景的未知区域探索框架，通过5个评估指标对比xBOA与原始BOA及其他3种变体的性能。
AI.result: xBOA在收敛性、局部最优鲁棒性和探索率上优于原始BOA及其它变体，而BOA在探索时间上表现良好，两者均非所有指标最优。
AI.conclusion: xBOA为能量约束下的机器人探索问题提供了有效的优化方案，可作为传统元启发式算法的可行替代方案。

authors_text: Charlie Budd,Luis C. Garcia-Peraza-Herrera,Martin Huber,Sebastien Ourselin,Tom Vercauteren
title: Rapid and robust endoscopic content area estimation: A lean GPU-based pipeline and curated benchmark dataset
title_zh: 快速、稳健的内窥镜内容区域估计：基于 GPU 的精益管道和精心策划的基准数据集
abstract: Endoscopic content area refers to the informative area enclosed by the dark, non-informative, border regions present in most endoscopic footage. The estimation of the content area is a common task in endoscopic image processing and computer vision pipelines. Despite the apparent simplicity of the problem, several factors make reliable real-time estimation surprisingly challenging. The lack of rigorous investigation into the topic combined with the lack of a common benchmark dataset for this task has been a long-lasting issue in the field. In this paper, we propose two variants of a lean GPU-based computational pipeline combining edge detection and circle fitting. The two variants differ by relying on handcrafted features, and learned features respectively to extract content area edge point candidates. We also present a first-of-its-kind dataset of manually annotated and pseudo-labelled content areas across a range of surgical indications. To encourage further developments, the curated dataset, and an implementation of both algorithms, has been made public (https://doi.org/10.7303/syn32148000, https://github.com/charliebudd/torch-content-area). We compare our proposed algorithm with a state-of-the-art U-Net-based approach and demonstrate significant improvement in terms of both accuracy (Hausdorff distance: 6.3 px versus 118.1 px) and computational time (Average runtime per frame: 0.13 ms versus 11.2 ms).
summary: Endoscopic content area refers to the informative area enclosed by the dark, non-informative, border regions present in most endoscopic footage. The estimation of the content area is a common task in endoscopic image processing and computer vision pipelines. Despite the apparent simplicity of the problem, several factors make reliable real-time estimation surprisingly challenging. The lack of rigorous investigation into the topic combined with the lack of a common benchmark dataset for this task has been a long-lasting issue in the field. In this paper, we propose two variants of a lean GPU-based computational pipeline combining edge detection and circle fitting. The two variants differ by relying on handcrafted features, and learned features respectively to extract content area edge point candidates. We also present a first-of-its-kind dataset of manually annotated and pseudo-labelled content areas across a range of surgical indications. To encourage further developments, the curated dataset, and an implementation of both algorithms, has been made public (https://doi.org/10.7303/syn32148000, https://github.com/charliebudd/torch-content-area). We compare our proposed algorithm with a state-of-the-art U-Net-based approach and demonstrate significant improvement in terms of both accuracy (Hausdorff distance: 6.3 px versus 118.1 px) and computational time (Average runtime per frame: 0.13 ms versus 11.2 ms).
abstract_zh: 内窥镜内容区域是指大多数内窥镜镜头中存在的黑暗、非信息边界区域所包围的信息区域。内容区域的估计是内窥镜图像处理和计算机视觉管道中的常见任务。尽管问题看起来很简单，但有几个因素使可靠的实时估计变得异常具有挑战性。缺乏对该主题的严格调查，加上缺乏该任务的通用基准数据集，一直是该领域的一个长期问题。在本文中，我们提出了两种基于 GPU 的精益计算管道的变体，结合了边缘检测和圆拟合。这两种变体的不同之处在于分别依靠手工特征和学习特征来提取内容区域边缘点候选。我们还提供了首个包含一系列手术适应症的手动注释和伪标记内容区域的数据集。为了鼓励进一步发展，整理的数据集以及两种算法的实现已公开（https://doi.org/10.7303/syn32148000、https://github.com/charliebudd/torch-content-area）。我们将我们提出的算法与最先进的基于 U-Net 的方法进行比较，并证明在准确性（豪斯多夫距离：6.3 px 与 118.1 px）和计算时间（每帧平均运行时间：0.13 毫秒与 11.2 毫秒）方面都有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU的轻量级计算流程和首个手术场景下的内窥镜内容区域标注数据集，用于解决内窥镜图像中内容区域的快速准确估计问题。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜内容区域估计缺乏统一基准数据集和可靠实时算法，导致该领域研究进展受限，亟需高效且精确的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计两种结合边缘检测与圆拟合的GPU加速算法：一种基于手工特征提取候选边缘点，另一种采用学习特征。同时构建包含手动标注和伪标签的多场景手术数据集。
AI.result: 相较U-Net方法，算法在Hausdorff距离指标上提升18倍（6.3px vs 118.1px），单帧处理时间缩短83倍（0.13ms vs 11.2ms）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量级GPU流程在精度和速度上均优于现有方法，公开的数据集和代码为内窥镜图像处理领域提供了标准化研究基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU的轻量级计算流程和首个手术场景下的内窥镜内容区域标注数据集，用于解决内窥镜图像中内容区域的快速准确估计问题。
ai_content.motivation: 内窥镜内容区域估计缺乏统一基准数据集和可靠实时算法，导致该领域研究进展受限，亟需高效且精确的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 提出的轻量级GPU流程在精度和速度上均优于现有方法，公开的数据集和代码为内窥镜图像处理领域提供了标准化研究基础。

search_text: Rapid and robust endoscopic content area estimation: A lean GPU-based pipeline and curated benchmark dataset 快速、稳健的内窥镜内容区域估计：基于 GPU 的精益管道和精心策划的基准数据集 Endoscopic content area refers to the informative area enclosed by the dark, non-informative, border regions present in most endoscopic footage. The estimation of the content area is a common task in endoscopic image processing and computer vision pipelines. Despite the apparent simplicity of the problem, several factors make reliable real-time estimation surprisingly challenging. The lack of rigorous investigation into the topic combined with the lack of a common benchmark dataset for this task has been a long-lasting issue in the field. In this paper, we propose two variants of a lean GPU-based computational pipeline combining edge detection and circle fitting. The two variants differ by relying on handcrafted features, and learned features respectively to extract content area edge point candidates. We also present a first-of-its-kind dataset of manually annotated and pseudo-labelled content areas across a range of surgical indications. To encourage further developments, the curated dataset, and an implementation of both algorithms, has been made public (https://doi.org/10.7303/syn32148000, https://github.com/charliebudd/torch-content-area). We compare our proposed algorithm with a state-of-the-art U-Net-based approach and demonstrate significant improvement in terms of both accuracy (Hausdorff distance: 6.3 px versus 118.1 px) and computational time (Average runtime per frame: 0.13 ms versus 11.2 ms). 内窥镜内容区域是指大多数内窥镜镜头中存在的黑暗、非信息边界区域所包围的信息区域。内容区域的估计是内窥镜图像处理和计算机视觉管道中的常见任务。尽管问题看起来很简单，但有几个因素使可靠的实时估计变得异常具有挑战性。缺乏对该主题的严格调查，加上缺乏该任务的通用基准数据集，一直是该领域的一个长期问题。在本文中，我们提出了两种基于 GPU 的精益计算管道的变体，结合了边缘检测和圆拟合。这两种变体的不同之处在于分别依靠手工特征和学习特征来提取内容区域边缘点候选。我们还提供了首个包含一系列手术适应症的手动注释和伪标记内容区域的数据集。为了鼓励进一步发展，整理的数据集以及两种算法的实现已公开（https://doi.org/10.7303/syn32148000、https://github.com/charliebudd/torch-content-area）。我们将我们提出的算法与最先进的基于 U-Net 的方法进行比较，并证明在准确性（豪斯多夫距离：6.3 px 与 118.1 px）和计算时间（每帧平均运行时间：0.13 毫秒与 11.2 毫秒）方面都有显着改进。 本文提出了一种基于GPU的轻量级计算流程和首个手术场景下的内窥镜内容区域标注数据集，用于解决内窥镜图像中内容区域的快速准确估计问题。 Charlie Budd,Luis C. Garcia-Peraza-Herrera,Martin Huber,Sebastien Ourselin,Tom Vercauteren cs.CV

authors_text: Aakash Khandelwal,Nilay Kant,Ranjan Mukherjee
title: Stabilization of Energy-Conserving Gaits for Point-Foot Planar Bipeds
title_zh: 尖足平面两足动物节能步态的稳定
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: The problem of designing and stabilizing impact-free, energy-conserving gaits is considered for underactuated, point-foot planar bipeds. Virtual holonomic constraints are used to design energy-conserving gaits. A desired gait corresponds to a periodic hybrid orbit and is stabilized using the Impulse Controlled Poincaré Map approach. Numerical simulations for the case of a five-link biped demonstrate convergence to a desired gait from arbitrary initial conditions.
summary: The problem of designing and stabilizing impact-free, energy-conserving gaits is considered for underactuated, point-foot planar bipeds. Virtual holonomic constraints are used to design energy-conserving gaits. A desired gait corresponds to a periodic hybrid orbit and is stabilized using the Impulse Controlled Poincaré Map approach. Numerical simulations for the case of a five-link biped demonstrate convergence to a desired gait from arbitrary initial conditions.
abstract_zh: 针对欠驱动、尖脚平面两足动物，考虑设计和稳定无冲击、节能步态的问题。虚拟完整约束用于设计节能步态。所需的步态对应于周期性混合轨道，并使用脉冲控制庞加莱图方法进行稳定。五连杆两足动物的数值模拟证明了从任意初始条件收敛到所需步态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何为欠驱动点足平面双足机器人设计并稳定无冲击、节能的步态。
AI.motivation: 传统双足机器人步态控制常面临能量损耗大或步态不稳定的问题，需寻找更高效的控制方法。
AI.method: 通过虚拟全息约束设计节能步态，并采用冲击控制的庞加莱映射方法进行稳定。
AI.result: 五连杆双足机器人的仿真验证了该方法能从任意初始条件收敛到目标步态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为双足机器人提供了稳定节能步态的新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Marie Kunešová,Zbyněk Zajíc
title: Multitask Detection of Speaker Changes, Overlapping Speech and Voice Activity Using wav2vec 2.0
title_zh: 使用 wav2vec 2.0 多任务检测说话者变化、重叠语音和语音活动
abstract: Self-supervised learning approaches have lately achieved great success on a broad spectrum of machine learning problems. In the field of speech processing, one of the most successful recent self-supervised models is wav2vec 2.0. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of this model on three basic speech classification tasks: speaker change detection, overlapped speech detection, and voice activity detection. First, we concentrate on only one task -- speaker change detection -- where our proposed system surpasses the previously reported results on four different corpora, and achieves comparable performance even when trained on out-of-domain data from an artificially designed dataset. Then we expand our approach to tackle all three tasks in a single multitask system with state-of-the-art performance on the AMI corpus. The implementation of the algorithms in this paper is publicly available at https://github.com/mkunes/w2v2_audioFrameClassification.
summary: Self-supervised learning approaches have lately achieved great success on a broad spectrum of machine learning problems. In the field of speech processing, one of the most successful recent self-supervised models is wav2vec 2.0. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of this model on three basic speech classification tasks: speaker change detection, overlapped speech detection, and voice activity detection. First, we concentrate on only one task -- speaker change detection -- where our proposed system surpasses the previously reported results on four different corpora, and achieves comparable performance even when trained on out-of-domain data from an artificially designed dataset. Then we expand our approach to tackle all three tasks in a single multitask system with state-of-the-art performance on the AMI corpus. The implementation of the algorithms in this paper is publicly available at https://github.com/mkunes/w2v2_audioFrameClassification.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习方法最近在广泛的机器学习问题上取得了巨大成功。在语音处理领域，最近最成功的自监督模型之一是 wav2vec 2.0。在本文中，我们探讨了该模型在三个基本语音分类任务上的有效性：说话人变化检测、重叠语音检测和语音活动检测。首先，我们只专注于一个任务——说话人变化检测——我们提出的系统超越了之前在四个不同语料库上报告的结果，并且即使在人工设计的数据集中的域外数据上进行训练时也能实现可比的性能。然后，我们扩展我们的方法，以在单个多任务系统中处理所有三个任务，并在 AMI 语料库上具有最先进的性能。本文中算法的实现可在 https://github.com/mkunes/w2v2_audioFrameClassification 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 利用wav2vec 2.0模型进行说话人变化检测、重叠语音检测和语音活动检测的多任务处理
AI.motivation: 探索自监督学习模型wav2vec 2.0在语音分类任务中的有效性，提升多场景语音检测性能
AI.method: 基于wav2vec 2.0预训练模型，采用单任务学习解决说话人变化检测，再扩展为多任务框架同时处理三个语音检测任务
AI.result: 在四个语料库上超越现有说话人变化检测结果，多任务系统在AMI语料库达到最先进水平，且支持跨领域数据训练
AI.conclusion: wav2vec 2.0在语音检测任务中表现优异，多任务学习框架可提升模型泛化能力，开源实现促进技术复用

authors_text: Jiangpeng He,Luotao Lin,Heather Eicher-Miller,Fengqing Zhu
title: Long-tailed Food Classification
title_zh: 长尾食品分类
abstract: Food classification serves as the basic step of image-based dietary assessment to predict the types of foods in each input image. However, food image predictions in a real world scenario are usually long-tail distributed among different food classes, which cause heavy class-imbalance problems and a restricted performance. In addition, none of the existing long-tailed classification methods focus on food data, which can be more challenging due to the lower inter-class and higher intra-class similarity among foods. In this work, we first introduce two new benchmark datasets for long-tailed food classification including Food101-LT and VFN-LT where the number of samples in VFN-LT exhibits the real world long-tailed food distribution. Then we propose a novel 2-Phase framework to address the problem of class-imbalance by (1) undersampling the head classes to remove redundant samples along with maintaining the learned information through knowledge distillation, and (2) oversampling the tail classes by performing visual-aware data augmentation. We show the effectiveness of our method by comparing with existing state-of-the-art long-tailed classification methods and show improved performance on both Food101-LT and VFN-LT benchmarks. The results demonstrate the potential to apply our method to related real life applications.
summary: Food classification serves as the basic step of image-based dietary assessment to predict the types of foods in each input image. However, food image predictions in a real world scenario are usually long-tail distributed among different food classes, which cause heavy class-imbalance problems and a restricted performance. In addition, none of the existing long-tailed classification methods focus on food data, which can be more challenging due to the lower inter-class and higher intra-class similarity among foods. In this work, we first introduce two new benchmark datasets for long-tailed food classification including Food101-LT and VFN-LT where the number of samples in VFN-LT exhibits the real world long-tailed food distribution. Then we propose a novel 2-Phase framework to address the problem of class-imbalance by (1) undersampling the head classes to remove redundant samples along with maintaining the learned information through knowledge distillation, and (2) oversampling the tail classes by performing visual-aware data augmentation. We show the effectiveness of our method by comparing with existing state-of-the-art long-tailed classification methods and show improved performance on both Food101-LT and VFN-LT benchmarks. The results demonstrate the potential to apply our method to related real life applications.
abstract_zh: 食物分类是基于图像的饮食评估的基本步骤，用于预测每个输入图像中的食物类型。然而，现实世界场景中的食物图像预测通常是长尾分布在不同食物类别之间，这会导致严重的类别不平衡问题和性能受限。此外，现有的长尾分类方法都没有关注食品数据，由于食品之间较低的类间相似性和较高的类内相似性，这可能更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们首先引入了两个新的长尾食品分类基准数据集，包括 Food101-LT 和 VFN-LT，其中 VFN-LT 中的样本数量展示了真实世界的长尾食品分布。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，通过以下方式解决类不平衡问题：（1）对头类进行欠采样以删除冗余样本，同时通过知识蒸馏维护学习到的信息；（2）通过执行视觉感知数据增强对尾类进行过采样。我们通过与现有最先进的长尾分类方法进行比较来展示我们的方法的有效性，并在 Food101-LT 和 VFN-LT 基准上显示出改进的性能。结果证明了将我们的方法应用于相关现实生活应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文针对食品分类中的长尾分布问题，提出新的数据集和两阶段框架以解决类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾分类方法未针对食品数据，而食品分类因类间相似度低、类内相似度高更具挑战性，需解决实际场景中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 引入Food101-LT和VFN-LT数据集，提出两阶段框架：通过知识蒸馏欠采样头部类别并保留信息，利用视觉感知数据增强过采样尾部类别。
AI.result: 在Food101-LT和VFN-LT基准上优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性及实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解食品分类的长尾问题，可推广至其他现实场景的类别不平衡任务。

search_text: Long-tailed Food Classification 长尾食品分类 Food classification serves as the basic step of image-based dietary assessment to predict the types of foods in each input image. However, food image predictions in a real world scenario are usually long-tail distributed among different food classes, which cause heavy class-imbalance problems and a restricted performance. In addition, none of the existing long-tailed classification methods focus on food data, which can be more challenging due to the lower inter-class and higher intra-class similarity among foods. In this work, we first introduce two new benchmark datasets for long-tailed food classification including Food101-LT and VFN-LT where the number of samples in VFN-LT exhibits the real world long-tailed food distribution. Then we propose a novel 2-Phase framework to address the problem of class-imbalance by (1) undersampling the head classes to remove redundant samples along with maintaining the learned information through knowledge distillation, and (2) oversampling the tail classes by performing visual-aware data augmentation. We show the effectiveness of our method by comparing with existing state-of-the-art long-tailed classification methods and show improved performance on both Food101-LT and VFN-LT benchmarks. The results demonstrate the potential to apply our method to related real life applications. 食物分类是基于图像的饮食评估的基本步骤，用于预测每个输入图像中的食物类型。然而，现实世界场景中的食物图像预测通常是长尾分布在不同食物类别之间，这会导致严重的类别不平衡问题和性能受限。此外，现有的长尾分类方法都没有关注食品数据，由于食品之间较低的类间相似性和较高的类内相似性，这可能更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们首先引入了两个新的长尾食品分类基准数据集，包括 Food101-LT 和 VFN-LT，其中 VFN-LT 中的样本数量展示了真实世界的长尾食品分布。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，通过以下方式解决类不平衡问题：（1）对头类进行欠采样以删除冗余样本，同时通过知识蒸馏维护学习到的信息；（2）通过执行视觉感知数据增强对尾类进行过采样。我们通过与现有最先进的长尾分类方法进行比较来展示我们的方法的有效性，并在 Food101-LT 和 VFN-LT 基准上显示出改进的性能。结果证明了将我们的方法应用于相关现实生活应用的潜力。 本文针对食品分类中的长尾分布问题，提出新的数据集和两阶段框架以解决类别不平衡问题。 Jiangpeng He,Luotao Lin,Heather Eicher-Miller,Fengqing Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Albert Zeyer,Robin Schmitt,Wei Zhou,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney
title: Monotonic segmental attention for automatic speech recognition
title_zh: 自动语音识别的单调分段注意
abstract: We introduce a novel segmental-attention model for automatic speech recognition. We restrict the decoder attention to segments to avoid quadratic runtime of global attention, better generalize to long sequences, and eventually enable streaming. We directly compare global-attention and different segmental-attention modeling variants. We develop and compare two separate time-synchronous decoders, one specifically taking the segmental nature into account, yielding further improvements. Using time-synchronous decoding for segmental models is novel and a step towards streaming applications. Our experiments show the importance of a length model to predict the segment boundaries. The final best segmental-attention model using segmental decoding performs better than global-attention, in contrast to other monotonic attention approaches in the literature. Further, we observe that the segmental model generalizes much better to long sequences of up to several minutes.
summary: We introduce a novel segmental-attention model for automatic speech recognition. We restrict the decoder attention to segments to avoid quadratic runtime of global attention, better generalize to long sequences, and eventually enable streaming. We directly compare global-attention and different segmental-attention modeling variants. We develop and compare two separate time-synchronous decoders, one specifically taking the segmental nature into account, yielding further improvements. Using time-synchronous decoding for segmental models is novel and a step towards streaming applications. Our experiments show the importance of a length model to predict the segment boundaries. The final best segmental-attention model using segmental decoding performs better than global-attention, in contrast to other monotonic attention approaches in the literature. Further, we observe that the segmental model generalizes much better to long sequences of up to several minutes.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于自动语音识别的新颖的分段注意力模型。我们将解码器注意力限制在片段上，以避免全局注意力的二次运行时间，更好地泛化到长序列，并最终启用流式传输。我们直接比较全局注意力和不同的分段注意力模型变体。我们开发并比较了两种独立的时间同步解码器，其中一种专门考虑了分段性质，从而产生了进一步的改进。对分段模型使用时间同步解码是新颖的，也是迈向流应用的一步。我们的实验表明长度模型对于预测段边界的重要性。与文献中的其他单调注意方法相比，使用分段解码的最终最佳分段注意模型比全局注意表现更好。此外，我们观察到分段模型对于长达几分钟的长序列具有更好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动语音识别的单调分段注意力模型，旨在提升流式处理效率和长序列泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 为解决全局注意力机制计算复杂度高、难以处理长序列的问题，同时满足流式语音识别需求。
AI.method: 设计分段注意力机制限制解码器关注范围，结合时间同步解码器与长度预测模型，实现分段边界建模。
AI.result: 分段注意力模型在长序列任务中表现优于全局注意力，且在流式场景下具有更好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 分段注意力框架为流式自动语音识别提供了有效方案，长度预测模块对分段边界建模至关重要。

authors_text: Yara Rizk,Praveen Venkateswaran,Vatche Isahagian,Vinod Muthusamy
title: A Case for Business Process-Specific Foundation Models
title_zh: 特定于业务流程的基础模型的案例
abstract: The inception of large language models has helped advance state-of-the-art performance on numerous natural language tasks. This has also opened the door for the development of foundation models for other domains and data modalities such as images, code, and music. In this paper, we argue that business process data representations have unique characteristics that warrant the development of a new class of foundation models to handle tasks like process mining, optimization, and decision making. These models should also tackle the unique challenges of applying AI to business processes which include data scarcity, multi-modal representations, domain specific terminology, and privacy concerns.
summary: The inception of large language models has helped advance state-of-the-art performance on numerous natural language tasks. This has also opened the door for the development of foundation models for other domains and data modalities such as images, code, and music. In this paper, we argue that business process data representations have unique characteristics that warrant the development of a new class of foundation models to handle tasks like process mining, optimization, and decision making. These models should also tackle the unique challenges of applying AI to business processes which include data scarcity, multi-modal representations, domain specific terminology, and privacy concerns.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型的诞生有助于提高众多自然语言任务的最先进性能。这也为其他领域和数据模式（例如图像、代码和音乐）的基础模型的开发打开了大门。在本文中，我们认为业务流程数据表示具有独特的特征，这些特征保证了开发一类新型基础模型来处理流程挖掘、优化和决策等任务。这些模型还应该解决将人工智能应用于业务流程的独特挑战，包括数据稀缺、多模式表示、领域特定术语和隐私问题。

AI.tldr: 提出针对业务流程数据的特定基础模型，以解决流程挖掘、优化和决策等任务中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理业务流程数据的特殊性，如数据稀缺、多模态表示、领域术语和隐私问题。
AI.method: 通过分析业务流程数据特性，设计适应多模态、领域术语和隐私需求的模型架构。
AI.result: 提出了业务流程特定基础模型的框架，为后续研究提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 开发业务流程特定基础模型对于解决AI在业务流程中的应用挑战具有重要意义。

authors_text: Ben Kenwright
title: Watch Your Step: Real-Time Adaptive Character Stepping
title_zh: 注意你的脚步：实时自适应角色步进
abstract: An effective 3D stepping control algorithm that is computationally fast, robust, and easy to implement is extremely important and valuable to character animation research. In this paper, we present a novel technique for generating dynamic, interactive, and controllable biped stepping motions. Our approach uses a low-dimensional physics-based model to create balanced humanoid avatars that can handle a wide variety of interactive situations, such as terrain height shifting and push exertions, while remaining upright and balanced. We accomplish this by combining the popular inverted-pendulum model with an ankle-feedback torque and variable leg-length mechanism to create a controllable solution that can adapt to unforeseen circumstances in real-time without key-framed data, any offline pre-processing, or on-line optimizations joint torque computations. We explain and address oversimplifications and limitations with the basic IP model and the reasons for extending the model by means of additional control mechanisms. We demonstrate a simple and fast approach for extending the IP model based on an ankle-torque and variable leg lengths approximation without hindering the extremely attractive properties (i.e., computational speed, robustness, and simplicity) that make the IP model so ideal for generating upright responsive balancing biped movements. Finally, while our technique focuses on lower body motions, it can, nevertheless, handle both small and large push forces even during terrain height variations. Moreover, our model effectively creates human-like motions that synthesize low-level upright stepping movements, and can be combined with additional controller techniques to produce whole body autonomous agents.
summary: An effective 3D stepping control algorithm that is computationally fast, robust, and easy to implement is extremely important and valuable to character animation research. In this paper, we present a novel technique for generating dynamic, interactive, and controllable biped stepping motions. Our approach uses a low-dimensional physics-based model to create balanced humanoid avatars that can handle a wide variety of interactive situations, such as terrain height shifting and push exertions, while remaining upright and balanced. We accomplish this by combining the popular inverted-pendulum model with an ankle-feedback torque and variable leg-length mechanism to create a controllable solution that can adapt to unforeseen circumstances in real-time without key-framed data, any offline pre-processing, or on-line optimizations joint torque computations. We explain and address oversimplifications and limitations with the basic IP model and the reasons for extending the model by means of additional control mechanisms. We demonstrate a simple and fast approach for extending the IP model based on an ankle-torque and variable leg lengths approximation without hindering the extremely attractive properties (i.e., computational speed, robustness, and simplicity) that make the IP model so ideal for generating upright responsive balancing biped movements. Finally, while our technique focuses on lower body motions, it can, nevertheless, handle both small and large push forces even during terrain height variations. Moreover, our model effectively creates human-like motions that synthesize low-level upright stepping movements, and can be combined with additional controller techniques to produce whole body autonomous agents.
abstract_zh: 一种计算速度快、鲁棒性强且易于实现的有效 3D 步进控制算法对于角色动画研究极其重要和有价值。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成动态、交互式且可控的两足行走运动的新技术。我们的方法使用基于低维物理的模型来创建平衡的人形化身，可以处理各种交互情况，例如地形高度变化和推力，同时保持直立和平衡。我们通过将流行的倒立摆模型与脚踝反馈扭矩和可变腿长机制相结合来实现这一目标，以创建一个可控的解决方案，可以实时适应不可预见的情况，而无需关键帧数据、任何离线预处理或在线优化关节扭矩计算。我们解释并解决基本 IP 模型的过度简化和限制，以及通过附加控制机制扩展模型的原因。我们展示了一种简单而快速的方法，用于基于脚踝扭矩和可变腿长近似来扩展 IP 模型，而不妨碍极具吸引力的特性（即计算速度、鲁棒性和简单性），这些特性使 IP 模型非常适合生成直立响应平衡两足运动。最后，虽然我们的技术专注于下半身运动，但即使在地形高度变化期间，它也可以处理小推力和大推力。此外，我们的模型有效地创建了类人运动，合成低水平的直立步进运动，并且可以与额外的控制器技术相结合来产生全身自主代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时自适应的双足角色步态生成算法，通过结合倒立摆模型与踝关节反馈扭矩及可变腿长机制，实现无需预处理和在线优化的动态平衡控制。
AI.motivation: 传统角色动画中步态控制方法依赖关键帧数据或离线预处理，难以应对实时交互场景中的地形变化和外力干扰，亟需一种计算高效、鲁棒性强且易于实现的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于低维物理模型，融合倒立摆模型、踝关节扭矩反馈及可变腿长机制，通过实时调整腿部参数和反馈控制实现动态平衡，避免关键帧数据与在线优化计算。
AI.result: 方法成功处理地形高度变化和大范围推力干扰，生成类人步态动作，计算速度快且鲁棒性高，可与其它控制器结合实现全身自主角色控制。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为实时交互式角色动画提供了高效平衡控制方案，适用于复杂动态环境，且具备扩展性以集成更多自主行为控制机制。

search_text: Watch Your Step: Real-Time Adaptive Character Stepping 注意你的脚步：实时自适应角色步进 An effective 3D stepping control algorithm that is computationally fast, robust, and easy to implement is extremely important and valuable to character animation research. In this paper, we present a novel technique for generating dynamic, interactive, and controllable biped stepping motions. Our approach uses a low-dimensional physics-based model to create balanced humanoid avatars that can handle a wide variety of interactive situations, such as terrain height shifting and push exertions, while remaining upright and balanced. We accomplish this by combining the popular inverted-pendulum model with an ankle-feedback torque and variable leg-length mechanism to create a controllable solution that can adapt to unforeseen circumstances in real-time without key-framed data, any offline pre-processing, or on-line optimizations joint torque computations. We explain and address oversimplifications and limitations with the basic IP model and the reasons for extending the model by means of additional control mechanisms. We demonstrate a simple and fast approach for extending the IP model based on an ankle-torque and variable leg lengths approximation without hindering the extremely attractive properties (i.e., computational speed, robustness, and simplicity) that make the IP model so ideal for generating upright responsive balancing biped movements. Finally, while our technique focuses on lower body motions, it can, nevertheless, handle both small and large push forces even during terrain height variations. Moreover, our model effectively creates human-like motions that synthesize low-level upright stepping movements, and can be combined with additional controller techniques to produce whole body autonomous agents. 一种计算速度快、鲁棒性强且易于实现的有效 3D 步进控制算法对于角色动画研究极其重要和有价值。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成动态、交互式且可控的两足行走运动的新技术。我们的方法使用基于低维物理的模型来创建平衡的人形化身，可以处理各种交互情况，例如地形高度变化和推力，同时保持直立和平衡。我们通过将流行的倒立摆模型与脚踝反馈扭矩和可变腿长机制相结合来实现这一目标，以创建一个可控的解决方案，可以实时适应不可预见的情况，而无需关键帧数据、任何离线预处理或在线优化关节扭矩计算。我们解释并解决基本 IP 模型的过度简化和限制，以及通过附加控制机制扩展模型的原因。我们展示了一种简单而快速的方法，用于基于脚踝扭矩和可变腿长近似来扩展 IP 模型，而不妨碍极具吸引力的特性（即计算速度、鲁棒性和简单性），这些特性使 IP 模型非常适合生成直立响应平衡两足运动。最后，虽然我们的技术专注于下半身运动，但即使在地形高度变化期间，它也可以处理小推力和大推力。此外，我们的模型有效地创建了类人运动，合成低水平的直立步进运动，并且可以与额外的控制器技术相结合来产生全身自主代理。 本文提出一种实时自适应的双足角色步态生成算法，通过结合倒立摆模型与踝关节反馈扭矩及可变腿长机制，实现无需预处理和在线优化的动态平衡控制。 Ben Kenwright cs.GR,cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Mengyuan Zhao,Zhiyong Zhang,Jing Xiao
title: Linguistic-Enhanced Transformer with CTC Embedding for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音识别的具有 CTC 嵌入的语言增强 Transformer
comment: Accepted by ECAISS2022, The Fourth International Workshop on Edge Computing and Artificial Intelligence based Sensor-Cloud System
comments: Accepted by ECAISS2022, The Fourth International Workshop on Edge Computing and Artificial Intelligence based Sensor-Cloud System
abstract: The recent emergence of joint CTC-Attention model shows significant improvement in automatic speech recognition (ASR). The improvement largely lies in the modeling of linguistic information by decoder. The decoder joint-optimized with an acoustic encoder renders the language model from ground-truth sequences in an auto-regressive manner during training. However, the training corpus of the decoder is limited to the speech transcriptions, which is far less than the corpus needed to train an acceptable language model. This leads to poor robustness of decoder. To alleviate this problem, we propose linguistic-enhanced transformer, which introduces refined CTC information to decoder during training process, so that the decoder can be more robust. Our experiments on AISHELL-1 speech corpus show that the character error rate (CER) is relatively reduced by up to 7%. We also find that in joint CTC-Attention ASR model, decoder is more sensitive to linguistic information than acoustic information.
summary: The recent emergence of joint CTC-Attention model shows significant improvement in automatic speech recognition (ASR). The improvement largely lies in the modeling of linguistic information by decoder. The decoder joint-optimized with an acoustic encoder renders the language model from ground-truth sequences in an auto-regressive manner during training. However, the training corpus of the decoder is limited to the speech transcriptions, which is far less than the corpus needed to train an acceptable language model. This leads to poor robustness of decoder. To alleviate this problem, we propose linguistic-enhanced transformer, which introduces refined CTC information to decoder during training process, so that the decoder can be more robust. Our experiments on AISHELL-1 speech corpus show that the character error rate (CER) is relatively reduced by up to 7%. We also find that in joint CTC-Attention ASR model, decoder is more sensitive to linguistic information than acoustic information.
abstract_zh: 最近出现的联合 CTC-Attention 模型显示了自动语音识别（ASR）的显着改进。改进主要在于解码器对语言信息的建模。与声学编码器联合优化的解码器在训​​练期间以自回归方式从真实序列渲染语言模型。然而，解码器的训练语料仅限于语音转录，远远小于训练可接受的语言模型所需的语料。这导致解码器的鲁棒性较差。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了语言增强变压器，它在训练过程中向解码器引入精炼的CTC信息，从而使解码器更加鲁棒。我们在AISHELL-1语音语料库上的实验表明，字符错误率（CER）相对降低了高达7%。我们还发现，在联合 CTC-Attention ASR 模型中，解码器对语言信息比声学信息更敏感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CTC嵌入的语言增强型Transformer解码器，以提升语音识别的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有联合CTC-Attention模型的解码器因训练语料局限于语音转录，导致语言模型训练不足，影响系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在解码器训练中引入精炼的CTC信息，增强其对语言特征的建模能力。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1数据集上字符错误率降低7%，验证了解码器对语言信息的敏感性高于声学信息。
AI.conclusion: 通过CTC信息增强解码器的语言建模能力，可有效提升语音识别性能并增强系统鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao
title: Improving Imbalanced Text Classification with Dynamic Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 通过动态课程学习改善不平衡的文本分类
comment: Accepted by UEIoT2022, The 3rd International Workshop on Ubiquitous Electric Internet of Things
comments: Accepted by UEIoT2022, The 3rd International Workshop on Ubiquitous Electric Internet of Things
abstract: Recent advances in pre-trained language models have improved the performance for text classification tasks. However, little attention is paid to the priority scheduling strategy on the samples during training. Humans acquire knowledge gradually from easy to complex concepts, and the difficulty of the same material can also vary significantly in different learning stages. Inspired by this insights, we proposed a novel self-paced dynamic curriculum learning (SPDCL) method for imbalanced text classification, which evaluates the sample difficulty by both linguistic character and model capacity. Meanwhile, rather than using static curriculum learning as in the existing research, our SPDCL can reorder and resample training data by difficulty criterion with an adaptive from easy to hard pace. The extensive experiments on several classification tasks show the effectiveness of SPDCL strategy, especially for the imbalanced dataset.
summary: Recent advances in pre-trained language models have improved the performance for text classification tasks. However, little attention is paid to the priority scheduling strategy on the samples during training. Humans acquire knowledge gradually from easy to complex concepts, and the difficulty of the same material can also vary significantly in different learning stages. Inspired by this insights, we proposed a novel self-paced dynamic curriculum learning (SPDCL) method for imbalanced text classification, which evaluates the sample difficulty by both linguistic character and model capacity. Meanwhile, rather than using static curriculum learning as in the existing research, our SPDCL can reorder and resample training data by difficulty criterion with an adaptive from easy to hard pace. The extensive experiments on several classification tasks show the effectiveness of SPDCL strategy, especially for the imbalanced dataset.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型的最新进展提高了文本分类任务的性能。然而，很少有人关注训练过程中样本的优先级调度策略。人类获取知识的过程是从简单到复杂的概念逐渐进行的，同一材料在不同学习阶段的难度也有很大差异。受这一见解的启发，我们提出了一种用于不平衡文本分类的新颖的自定进度动态课程学习（SPDCL）方法，该方法通过语言特征和模型能力来评估样本难度。同时，我们的 SPDCL 不是像现有研究那样使用静态课程学习，而是可以按照难度标准对训练数据进行重新排序和重新采样，并以从易到难的自适应速度进行。对多个分类任务的广泛实验表明了 SPDCL 策略的有效性，特别是对于不平衡数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自定进度的动态课程学习方法（SPDCL），用于解决不平衡文本分类中样本优先级调度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多采用静态课程学习，忽视了样本难度随训练阶段变化的特点，导致在不平衡数据集中分类效果不佳。
AI.method: SPDCL通过结合语言特征与模型能力动态评估样本难度，按从易到难的自适应节奏重新排序和采样训练数据。
AI.result: 在多个分类任务实验中，SPDCL策略显著提升了模型性能，尤其在处理不平衡数据集时效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 动态课程学习能有效优化不平衡文本分类，通过自适应调整样本难度提升模型泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自定进度的动态课程学习方法（SPDCL），用于解决不平衡文本分类中样本优先级调度不足的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究多采用静态课程学习，忽视了样本难度随训练阶段变化的特点，导致在不平衡数据集中分类效果不佳。
ai_content.method: SPDCL通过结合语言特征与模型能力动态评估样本难度，按从易到难的自适应节奏重新排序和采样训练数据。
ai_content.result: 在多个分类任务实验中，SPDCL策略显著提升了模型性能，尤其在处理不平衡数据集时效果突出。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态课程学习能有效优化不平衡文本分类，通过自适应调整样本难度提升模型泛化能力。

search_text: Improving Imbalanced Text Classification with Dynamic Curriculum Learning 通过动态课程学习改善不平衡的文本分类 Recent advances in pre-trained language models have improved the performance for text classification tasks. However, little attention is paid to the priority scheduling strategy on the samples during training. Humans acquire knowledge gradually from easy to complex concepts, and the difficulty of the same material can also vary significantly in different learning stages. Inspired by this insights, we proposed a novel self-paced dynamic curriculum learning (SPDCL) method for imbalanced text classification, which evaluates the sample difficulty by both linguistic character and model capacity. Meanwhile, rather than using static curriculum learning as in the existing research, our SPDCL can reorder and resample training data by difficulty criterion with an adaptive from easy to hard pace. The extensive experiments on several classification tasks show the effectiveness of SPDCL strategy, especially for the imbalanced dataset. 预训练语言模型的最新进展提高了文本分类任务的性能。然而，很少有人关注训练过程中样本的优先级调度策略。人类获取知识的过程是从简单到复杂的概念逐渐进行的，同一材料在不同学习阶段的难度也有很大差异。受这一见解的启发，我们提出了一种用于不平衡文本分类的新颖的自定进度动态课程学习（SPDCL）方法，该方法通过语言特征和模型能力来评估样本难度。同时，我们的 SPDCL 不是像现有研究那样使用静态课程学习，而是可以按照难度标准对训练数据进行重新排序和重新采样，并以从易到难的自适应速度进行。对多个分类任务的广泛实验表明了 SPDCL 策略的有效性，特别是对于不平衡数据集。 本文提出一种自定进度的动态课程学习方法（SPDCL），用于解决不平衡文本分类中样本优先级调度不足的问题。 Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao
title: Semi-Supervised Learning Based on Reference Model for Low-resource TTS
title_zh: 基于参考模型的低资源TTS半监督学习
comment: Accepted by NMIC2022, The Fourth International Workshop on Network Meets Intelligent Computations
comments: Accepted by NMIC2022, The Fourth International Workshop on Network Meets Intelligent Computations
abstract: Most previous neural text-to-speech (TTS) methods are mainly based on supervised learning methods, which means they depend on a large training dataset and hard to achieve comparable performance under low-resource conditions. To address this issue, we propose a semi-supervised learning method for neural TTS in which labeled target data is limited, which can also resolve the problem of exposure bias in the previous auto-regressive models. Specifically, we pre-train the reference model based on Fastspeech2 with much source data, fine-tuned on a limited target dataset. Meanwhile, pseudo labels generated by the original reference model are used to guide the fine-tuned model's training further, achieve a regularization effect, and reduce the overfitting of the fine-tuned model during training on the limited target data. Experimental results show that our proposed semi-supervised learning scheme with limited target data significantly improves the voice quality for test data to achieve naturalness and robustness in speech synthesis.
summary: Most previous neural text-to-speech (TTS) methods are mainly based on supervised learning methods, which means they depend on a large training dataset and hard to achieve comparable performance under low-resource conditions. To address this issue, we propose a semi-supervised learning method for neural TTS in which labeled target data is limited, which can also resolve the problem of exposure bias in the previous auto-regressive models. Specifically, we pre-train the reference model based on Fastspeech2 with much source data, fine-tuned on a limited target dataset. Meanwhile, pseudo labels generated by the original reference model are used to guide the fine-tuned model's training further, achieve a regularization effect, and reduce the overfitting of the fine-tuned model during training on the limited target data. Experimental results show that our proposed semi-supervised learning scheme with limited target data significantly improves the voice quality for test data to achieve naturalness and robustness in speech synthesis.
abstract_zh: 以往的神经文本转语音（TTS）方法主要基于监督学习方法，这意味着它们依赖于大型训练数据集，并且在资源匮乏的情况下很难达到可比的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种神经TTS的半监督学习方法，其中标记的目标数据是有限的，这也可以解决先前自回归模型中的曝光偏差问题。具体来说，我们使用大量源数据预训练基于 Fastspeech2 的参考模型，并在有限的目标数据集上进行微调。同时，利用原始参考模型生成的伪标签进一步指导微调模型的训练，达到正则化的效果，减少微调模型在有限目标数据上训练时的过拟合。实验结果表明，我们提出的有限目标数据的半监督学习方案显着提高了测试数据的语音质量，实现了语音合成的自然性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于参考模型的半监督学习方法，解决低资源条件下神经网络语音合成（TTS）性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习TTS方法依赖大量标注数据，在低资源场景下难以获得理想效果，且存在暴露偏差问题。
AI.method: 预训练Fastspeech2参考模型后，在有限目标数据上微调；利用原始参考模型生成伪标签，指导微调模型训练以增强正则化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该半监督方案在有限目标数据下显著提升语音自然度与合成鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习有效缓解低资源TTS的过拟合问题，通过参考模型伪标签提升模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Evripidis Bampis,Bruno Escoffier,Niklas Hahn,Michalis Xefteris
title: Online TSP with Known Locations
title_zh: 具有已知位置的在线 TSP
abstract: In this paper, we consider the Online Traveling Salesperson Problem (OLTSP) where the locations of the requests are known in advance, but not their arrival times. We study both the open variant, in which the algorithm is not required to return to the origin when all the requests are served, as well as the closed variant, in which the algorithm has to return to the origin after serving all the requests. Our aim is to measure the impact of the extra knowledge of the locations on the competitiveness of the problem. We present an online 3/2-competitive algorithm for the general case and a matching lower bound for both the open and the closed variant. Then, we focus on some interesting metric spaces (ring, star, semi-line), providing both lower bounds and polynomial time online algorithms for the problem.
summary: In this paper, we consider the Online Traveling Salesperson Problem (OLTSP) where the locations of the requests are known in advance, but not their arrival times. We study both the open variant, in which the algorithm is not required to return to the origin when all the requests are served, as well as the closed variant, in which the algorithm has to return to the origin after serving all the requests. Our aim is to measure the impact of the extra knowledge of the locations on the competitiveness of the problem. We present an online 3/2-competitive algorithm for the general case and a matching lower bound for both the open and the closed variant. Then, we focus on some interesting metric spaces (ring, star, semi-line), providing both lower bounds and polynomial time online algorithms for the problem.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑在线旅行销售员问题（OLTSP），其中提前知道请求的位置，但不知道其到达时间。我们研究了开放变体，其中当所有请求得到满足时，算法不需要返回到原点，以及封闭变体，其中算法必须在满足所有请求后返回到原点。我们的目标是衡量位置的额外知识对问题竞争力的影响。我们针对一般情况提出了一种在线 3/2 竞争算法，并为开放式和封闭式变体提供了匹配的下界。然后，我们关注一些有趣的度量空间（环、星、半线），为问题提供下界和多项式时间在线算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线旅行商问题（OLTSP）中已知请求位置但未知到达时间的情况，分析开环与闭环两种变体的竞争力，并提出相应算法与下界。
AI.motivation: 传统OLTSP假设请求位置未知，但实际中位置可能提前获知。研究此场景下竞争力的变化，可优化在线路径规划策略。
AI.method: 设计3/2-competitive在线算法，结合特定度量空间（环形、星型、半线）的结构特性，提出多项式时间算法并证明下界。
AI.result: 提出适用于一般情况的3/2-competitive算法，证明开环与闭环的下界匹配；针对特定度量空间给出多项式时间算法及对应下界。
AI.conclusion: 位置先验知识可提升OLTSP竞争力，且不同度量空间存在差异化算法效果，为实际路径规划提供理论支持。

authors_text: John So,Amber Xie,Sunggoo Jung,Jeffrey Edlund,Rohan Thakker,Ali Agha-mohammadi,Pieter Abbeel,Stephen James
title: Sim-to-Real via Sim-to-Seg: End-to-end Off-road Autonomous Driving Without Real Data
title_zh: Sim-to-Real via Sim-to-Seg：无需真实数据的端到端越野自动驾驶
abstract: Autonomous driving is complex, requiring sophisticated 3D scene understanding, localization, mapping, and control. Rather than explicitly modelling and fusing each of these components, we instead consider an end-to-end approach via reinforcement learning (RL). However, collecting exploration driving data in the real world is impractical and dangerous. While training in simulation and deploying visual sim-to-real techniques has worked well for robot manipulation, deploying beyond controlled workspace viewpoints remains a challenge. In this paper, we address this challenge by presenting Sim2Seg, a re-imagining of RCAN that crosses the visual reality gap for off-road autonomous driving, without using any real-world data. This is done by learning to translate randomized simulation images into simulated segmentation and depth maps, subsequently enabling real-world images to also be translated. This allows us to train an end-to-end RL policy in simulation, and directly deploy in the real-world. Our approach, which can be trained in 48 hours on 1 GPU, can perform equally as well as a classical perception and control stack that took thousands of engineering hours over several months to build. We hope this work motivates future end-to-end autonomous driving research.
summary: Autonomous driving is complex, requiring sophisticated 3D scene understanding, localization, mapping, and control. Rather than explicitly modelling and fusing each of these components, we instead consider an end-to-end approach via reinforcement learning (RL). However, collecting exploration driving data in the real world is impractical and dangerous. While training in simulation and deploying visual sim-to-real techniques has worked well for robot manipulation, deploying beyond controlled workspace viewpoints remains a challenge. In this paper, we address this challenge by presenting Sim2Seg, a re-imagining of RCAN that crosses the visual reality gap for off-road autonomous driving, without using any real-world data. This is done by learning to translate randomized simulation images into simulated segmentation and depth maps, subsequently enabling real-world images to also be translated. This allows us to train an end-to-end RL policy in simulation, and directly deploy in the real-world. Our approach, which can be trained in 48 hours on 1 GPU, can perform equally as well as a classical perception and control stack that took thousands of engineering hours over several months to build. We hope this work motivates future end-to-end autonomous driving research.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶很复杂，需要复杂的 3D 场景理解、定位、映射和控制。我们没有明确地建模和融合每个组件，而是考虑通过强化学习（RL）的端到端方法。然而，在现实世界中收集勘探驾驶数据是不切实际且危险的。虽然模拟培训和部署视觉模拟真实技术对于机器人操作来说效果很好，但在受控工作空间视点之外进行部署仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们通过提出 Sim2Seg 来应对这一挑战，这是对 RCAN 的重新构想，它跨越了越野自动驾驶的视觉现实差距，而无需使用任何现实世界的数据。这是通过学习将随机模拟图像转换为模拟分割和深度图来完成的，随后也可以转换真实世界的图像。这使我们能够在模拟中训练端到端的强化学习策略，并直接部署在现实世界中。我们的方法可以在 1 个 GPU 上进行 48 小时的训练，其性能与传统的感知和控制堆栈一样好，而传统的感知和控制堆栈需要花费数千个工程时间和几个月的时间来构建。我们希望这项工作能够推动未来的端到端自动驾驶研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sim2Seg方法，通过模拟到分割的迁移实现无需真实数据的端到端越野自动驾驶。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要复杂环境感知与控制，但真实数据采集危险且困难，现有模拟到现实技术难以应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 改进RCAN网络实现模拟图像到分割/深度图的转换，构建端到端强化学习框架，在模拟环境训练后直接部署至真实场景。
AI.result: 48小时单GPU训练即可达到经典感知控制栈（耗时数月开发）的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 证明端到端方法可替代传统模块化系统，为自动驾驶研究提供新方向。

search_text: Sim-to-Real via Sim-to-Seg: End-to-end Off-road Autonomous Driving Without Real Data Sim-to-Real via Sim-to-Seg：无需真实数据的端到端越野自动驾驶 Autonomous driving is complex, requiring sophisticated 3D scene understanding, localization, mapping, and control. Rather than explicitly modelling and fusing each of these components, we instead consider an end-to-end approach via reinforcement learning (RL). However, collecting exploration driving data in the real world is impractical and dangerous. While training in simulation and deploying visual sim-to-real techniques has worked well for robot manipulation, deploying beyond controlled workspace viewpoints remains a challenge. In this paper, we address this challenge by presenting Sim2Seg, a re-imagining of RCAN that crosses the visual reality gap for off-road autonomous driving, without using any real-world data. This is done by learning to translate randomized simulation images into simulated segmentation and depth maps, subsequently enabling real-world images to also be translated. This allows us to train an end-to-end RL policy in simulation, and directly deploy in the real-world. Our approach, which can be trained in 48 hours on 1 GPU, can perform equally as well as a classical perception and control stack that took thousands of engineering hours over several months to build. We hope this work motivates future end-to-end autonomous driving research. 自动驾驶很复杂，需要复杂的 3D 场景理解、定位、映射和控制。我们没有明确地建模和融合每个组件，而是考虑通过强化学习（RL）的端到端方法。然而，在现实世界中收集勘探驾驶数据是不切实际且危险的。虽然模拟培训和部署视觉模拟真实技术对于机器人操作来说效果很好，但在受控工作空间视点之外进行部署仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们通过提出 Sim2Seg 来应对这一挑战，这是对 RCAN 的重新构想，它跨越了越野自动驾驶的视觉现实差距，而无需使用任何现实世界的数据。这是通过学习将随机模拟图像转换为模拟分割和深度图来完成的，随后也可以转换真实世界的图像。这使我们能够在模拟中训练端到端的强化学习策略，并直接部署在现实世界中。我们的方法可以在 1 个 GPU 上进行 48 小时的训练，其性能与传统的感知和控制堆栈一样好，而传统的感知和控制堆栈需要花费数千个工程时间和几个月的时间来构建。我们希望这项工作能够推动未来的端到端自动驾驶研究。 本文提出Sim2Seg方法，通过模拟到分割的迁移实现无需真实数据的端到端越野自动驾驶。 John So,Amber Xie,Sunggoo Jung,Jeffrey Edlund,Rohan Thakker,Ali Agha-mohammadi,Pieter Abbeel,Stephen James cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Marcelo Matheus Gauy,Marcelo Finger
title: Pretrained audio neural networks for Speech emotion recognition in Portuguese
title_zh: 用于葡萄牙语语音情感识别的预训练音频神经网络
comment: ef:First Workshop on Automatic Speech Recognition for Spontaneous and Prepared Speech Speech emotion recognition in Portuguese (SER 2022)
comments: ef:First Workshop on Automatic Speech Recognition for Spontaneous and Prepared Speech Speech emotion recognition in Portuguese (SER 2022)
abstract: The goal of speech emotion recognition (SER) is to identify the emotional aspects of speech. The SER challenge for Brazilian Portuguese speech was proposed with short snippets of Portuguese which are classified as neutral, non-neutral female and non-neutral male according to paralinguistic elements (laughing, crying, etc). This dataset contains about $50$ minutes of Brazilian Portuguese speech. As the dataset leans on the small side, we investigate whether a combination of transfer learning and data augmentation techniques can produce positive results. Thus, by combining a data augmentation technique called SpecAugment, with the use of Pretrained Audio Neural Networks (PANNs) for transfer learning we are able to obtain interesting results. The PANNs (CNN6, CNN10 and CNN14) are pretrained on a large dataset called AudioSet containing more than $5000$ hours of audio. They were finetuned on the SER dataset and the best performing model (CNN10) on the validation set was submitted to the challenge, achieving an $F1$ score of $0.73$ up from $0.54$ from the baselines provided by the challenge. Moreover, we also tested the use of Transformer neural architecture, pretrained on about $600$ hours of Brazilian Portuguese audio data. Transformers, as well as more complex models of PANNs (CNN14), fail to generalize to the test set in the SER dataset and do not beat the baseline. Considering the limitation of the dataset sizes, currently the best approach for SER is using PANNs (specifically, CNN6 and CNN10).
summary: The goal of speech emotion recognition (SER) is to identify the emotional aspects of speech. The SER challenge for Brazilian Portuguese speech was proposed with short snippets of Portuguese which are classified as neutral, non-neutral female and non-neutral male according to paralinguistic elements (laughing, crying, etc). This dataset contains about $50$ minutes of Brazilian Portuguese speech. As the dataset leans on the small side, we investigate whether a combination of transfer learning and data augmentation techniques can produce positive results. Thus, by combining a data augmentation technique called SpecAugment, with the use of Pretrained Audio Neural Networks (PANNs) for transfer learning we are able to obtain interesting results. The PANNs (CNN6, CNN10 and CNN14) are pretrained on a large dataset called AudioSet containing more than $5000$ hours of audio. They were finetuned on the SER dataset and the best performing model (CNN10) on the validation set was submitted to the challenge, achieving an $F1$ score of $0.73$ up from $0.54$ from the baselines provided by the challenge. Moreover, we also tested the use of Transformer neural architecture, pretrained on about $600$ hours of Brazilian Portuguese audio data. Transformers, as well as more complex models of PANNs (CNN14), fail to generalize to the test set in the SER dataset and do not beat the baseline. Considering the limitation of the dataset sizes, currently the best approach for SER is using PANNs (specifically, CNN6 and CNN10).
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）的目标是识别语音的情感方面。针对巴西葡萄牙语语音的 SER 挑战是用葡萄牙语的简短片段提出的，根据副语言元素（笑、哭等）将其分为中性、非中性女性和非中性男性。该数据集包含约 50 分钟的巴西葡萄牙语语音。由于数据集偏小，我们研究了迁移学习和数据增强技术的结合是否可以产生积极的结果。因此，通过将称为 SpecAugment 的数据增强技术与使用预训练音频神经网络 (PANN) 进行迁移学习相结合，我们能够获得有趣的结果。 PANN（CNN6、CNN10 和 CNN14）在名为 AudioSet 的大型数据集上进行预训练，该数据集包含超过 5000 小时的音频。它们在 SER 数据集上进行了微调，并将验证集上表现最佳的模型 (CNN10) 提交给挑战赛，获得了 0.73 美元的 $F1$ 分数，比挑战赛提供的基线的 0.54 美元高出 0.73 美元。此外，我们还测试了 Transformer 神经架构的使用，该架构对大约 600 美元小时的巴西葡萄牙语音频数据进行了预训练。 Transformer 以及更复杂的 PANN 模型 (CNN14) 无法泛化到 SER 数据集中的测试集，也无法超越基线。考虑到数据集大小的限制，目前 SER 的最佳方法是使用 PANN（特别是 CNN6 和 CNN10）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用预训练音频神经网络进行葡萄牙语语音情感识别（SER），通过迁移学习和数据增强技术提升小数据集下的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 由于巴西葡萄牙语SER数据集规模较小（仅50分钟音频），传统方法效果有限，需探索更高效的模型训练策略。
AI.method: 结合SpecAugment数据增强技术与预训练音频神经网络（PANNs，包括CNN6/CNN10/CNN14），并在SER数据集上微调模型；同时测试了基于600小时葡萄牙语数据预训练的Transformer模型。
AI.result: CNN10模型在验证集上达到0.73的F1分数（较基线提升0.19），而Transformer和CNN14模型未超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 在小规模数据集下，PANNs（特别是CNN6和CNN10）是当前SER任务的最佳方案，复杂模型如Transformer和CNN14难以泛化。

authors_text: Nada Osman,Guglielmo Camporese,Lamberto Ballan
title: TAMFormer: Multi-Modal Transformer with Learned Attention Mask for Early Intent Prediction
title_zh: TAMFormer：具有学习注意力掩模的多模态变压器，用于早期意图预测
abstract: Human intention prediction is a growing area of research where an activity in a video has to be anticipated by a vision-based system. To this end, the model creates a representation of the past, and subsequently, it produces future hypotheses about upcoming scenarios. In this work, we focus on pedestrians' early intention prediction in which, from a current observation of an urban scene, the model predicts the future activity of pedestrians that approach the street. Our method is based on a multi-modal transformer that encodes past observations and produces multiple predictions at different anticipation times. Moreover, we propose to learn the attention masks of our transformer-based model (Temporal Adaptive Mask Transformer) in order to weigh differently present and past temporal dependencies. We investigate our method on several public benchmarks for early intention prediction, improving the prediction performances at different anticipation times compared to the previous works.
summary: Human intention prediction is a growing area of research where an activity in a video has to be anticipated by a vision-based system. To this end, the model creates a representation of the past, and subsequently, it produces future hypotheses about upcoming scenarios. In this work, we focus on pedestrians' early intention prediction in which, from a current observation of an urban scene, the model predicts the future activity of pedestrians that approach the street. Our method is based on a multi-modal transformer that encodes past observations and produces multiple predictions at different anticipation times. Moreover, we propose to learn the attention masks of our transformer-based model (Temporal Adaptive Mask Transformer) in order to weigh differently present and past temporal dependencies. We investigate our method on several public benchmarks for early intention prediction, improving the prediction performances at different anticipation times compared to the previous works.
abstract_zh: 人类意图预测是一个不断发展的研究领域，其中视频中的活动必须由基于视觉的系统来预测。为此，该模型创建了过去的表示，随后，它产生了关于即将发生的场景的未来假设。在这项工作中，我们关注行人的早期意图预测，其中，根据当前对城市场景的观察，模型预测接近街道的行人的未来活动。我们的方法基于多模态转换器，该转换器对过去的观察结果进行编码并在不同的预期时间产生多个预测。此外，我们建议学习基于变压器的模型（时间自适应掩模变压器）的注意掩模，以便权衡不同的当前和过去的时间依赖性。我们在几个早期意图预测的公共基准上研究了我们的方法，与之前的工作相比，提高了不同预期时间的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAMFormer模型，通过多模态Transformer和学习注意力掩码机制，实现对行人早期意图的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理行人意图预测时，难以有效建模过去与当前时间步的动态依赖关系，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计多模态Transformer架构，结合时序自适应掩码（TAM）学习机制，动态调整历史与当前帧的注意力权重，生成多时间步长的未来行为预测。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上验证，相较现有方法在不同预测时间步长下均取得性能提升，尤其在早期意图预测任务中表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入可学习的注意力掩码机制，TAMFormer有效捕捉了时序依赖特征，为早期意图预测提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出TAMFormer模型，通过多模态Transformer和学习注意力掩码机制，实现对行人早期意图的预测。

search_text: TAMFormer: Multi-Modal Transformer with Learned Attention Mask for Early Intent Prediction TAMFormer：具有学习注意力掩模的多模态变压器，用于早期意图预测 Human intention prediction is a growing area of research where an activity in a video has to be anticipated by a vision-based system. To this end, the model creates a representation of the past, and subsequently, it produces future hypotheses about upcoming scenarios. In this work, we focus on pedestrians' early intention prediction in which, from a current observation of an urban scene, the model predicts the future activity of pedestrians that approach the street. Our method is based on a multi-modal transformer that encodes past observations and produces multiple predictions at different anticipation times. Moreover, we propose to learn the attention masks of our transformer-based model (Temporal Adaptive Mask Transformer) in order to weigh differently present and past temporal dependencies. We investigate our method on several public benchmarks for early intention prediction, improving the prediction performances at different anticipation times compared to the previous works. 人类意图预测是一个不断发展的研究领域，其中视频中的活动必须由基于视觉的系统来预测。为此，该模型创建了过去的表示，随后，它产生了关于即将发生的场景的未来假设。在这项工作中，我们关注行人的早期意图预测，其中，根据当前对城市场景的观察，模型预测接近街道的行人的未来活动。我们的方法基于多模态转换器，该转换器对过去的观察结果进行编码并在不同的预期时间产生多个预测。此外，我们建议学习基于变压器的模型（时间自适应掩模变压器）的注意掩模，以便权衡不同的当前和过去的时间依赖性。我们在几个早期意图预测的公共基准上研究了我们的方法，与之前的工作相比，提高了不同预期时间的预测性能。 本文提出TAMFormer模型，通过多模态Transformer和学习注意力掩码机制，实现对行人早期意图的预测。 Nada Osman,Guglielmo Camporese,Lamberto Ballan cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Colin Leong,Joshua Nemecek,Jacob Mansdorfer,Anna Filighera,Abraham Owodunni,Daniel Whitenack
title: Bloom Library: Multimodal Datasets in 300+ Languages for a Variety of Downstream Tasks
title_zh: Bloom 库：用于各种下游任务的 300 多种语言的多模态数据集
comment: 14 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, accepted to and presented at EMNLP 2022
comments: 14 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, accepted to and presented at EMNLP 2022
abstract: We present Bloom Library, a linguistically diverse set of multimodal and multilingual datasets for language modeling, image captioning, visual storytelling, and speech synthesis/recognition. These datasets represent either the most, or among the most, multilingual datasets for each of the included downstream tasks. In total, the initial release of the Bloom Library datasets covers 363 languages across 32 language families. We train downstream task models for various languages represented in the data, showing the viability of the data for future work in low-resource, multimodal NLP and establishing the first known baselines for these downstream tasks in certain languages (e.g., Bisu [bzi], with an estimated population of 700 users). Some of these first-of-their-kind baselines are comparable to state-of-the-art performance for higher-resourced languages. The Bloom Library datasets are released under Creative Commons licenses on the Hugging Face datasets hub to catalyze more linguistically diverse research in the included downstream tasks.
summary: We present Bloom Library, a linguistically diverse set of multimodal and multilingual datasets for language modeling, image captioning, visual storytelling, and speech synthesis/recognition. These datasets represent either the most, or among the most, multilingual datasets for each of the included downstream tasks. In total, the initial release of the Bloom Library datasets covers 363 languages across 32 language families. We train downstream task models for various languages represented in the data, showing the viability of the data for future work in low-resource, multimodal NLP and establishing the first known baselines for these downstream tasks in certain languages (e.g., Bisu [bzi], with an estimated population of 700 users). Some of these first-of-their-kind baselines are comparable to state-of-the-art performance for higher-resourced languages. The Bloom Library datasets are released under Creative Commons licenses on the Hugging Face datasets hub to catalyze more linguistically diverse research in the included downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Bloom Library，这是一组语言多样化的多模式和多语言数据集，用于语言建模、图像字幕、视觉叙事和语音合成/识别。这些数据集代表了每个包含的下游任务的最多或最多的多语言数据集。总体而言，Bloom Library 数据集的初始版本涵盖 32 个语系的 363 种语言。我们为数据中表示的各种语言训练下游任务模型，显示数据在低资源、多模式 NLP 中未来工作的可行性，并为某些语言的这些下游任务建立第一个已知基线（例如 Bisu [bzi]，估计有 700 名用户）。其中一些首创的基线可与资源丰富的语言的最先进性能相媲美。 Bloom 库数据集根据 Creative Commons 许可在 Hugging Face 数据集中心发布，以促进所包含的下游任务中更加语言多样化的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Bloom Library，一个包含300多种语言的多模态数据集库，用于语言建模、图像描述、视觉叙事和语音合成/识别等下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在低资源语言的多模态NLP任务中缺乏足够数据支持，需构建多样化数据集推动相关研究。
AI.method: 收集覆盖32个语言家族的363种语言数据，构建多任务数据集，并训练对应语言的下游模型验证数据有效性。
AI.result: 在363种语言中建立首个基线模型，部分低资源语言（如Bisu语）性能接近高资源语言的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Bloom Library通过开源多语言数据集，为低资源语言的多模态研究提供了基础，推动了语言技术的包容性发展。

authors_text: Shoichi Koyama,Kazuyuki Arikawa
title: Weighted Pressure Matching Based on Kernel Interpolation For Sound Field Reproduction
title_zh: 基于核插值的加权压力匹配声场再现
comment: Presented at 24th International Congress on Acoustics (ICA) 2022
comments: Presented at 24th International Congress on Acoustics (ICA) 2022
abstract: A sound field reproduction method called weighted pressure matching is proposed. Sound field reproduction is aimed at synthesizing the desired sound field using multiple loudspeakers inside a target region. Optimization-based methods are derived from the minimization of errors between synthesized and desired sound fields, which enable the use of an arbitrary array geometry in contrast with integral-equation-based methods. Pressure matching is widely used in the optimization-based sound field reproduction methods because of its simplicity of implementation. Its cost function is defined as the synthesis errors at multiple control points inside the target region; then, the driving signals of the loudspeakers are obtained by solving a least-squares problem. However, in pressure matching, the region between the control points is not taken into consideration. We define the cost function as the regional integration of the synthesis error over the target region. On the basis of the kernel interpolation of the sound field, this cost function is represented as the weighted square error of the synthesized pressures at the control points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed weighted pressure matching outperforms conventional pressure matching.
summary: A sound field reproduction method called weighted pressure matching is proposed. Sound field reproduction is aimed at synthesizing the desired sound field using multiple loudspeakers inside a target region. Optimization-based methods are derived from the minimization of errors between synthesized and desired sound fields, which enable the use of an arbitrary array geometry in contrast with integral-equation-based methods. Pressure matching is widely used in the optimization-based sound field reproduction methods because of its simplicity of implementation. Its cost function is defined as the synthesis errors at multiple control points inside the target region; then, the driving signals of the loudspeakers are obtained by solving a least-squares problem. However, in pressure matching, the region between the control points is not taken into consideration. We define the cost function as the regional integration of the synthesis error over the target region. On the basis of the kernel interpolation of the sound field, this cost function is represented as the weighted square error of the synthesized pressures at the control points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed weighted pressure matching outperforms conventional pressure matching.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种称为加权压力匹配的声场再现方法。声场再现旨在使用目标区域内的多个扬声器合成所需的声场。基于优化的方法源自合成声场和所需声场之间的误差最小化，与基于积分方程的方法相比，这使得能够使用任意阵列几何形状。压力匹配因其实现简单而被广泛应用于基于优化的声场再现方法中。其代价函数定义为目标区域内多个控制点的综合误差；然后，通过求解最小二乘问题得到扬声器的驱动信号。然而，在压力匹配中，没有考虑控制点之间的区域。我们将成本函数定义为目标区域综合误差的区域积分。在声场核插值的基础上，该成本函数表示为控制点处合成压力的加权平方误差。实验结果表明，所提出的加权压力匹配优于传统压力匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核插值的加权压力匹配方法，用于声场再现。
AI.motivation: 传统压力匹配方法在控制点之间的区域未被考虑，导致声场再现效果有限，因此需要改进方法以提高准确性。
AI.method: 基于声场的核插值，将成本函数定义为目标区域内合成误差的区域积分，并表示为控制点上合成压力的加权平方误差。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的加权压力匹配方法优于传统的压力匹配方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的加权压力匹配方法通过考虑控制点之间的区域，提高了声场再现的准确性。

authors_text: Wenbo Gong,Joel Jennings,Cheng Zhang,Nick Pawlowski
title: Rhino: Deep Causal Temporal Relationship Learning With History-dependent Noise
title_zh: Rhino：利用历史相关噪声进行深度因果时间关系学习
abstract: Discovering causal relationships between different variables from time series data has been a long-standing challenge for many domains such as climate science, finance, and healthcare. Given the complexity of real-world relationships and the nature of observations in discrete time, causal discovery methods need to consider non-linear relations between variables, instantaneous effects and history-dependent noise (the change of noise distribution due to past actions). However, previous works do not offer a solution addressing all these problems together. In this paper, we propose a novel causal relationship learning framework for time-series data, called Rhino, which combines vector auto-regression, deep learning and variational inference to model non-linear relationships with instantaneous effects while allowing the noise distribution to be modulated by historical observations. Theoretically, we prove the structural identifiability of Rhino. Our empirical results from extensive synthetic experiments and two real-world benchmarks demonstrate better discovery performance compared to relevant baselines, with ablation studies revealing its robustness under model misspecification.
summary: Discovering causal relationships between different variables from time series data has been a long-standing challenge for many domains such as climate science, finance, and healthcare. Given the complexity of real-world relationships and the nature of observations in discrete time, causal discovery methods need to consider non-linear relations between variables, instantaneous effects and history-dependent noise (the change of noise distribution due to past actions). However, previous works do not offer a solution addressing all these problems together. In this paper, we propose a novel causal relationship learning framework for time-series data, called Rhino, which combines vector auto-regression, deep learning and variational inference to model non-linear relationships with instantaneous effects while allowing the noise distribution to be modulated by historical observations. Theoretically, we prove the structural identifiability of Rhino. Our empirical results from extensive synthetic experiments and two real-world benchmarks demonstrate better discovery performance compared to relevant baselines, with ablation studies revealing its robustness under model misspecification.
abstract_zh: 从时间序列数据中发现不同变量之间的因果关系一直是气候科学、金融和医疗保健等许多领域面临的长期挑战。考虑到现实世界关系的复杂性和离散时间观测的性质，因果发现方法需要考虑变量、瞬时效应和历史相关噪声（由于过去的行为而导致的噪声分布的变化）之间的非线性关系。然而，以前的工作并没有提供解决所有这些问题的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的时间序列数据因果关系学习框架，称为Rhino，它结合了向量自回归、深度学习和变分推理来建模具有瞬时效应的非线性关系，同时允许通过历史观察来调节噪声分布。理论上，我们证明了Rhino的结构可识别性。我们从广泛的合成实验和两个现实世界基准中得到的实证结果表明，与相关基线相比，发现性能更好，消融研究揭示了其在模型错误指定下的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Rhino的框架，用于从时间序列数据中学习具有历史依赖噪声的深度因果时序关系。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法无法同时处理非线性关系、即时效应和历史依赖噪声等复杂时序数据特性。
AI.method: 结合向量自回归(VAR)、深度学习和变分推断，建模非线性关系与即时效应，允许噪声分布由历史观测动态调节。
AI.result: 合成实验和真实数据集验证显示，Rhino在因果发现性能上优于现有方法，且对模型误设具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 理论证明了Rhino的结构可识别性，实验证明其有效性和鲁棒性，为复杂时序数据的因果发现提供了新方法。

search_text: Rhino: Deep Causal Temporal Relationship Learning With History-dependent Noise Rhino：利用历史相关噪声进行深度因果时间关系学习 Discovering causal relationships between different variables from time series data has been a long-standing challenge for many domains such as climate science, finance, and healthcare. Given the complexity of real-world relationships and the nature of observations in discrete time, causal discovery methods need to consider non-linear relations between variables, instantaneous effects and history-dependent noise (the change of noise distribution due to past actions). However, previous works do not offer a solution addressing all these problems together. In this paper, we propose a novel causal relationship learning framework for time-series data, called Rhino, which combines vector auto-regression, deep learning and variational inference to model non-linear relationships with instantaneous effects while allowing the noise distribution to be modulated by historical observations. Theoretically, we prove the structural identifiability of Rhino. Our empirical results from extensive synthetic experiments and two real-world benchmarks demonstrate better discovery performance compared to relevant baselines, with ablation studies revealing its robustness under model misspecification. 从时间序列数据中发现不同变量之间的因果关系一直是气候科学、金融和医疗保健等许多领域面临的长期挑战。考虑到现实世界关系的复杂性和离散时间观测的性质，因果发现方法需要考虑变量、瞬时效应和历史相关噪声（由于过去的行为而导致的噪声分布的变化）之间的非线性关系。然而，以前的工作并没有提供解决所有这些问题的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的时间序列数据因果关系学习框架，称为Rhino，它结合了向量自回归、深度学习和变分推理来建模具有瞬时效应的非线性关系，同时允许通过历史观察来调节噪声分布。理论上，我们证明了Rhino的结构可识别性。我们从广泛的合成实验和两个现实世界基准中得到的实证结果表明，与相关基线相比，发现性能更好，消融研究揭示了其在模型错误指定下的稳健性。 提出一种名为Rhino的框架，用于从时间序列数据中学习具有历史依赖噪声的深度因果时序关系。 Wenbo Gong,Joel Jennings,Cheng Zhang,Nick Pawlowski cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Diego Ulisse Pizzagalli,Ilaria Arini,Mauro Prevostini
title: ClipBot: an educational, physically impaired robot that learns to walk via genetic algorithm optimization
title_zh: ClipBot：一种具有教育意义的身体受损机器人，通过遗传算法优化学习行走
abstract: Educational robots allow experimenting with a variety of principles from mechanics, electronics, and informatics. Here we propose ClipBot, a low-cost, do-it-yourself, robot whose skeleton is made of two paper clips. An Arduino nano microcontroller actuates two servo motors that move the paper clips. However, such mechanical configuration confers physical impairments to movement. This creates the need for and allows experimenting with artificial intelligence methods to overcome hardware limitations. We report our experience in the usage of this robot during the study week 'fascinating informatics', organized by the Swiss Foundation Schweizer Jugend Forscht (www.sjf.ch). Students at the high school level were asked to implement a genetic algorithm to optimize the movements of the robot until it learned to walk. Such a methodology allowed the robot to learn the motor actuation scheme yielding straight movement in the forward direction using less than 20 iterations.
summary: Educational robots allow experimenting with a variety of principles from mechanics, electronics, and informatics. Here we propose ClipBot, a low-cost, do-it-yourself, robot whose skeleton is made of two paper clips. An Arduino nano microcontroller actuates two servo motors that move the paper clips. However, such mechanical configuration confers physical impairments to movement. This creates the need for and allows experimenting with artificial intelligence methods to overcome hardware limitations. We report our experience in the usage of this robot during the study week 'fascinating informatics', organized by the Swiss Foundation Schweizer Jugend Forscht (www.sjf.ch). Students at the high school level were asked to implement a genetic algorithm to optimize the movements of the robot until it learned to walk. Such a methodology allowed the robot to learn the motor actuation scheme yielding straight movement in the forward direction using less than 20 iterations.
abstract_zh: 教育机器人允许尝试机械、电子和信息学的各种原理。在这里，我们提出了 ClipBot，这是一种低成本、DIY 的机器人，其骨架由两个回形针制成。 Arduino 纳米微控制器驱动两个伺服电机来移动回形针。然而，这种机械构造对运动造成身体损伤。这就产生了对人工智能方法的需求并允许尝试人工智能方法来克服硬件限制。我们报告了在由瑞士基金会 Schweizer Jugend Forscht (www.sjf.ch) 组织的“迷人信息学”学习周期间使用该机器人的经验。高中阶段的学生被要求实施遗传算法来优化机器人的动作，直到它学会走路。这种方法使机器人能够学习电机驱动方案，从而使用不到 20 次迭代实现向前方向的直线运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低成本的教育机器人ClipBot，通过遗传算法优化其运动控制，使其克服机械结构缺陷并实现行走。
AI.motivation: 通过设计具有物理缺陷的教育机器人，让学生在实践中探索人工智能方法解决硬件限制问题，培养跨学科能力。
AI.method: 使用Arduino Nano控制双伺服电机驱动纸夹骨架结构，学生通过遗传算法优化运动参数，迭代少于20次实现直线行走。
AI.result: 学生成功使ClipBot在20次迭代内学会向前直线行走，验证了遗传算法在解决机械约束问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ClipBot作为教育工具展示了遗传算法在硬件限制场景下的应用潜力，为STEM教育提供了创新实践平台。
