authors_text: Wei Wang,Chao Zhang,Xiaopei Wu
title: Pronunciation Generation for Foreign Language Words in Intra-Sentential Code-Switching Speech Recognition
title_zh: 句内语码转换语音识别中外语单词的发音生成
abstract: Code-Switching refers to the phenomenon of switching languages within a sentence or discourse. However, limited code-switching , different language phoneme-sets and high rebuilding costs throw a challenge to make the specialized acoustic model for code-switching speech recognition. In this paper, we make use of limited code-switching data as driving materials and explore a shortcut to quickly develop intra-sentential code-switching recognition skill on the commissioned native language acoustic model, where we propose a data-driven method to make the seed lexicon which is used to train grapheme-to-phoneme model to predict mapping pronunciations for foreign language word in code-switching sentences. The core work of the data-driven technology in this paper consists of a phonetic decoding method and different selection methods. And for imbalanced word-level driving materials problem, we have an internal assistance inspiration that learning the good pronunciation rules in the words that possess sufficient materials using the grapheme-to-phoneme model to help the scarce. Our experiments show that the Mixed Error Rate in intra-sentential Chinese-English code-switching recognition reduced from 29.15\%, acquired on the pure Chinese recognizer, to 12.13\% by adding foreign language words' pronunciation through our data-driven approach, and finally get the best result 11.14\% with the combination of different selection methods and internal assistance tactic.
summary: Code-Switching refers to the phenomenon of switching languages within a sentence or discourse. However, limited code-switching , different language phoneme-sets and high rebuilding costs throw a challenge to make the specialized acoustic model for code-switching speech recognition. In this paper, we make use of limited code-switching data as driving materials and explore a shortcut to quickly develop intra-sentential code-switching recognition skill on the commissioned native language acoustic model, where we propose a data-driven method to make the seed lexicon which is used to train grapheme-to-phoneme model to predict mapping pronunciations for foreign language word in code-switching sentences. The core work of the data-driven technology in this paper consists of a phonetic decoding method and different selection methods. And for imbalanced word-level driving materials problem, we have an internal assistance inspiration that learning the good pronunciation rules in the words that possess sufficient materials using the grapheme-to-phoneme model to help the scarce. Our experiments show that the Mixed Error Rate in intra-sentential Chinese-English code-switching recognition reduced from 29.15\%, acquired on the pure Chinese recognizer, to 12.13\% by adding foreign language words' pronunciation through our data-driven approach, and finally get the best result 11.14\% with the combination of different selection methods and internal assistance tactic.
abstract_zh: 语码转换是指在句子或话语中转换语言的现象。然而，有限的语码转换、不同的语言音素集和高昂的重建成本给构建用于语码转换语音识别的专用声学模型带来了挑战。本文利用有限的语码转换数据作为驱动材料，探索了在委托的母语声学模型上快速开发句内语码转换识别技能的捷径，提出了一种数据驱动的方法来制作种子词典，用于训练字素到音素模型来预测语码转换句子中外语单词的映射发音。本文数据驱动技术的核心工作包括语音解码方法和不同的选择方法。而对于词级驱动材料不平衡的问题，我们有一个内在的辅助灵感，即利用字素到音素模型来学习拥有足够材料的单词中良好的发音规则，以帮助稀缺的。我们的实验表明，通过我们的数据驱动方法添加外语单词发音，句内汉英语码转换识别的混合错误率从纯中文识别器上获得的29.15%降低到12.13%，并最终通过不同选择方法和内部辅助策略的结合得到最佳结果11.14%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的方法生成外语词发音，以提升语内语码转换语音识别的准确性
AI.motivation: 现有方法因数据有限、多语言音素集差异及重建成本高，难以有效处理语内语码转换中的外语词发音问题
AI.method: 通过数据驱动生成种子词典训练图素到音素模型，结合语音解码、选择方法及内部辅助策略处理数据不平衡问题
AI.result: 混合错误率从29.15%降至11.14%，显著提升识别准确率
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法结合多种策略能有效提升语内语码转换识别性能，为多语言语音识别提供新思路

search_text: Pronunciation Generation for Foreign Language Words in Intra-Sentential Code-Switching Speech Recognition 句内语码转换语音识别中外语单词的发音生成 Code-Switching refers to the phenomenon of switching languages within a sentence or discourse. However, limited code-switching , different language phoneme-sets and high rebuilding costs throw a challenge to make the specialized acoustic model for code-switching speech recognition. In this paper, we make use of limited code-switching data as driving materials and explore a shortcut to quickly develop intra-sentential code-switching recognition skill on the commissioned native language acoustic model, where we propose a data-driven method to make the seed lexicon which is used to train grapheme-to-phoneme model to predict mapping pronunciations for foreign language word in code-switching sentences. The core work of the data-driven technology in this paper consists of a phonetic decoding method and different selection methods. And for imbalanced word-level driving materials problem, we have an internal assistance inspiration that learning the good pronunciation rules in the words that possess sufficient materials using the grapheme-to-phoneme model to help the scarce. Our experiments show that the Mixed Error Rate in intra-sentential Chinese-English code-switching recognition reduced from 29.15\%, acquired on the pure Chinese recognizer, to 12.13\% by adding foreign language words' pronunciation through our data-driven approach, and finally get the best result 11.14\% with the combination of different selection methods and internal assistance tactic. 语码转换是指在句子或话语中转换语言的现象。然而，有限的语码转换、不同的语言音素集和高昂的重建成本给构建用于语码转换语音识别的专用声学模型带来了挑战。本文利用有限的语码转换数据作为驱动材料，探索了在委托的母语声学模型上快速开发句内语码转换识别技能的捷径，提出了一种数据驱动的方法来制作种子词典，用于训练字素到音素模型来预测语码转换句子中外语单词的映射发音。本文数据驱动技术的核心工作包括语音解码方法和不同的选择方法。而对于词级驱动材料不平衡的问题，我们有一个内在的辅助灵感，即利用字素到音素模型来学习拥有足够材料的单词中良好的发音规则，以帮助稀缺的。我们的实验表明，通过我们的数据驱动方法添加外语单词发音，句内汉英语码转换识别的混合错误率从纯中文识别器上获得的29.15%降低到12.13%，并最终通过不同选择方法和内部辅助策略的结合得到最佳结果11.14%。 提出一种数据驱动的方法生成外语词发音，以提升语内语码转换语音识别的准确性 Wei Wang,Chao Zhang,Xiaopei Wu cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Jonas Gehring,Deepak Gopinath,Jungdam Won,Andreas Krause,Gabriel Synnaeve,Nicolas Usunier
title: Leveraging Demonstrations with Latent Space Priors
title_zh: 利用潜在空间先验的演示
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (03/2023)
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (03/2023)
abstract: Demonstrations provide insight into relevant state or action space regions, bearing great potential to boost the efficiency and practicality of reinforcement learning agents. In this work, we propose to leverage demonstration datasets by combining skill learning and sequence modeling. Starting with a learned joint latent space, we separately train a generative model of demonstration sequences and an accompanying low-level policy. The sequence model forms a latent space prior over plausible demonstration behaviors to accelerate learning of high-level policies. We show how to acquire such priors from state-only motion capture demonstrations and explore several methods for integrating them into policy learning on transfer tasks. Our experimental results confirm that latent space priors provide significant gains in learning speed and final performance. We benchmark our approach on a set of challenging sparse-reward environments with a complex, simulated humanoid, and on offline RL benchmarks for navigation and object manipulation. Videos, source code and pre-trained models are available at the corresponding project website at https://facebookresearch.github.io/latent-space-priors .
summary: Demonstrations provide insight into relevant state or action space regions, bearing great potential to boost the efficiency and practicality of reinforcement learning agents. In this work, we propose to leverage demonstration datasets by combining skill learning and sequence modeling. Starting with a learned joint latent space, we separately train a generative model of demonstration sequences and an accompanying low-level policy. The sequence model forms a latent space prior over plausible demonstration behaviors to accelerate learning of high-level policies. We show how to acquire such priors from state-only motion capture demonstrations and explore several methods for integrating them into policy learning on transfer tasks. Our experimental results confirm that latent space priors provide significant gains in learning speed and final performance. We benchmark our approach on a set of challenging sparse-reward environments with a complex, simulated humanoid, and on offline RL benchmarks for navigation and object manipulation. Videos, source code and pre-trained models are available at the corresponding project website at https://facebookresearch.github.io/latent-space-priors .
abstract_zh: 演示提供了对相关状态或动作空间区域的深入了解，具有提高强化学习代理的效率和实用性的巨大潜力。在这项工作中，我们建议通过结合技能学习和序列建模来利用演示数据集。从学习的联合潜在空间开始，我们分别训练演示序列的生成模型和伴随的低级策略。序列模型形成了先于合理示范行为的潜在空间，以加速高层政策的学习。我们展示了如何从纯状态动作捕捉演示中获取此类先验，并探索将它们集成到转移任务的策略学习中的几种方法。我们的实验结果证实，潜在空间先验可以显着提高学习速度和最终性能。我们在一组具有复杂的模拟人形机器人的具有挑战性的稀疏奖励环境以及用于导航和对象操作的离线强化学习基准上对我们的方法进行了基准测试。视频、源代码和预训练模型可在相应项目网站 https://facebookresearch.github.io/latent-space-priors 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合技能学习与序列建模的方法，通过潜在空间先验提升强化学习效率。
AI.motivation: 演示数据能提供状态/动作空间的关键信息，但如何有效利用这些数据提升强化学习效率是核心挑战。
AI.method: 构建联合潜在空间，分离训练生成模型（建模演示序列）与低级策略，通过序列模型形成潜在空间先验辅助高层策略学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在稀疏奖励环境与离线RL基准测试中显著提升学习速度与最终性能。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间先验有效整合演示数据，为复杂任务的强化学习提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jee-weon Jung,Hee-Soo Heo,Bong-Jin Lee,Jaesung Huh,Andrew Brown,Youngki Kwon,Shinji Watanabe,Joon Son Chung
title: In search of strong embedding extractors for speaker diarisation
title_zh: 寻找用于说话人二值化的强大嵌入提取器
abstract: Speaker embedding extractors (EEs), which map input audio to a speaker discriminant latent space, are of paramount importance in speaker diarisation. However, there are several challenges when adopting EEs for diarisation, from which we tackle two key problems. First, the evaluation is not straightforward because the features required for better performance differ between speaker verification and diarisation. We show that better performance on widely adopted speaker verification evaluation protocols does not lead to better diarisation performance. Second, embedding extractors have not seen utterances in which multiple speakers exist. These inputs are inevitably present in speaker diarisation because of overlapped speech and speaker changes; they degrade the performance. To mitigate the first problem, we generate speaker verification evaluation protocols that mimic the diarisation scenario better. We propose two data augmentation techniques to alleviate the second problem, making embedding extractors aware of overlapped speech or speaker change input. One technique generates overlapped speech segments, and the other generates segments where two speakers utter sequentially. Extensive experimental results using three state-of-the-art speaker embedding extractors demonstrate that both proposed approaches are effective.
summary: Speaker embedding extractors (EEs), which map input audio to a speaker discriminant latent space, are of paramount importance in speaker diarisation. However, there are several challenges when adopting EEs for diarisation, from which we tackle two key problems. First, the evaluation is not straightforward because the features required for better performance differ between speaker verification and diarisation. We show that better performance on widely adopted speaker verification evaluation protocols does not lead to better diarisation performance. Second, embedding extractors have not seen utterances in which multiple speakers exist. These inputs are inevitably present in speaker diarisation because of overlapped speech and speaker changes; they degrade the performance. To mitigate the first problem, we generate speaker verification evaluation protocols that mimic the diarisation scenario better. We propose two data augmentation techniques to alleviate the second problem, making embedding extractors aware of overlapped speech or speaker change input. One technique generates overlapped speech segments, and the other generates segments where two speakers utter sequentially. Extensive experimental results using three state-of-the-art speaker embedding extractors demonstrate that both proposed approaches are effective.
abstract_zh: 说话人嵌​​入提取器（EE）将输入音频映射到说话人判别潜在空间，在说话人二值化中至关重要。然而，采用 EE 进行二值化时存在一些挑战，我们从中解决了两个关键问题。首先，评估并不简单，因为说话者验证和分类之间获得更好性能所需的功能有所不同。我们表明，广泛采用的说话人验证评估协议的更好性能并不会带来更好的二值化性能。其次，嵌入提取器还没有发现存在多个说话者的话语。由于语音重叠和说话人变化，这些输入不可避免地出现在说话人分类中；它们会降低性能。为了缓解第一个问题，我们生成了更好地模拟二值化场景的说话人验证评估协议。我们提出了两种数据增强技术来缓解第二个问题，使嵌入提取器意识到重叠的语音或说话者变化的输入。一种技术生成重叠的语音片段，另一种技术生成两个说话者顺序说话的片段。使用三个最先进的说话人嵌入提取器进行的大量实验结果表明，所提出的两种方法都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种数据增强技术，解决说话人嵌入提取器在说话人分割任务中因评估标准不一致及多说话人场景适应性不足导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人嵌入提取器在分割任务中表现不佳，因评估标准与分割需求不匹配，且缺乏对重叠语音和说话人切换场景的训练数据。
AI.method: 生成符合分割场景的评估协议，并提出两种数据增强技术：1）合成重叠语音段；2）生成两说话人顺序发言段，以增强模型对多说话人输入的适应性。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种方法均有效提升三个先进嵌入提取器在说话人分割任务中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性数据增强，可显著改善嵌入提取器在分割任务中的表现，解决评估偏差与多说话人场景适应性问题。

authors_text: Rosana El Jurdi,Olivier Colliot
title: How precise are performance estimates for typical medical image segmentation tasks?
title_zh: 典型医学图像分割任务的性能估计有多精确？
abstract: An important issue in medical image processing is to be able to estimate not only the performances of algorithms but also the precision of the estimation of these performances. Reporting precision typically amounts to reporting standard-error of the mean (SEM) or equivalently confidence intervals. However, this is rarely done in medical image segmentation studies. In this paper, we aim to estimate what is the typical confidence that can be expected in such studies. To that end, we first perform experiments for Dice metric estimation using a standard deep learning model (U-net) and a classical task from the Medical Segmentation Decathlon. We extensively study precision estimation using both Gaussian assumption and bootstrapping (which does not require any assumption on the distribution). We then perform simulations for other test set sizes and performance spreads. Overall, our work shows that small test sets lead to wide confidence intervals (e.g. $\sim$8 points of Dice for 20 samples with $σ\simeq 10$).
summary: An important issue in medical image processing is to be able to estimate not only the performances of algorithms but also the precision of the estimation of these performances. Reporting precision typically amounts to reporting standard-error of the mean (SEM) or equivalently confidence intervals. However, this is rarely done in medical image segmentation studies. In this paper, we aim to estimate what is the typical confidence that can be expected in such studies. To that end, we first perform experiments for Dice metric estimation using a standard deep learning model (U-net) and a classical task from the Medical Segmentation Decathlon. We extensively study precision estimation using both Gaussian assumption and bootstrapping (which does not require any assumption on the distribution). We then perform simulations for other test set sizes and performance spreads. Overall, our work shows that small test sets lead to wide confidence intervals (e.g. $\sim$8 points of Dice for 20 samples with $σ\simeq 10$).
abstract_zh: 医学图像处理中的一个重要问题是不仅能够估计算法的性能，而且能够估计这些性能的估计精度。报告精度通常相当于报告平均值的标准误差 (SEM) 或等效的置信区间。然而，在医学图像分割研究中很少这样做。在本文中，我们的目的是估计此类研究中可以预期的典型置信度。为此，我们首先使用标准深度学习模型 (U-net) 和来自 Medical Segmentation Decathlon 的经典任务进行 Dice 度量估计实验。我们使用高斯假设和自举法（不需要对分布进行任何假设）广泛研究精度估计。然后，我们对其他测试集大小和性能分布进行模拟。总体而言，我们的工作表明，较小的测试集会导致较宽的置信区间（例如，20 个样本的 Dice 为 $\sim$8 点，$σ\simeq 10$）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估医学图像分割任务中性能估计的精度，分析不同测试集规模对置信区间的影响。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割研究通常仅报告算法性能指标（如Dice系数），但缺乏对性能估计精度（如置信区间）的系统分析，导致结果可信度存疑。
AI.method: 基于U-Net模型和Medical Segmentation Decathlon数据集，通过高斯假设和自助法（bootstrapping）估算Dice指标的置信区间，并模拟不同测试集规模与性能分布情况。
AI.result: 实验表明，当测试集样本量为20且标准差约为10时，Dice指标的置信区间宽度可达约8个百分点，小样本导致估计精度显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 医学图像分割研究中需重视测试集规模对性能估计精度的影响，小样本可能导致过宽的置信区间，建议采用更大测试集以提高结果可靠性。

search_text: How precise are performance estimates for typical medical image segmentation tasks? 典型医学图像分割任务的性能估计有多精确？ An important issue in medical image processing is to be able to estimate not only the performances of algorithms but also the precision of the estimation of these performances. Reporting precision typically amounts to reporting standard-error of the mean (SEM) or equivalently confidence intervals. However, this is rarely done in medical image segmentation studies. In this paper, we aim to estimate what is the typical confidence that can be expected in such studies. To that end, we first perform experiments for Dice metric estimation using a standard deep learning model (U-net) and a classical task from the Medical Segmentation Decathlon. We extensively study precision estimation using both Gaussian assumption and bootstrapping (which does not require any assumption on the distribution). We then perform simulations for other test set sizes and performance spreads. Overall, our work shows that small test sets lead to wide confidence intervals (e.g. $\sim$8 points of Dice for 20 samples with $σ\simeq 10$). 医学图像处理中的一个重要问题是不仅能够估计算法的性能，而且能够估计这些性能的估计精度。报告精度通常相当于报告平均值的标准误差 (SEM) 或等效的置信区间。然而，在医学图像分割研究中很少这样做。在本文中，我们的目的是估计此类研究中可以预期的典型置信度。为此，我们首先使用标准深度学习模型 (U-net) 和来自 Medical Segmentation Decathlon 的经典任务进行 Dice 度量估计实验。我们使用高斯假设和自举法（不需要对分布进行任何假设）广泛研究精度估计。然后，我们对其他测试集大小和性能分布进行模拟。总体而言，我们的工作表明，较小的测试集会导致较宽的置信区间（例如，20 个样本的 Dice 为 $\sim$8 点，$σ\simeq 10$）。 本文旨在评估医学图像分割任务中性能估计的精度，分析不同测试集规模对置信区间的影响。 Rosana El Jurdi,Olivier Colliot cs.CV,q-bio.QM,stat.AP

authors_text: Haoyu Xie,Changqi Wang,Mingkai Zheng,Minjing Dong,Shan You,Chong Fu,Chang Xu
title: Boosting Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation with Probabilistic Representations
title_zh: 用概率表示促进半监督语义分割
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in semi-supervised semantic segmentation have been developed through contrastive learning. In prevalent pixel-wise contrastive learning solutions, the model maps pixels to deterministic representations and regularizes them in the latent space. However, there exist inaccurate pseudo-labels which map the ambiguous representations of pixels to the wrong classes due to the limited cognitive ability of the model. In this paper, we define pixel-wise representations from a new perspective of probability theory and propose a Probabilistic Representation Contrastive Learning (PRCL) framework that improves representation quality by taking its probability into consideration. Through modelling the mapping from pixels to representations as the probability via multivariate Gaussian distributions, we can tune the contribution of the ambiguous representations to tolerate the risk of inaccurate pseudo-labels. Furthermore, we define prototypes in the form of distributions, which indicates the confidence of a class, while the point prototype cannot. Moreover, we propose to regularize the distribution variance to enhance the reliability of representations. Taking advantage of these benefits, high-quality feature representations can be derived in the latent space, thereby the performance of semantic segmentation can be further improved. We conduct sufficient experiment to evaluate PRCL on Pascal VOC and CityScapes to demonstrate its superiority. The code is available at https://github.com/Haoyu-Xie/PRCL.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in semi-supervised semantic segmentation have been developed through contrastive learning. In prevalent pixel-wise contrastive learning solutions, the model maps pixels to deterministic representations and regularizes them in the latent space. However, there exist inaccurate pseudo-labels which map the ambiguous representations of pixels to the wrong classes due to the limited cognitive ability of the model. In this paper, we define pixel-wise representations from a new perspective of probability theory and propose a Probabilistic Representation Contrastive Learning (PRCL) framework that improves representation quality by taking its probability into consideration. Through modelling the mapping from pixels to representations as the probability via multivariate Gaussian distributions, we can tune the contribution of the ambiguous representations to tolerate the risk of inaccurate pseudo-labels. Furthermore, we define prototypes in the form of distributions, which indicates the confidence of a class, while the point prototype cannot. Moreover, we propose to regularize the distribution variance to enhance the reliability of representations. Taking advantage of these benefits, high-quality feature representations can be derived in the latent space, thereby the performance of semantic segmentation can be further improved. We conduct sufficient experiment to evaluate PRCL on Pascal VOC and CityScapes to demonstrate its superiority. The code is available at https://github.com/Haoyu-Xie/PRCL.
abstract_zh: 半监督语义分割的最新突破是通过对比学习取得的。在流行的逐像素对比学习解决方案中，模型将像素映射到确定性表示，并在潜在空间中对它们进行正则化。然而，由于模型认知能力有限，存在不准确的伪标签，将像素的模糊表示映射到错误的类别。在本文中，我们从概率论的新角度定义了像素级表示，并提出了一种概率表示对比学习（PRCL）框架，该框架通过考虑其概率来提高表示质量。通过将像素到表示的映射建模为多元高斯分布的概率，我们可以调整模糊表示的贡献以容忍不准确的伪标签的风险。此外，我们以分布的形式定义原型，这表明了类的置信度，而点原型则不能。此外，我们建议对分布方差进行正则化以增强表示的可靠性。利用这些好处，可以在潜在空间中导出高质量的特征表示，从而进一步提高语义分割的性能。我们在 Pascal VOC 和 CityScapes 上进行了充分的实验来评估 PRCL，以证明其优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/Haoyu-Xie/PRCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率表示的对比学习框架PRCL，以提升半监督语义分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有像素级对比学习方法因模型认知能力有限，导致伪标签不准确，从而影响分割效果。
AI.method: 通过将像素到表示的映射建模为多元高斯分布，引入概率理论处理模糊表示，并通过分布原型和方差正则化提升表示可靠性。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC和CityScapes数据集上的实验验证了PRCL方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 概率表示框架有效提升了特征表示质量，通过分布原型和方差正则化增强了分割性能。

authors_text: Chunhui Wang,Chang Zeng,Xing He
title: Xiaoicesing 2: A High-Fidelity Singing Voice Synthesizer Based on Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 小冰歌2：基于生成对抗网络的高保真歌声合成器
abstract: XiaoiceSing is a singing voice synthesis (SVS) system that aims at generating 48kHz singing voices. However, the mel-spectrogram generated by it is over-smoothing in middle- and high-frequency areas due to no special design for modeling the details of these parts. In this paper, we propose XiaoiceSing2, which can generate the details of middle- and high-frequency parts to better construct the full-band mel-spectrogram. Specifically, in order to alleviate this problem, XiaoiceSing2 adopts a generative adversarial network (GAN), which consists of a FastSpeech-based generator and a multi-band discriminator. We improve the feed-forward Transformer (FFT) block by adding multiple residual convolutional blocks in parallel with the self-attention block to balance the local and global features. The multi-band discriminator contains three sub-discriminators responsible for low-, middle-, and high-frequency parts of the mel-spectrogram, respectively. Each sub-discriminator is composed of several segment discriminators (SD) and detail discriminators (DD) to distinguish the audio from different aspects. The experiment on our internal 48kHz singing voice dataset shows XiaoiceSing2 significantly improves the quality of the singing voice over XiaoiceSing.
summary: XiaoiceSing is a singing voice synthesis (SVS) system that aims at generating 48kHz singing voices. However, the mel-spectrogram generated by it is over-smoothing in middle- and high-frequency areas due to no special design for modeling the details of these parts. In this paper, we propose XiaoiceSing2, which can generate the details of middle- and high-frequency parts to better construct the full-band mel-spectrogram. Specifically, in order to alleviate this problem, XiaoiceSing2 adopts a generative adversarial network (GAN), which consists of a FastSpeech-based generator and a multi-band discriminator. We improve the feed-forward Transformer (FFT) block by adding multiple residual convolutional blocks in parallel with the self-attention block to balance the local and global features. The multi-band discriminator contains three sub-discriminators responsible for low-, middle-, and high-frequency parts of the mel-spectrogram, respectively. Each sub-discriminator is composed of several segment discriminators (SD) and detail discriminators (DD) to distinguish the audio from different aspects. The experiment on our internal 48kHz singing voice dataset shows XiaoiceSing2 significantly improves the quality of the singing voice over XiaoiceSing.
abstract_zh: 小冰Sing是一个歌声合成（SVS）系统，旨在产生48kHz歌声。然而，由于没有对这些部分的细节进行建模的特殊设计，它生成的梅尔谱图在中高频区域过于平滑。在本文中，我们提出了XiaoiceSing2，它可以生成中高频部分的细节，以更好地构建全频带梅尔频谱图。具体来说，为了缓解这个问题，XiaoiceSing2采用了生成对抗网络（GAN），该网络由基于FastSpeech的生成器和多频段鉴别器组成。我们通过与自注意力块并行添加多个残差卷积块来改进前馈变换器（FFT）块，以平衡局部和全局特征。多频带鉴别器包含三个子鉴别器，分别负责梅尔频谱图的低频、中频和高频部分。每个子鉴别器由若干段鉴别器（SD）和细节鉴别器（DD）组成，以从不同方面区分音频。在我们内部48kHz歌声数据集上的实验表明，XiaoiceSing2比XiaoiceSing显着提高了歌声质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生成对抗网络的高保真歌唱语音合成系统XiaoiceSing2，解决中高频段mel频谱过平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 原XiaoiceSing系统生成的mel频谱在中高频段存在细节丢失的过平滑现象，影响语音质量。
AI.method: 采用包含FastSpeech生成器和多频段判别器的GAN框架，改进FFT模块结构并设计多子判别器协同工作。
AI.result: 在48kHz歌唱语音数据集测试中，XiaoiceSing2显著优于原系统，生成语音质量明显提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过多频段细节建模和网络结构优化，有效提升了歌唱语音合成的高保真度表现。

motivation: 原XiaoiceSing系统生成的mel频谱在中高频段存在细节丢失的过平滑现象，影响语音质量。
method: 采用包含FastSpeech生成器和多频段判别器的GAN框架，改进FFT模块结构并设计多子判别器协同工作。
result: 在48kHz歌唱语音数据集测试中，XiaoiceSing2显著优于原系统，生成语音质量明显提升。
conclusion: 通过多频段细节建模和网络结构优化，有效提升了歌唱语音合成的高保真度表现。
search_text: Xiaoicesing 2: A High-Fidelity Singing Voice Synthesizer Based on Generative Adversarial Network 小冰歌2：基于生成对抗网络的高保真歌声合成器 XiaoiceSing is a singing voice synthesis (SVS) system that aims at generating 48kHz singing voices. However, the mel-spectrogram generated by it is over-smoothing in middle- and high-frequency areas due to no special design for modeling the details of these parts. In this paper, we propose XiaoiceSing2, which can generate the details of middle- and high-frequency parts to better construct the full-band mel-spectrogram. Specifically, in order to alleviate this problem, XiaoiceSing2 adopts a generative adversarial network (GAN), which consists of a FastSpeech-based generator and a multi-band discriminator. We improve the feed-forward Transformer (FFT) block by adding multiple residual convolutional blocks in parallel with the self-attention block to balance the local and global features. The multi-band discriminator contains three sub-discriminators responsible for low-, middle-, and high-frequency parts of the mel-spectrogram, respectively. Each sub-discriminator is composed of several segment discriminators (SD) and detail discriminators (DD) to distinguish the audio from different aspects. The experiment on our internal 48kHz singing voice dataset shows XiaoiceSing2 significantly improves the quality of the singing voice over XiaoiceSing. 小冰Sing是一个歌声合成（SVS）系统，旨在产生48kHz歌声。然而，由于没有对这些部分的细节进行建模的特殊设计，它生成的梅尔谱图在中高频区域过于平滑。在本文中，我们提出了XiaoiceSing2，它可以生成中高频部分的细节，以更好地构建全频带梅尔频谱图。具体来说，为了缓解这个问题，XiaoiceSing2采用了生成对抗网络（GAN），该网络由基于FastSpeech的生成器和多频段鉴别器组成。我们通过与自注意力块并行添加多个残差卷积块来改进前馈变换器（FFT）块，以平衡局部和全局特征。多频带鉴别器包含三个子鉴别器，分别负责梅尔频谱图的低频、中频和高频部分。每个子鉴别器由若干段鉴别器（SD）和细节鉴别器（DD）组成，以从不同方面区分音频。在我们内部48kHz歌声数据集上的实验表明，XiaoiceSing2比XiaoiceSing显着提高了歌声质量。 本文提出基于生成对抗网络的高保真歌唱语音合成系统XiaoiceSing2，解决中高频段mel频谱过平滑问题。 Chunhui Wang,Chang Zeng,Xing He eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Lingxiao Huang,Zhize Li,Jialin Sun,Haoyu Zhao
title: Coresets for Vertical Federated Learning: Regularized Linear Regression and $K$-Means Clustering
title_zh: 垂直联合学习的核心集：正则化线性回归和 $K$ 均值聚类
abstract: Vertical federated learning (VFL), where data features are stored in multiple parties distributively, is an important area in machine learning. However, the communication complexity for VFL is typically very high. In this paper, we propose a unified framework by constructing coresets in a distributed fashion for communication-efficient VFL. We study two important learning tasks in the VFL setting: regularized linear regression and $k$-means clustering, and apply our coreset framework to both problems. We theoretically show that using coresets can drastically alleviate the communication complexity, while nearly maintain the solution quality. Numerical experiments are conducted to corroborate our theoretical findings.
summary: Vertical federated learning (VFL), where data features are stored in multiple parties distributively, is an important area in machine learning. However, the communication complexity for VFL is typically very high. In this paper, we propose a unified framework by constructing coresets in a distributed fashion for communication-efficient VFL. We study two important learning tasks in the VFL setting: regularized linear regression and $k$-means clustering, and apply our coreset framework to both problems. We theoretically show that using coresets can drastically alleviate the communication complexity, while nearly maintain the solution quality. Numerical experiments are conducted to corroborate our theoretical findings.
abstract_zh: 垂直联邦学习（VFL）将数据特征分布式存储在多方中，是机器学习中的一个重要领域。然而，VFL 的通信复杂性通常非常高。在本文中，我们通过以分布式方式构建核心集来提出一个统一的框架，以实现高效通信的 VFL。我们研究了 VFL 设置中的两个重要学习任务：正则化线性回归和 $k$ 均值聚类，并将我们的核心集框架应用于这两个问题。我们从理论上证明，使用核心集可以极大地降低通信复杂性，同时几乎保持解决方案的质量。进行数值实验来证实我们的理论发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布式核心集的统一框架，用于降低垂直联邦学习中的通信复杂度，并应用于正则化线性回归和K均值聚类任务。
AI.motivation: 垂直联邦学习面临高通信开销问题，现有方法难以兼顾通信效率与模型性能，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分布式构造核心集（Coresets）构建通信高效框架，分别针对正则化线性回归和K均值聚类任务进行优化。
AI.result: 理论分析表明核心集可显著降低通信复杂度且几乎不损失模型精度，数值实验验证了理论结论。
AI.conclusion: 核心集框架为垂直联邦学习提供了高效通信方案，在保持模型质量的同时显著减少跨方数据传输开销。

authors_text: Santiago Pascual,Gautam Bhattacharya,Chunghsin Yeh,Jordi Pons,Joan Serrà
title: Full-band General Audio Synthesis with Score-based Diffusion
title_zh: 具有基于乐谱的扩散的全频带通用音频合成
abstract: Recent works have shown the capability of deep generative models to tackle general audio synthesis from a single label, producing a variety of impulsive, tonal, and environmental sounds. Such models operate on band-limited signals and, as a result of an autoregressive approach, they are typically conformed by pre-trained latent encoders and/or several cascaded modules. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based generative model for general audio synthesis, named DAG, which deals with full-band signals end-to-end in the waveform domain. Results show the superiority of DAG over existing label-conditioned generators in terms of both quality and diversity. More specifically, when compared to the state of the art, the band-limited and full-band versions of DAG achieve relative improvements that go up to 40 and 65%, respectively. We believe DAG is flexible enough to accommodate different conditioning schemas while providing good quality synthesis.
summary: Recent works have shown the capability of deep generative models to tackle general audio synthesis from a single label, producing a variety of impulsive, tonal, and environmental sounds. Such models operate on band-limited signals and, as a result of an autoregressive approach, they are typically conformed by pre-trained latent encoders and/or several cascaded modules. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based generative model for general audio synthesis, named DAG, which deals with full-band signals end-to-end in the waveform domain. Results show the superiority of DAG over existing label-conditioned generators in terms of both quality and diversity. More specifically, when compared to the state of the art, the band-limited and full-band versions of DAG achieve relative improvements that go up to 40 and 65%, respectively. We believe DAG is flexible enough to accommodate different conditioning schemas while providing good quality synthesis.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明深度生成模型能够处理单个标签的一般音频合成，产生各种脉冲、音调和环境声音。此类模型对带限信号进行操作，并且由于采用自回归方法，它们通常由预先训练的潜在编码器和/或多个级联模块来遵循。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于通用音频合成的基于扩散的生成模型，称为 DAG，它在波形域中端到端地处理全频带信号。结果表明，DAG 在质量和多样性方面均优于现有的标签调节生成器。更具体地说，与现有技术相比，DAG 的带限版本和全带版本分别实现了高达 40% 和 65% 的相对改进。我们相信 DAG 足够灵活，可以适应不同的条件模式，同时提供高质量的合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的端到端全带宽通用音频合成方法DAG，直接在波形域处理音频信号。
AI.motivation: 现有模型受限于带宽信号处理和复杂结构，难以兼顾音频质量和多样性，需更灵活高效的生成方案。
AI.method: 采用基于分数的扩散模型，直接在波形域对全带宽信号进行端到端生成，无需预训练编码器或级联模块。
AI.result: DAG在质量和多样性指标上分别较现有方法提升40%（带宽限制版）和65%（全带宽版）。
AI.conclusion: DAG方法通过全带宽端到端处理实现了更优的音频合成效果，且具备灵活适配不同条件的能力。

Such models operate on band-limited signals and, as a result of an autoregressive approach, they are typically conformed by pre-trained latent encoders and/or several cascaded modules. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based generative model for general audio synthesis, named DAG, which deals with full-band signals end-to-end in the waveform domain. More specifically, when compared to the state of the art, the band-limited and full-band versions of DAG achieve relative improvements that go up to 40 and 65%, respectively. authors_text: Bowen Pang,Huan Zhao,Gaosheng Zhang,Xiaoyue Yang,Yang Sun,Li Zhang,Qing Wang,Lei Xie
title: TSUP Speaker Diarization System for Conversational Short-phrase Speaker Diarization Challenge
title_zh: 用于会话短句说话人分类挑战的 TSUP 说话人分类系统
abstract: This paper describes the TSUP team's submission to the ISCSLP 2022 conversational short-phrase speaker diarization (CSSD) challenge which particularly focuses on short-phrase conversations with a new evaluation metric called conversational diarization error rate (CDER). In this challenge, we explore three kinds of typical speaker diarization systems, which are spectral clustering(SC) based diarization, target-speaker voice activity detection(TS-VAD) and end-to-end neural diarization(EEND) respectively. Our major findings are summarized as follows. First, the SC approach is more favored over the other two approaches under the new CDER metric. Second, tuning on hyperparameters is essential to CDER for all three types of speaker diarization systems. Specifically, CDER becomes smaller when the length of sub-segments setting longer. Finally, multi-system fusion through DOVER-LAP will worsen the CDER metric on the challenge data. Our submitted SC system eventually ranks the third place in the challenge.
summary: This paper describes the TSUP team's submission to the ISCSLP 2022 conversational short-phrase speaker diarization (CSSD) challenge which particularly focuses on short-phrase conversations with a new evaluation metric called conversational diarization error rate (CDER). In this challenge, we explore three kinds of typical speaker diarization systems, which are spectral clustering(SC) based diarization, target-speaker voice activity detection(TS-VAD) and end-to-end neural diarization(EEND) respectively. Our major findings are summarized as follows. First, the SC approach is more favored over the other two approaches under the new CDER metric. Second, tuning on hyperparameters is essential to CDER for all three types of speaker diarization systems. Specifically, CDER becomes smaller when the length of sub-segments setting longer. Finally, multi-system fusion through DOVER-LAP will worsen the CDER metric on the challenge data. Our submitted SC system eventually ranks the third place in the challenge.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 TSUP 团队向 ISCSLP 2022 会话短短语说话者二值化 (CSSD) 挑战提交的内容，该挑战特别关注短短语会话，并采用称为会话二值化错误率 (CDER) 的新评估指标。在本次挑战中，我们探索了三种典型的说话人二值化系统，分别是基于谱聚类（SC）的二值化、目标说话者语音活动检测（TS-VAD）和端到端神经二值化（EEND）。我们的主要发现总结如下。首先，在新的 CDER 指标下，SC 方法比其他两种方法更受青睐。其次，超参数的调整对于所有三种类型的说话人二值化系统的 CDER 至关重要。具体来说，当子段的长度设置较长时，CDER变得较小。最后，通过 DOVER-LAP 进行的多系统融合将使挑战数据上的 CDER 指标恶化。我们提交的 SC 系统最终在挑战赛中排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TSUP团队在ISCSLP 2022会话短语说话人分割挑战赛中的系统提交，重点研究了基于谱聚类（SC）、目标说话人语音活动检测（TS-VAD）和端到端神经分割（EEND）的三种方法。
AI.motivation: 挑战赛引入了新的会话分割错误率（CDER）评估指标，旨在探索不同说话人分割系统在短语会话场景下的性能表现。
AI.method: 对比了SC、TS-VAD和EEND三种方法，通过调整超参数（如子段长度）优化CDER指标，并尝试多系统融合（DOVER-LAP）策略。
AI.result: SC方法在CDER指标下表现最优，超参数调优显著降低指标值，但多系统融合策略导致CDER恶化，最终SC系统获得挑战赛第三名。
AI.conclusion: SC方法更适合CDER评估，超参数优化关键，多系统融合在该数据集上效果不佳。

search_text: TSUP Speaker Diarization System for Conversational Short-phrase Speaker Diarization Challenge 用于会话短句说话人分类挑战的 TSUP 说话人分类系统 This paper describes the TSUP team's submission to the ISCSLP 2022 conversational short-phrase speaker diarization (CSSD) challenge which particularly focuses on short-phrase conversations with a new evaluation metric called conversational diarization error rate (CDER). In this challenge, we explore three kinds of typical speaker diarization systems, which are spectral clustering(SC) based diarization, target-speaker voice activity detection(TS-VAD) and end-to-end neural diarization(EEND) respectively. Our major findings are summarized as follows. First, the SC approach is more favored over the other two approaches under the new CDER metric. Second, tuning on hyperparameters is essential to CDER for all three types of speaker diarization systems. Specifically, CDER becomes smaller when the length of sub-segments setting longer. Finally, multi-system fusion through DOVER-LAP will worsen the CDER metric on the challenge data. Our submitted SC system eventually ranks the third place in the challenge. 本文介绍了 TSUP 团队向 ISCSLP 2022 会话短短语说话者二值化 (CSSD) 挑战提交的内容，该挑战特别关注短短语会话，并采用称为会话二值化错误率 (CDER) 的新评估指标。在本次挑战中，我们探索了三种典型的说话人二值化系统，分别是基于谱聚类（SC）的二值化、目标说话者语音活动检测（TS-VAD）和端到端神经二值化（EEND）。我们的主要发现总结如下。首先，在新的 CDER 指标下，SC 方法比其他两种方法更受青睐。其次，超参数的调整对于所有三种类型的说话人二值化系统的 CDER 至关重要。具体来说，当子段的长度设置较长时，CDER变得较小。最后，通过 DOVER-LAP 进行的多系统融合将使挑战数据上的 CDER 指标恶化。我们提交的 SC 系统最终在挑战赛中排名第三。 本文介绍了TSUP团队在ISCSLP 2022会话短语说话人分割挑战赛中的系统提交，重点研究了基于谱聚类（SC）、目标说话人语音活动检测（TS-VAD）和端到端神经分割（EEND）的三种方法。 Bowen Pang,Huan Zhao,Gaosheng Zhang,Xiaoyue Yang,Yang Sun,Li Zhang,Qing Wang,Lei Xie cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Daisuke Niizumi,Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino
title: Masked Modeling Duo: Learning Representations by Encouraging Both Networks to Model the Input
title_zh: Masked Modeling Duo：通过鼓励两个网络对输入进行建模来学习表示
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, and 6 tables. To appear at ICASSP2023
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, and 6 tables. To appear at ICASSP2023
abstract: Masked Autoencoders is a simple yet powerful self-supervised learning method. However, it learns representations indirectly by reconstructing masked input patches. Several methods learn representations directly by predicting representations of masked patches; however, we think using all patches to encode training signal representations is suboptimal. We propose a new method, Masked Modeling Duo (M2D), that learns representations directly while obtaining training signals using only masked patches. In the M2D, the online network encodes visible patches and predicts masked patch representations, and the target network, a momentum encoder, encodes masked patches. To better predict target representations, the online network should model the input well, while the target network should also model it well to agree with online predictions. Then the learned representations should better model the input. We validated the M2D by learning general-purpose audio representations, and M2D set new state-of-the-art performance on tasks such as UrbanSound8K, VoxCeleb1, AudioSet20K, GTZAN, and SpeechCommandsV2. We additionally validate the effectiveness of M2D for images using ImageNet-1K in the appendix.
summary: Masked Autoencoders is a simple yet powerful self-supervised learning method. However, it learns representations indirectly by reconstructing masked input patches. Several methods learn representations directly by predicting representations of masked patches; however, we think using all patches to encode training signal representations is suboptimal. We propose a new method, Masked Modeling Duo (M2D), that learns representations directly while obtaining training signals using only masked patches. In the M2D, the online network encodes visible patches and predicts masked patch representations, and the target network, a momentum encoder, encodes masked patches. To better predict target representations, the online network should model the input well, while the target network should also model it well to agree with online predictions. Then the learned representations should better model the input. We validated the M2D by learning general-purpose audio representations, and M2D set new state-of-the-art performance on tasks such as UrbanSound8K, VoxCeleb1, AudioSet20K, GTZAN, and SpeechCommandsV2. We additionally validate the effectiveness of M2D for images using ImageNet-1K in the appendix.
abstract_zh: 掩码自动编码器是一种简单但功能强大的自监督学习方法。然而，它通过重建屏蔽输入补丁来间接学习表示。有几种方法通过预测蒙版补丁的表示来直接学习表示；然而，我们认为使用所有补丁来编码训练信号表示并不是最理想的。我们提出了一种新方法，即 Masked Modeling Duo (M2D)，它可以直接学习表示，同时仅使用屏蔽补丁获取训练信号。在 M2D 中，在线网络对可见补丁进行编码并预测屏蔽补丁表示，目标网络（动量编码器）对屏蔽补丁进行编码。为了更好地预测目标表示，在线网络应该很好地对输入进行建模，而目标网络也应该很好地对其进行建模以与在线预测一致。然后学习到的表示应该更好地对输入进行建模。我们通过学习通用音频表示来验证 M2D，M2D 在 UrbanSound8K、VoxCeleb1、AudioSet20K、GTZAN 和 SpeechCommandsV2 等任务上设置了新的最先进性能。我们还在附录中使用 ImageNet-1K 验证了 M2D 对图像的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Masked Modeling Duo (M2D)的新方法，通过让两个网络共同建模输入的被遮罩块来直接学习表示。
AI.motivation: 传统掩码自编码器通过重建被遮罩输入块间接学习表示，而直接预测被遮罩块表示的方法未充分利用所有块的训练信号，因此提出M2D以优化表示学习。
AI.method: M2D包含在线网络和目标网络（动量编码器）。在线网络编码可见块并预测被遮罩块的表示，目标网络编码被遮罩块。通过强制两者建模输入的一致性来优化表示。
AI.result: M2D在UrbanSound8K、VoxCeleb1、AudioSet20K等音频任务上达到新SOTA，在ImageNet-1K图像任务上也验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: M2D通过协同建模输入的两个网络直接学习表示，优于现有方法，在音频和图像任务中均表现出色，为自监督学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hongyi Wang,Lanfen Lin,Hongjie Hu,Qingqing Chen,Yinhao Li,Yutaro Iwamoto,Xian-Hua Han,Yen-Wei Chen,Ruofeng Tong
title: Super-Resolution Based Patch-Free 3D Image Segmentation with High-Frequency Guidance
title_zh: 基于超分辨率的高频引导无补丁 3D 图像分割
abstract: High resolution (HR) 3D images are widely used nowadays, such as medical images like Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) and Computed Tomography (CT). However, segmentation of these 3D images remains a challenge due to their high spatial resolution and dimensionality in contrast to currently limited GPU memory. Therefore, most existing 3D image segmentation methods use patch-based models, which have low inference efficiency and ignore global contextual information. To address these problems, we propose a super-resolution (SR) based patch-free 3D image segmentation framework that can realize HR segmentation from a global-wise low-resolution (LR) input. The framework contains two sub-tasks, of which semantic segmentation is the main task and super resolution is an auxiliary task aiding in rebuilding the high frequency information from the LR input. To furthermore balance the information loss with the LR input, we propose a High-Frequency Guidance Module (HGM), and design an efficient selective cropping algorithm to crop an HR patch from the original image as restoration guidance for it. In addition, we also propose a Task-Fusion Module (TFM) to exploit the inter connections between segmentation and SR task, realizing joint optimization of the two tasks. When predicting, only the main segmentation task is needed, while other modules can be removed for acceleration. The experimental results on two different datasets show that our framework has a four times higher inference speed compared to traditional patch-based methods, while its performance also surpasses other patch-based and patch-free models.
summary: High resolution (HR) 3D images are widely used nowadays, such as medical images like Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) and Computed Tomography (CT). However, segmentation of these 3D images remains a challenge due to their high spatial resolution and dimensionality in contrast to currently limited GPU memory. Therefore, most existing 3D image segmentation methods use patch-based models, which have low inference efficiency and ignore global contextual information. To address these problems, we propose a super-resolution (SR) based patch-free 3D image segmentation framework that can realize HR segmentation from a global-wise low-resolution (LR) input. The framework contains two sub-tasks, of which semantic segmentation is the main task and super resolution is an auxiliary task aiding in rebuilding the high frequency information from the LR input. To furthermore balance the information loss with the LR input, we propose a High-Frequency Guidance Module (HGM), and design an efficient selective cropping algorithm to crop an HR patch from the original image as restoration guidance for it. In addition, we also propose a Task-Fusion Module (TFM) to exploit the inter connections between segmentation and SR task, realizing joint optimization of the two tasks. When predicting, only the main segmentation task is needed, while other modules can be removed for acceleration. The experimental results on two different datasets show that our framework has a four times higher inference speed compared to traditional patch-based methods, while its performance also surpasses other patch-based and patch-free models.

However, segmentation of these 3D images remains a challenge due to their high spatial resolution and dimensionality in contrast to currently limited GPU memory. Therefore, most existing 3D image segmentation methods use patch-based models, which have low inference efficiency and ignore global contextual information. To address these problems, we propose a super-resolution (SR) based patch-free 3D image segmentation framework that can realize HR segmentation from a global-wise low-resolution (LR) input. The framework contains two sub-tasks, of which semantic segmentation is the main task and super resolution is an auxiliary task aiding in rebuilding the high frequency information from the LR input. To furthermore balance the information loss with the LR input, we propose a High-Frequency Guidance Module (HGM), and design an efficient selective cropping algorithm to crop an HR patch from the original image as restoration guidance for it. In addition, we also propose a Task-Fusion Module (TFM) to exploit the inter connections between segmentation and SR task, realizing joint optimization of the two tasks.预测时只需要主要的分割任务，其他模块可以去掉进行加速。 The experimental results on two different datasets show that our framework has a four times higher inference speed compared to traditional patch-based methods, while its performance also surpasses other patch-based and patch-free models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超分辨率的无补丁3D图像分割框架，通过高频引导实现从低分辨率输入到高分辨率分割的全局优化。
AI.motivation: 传统3D图像分割方法因依赖补丁处理导致推理效率低且丢失全局信息，而高分辨率3D图像对GPU内存要求高，亟需高效且保留全局上下文的分割方案。
AI.method: 框架包含语义分割主任务与超分辨率辅助任务，设计高频引导模块（HGM）平衡低分辨率信息损失，并通过选择性裁剪算法获取高分辨率补丁作为修复指导，同时引入任务融合模块（TFM）实现分割与超分辨率任务的联合优化。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，该框架推理速度较传统补丁方法提升4倍，性能优于其他补丁式和无补丁模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过整合超分辨率与高频引导机制，有效解决了3D图像分割中的效率与全局信息保留问题，为高分辨率医学影像分析提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 框架包含语义分割主任务与超分辨率辅助任务，设计高频引导模块（HGM）平衡低分辨率信息损失，并通过选择性裁剪算法获取高分辨率补丁作为修复指导，同时引入任务融合模块（TFM）实现分割与超分辨率任务的联合优化。
ai_content_json.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，该框架推理速度较传统补丁方法提升4倍，性能优于其他补丁式和无补丁模型。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文方法通过整合超分辨率与高频引导机制，有效解决了3D图像分割中的效率与全局信息保留问题，为高分辨率医学影像分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Super-Resolution Based Patch-Free 3D Image Segmentation with High-Frequency Guidance 基于超分辨率的高频引导无补丁 3D 图像分割 High resolution (HR) 3D images are widely used nowadays, such as medical images like Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) and Computed Tomography (CT). However, segmentation of these 3D images remains a challenge due to their high spatial resolution and dimensionality in contrast to currently limited GPU memory. Therefore, most existing 3D image segmentation methods use patch-based models, which have low inference efficiency and ignore global contextual information. To address these problems, we propose a super-resolution (SR) based patch-free 3D image segmentation framework that can realize HR segmentation from a global-wise low-resolution (LR) input. The framework contains two sub-tasks, of which semantic segmentation is the main task and super resolution is an auxiliary task aiding in rebuilding the high frequency information from the LR input. To furthermore balance the information loss with the LR input, we propose a High-Frequency Guidance Module (HGM), and design an efficient selective cropping algorithm to crop an HR patch from the original image as restoration guidance for it. In addition, we also propose a Task-Fusion Module (TFM) to exploit the inter connections between segmentation and SR task, realizing joint optimization of the two tasks. When predicting, only the main segmentation task is needed, while other modules can be removed for acceleration. The experimental results on two different datasets show that our framework has a four times higher inference speed compared to traditional patch-based methods, while its performance also surpasses other patch-based and patch-free models. High resolution (HR) 3D images are widely used nowadays, such as medical images like Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) and Computed Tomography (CT). However, segmentation of these 3D images remains a challenge due to their high spatial resolution and dimensionality in contrast to currently limited GPU memory. Therefore, most existing 3D image segmentation methods use patch-based models, which have low inference efficiency and ignore global contextual information. To address these problems, we propose a super-resolution (SR) based patch-free 3D image segmentation framework that can realize HR segmentation from a global-wise low-resolution (LR) input. The framework contains two sub-tasks, of which semantic segmentation is the main task and super resolution is an auxiliary task aiding in rebuilding the high frequency information from the LR input. To furthermore balance the information loss with the LR input, we propose a High-Frequency Guidance Module (HGM), and design an efficient selective cropping algorithm to crop an HR patch from the original image as restoration guidance for it. In addition, we also propose a Task-Fusion Module (TFM) to exploit the inter connections between segmentation and SR task, realizing joint optimization of the two tasks.预测时只需要主要的分割任务，其他模块可以去掉进行加速。 The experimental results on two different datasets show that our framework has a four times higher inference speed compared to traditional patch-based methods, while its performance also surpasses other patch-based and patch-free models. 本文提出了一种基于超分辨率的无补丁3D图像分割框架，通过高频引导实现从低分辨率输入到高分辨率分割的全局优化。 Hongyi Wang,Lanfen Lin,Hongjie Hu,Qingqing Chen,Yinhao Li,Yutaro Iwamoto,Xian-Hua Han,Yen-Wei Chen,Ruofeng Tong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxuan Du,Ruohua Zhou
title: Speaker Diarization Based on Multi-channel Microphone Array in Small-scale Meeting
title_zh: 基于多通道麦克风阵列的小型会议发言者分类
abstract: In the task of speaker diarization, the number of small-scale meetings accounts for a large proportion. When microphone arrays are employed as a recording device, its spatial information is usually ignored by most researchers. In this paper, inspired by the clustering method combining d-vector and microphone array spatial vector, we proposed a diarization method which using multi-channel microphone arrays for a meeting with no more than 4 speakers. We utilize speech enhancement to preprocess the audio from the microphone array. The Steered-Response Power Phase Transform (SRP-PHAT) algorithm are employed to get more accurate speakers, and apply the number of speakers to recluster the speech segments to achieve better performance. Finally, we fuse our system by DOVER-LAP to get the best result. We evaluated our system on the AMI corpus. Compared with the best experimental results so far, our system has achieved largely improvement in the diarization error rate (DER).
summary: In the task of speaker diarization, the number of small-scale meetings accounts for a large proportion. When microphone arrays are employed as a recording device, its spatial information is usually ignored by most researchers. In this paper, inspired by the clustering method combining d-vector and microphone array spatial vector, we proposed a diarization method which using multi-channel microphone arrays for a meeting with no more than 4 speakers. We utilize speech enhancement to preprocess the audio from the microphone array. The Steered-Response Power Phase Transform (SRP-PHAT) algorithm are employed to get more accurate speakers, and apply the number of speakers to recluster the speech segments to achieve better performance. Finally, we fuse our system by DOVER-LAP to get the best result. We evaluated our system on the AMI corpus. Compared with the best experimental results so far, our system has achieved largely improvement in the diarization error rate (DER).
abstract_zh: 在发言者分类任务中，小型会议数量占很大比例。当麦克风阵列用作录音设备时，其空间信息通常被大多数研究人员忽略。本文受d向量和麦克风阵列空间向量相结合的聚类方法的启发，提出了一种针对不超过4个发言者的会议使用多通道麦克风阵列的二值化方法。我们利用语音增强来预处理来自麦克风阵列的音频。采用转向响应功率相变（SRP-PHAT）算法来获得更准确的说话人，并应用说话人的数量来重新聚类语音片段以获得更好的性能。最后，我们通过DOVER-LAP融合我们的系统以获得最佳结果。我们在 AMI 语料库上评估了我们的系统。与迄今为止最好的实验结果相比，我们的系统在二值化错误率（DER）方面取得了很大的改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多通道麦克风阵列的小规模会议说话人分割方法，通过结合空间信息与聚类技术提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在利用麦克风阵列时忽略空间信息，导致小规模会议场景下说话人分割效果受限。
AI.method: 融合语音增强、SRP-PHAT算法定位说话人、基于说话人数的语音段重聚类，并通过DOVER-LAP系统融合优化结果。
AI.result: 在AMI语料库测试中，系统在分割错误率（DER）指标上较现有最佳结果取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 结合麦克风阵列空间信息与聚类方法能有效提升小规模会议场景的说话人分割性能。

authors_text: Aurélien Delage,Olivier Buffet,Jilles S. Dibangoye,Abdallah Saffidine
title: HSVI can solve zero-sum Partially Observable Stochastic Games
title_zh: HSVI可以解决零和部分可观察随机博弈
comment: 42 pages, 2 algorithms. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.14529
comments: 42 pages, 2 algorithms. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.14529
abstract: State-of-the-art methods for solving 2-player zero-sum imperfect information games rely on linear programming or regret minimization, though not on dynamic programming (DP) or heuristic search (HS), while the latter are often at the core of state-of-the-art solvers for other sequential decision-making problems. In partially observable or collaborative settings (e.g., POMDPs and Dec- POMDPs), DP and HS require introducing an appropriate statistic that induces a fully observable problem as well as bounding (convex) approximators of the optimal value function. This approach has succeeded in some subclasses of 2-player zero-sum partially observable stochastic games (zs- POSGs) as well, but how to apply it in the general case still remains an open question. We answer it by (i) rigorously defining an equivalent game to work with, (ii) proving mathematical properties of the optimal value function that allow deriving bounds that come with solution strategies, (iii) proposing for the first time an HSVI-like solver that provably converges to an $ε$-optimal solution in finite time, and (iv) empirically analyzing it. This opens the door to a novel family of promising approaches complementing those relying on linear programming or iterative methods.
summary: State-of-the-art methods for solving 2-player zero-sum imperfect information games rely on linear programming or regret minimization, though not on dynamic programming (DP) or heuristic search (HS), while the latter are often at the core of state-of-the-art solvers for other sequential decision-making problems. In partially observable or collaborative settings (e.g., POMDPs and Dec- POMDPs), DP and HS require introducing an appropriate statistic that induces a fully observable problem as well as bounding (convex) approximators of the optimal value function. This approach has succeeded in some subclasses of 2-player zero-sum partially observable stochastic games (zs- POSGs) as well, but how to apply it in the general case still remains an open question. We answer it by (i) rigorously defining an equivalent game to work with, (ii) proving mathematical properties of the optimal value function that allow deriving bounds that come with solution strategies, (iii) proposing for the first time an HSVI-like solver that provably converges to an $ε$-optimal solution in finite time, and (iv) empirically analyzing it. This opens the door to a novel family of promising approaches complementing those relying on linear programming or iterative methods.
abstract_zh: 解决两人零和不完美信息博弈的最先进方法依赖于线性规划或遗憾最小化，尽管不是动态规划（DP）或启发式搜索（HS），而后者通常是其他顺序决策问题的最先进求解器的核心。在部分可观察或协作环境中（例如，POMDP 和 Dec-POMDP），DP 和 HS 需要引入适当的统计量，以引发完全可观察的问题以及最优值函数的边界（凸）逼近器。这种方法在 2 人零和部分可观察随机博弈 (zs-POSG) 的一些子类中也取得了成功，但如何将其应用于一般情况仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们通过以下方式回答这个问题：(i) 严格定义一个等效的游戏，(ii) 证明最优值函数的数学属性，允许导出解决方案策略的边界，(iii) 首次提出一个类似 HSVI 的求解器，可证明在有限时间内收敛到 $ε$ 最优解，以及 (iv) 对其进行实证分析。这为一系列有前途的新方法打开了大门，这些方法可以补充依赖线性规划或迭代方法的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于启发式搜索的HSVI算法，用于求解零和部分可观察随机博弈（zs-POSGs）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖线性规划或遗憾最小化，而动态规划（DP）和启发式搜索（HS）在部分可观测场景中应用受限，需解决如何将DP/HS扩展到一般零和部分可观测博弈的问题。
AI.method: 通过定义等效博弈、证明最优价值函数的数学性质、设计首个可证明收敛的HSVI求解器，并进行实证分析。
AI.result: 提出的方法在有限时间内可收敛到ε-最优解，并通过实验验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为零和部分可观测博弈提供了新思路，补充了现有线性规划和迭代方法的不足。

authors_text: Daniel Lokshtanov,Marcin Pilipczuk,Michał Pilipczuk,Saket Saurabh
title: Fixed-parameter tractability of Graph Isomorphism in graphs with an excluded minor
title_zh: 具有排除次要的图中图同构的固定参数可处理性
comment: Part I of a full version of a paper accepted at STOC 2022
comments: Part I of a full version of a paper accepted at STOC 2022
abstract: We prove that Graph Isomorphism and Canonization in graphs excluding a fixed graph $H$ as a minor can be solved by an algorithm working in time $f(H)\cdot n^{O(1)}$, where $f$ is some function. In other words, we show that these problems are fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by the size of the excluded minor, with the caveat that the bound on the running time is not necessarily computable. The underlying approach is based on decomposing the graph in a canonical way into unbreakable (intuitively, well-connected) parts, which essentially provides a reduction to the case where the given $H$-minor-free graph is unbreakable itself. This is complemented by an analysis of unbreakable $H$-minor-free graphs, performed in a second subordinate manuscript, which reveals that every such graph can be canonically decomposed into a part that admits few automorphisms and a part that has bounded treewidth.
summary: We prove that Graph Isomorphism and Canonization in graphs excluding a fixed graph $H$ as a minor can be solved by an algorithm working in time $f(H)\cdot n^{O(1)}$, where $f$ is some function. In other words, we show that these problems are fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by the size of the excluded minor, with the caveat that the bound on the running time is not necessarily computable. The underlying approach is based on decomposing the graph in a canonical way into unbreakable (intuitively, well-connected) parts, which essentially provides a reduction to the case where the given $H$-minor-free graph is unbreakable itself. This is complemented by an analysis of unbreakable $H$-minor-free graphs, performed in a second subordinate manuscript, which reveals that every such graph can be canonically decomposed into a part that admits few automorphisms and a part that has bounded treewidth.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，排除固定图$H$作为次要图的图中的图同构和规范化可以通过在时间$f(H)\cdot n^{O(1)}$上运行的算法来解决，其中$f$是某个函数。换句话说，我们表明，当通过排除的次要的大小进行参数化时，这些问题是固定参数可处理的，但需要注意的是，运行时间的界限不一定是可计算的。底层方法基于以规范的方式将图分解为牢不可破的（直观上，连接良好的）部分，这本质上提供了对给定 $H$-minor-free 图本身牢不可破的情况的简化。这是对牢不可破的 $H$-minor-free 图的分析的补充，该分析在第二个从属手稿中进行，表明每个这样的图都可以规范地分解为允许很少自同构的部分和具有有界树宽的部分。

AI.tldr: 证明图同构问题和规范化问题在排除固定图H作为子式的图类中是固定参数易解的。
AI.motivation: 将图同构问题的参数化复杂性研究拓展到更一般的图类——排除子式图类，并为这类图提供高效的算法。
AI.method: 将图规范地分解为不可破坏（即高度连通）的部分，将问题规约到排除H子式的图本身是不可破坏的情况；再对不可破坏的图进一步分解为自同构少的部分和树宽有界的部分。
AI.result: 给出了一个运行时间为$f(H)\cdot n^{O(1)}$的算法，其中f是某个函数，但运行时间界限不一定是可计算的。
AI.conclusion: 以排除子式的大小为参数，图同构和规范化问题在排除H子式的图类中是固定参数易解的。

authors_text: Zhao Ren,Thanh Tam Nguyen,Yi Chang,Björn W. Schuller
title: Fast Yet Effective Speech Emotion Recognition with Self-distillation
title_zh: 快速而有效的自蒸馏语音情感识别
abstract: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is the task of recognising human's emotional states from speech. SER is extremely prevalent in helping dialogue systems to truly understand our emotions and become a trustworthy human conversational partner. Due to the lengthy nature of speech, SER also suffers from the lack of abundant labelled data for powerful models like deep neural networks. Pre-trained complex models on large-scale speech datasets have been successfully applied to SER via transfer learning. However, fine-tuning complex models still requires large memory space and results in low inference efficiency. In this paper, we argue achieving a fast yet effective SER is possible with self-distillation, a method of simultaneously fine-tuning a pretrained model and training shallower versions of itself. The benefits of our self-distillation framework are threefold: (1) the adoption of self-distillation method upon the acoustic modality breaks through the limited ground-truth of speech data, and outperforms the existing models' performance on an SER dataset; (2) executing powerful models at different depth can achieve adaptive accuracy-efficiency trade-offs on resource-limited edge devices; (3) a new fine-tuning process rather than training from scratch for self-distillation leads to faster learning time and the state-of-the-art accuracy on data with small quantities of label information.
summary: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is the task of recognising human's emotional states from speech. SER is extremely prevalent in helping dialogue systems to truly understand our emotions and become a trustworthy human conversational partner. Due to the lengthy nature of speech, SER also suffers from the lack of abundant labelled data for powerful models like deep neural networks. Pre-trained complex models on large-scale speech datasets have been successfully applied to SER via transfer learning. However, fine-tuning complex models still requires large memory space and results in low inference efficiency. In this paper, we argue achieving a fast yet effective SER is possible with self-distillation, a method of simultaneously fine-tuning a pretrained model and training shallower versions of itself. The benefits of our self-distillation framework are threefold: (1) the adoption of self-distillation method upon the acoustic modality breaks through the limited ground-truth of speech data, and outperforms the existing models' performance on an SER dataset; (2) executing powerful models at different depth can achieve adaptive accuracy-efficiency trade-offs on resource-limited edge devices; (3) a new fine-tuning process rather than training from scratch for self-distillation leads to faster learning time and the state-of-the-art accuracy on data with small quantities of label information.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）是从语音中识别人类情绪状态的任务。 SER 在帮助对话系统真正理解我们的情感并成为值得信赖的人类对话伙伴方面非常普遍。由于语音的冗长性质，SER 还缺乏用于深度神经网络等强大模型的丰富标记数据。在大规模语音数据集上预训练的复杂模型已通过迁移学习成功应用于 SER。然而，对复杂模型进行微调仍然需要较大的内存空间，导致推理效率较低。 In this paper, we argue achieving a fast yet effective SER is possible with self-distillation, a method of simultaneously fine-tuning a pretrained model and training shallower versions of itself. The benefits of our self-distillation framework are threefold: (1) the adoption of self-distillation method upon the acoustic modality breaks through the limited ground-truth of speech data, and outperforms the existing models' performance on an SER dataset; （2）在不同深度执行强大的模型可以在资源有限的边缘设备上实现自适应精度-效率权衡； (3) a new fine-tuning process rather than training from scratch for self-distillation leads to faster learning time and the state-of-the-art accuracy on data with small quantities of label information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自蒸馏的语音情感识别框架，在保证效果的同时提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有SER模型依赖大量标注数据且推理效率低，预训练模型微调需高资源消耗，难以适应边缘设备。
AI.method: 通过自蒸馏同步微调预训练模型与浅层模型，实现知识迁移与精度-效率平衡，采用新型微调流程提升小样本学习效率。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上超越现有模型性能，支持边缘设备自适应精度效率权衡，小样本场景下达到SOTA准确率。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏框架有效解决SER的数据与效率矛盾，为资源受限场景提供可行方案，未来可探索更优蒸馏策略。

authors_text: Daniel Lokshtanov,Marcin Pilipczuk,Michał Pilipczuk,Saket Saurabh
title: Highly unbreakable graph with a fixed excluded minor are almost rigid
title_zh: 具有固定排除次要的高度牢不可破的图表几乎是刚性的
comment: Part II of a full version of a paper appearing at STOC 2022
comments: Part II of a full version of a paper appearing at STOC 2022
abstract: A set $X \subseteq V(G)$ in a graph $G$ is $(q,k)$-unbreakable if every separation $(A,B)$ of order at most $k$ in $G$ satisfies $|A \cap X| \leq q$ or $|B \cap X| \leq q$. In this paper, we prove the following result: If a graph $G$ excludes a fixed complete graph $K_h$ as a minor and satisfies certain unbreakability guarantees, then $G$ is almost rigid in the following sense: the vertices of $G$ can be partitioned in an isomorphism-invariant way into a part inducing a graph of bounded treewidth and a part that admits a small isomorphism-invariant family of labelings. This result is the key ingredient in the fixed-parameter algorithm for Graph Isomorphism parameterized by the Hadwiger number of the graph, which is presented in a companion paper.
summary: A set $X \subseteq V(G)$ in a graph $G$ is $(q,k)$-unbreakable if every separation $(A,B)$ of order at most $k$ in $G$ satisfies $|A \cap X| \leq q$ or $|B \cap X| \leq q$. In this paper, we prove the following result: If a graph $G$ excludes a fixed complete graph $K_h$ as a minor and satisfies certain unbreakability guarantees, then $G$ is almost rigid in the following sense: the vertices of $G$ can be partitioned in an isomorphism-invariant way into a part inducing a graph of bounded treewidth and a part that admits a small isomorphism-invariant family of labelings. This result is the key ingredient in the fixed-parameter algorithm for Graph Isomorphism parameterized by the Hadwiger number of the graph, which is presented in a companion paper.
abstract_zh: 如果$G$中阶数最多为$k$的每个分隔$(A,B)$满足$|A \cap X|，则图$G$中的集合$X \subseteq V(G)$是$(q,k)$牢不可破的\leq q$ 或 $|B \cap X| \leq q$。在本文中，我们证明了以下结果：如果图$G$排除了固定完整图$K_h$作为次要图并且满足某些不可破坏性保证，那么$G$在以下意义上几乎是刚性的：$G$的顶点可以以同构不变的方式划分为导出有界树宽图的部分和允许小的同构不变标签族的部分。这一结果是由图的 Hadwiger 数参数化的图同构固定参数算法的关键要素，该算法在另一篇论文中介绍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了排除固定完全图作为子式的高度不可分割图的刚性性质，证明其可被划分为具有有界树宽的部分和具有小不变标记的部分。
AI.motivation: 为解决以哈迪格数为参数的图同构问题提供结构基础，通过图的刚性性质设计固定参数算法。
AI.method: 通过定义(q,k)-不可分割集，结合图的排除子式条件，证明图的近似刚性结构并构造不变划分方法。
AI.result: 证明排除固定K_h子式的不可分割图可被划分为有界树宽部分和小不变标记部分，成为图同构算法的关键理论支撑。
AI.conclusion: 该结构定理为基于哈迪格数的图同构固定参数算法提供了理论依据，推动了参数化复杂性研究的发展。

search_text: Highly unbreakable graph with a fixed excluded minor are almost rigid 具有固定排除次要的高度牢不可破的图表几乎是刚性的 A set $X \subseteq V(G)$ in a graph $G$ is $(q,k)$-unbreakable if every separation $(A,B)$ of order at most $k$ in $G$ satisfies $|A \cap X| \leq q$ or $|B \cap X| \leq q$. In this paper, we prove the following result: If a graph $G$ excludes a fixed complete graph $K_h$ as a minor and satisfies certain unbreakability guarantees, then $G$ is almost rigid in the following sense: the vertices of $G$ can be partitioned in an isomorphism-invariant way into a part inducing a graph of bounded treewidth and a part that admits a small isomorphism-invariant family of labelings. This result is the key ingredient in the fixed-parameter algorithm for Graph Isomorphism parameterized by the Hadwiger number of the graph, which is presented in a companion paper. 如果$G$中阶数最多为$k$的每个分隔$(A,B)$满足$|A \cap X|，则图$G$中的集合$X \subseteq V(G)$是$(q,k)$牢不可破的\leq q$ 或 $|B \cap X| \leq q$。在本文中，我们证明了以下结果：如果图$G$排除了固定完整图$K_h$作为次要图并且满足某些不可破坏性保证，那么$G$在以下意义上几乎是刚性的：$G$的顶点可以以同构不变的方式划分为导出有界树宽图的部分和允许小的同构不变标签族的部分。这一结果是由图的 Hadwiger 数参数化的图同构固定参数算法的关键要素，该算法在另一篇论文中介绍。 本文研究了排除固定完全图作为子式的高度不可分割图的刚性性质，证明其可被划分为具有有界树宽的部分和具有小不变标记的部分。 Daniel Lokshtanov,Marcin Pilipczuk,Michał Pilipczuk,Saket Saurabh math.CO,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Priyash Bhugra,Benjamin Bischke,Christoph Werner,Robert Syrnicki,Carolin Packbier,Patrick Helber,Caglar Senaras,Akhil Singh Rana,Tim Davis,Wanda De Keersmaecker,Daniele Zanaga,Annett Wania,Ruben Van De Kerchove,Giovanni Marchisio
title: RapidAI4EO: Mono- and Multi-temporal Deep Learning models for Updating the CORINE Land Cover Product
title_zh: RapidAI4EO：用于更新 CORINE 土地覆盖产品的单时相和多时相深度学习模型
comment: Published in IGARSS 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
comments: Published in IGARSS 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
abstract: In the remote sensing community, Land Use Land Cover (LULC) classification with satellite imagery is a main focus of current research activities. Accurate and appropriate LULC classification, however, continues to be a challenging task. In this paper, we evaluate the performance of multi-temporal (monthly time series) compared to mono-temporal (single time step) satellite images for multi-label classification using supervised learning on the RapidAI4EO dataset. As a first step, we trained our CNN model on images at a single time step for multi-label classification, i.e. mono-temporal. We incorporated time-series images using a LSTM model to assess whether or not multi-temporal signals from satellites improves CLC classification. The results demonstrate an improvement of approximately 0.89% in classifying satellite imagery on 15 classes using a multi-temporal approach on monthly time series images compared to the mono-temporal approach. Using features from multi-temporal or mono-temporal images, this work is a step towards an efficient change detection and land monitoring approach.
summary: In the remote sensing community, Land Use Land Cover (LULC) classification with satellite imagery is a main focus of current research activities. Accurate and appropriate LULC classification, however, continues to be a challenging task. In this paper, we evaluate the performance of multi-temporal (monthly time series) compared to mono-temporal (single time step) satellite images for multi-label classification using supervised learning on the RapidAI4EO dataset. As a first step, we trained our CNN model on images at a single time step for multi-label classification, i.e. mono-temporal. We incorporated time-series images using a LSTM model to assess whether or not multi-temporal signals from satellites improves CLC classification. The results demonstrate an improvement of approximately 0.89% in classifying satellite imagery on 15 classes using a multi-temporal approach on monthly time series images compared to the mono-temporal approach. Using features from multi-temporal or mono-temporal images, this work is a step towards an efficient change detection and land monitoring approach.
abstract_zh: 在遥感界，利用卫星图像进行土地利用土地覆盖（LULC）分类是当前研究活动的主要焦点。然而，准确且适当的 LULC 分类仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们使用 RapidAI4EO 数据集上的监督学习来评估多时相（每月时间序列）与单时相（单时间步长）卫星图像的多标签分类性能。第一步，我们在单个时间步长的图像上训练 CNN 模型，以进行多标签分类，即单时间分类。我们使用 LSTM 模型合并时间序列图像，以评估来自卫星的多时相信号是否可以改善 CLC 分类。结果表明，与单时相方法相比，对月度时间序列图像使用多时相方法对卫星图像进行 15 个类别分类的效果提高了约 0.89%。这项工作利用多时相或单时相图像的特征，向高效的变化检测和土地监测方法迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了单时相与多时相卫星图像在土地利用/覆盖分类任务中的性能差异，旨在提升CORINE土地覆盖产品的更新效率。
AI.motivation: 准确的土地利用/覆盖分类是遥感研究的核心挑战，传统方法难以有效捕捉动态变化，需探索多时相数据的潜力。
AI.method: 基于RapidAI4EO数据集，采用卷积神经网络（CNN）处理单时相图像，结合长短期记忆网络（LSTM）建模多时相月度时间序列，进行多标签分类对比实验。
AI.result: 多时相方法在15类土地覆盖分类任务中较单时相方法提升了约0.89%的准确率，验证了时间序列信息的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多时相卫星数据能有效增强土地覆盖分类性能，为动态变化检测和土地监测提供更高效的技术路径。

authors_text: A. Elmaizi,E. Sarhrouni,A. Hammouch,C. Nacir
title: A new band selection approach based on information theory and support vector machine for hyperspectral images reduction and classification
title_zh: 一种基于信息论和支持向量机的高光谱图像缩减和分类的新波段选择方法
comment: ef:2017 International Symposium on Networks, Computers and Communications (ISNCC) - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-85039974269&partnerID=MN8TOARS
comments: ef:2017 International Symposium on Networks, Computers and Communications (ISNCC) - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-85039974269&partnerID=MN8TOARS
abstract: The high dimensionality of hyperspectral images consisting of several bands often imposes a big computational challenge for image processing. Therefore, spectral band selection is an essential step for removing the irrelevant, noisy and redundant bands. Consequently increasing the classification accuracy. However, identification of useful bands from hundreds or even thousands of related bands is a nontrivial task. This paper aims at identifying a small set of highly discriminative bands, for improving computational speed and prediction accuracy. Hence, we proposed a new strategy based on joint mutual information to measure the statistical dependence and correlation between the selected bands and evaluate the relative utility of each one to classification. The proposed filter approach is compared to an effective reproduced filters based on mutual information. Simulations results on the hyperpectral image HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C using the SVM classifier have shown that the effective proposed algorithm outperforms the reproduced filters strategy performance. Keywords-Hyperspectral images, Classification, band Selection, Joint Mutual Information, dimensionality reduction ,correlation, SVM.
summary: The high dimensionality of hyperspectral images consisting of several bands often imposes a big computational challenge for image processing. This paper aims at identifying a small set of highly discriminative bands, for improving computational speed and prediction accuracy. Hence, we proposed a new strategy based on joint mutual information to measure the statistical dependence and correlation between the selected bands and evaluate the relative utility of each one to classification. The proposed filter approach is compared to an effective reproduced filters based on mutual information. Simulations results on the hyperpectral image HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C using the SVM classifier have shown that the effective proposed algorithm outperforms the reproduced filters strategy performance. Keywords-Hyperspectral images, Classification, band Selection, Joint Mutual Information, dimensionality reduction ,correlation, SVM.
abstract_zh: 由多个波段组成的高光谱图像通常给图像处理带来巨大的计算挑战。因此，频带选择是去除不相关、噪声和冗余频带的重要步骤。从而提高分类精度。然而，从数百甚至数千个相关频带中识别有用频带是一项艰巨的任务。本文旨在识别一小组具有高度辨别力的频带，以提高计算速度和预测精度。因此，我们提出了一种基于联合互信息的新策略来测量所选波段之间的统计依赖性和相关性，并评估每个波段对分类的相对效用。将所提出的滤波器方法与基于互信息的有效再现滤波器进行比较。使用 SVM 分类器对超光谱图像 HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C 进行的仿真结果表明，所提出的有效算法优于再现滤波器策略的性能。关键词-高光谱图像，分类，波段选择，联合互信息，降维，相关，SVM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息论和支持向量机的高光谱图像波段选择方法，旨在通过减少冗余波段提升分类效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像波段数量庞大导致计算复杂度高，冗余和噪声波段会影响分类准确性，亟需有效方法筛选关键波段。
AI.method: 结合联合互信息理论评估波段间的统计依赖性和相关性，提出一种过滤器方法，并与基于互信息的现有方法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS 92AV3C数据集上实验表明，所提算法在分类精度和计算速度上优于传统过滤策略。
AI.conclusion: 联合互信息方法能有效识别高判别性波段，为高光谱图像降维与分类提供优化解决方案。

authors_text: Junliang Chen,Xiaodong Zhao,Cheng Luo,Linlin Shen
title: SemFormer: Semantic Guided Activation Transformer for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: SemFormer：用于弱监督语义分割的语义引导激活变压器
abstract: Recent mainstream weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) approaches are mainly based on Class Activation Map (CAM) generated by a CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) based image classifier. In this paper, we propose a novel transformer-based framework, named Semantic Guided Activation Transformer (SemFormer), for WSSS. We design a transformer-based Class-Aware AutoEncoder (CAAE) to extract the class embeddings for the input image and learn class semantics for all classes of the dataset. The class embeddings and learned class semantics are then used to guide the generation of activation maps with four losses, i.e., class-foreground, class-background, activation suppression, and activation complementation loss. Experimental results show that our SemFormer achieves \textbf{74.3}\% mIoU and surpasses many recent mainstream WSSS approaches by a large margin on PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/JLChen-C/SemFormer}.
summary: Recent mainstream weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) approaches are mainly based on Class Activation Map (CAM) generated by a CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) based image classifier. In this paper, we propose a novel transformer-based framework, named Semantic Guided Activation Transformer (SemFormer), for WSSS. We design a transformer-based Class-Aware AutoEncoder (CAAE) to extract the class embeddings for the input image and learn class semantics for all classes of the dataset. The class embeddings and learned class semantics are then used to guide the generation of activation maps with four losses, i.e., class-foreground, class-background, activation suppression, and activation complementation loss. Experimental results show that our SemFormer achieves \textbf{74.3}\% mIoU and surpasses many recent mainstream WSSS approaches by a large margin on PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/JLChen-C/SemFormer}.
abstract_zh: 最近主流的弱监督语义分割（WSSS）方法主要基于由基于 CNN（卷积神经网络）的图像分类器生成的类激活图（CAM）。在本文中，我们为 WSSS 提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新型框架，名为 Semantic Guided Activation Transformer (SemFormer)。我们设计了一个基于变压器的类感知自动编码器（CAAE）来提取输入图像的类嵌入并学习数据集所有类的类语义。然后使用类嵌入和学习到的类语义来指导生成具有四种损失的激活图，即前景类、背景类、激活抑制和激活互补损失。实验结果表明，我们的 SemFormer 在 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上实现了 \textbf{74.3}\% mIoU，并大大超过了许多最近主流的 WSSS 方法。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/JLChen-C/SemFormer} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的弱监督语义分割框架SemFormer，通过语义引导的激活机制提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督语义分割方法依赖CNN生成的类别激活图（CAM），存在语义表达能力不足的问题，需探索更有效的Transformer架构进行改进。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的类感知自编码器（CAAE）提取类别嵌入并学习全局语义，结合四类损失函数（前景/背景激活、抑制与补全）指导激活图生成。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上达到74.3%的mIoU，显著优于现有主流弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: SemFormer通过Transformer架构与多损失联合优化有效提升了弱监督语义分割性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zhibo Zhang,Ernesto Damiani,Hussam Al Hamadi,Chan Yeob Yeun,Fatma Taher
title: A Late Multi-Modal Fusion Model for Detecting Hybrid Spam E-mail
title_zh: 用于检测混合垃圾邮件的后期多模态融合模型
comment: The content of this paper needs to be updated
comments: The content of this paper needs to be updated
abstract: In recent years, spammers are now trying to obfuscate their intents by introducing hybrid spam e-mail combining both image and text parts, which is more challenging to detect in comparison to e-mails containing text or image only. The motivation behind this research is to design an effective approach filtering out hybrid spam e-mails to avoid situations where traditional text-based or image-baesd only filters fail to detect hybrid spam e-mails. To the best of our knowledge, a few studies have been conducted with the goal of detecting hybrid spam e-mails. Ordinarily, Optical Character Recognition (OCR) technology is used to eliminate the image parts of spam by transforming images into text. However, the research questions are that although OCR scanning is a very successful technique in processing text-and-image hybrid spam, it is not an effective solution for dealing with huge quantities due to the CPU power required and the execution time it takes to scan e-mail files. And the OCR techniques are not always reliable in the transformation processes. To address such problems, we propose new late multi-modal fusion training frameworks for a text-and-image hybrid spam e-mail filtering system compared to the classical early fusion detection frameworks based on the OCR method. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Continuous Bag of Words were implemented to extract features from image and text parts of hybrid spam respectively, whereas generated features were fed to sigmoid layer and Machine Learning based classifiers including Random Forest (RF), Decision Tree (DT), Naive Bayes (NB) and Support Vector Machine (SVM) to determine the e-mail ham or spam.

The motivation behind this research is to design an effective approach filtering out hybrid spam e-mails to avoid situations where traditional text-based or image-baesd only filters fail to detect hybrid spam e-mails.
