However, the research questions are that although OCR scanning is a very successful technique in processing text-and-image hybrid spam, it is not an effective solution for dealing with huge quantities due to the CPU power required and the execution time it takes to scan e-mail files. And the OCR techniques are not always reliable in the transformation processes. To address such problems, we propose new late multi-modal fusion training frameworks for a text-and-image hybrid spam e-mail filtering system compared to the classical early fusion detection frameworks based on the OCR method. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Continuous Bag of Words were implemented to extract features from image and text parts of hybrid spam respectively, whereas generated features were fed to sigmoid layer and Machine Learning based classifiers including Random Forest (RF), Decision Tree (DT), Naive Bayes (NB) and Support Vector Machine (SVM) to determine the e-mail ham or spam.
abstract_zh: 近年来，垃圾邮件发送者试图通过引入结合图像和文本部分的混合垃圾邮件电子邮件来混淆他们的意图，与仅包含文本或图像的电子邮件相比，这种混合垃圾邮件更难以检测。这项研究背后的动机是设计一种有效的方法来过滤混合垃圾邮件，以避免传统的基于文本或仅基于图像的过滤器无法检测混合垃圾邮件的情况。据我们所知，已经进行了一些研究以检测混合垃圾邮件。通常，光学字符识别（OCR）技术通过将图像转换为文本来消除垃圾邮件中的图像部分。然而，研究问题是，尽管 OCR 扫描在处理文本和图像混合垃圾邮件方面是一种非常成功的技术，但由于所需的 CPU 能力和扫描电子邮件文件所需的执行时间，它并不是处理大量垃圾邮件的有效解决方案。并且 OCR 技术在转换过程中并不总是可靠。为了解决这些问题，与基于 OCR 方法的经典早期融合检测框架相比，我们为文本和图像混合垃圾邮件过滤系统提出了新的后期多模态融合训练框架。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和连续词袋分别从混合垃圾邮件的图像和文本部分提取特征，而生成的特征被馈送到 sigmoid 层和基于机器学习的分类器，包括随机森林 (RF)、决策树 (DT)、朴素贝叶斯 (NB) 和支持向量机 (SVM)，以确定电子邮件是垃圾邮件还是垃圾邮件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于晚期多模态融合的混合垃圾邮件检测模型，结合图像和文本特征进行过滤。
AI.motivation: 传统基于文本或图像的过滤方法难以检测混合型垃圾邮件，且OCR技术存在效率低和可靠性不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）提取图像特征，连续词袋模型（CBOW）提取文本特征，通过Sigmoid层与随机森林、支持向量机等分类器进行晚期多模态融合。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在处理大规模混合垃圾邮件时效率优于传统OCR方法，且检测准确性得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 晚期多模态融合框架能有效解决混合垃圾邮件检测难题，优于基于OCR的早期融合方法。

authors_text: Carlos S. Sepúlveda,Eric Goles,Martín Ríos-Wilson,Andrew Adamatzky
title: Exploring the Dynamics of Fungal Cellular Automata
title_zh: 探索真菌细胞自动机的动力学
abstract: Cells in a fungal hyphae are separated by internal walls (septa). The septa have tiny pores that allow cytoplasm flowing between cells. Cells can close their septa blocking the flow if they are injured, preventing fluid loss from the rest of filament. This action is achieved by special organelles called Woronin bodies. Using the controllable pores as an inspiration we advance one and two-dimensional cellular automata into Elementary fungal cellular automata (EFCA) and Majority fungal automata (MFA) by adding a concept of Woronin bodies to the cell state transition rules. EFCA is a cellular automaton where the communications between neighboring cells can be blocked by the activation of the Woronin bodies (Wb), allowing or blocking the flow of information (represented by a cytoplasm and chemical elements it carries) between them. We explore a novel version of the fungal automata where the evolution of the system is only affected by the activation of the Wb. We explore two case studies: the Elementary Fungal Cellular Automata (EFCA), which is a direct application of this variant for elementary cellular automata rules, and the Majority Fungal Automata (MFA), which correspond to an application of the Wb to two dimensional automaton with majority rule with Von Neumann neighborhood. By studying the EFCA model, we analyze how the 256 elementary cellular automata rules are affected by the activation of Wb in different modes, increasing the complexity on applied rule in some cases. Also we explore how a consensus over MFA is affected when the continuous flow of information is interrupted due to the activation of Woronin bodies.

By studying the EFCA model, we analyze how the 256 elementary cellular automata rules are affected by the activation of Wb in different modes, increasing the complexity on applied rule in some cases. Also we explore how a consensus over MFA is affected when the continuous flow of information is interrupted due to the activation of Woronin bodies.
abstract_zh: 真菌菌丝中的细胞由内壁（隔膜）分隔开。隔膜具有微小的孔，允许细胞质在细胞之间流动。如果细胞受伤，它们可以关闭隔膜，阻止流动，从而防止其余细丝中的液体流失。这一作用是通过称为 Woronin 小体的特殊细胞器来实现的。以可控孔为灵感，我们通过在细胞状态转换规则中添加 Woronin 体的概念，将一维和二维细胞自动机推进为初级真菌细胞自动机 (EFCA) 和多数真菌自动机 (MFA)。 EFCA 是一种细胞自动机，其中相邻细胞之间的通信可以通过 Woronin 小体 (Wb) 的激活来阻断，从而允许或阻止它们之间的信息流动（由细胞质和其携带的化学元素表示）。我们探索了一种新颖的真菌自动机版本，其中系统的进化仅受 Wb 激活的影响。我们探讨了两个案例研究：基本真菌细胞自动机（EFCA），它是基本细胞自动机规则的这种变体的直接应用，以及多数真菌自动机（MFA），它对应于 Wb 在具有冯诺依曼邻域的多数规则的二维自动机中的应用。通过研究EFCA模型，我们分析了Wb在不同模式下的激活如何影响256个基本元胞自动机规则，在某些情况下增加了应用规则的复杂性。我们还探讨了当连续的信息流因 Woronin 体的激活而中断时，MFA 共识会受到怎样的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于真菌细胞结构的新型细胞自动机模型（EFCA和MFA），通过引入Woronin体机制模拟细胞间信息流动的阻断与恢复过程。
AI.motivation: 受真菌菌丝中Woronin体通过阻断细胞间质流动实现损伤隔离的生物学机制启发，探索其在计算模型中模拟信息流动控制的潜力。
AI.method: 在传统细胞自动机规则中嵌入Woronin体激活状态，构建可动态阻断邻域细胞交互的EFCA（一维）和MFA（二维）模型，并通过案例分析验证其特性。
AI.result: 发现Woronin体激活模式显著增加部分基础规则的复杂性，且在MFA中信息流中断会破坏共识形成过程，揭示了生物机制对计算模型的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为细胞自动机理论提供了生物启发的新型动态控制机制，同时展示了真菌细胞结构在计算模型中的潜在应用价值。

search_text: Exploring the Dynamics of Fungal Cellular Automata 探索真菌细胞自动机的动力学 Cells in a fungal hyphae are separated by internal walls (septa). The septa have tiny pores that allow cytoplasm flowing between cells. Cells can close their septa blocking the flow if they are injured, preventing fluid loss from the rest of filament. This action is achieved by special organelles called Woronin bodies. Using the controllable pores as an inspiration we advance one and two-dimensional cellular automata into Elementary fungal cellular automata (EFCA) and Majority fungal automata (MFA) by adding a concept of Woronin bodies to the cell state transition rules. EFCA is a cellular automaton where the communications between neighboring cells can be blocked by the activation of the Woronin bodies (Wb), allowing or blocking the flow of information (represented by a cytoplasm and chemical elements it carries) between them. We explore a novel version of the fungal automata where the evolution of the system is only affected by the activation of the Wb. We explore two case studies: the Elementary Fungal Cellular Automata (EFCA), which is a direct application of this variant for elementary cellular automata rules, and the Majority Fungal Automata (MFA), which correspond to an application of the Wb to two dimensional automaton with majority rule with Von Neumann neighborhood. By studying the EFCA model, we analyze how the 256 elementary cellular automata rules are affected by the activation of Wb in different modes, increasing the complexity on applied rule in some cases. Also we explore how a consensus over MFA is affected when the continuous flow of information is interrupted due to the activation of Woronin bodies. 真菌菌丝中的细胞由内壁（隔膜）分隔开。隔膜具有微小的孔，允许细胞质在细胞之间流动。如果细胞受伤，它们可以关闭隔膜，阻止流动，从而防止其余细丝中的液体流失。这一作用是通过称为 Woronin 小体的特殊细胞器来实现的。以可控孔为灵感，我们通过在细胞状态转换规则中添加 Woronin 体的概念，将一维和二维细胞自动机推进为初级真菌细胞自动机 (EFCA) 和多数真菌自动机 (MFA)。 EFCA 是一种细胞自动机，其中相邻细胞之间的通信可以通过 Woronin 小体 (Wb) 的激活来阻断，从而允许或阻止它们之间的信息流动（由细胞质和其携带的化学元素表示）。我们探索了一种新颖的真菌自动机版本，其中系统的进化仅受 Wb 激活的影响。我们探讨了两个案例研究：基本真菌细胞自动机（EFCA），它是基本细胞自动机规则的这种变体的直接应用，以及多数真菌自动机（MFA），它对应于 Wb 在具有冯诺依曼邻域的多数规则的二维自动机中的应用。通过研究EFCA模型，我们分析了Wb在不同模式下的激活如何影响256个基本元胞自动机规则，在某些情况下增加了应用规则的复杂性。我们还探讨了当连续的信息流因 Woronin 体的激活而中断时，MFA 共识会受到怎样的影响。 本文提出基于真菌细胞结构的新型细胞自动机模型（EFCA和MFA），通过引入Woronin体机制模拟细胞间信息流动的阻断与恢复过程。 Carlos S. authors_text: Marc Uecker,Tobias Fleck,Marcel Pflugfelder,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Analyzing Deep Learning Representations of Point Clouds for Real-Time In-Vehicle LiDAR Perception
title_zh: 分析点云的深度学习表示以实现实时车载 LiDAR 感知
comment: Accepted at the NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving (ML4AD). Changed in v3: corrected erroneously cited mIoU score for PolarNet
comments: Accepted at the NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving (ML4AD). Changed in v3: corrected erroneously cited mIoU score for PolarNet
abstract: LiDAR sensors are an integral part of modern autonomous vehicles as they provide an accurate, high-resolution 3D representation of the vehicle's surroundings. However, it is computationally difficult to make use of the ever-increasing amounts of data from multiple high-resolution LiDAR sensors. As frame-rates, point cloud sizes and sensor resolutions increase, real-time processing of these point clouds must still extract semantics from this increasingly precise picture of the vehicle's environment. One deciding factor of the run-time performance and accuracy of deep neural networks operating on these point clouds is the underlying data representation and the way it is computed. In this work, we examine the relationship between the computational representations used in neural networks and their performance characteristics. To this end, we propose a novel computational taxonomy of LiDAR point cloud representations used in modern deep neural networks for 3D point cloud processing. Using this taxonomy, we perform a structured analysis of different families of approaches. Thereby, we uncover common advantages and limitations in terms of computational efficiency, memory requirements, and representational capacity as measured by semantic segmentation performance. Finally, we provide some insights and guidance for future developments in neural point cloud processing methods.
summary: LiDAR sensors are an integral part of modern autonomous vehicles as they provide an accurate, high-resolution 3D representation of the vehicle's surroundings. However, it is computationally difficult to make use of the ever-increasing amounts of data from multiple high-resolution LiDAR sensors. As frame-rates, point cloud sizes and sensor resolutions increase, real-time processing of these point clouds must still extract semantics from this increasingly precise picture of the vehicle's environment. One deciding factor of the run-time performance and accuracy of deep neural networks operating on these point clouds is the underlying data representation and the way it is computed. In this work, we examine the relationship between the computational representations used in neural networks and their performance characteristics. To this end, we propose a novel computational taxonomy of LiDAR point cloud representations used in modern deep neural networks for 3D point cloud processing. Using this taxonomy, we perform a structured analysis of different families of approaches. Thereby, we uncover common advantages and limitations in terms of computational efficiency, memory requirements, and representational capacity as measured by semantic segmentation performance. Finally, we provide some insights and guidance for future developments in neural point cloud processing methods.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 传感器是现代自动驾驶汽车不可或缺的一部分，因为它们可以提供车辆周围环境的准确、高分辨率的 3D 表示。然而，利用来自多个高分辨率激光雷达传感器的不断增加的数据量在计算上是困难的。随着帧速率、点云大小和传感器分辨率的增加，这些点云的实时处理仍然必须从日益精确的车辆环境图片中提取语义。在这些点云上运行的深度神经网络的运行时性能和准确性的决定因素之一是底层数据表示及其计算方式。在这项工作中，我们研究了神经网络中使用的计算表示与其性能特征之间的关系。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的 LiDAR 点云表示计算分类法，用于现代深度神经网络进行 3D 点云处理。使用这种分类法，我们对不同的方法系列进行结构化分析。因此，我们发现了在计算效率、内存需求和通过语义分割性能衡量的表示能力方面的共同优点和局限性。最后，我们为神经点云处理方法的未来发展提供一些见解和指导。

AI.tldr: 本文分析深度学习中点云表示方法在车载激光雷达实时感知中的应用，提出分类框架并评估不同方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率激光雷达数据量激增导致实时处理困难，现有方法的表示方式直接影响计算效率与感知精度，需系统性分析不同表示方案的优劣。
AI.method: 提出点云表示的计算分类法，对主流深度学习方法进行结构化分析，从计算效率、内存占用和语义分割性能三个维度评估不同表示方式。
AI.result: 揭示了各类表示方法在效率与精度间的权衡关系，发现稀疏表示更利于实时性而密集表示更优分割精度，为方法选择提供量化依据。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统分类与对比分析，明确了点云表示设计的关键影响因素，为未来高精度实时激光雷达感知算法开发提供方向性指导。

authors_text: Mahboobeh Jafari,Afshin Shoeibi,Navid Ghassemi,Jonathan Heras,Sai Ho Ling,Amin Beheshti,Yu-Dong Zhang,Shui-Hua Wang,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Juan M. Gorriz,U. Rajendra Acharya,Hamid Alinejad Rokny
title: Automatic Diagnosis of Myocarditis Disease in Cardiac MRI Modality using Deep Transformers and Explainable Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 使用深度变压器和可解释的人工智能在心脏 MRI 模式中自动诊断心肌炎疾病
abstract: Myocarditis is a significant cardiovascular disease (CVD) that poses a threat to the health of many individuals by causing damage to the myocardium. The occurrence of microbes and viruses, including the likes of HIV, plays a crucial role in the development of myocarditis disease (MCD). The images produced during cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMRI) scans are low contrast, which can make it challenging to diagnose cardiovascular diseases. In other hand, checking numerous CMRI slices for each CVD patient can be a challenging task for medical doctors. To overcome the existing challenges, researchers have suggested the use of artificial intelligence (AI)-based computer-aided diagnosis systems (CADS). The presented paper outlines a CADS for the detection of MCD from CMR images, utilizing deep learning (DL) methods. The proposed CADS consists of several steps, including dataset, preprocessing, feature extraction, classification, and post-processing. First, the Z-Alizadeh dataset was selected for the experiments. Subsequently, the CMR images underwent various preprocessing steps, including denoising, resizing, as well as data augmentation (DA) via CutMix and MixUp techniques. In the following, the most current deep pre-trained and transformer models are used for feature extraction and classification on the CMR images. The findings of our study reveal that transformer models exhibit superior performance in detecting MCD as opposed to pre-trained architectures. In terms of DL architectures, the Turbulence Neural Transformer (TNT) model exhibited impressive accuracy, reaching 99.73% utilizing a 10-fold cross-validation approach. Additionally, to pinpoint areas of suspicion for MCD in CMRI images, the Explainable-based Grad Cam method was employed.

Subsequently, the CMR images underwent various preprocessing steps, including denoising, resizing, as well as data augmentation (DA) via CutMix and MixUp techniques. In the following, the most current deep pre-trained and transformer models are used for feature extraction and classification on the CMR images. The findings of our study reveal that transformer models exhibit superior performance in detecting MCD as opposed to pre-trained architectures. In terms of DL architectures, the Turbulence Neural Transformer (TNT) model exhibited impressive accuracy, reaching 99.73% utilizing a 10-fold cross-validation approach. Additionally, to pinpoint areas of suspicion for MCD in CMRI images, the Explainable-based Grad Cam method was employed.
abstract_zh: 心肌炎是一种重要的心血管疾病（CVD），它对心肌造成损害，对许多人的健康构成威胁。微生物和病毒（包括 HIV 等）的出现在心肌炎疾病 (MCD) 的发展中起着至关重要的作用。心脏磁共振成像 (CMRI) 扫描过程中产生的图像对比度较低，这使得诊断心血管疾病变得困难。另一方面，检查每个 CVD 患者的大量 CMRI 切片对于医生来说是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了克服现有的挑战，研究人员建议使用基于人工智能（AI）的计算机辅助诊断系统（CADS）。本文概述了利用深度学习 (DL) 方法从 CMR 图像中检测 MCD 的 CADS。所提出的CADS由几个步骤组成，包括数据集、预处理、特征提取、分类和后处理。首先，选择 Z-Alizadeh 数据集进行实验。随后，CMR 图像经历了各种预处理步骤，包括去噪、调整大小以及通过 CutMix 和 MixUp 技术进行数据增强 (DA)。下面，使用最新的深度预训练模型和 Transformer 模型对 CMR 图像进行特征提取和分类。我们的研究结果表明，与预先训练的架构相比，变压器模型在检测 MCD 方面表现出优越的性能。在深度学习架构方面，Turbulence Neural Transformer (TNT) 模型表现出了令人印象深刻的准确率，利用 10 倍交叉验证方法达到了 99.73%。此外，为了查明 CMRI 图像中 MCD 的可疑区域，采用了基于可解释的 Grad Cam 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度Transformer和可解释人工智能的计算机辅助诊断系统（CADS），用于从心脏MRI图像中自动检测心肌炎疾病。
AI.motivation: 心肌炎诊断依赖低对比度的心脏MRI图像，人工分析耗时且易误诊，亟需高效准确的AI辅助诊断方法。
AI.method: 使用Z-Alizadeh数据集，通过去噪、重采样和CutMix/MixUp增强预处理数据；采用最新Transformer模型（如TNT）进行特征提取与分类，并结合Grad-Cam实现可解释性分析。
AI.result: TNT模型在10折交叉验证中达到99.73%的准确率，显著优于传统预训练模型，Grad-Cam有效定位心肌炎可疑区域。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构在心肌炎检测中表现优异，结合可解释AI技术可提升诊断可信度与临床应用价值。

search_text: Automatic Diagnosis of Myocarditis Disease in Cardiac MRI Modality using Deep Transformers and Explainable Artificial Intelligence 使用深度变压器和可解释的人工智能在心脏 MRI 模式中自动诊断心肌炎疾病 Myocarditis is a significant cardiovascular disease (CVD) that poses a threat to the health of many individuals by causing damage to the myocardium. The occurrence of microbes and viruses, including the likes of HIV, plays a crucial role in the development of myocarditis disease (MCD). The images produced during cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMRI) scans are low contrast, which can make it challenging to diagnose cardiovascular diseases. In other hand, checking numerous CMRI slices for each CVD patient can be a challenging task for medical doctors. To overcome the existing challenges, researchers have suggested the use of artificial intelligence (AI)-based computer-aided diagnosis systems (CADS). The presented paper outlines a CADS for the detection of MCD from CMR images, utilizing deep learning (DL) methods. The proposed CADS consists of several steps, including dataset, preprocessing, feature extraction, classification, and post-processing. First, the Z-Alizadeh dataset was selected for the experiments. Subsequently, the CMR images underwent various preprocessing steps, including denoising, resizing, as well as data augmentation (DA) via CutMix and MixUp techniques. In the following, the most current deep pre-trained and transformer models are used for feature extraction and classification on the CMR images. The findings of our study reveal that transformer models exhibit superior performance in detecting MCD as opposed to pre-trained architectures. In terms of DL architectures, the Turbulence Neural Transformer (TNT) model exhibited impressive accuracy, reaching 99.73% utilizing a 10-fold cross-validation approach. Additionally, to pinpoint areas of suspicion for MCD in CMRI images, the Explainable-based Grad Cam method was employed. 心肌炎是一种重要的心血管疾病（CVD），它对心肌造成损害，对许多人的健康构成威胁。微生物和病毒（包括 HIV 等）的出现在心肌炎疾病 (MCD) 的发展中起着至关重要的作用。心脏磁共振成像 (CMRI) 扫描过程中产生的图像对比度较低，这使得诊断心血管疾病变得困难。另一方面，检查每个 CVD 患者的大量 CMRI 切片对于医生来说是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了克服现有的挑战，研究人员建议使用基于人工智能（AI）的计算机辅助诊断系统（CADS）。本文概述了利用深度学习 (DL) 方法从 CMR 图像中检测 MCD 的 CADS。所提出的CADS由几个步骤组成，包括数据集、预处理、特征提取、分类和后处理。首先，选择 Z-Alizadeh 数据集进行实验。随后，CMR 图像经历了各种预处理步骤，包括去噪、调整大小以及通过 CutMix 和 MixUp 技术进行数据增强 (DA)。下面，使用最新的深度预训练模型和 Transformer 模型对 CMR 图像进行特征提取和分类。我们的研究结果表明，与预先训练的架构相比，变压器模型在检测 MCD 方面表现出优越的性能。在深度学习架构方面，Turbulence Neural Transformer (TNT) 模型表现出了令人印象深刻的准确率，利用 10 倍交叉验证方法达到了 99.73%。此外，为了查明 CMRI 图像中 MCD 的可疑区域，采用了基于可解释的 Grad Cam 方法。 本文提出一种基于深度Transformer和可解释人工智能的计算机辅助诊断系统（CADS），用于从心脏MRI图像中自动检测心肌炎疾病。 Mahboobeh Jafari,Afshin Shoeibi,Navid Ghassemi,Jonathan Heras,Sai Ho Ling,Amin Beheshti,Yu-Dong Zhang,Shui-Hua Wang,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Juan M. Gorriz,U. Rajendra Acharya,Hamid Alinejad Rokny cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Asma Elmaizi,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed hammouch,Chafik Nacir
title: A novel filter based on three variables mutual information for dimensionality reduction and classification of hyperspectral images
title_zh: 一种基于三变量互信息的新型滤波器，用于高光谱图像降维和分类
comment: ef:2016 International Conference on Electrical and Information Technologies (ICEIT) - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-84992221810&partnerID=MN8TOARS
comments: ef:2016 International Conference on Electrical and Information Technologies (ICEIT) - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-84992221810&partnerID=MN8TOARS
abstract: The high dimensionality of hyperspectral images (HSI) that contains more than hundred bands (images) for the same region called Ground Truth Map, often imposes a heavy computational burden for image processing and complicates the learning process. In fact, the removal of irrelevant, noisy and redundant bands helps increase the classification accuracy. Band selection filter based on "Mutual Information" is a common technique for dimensionality reduction. In this paper, a categorization of dimensionality reduction methods according to the evaluation process is presented. Moreover, a new filter approach based on three variables mutual information is developed in order to measure band correlation for classification, it considers not only bands relevance but also bands interaction. The proposed approach is compared to a reproduced filter algorithm based on mutual information. Experimental results on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C have shown that the proposed approach is very competitive, effective and outperforms the reproduced filter strategy performance. Keywords - Hyperspectral images, Classification, band Selection, Three variables Mutual Information, information gain.
summary: The high dimensionality of hyperspectral images (HSI) that contains more than hundred bands (images) for the same region called Ground Truth Map, often imposes a heavy computational burden for image processing and complicates the learning process. In fact, the removal of irrelevant, noisy and redundant bands helps increase the classification accuracy. Band selection filter based on "Mutual Information" is a common technique for dimensionality reduction. In this paper, a categorization of dimensionality reduction methods according to the evaluation process is presented. Moreover, a new filter approach based on three variables mutual information is developed in order to measure band correlation for classification, it considers not only bands relevance but also bands interaction. The proposed approach is compared to a reproduced filter algorithm based on mutual information. Experimental results on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C have shown that the proposed approach is very competitive, effective and outperforms the reproduced filter strategy performance. Keywords - Hyperspectral images, Classification, band Selection, Three variables Mutual Information, information gain.
abstract_zh: 高维高光谱图像 (HSI) 包含同一区域的数百个波段（图像），称为地面实况图，通常会给图像处理带来沉重的计算负担，并使学习过程变得复杂。事实上，去除不相关、噪声和冗余频带有助于提高分类精度。基于“互信息”的频带选择滤波器是降维的常用技术。本文根据评估过程对降维方法进行了分类。此外，开发了一种基于三变量互信息的新滤波器方法，以测量频带相关性以进行分类，它不仅考虑频带相关性，还考虑频带交互。将所提出的方法与基于互信息的再现滤波器算法进行比较。 HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C 上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法非常有竞争力、有效，并且优于再现的滤波器策略性能。关键词 - 高光谱图像、分类、波段选择、三变量互信息、信息增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三变量互信息的新滤波方法，用于高光谱图像的降维与分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像波段数量多导致计算负担重且分类复杂，传统方法未充分考虑波段间交互作用，需改进以提高分类精度。
AI.method: 开发基于三变量互信息的滤波器，综合评估波段相关性及交互作用，并与传统互信息滤波器对比验证。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS 92AV3C数据集实验中，新方法分类性能优于传统滤波策略，具有竞争力且有效性显著。
AI.conclusion: 三变量互信息滤波器能有效提升高光谱图像分类准确率，验证了其在降维与分类任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Jean Cardinal,Raphael Steiner
title: Inapproximability of shortest paths on perfect matching polytopes
title_zh: 完美匹配多面体上最短路径的不近似性
abstract: We consider the computational problem of finding short paths in the skeleton of the perfect matching polytope of a bipartite graph. We prove that unless $P=NP$, there is no polynomial-time algorithm that computes a path of constant length between two vertices at distance two of the perfect matching polytope of a bipartite graph. Conditioned on $P\neq NP$, this disproves a conjecture by Ito, Kakimura, Kamiyama, Kobayashi and Okamoto [SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics, 36(2), pp. 1102-1123 (2022)]. Assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis we prove the stronger result that there exists no polynomial-time algorithm computing a path of length at most $\left(\frac{1}{4}-o(1)\right)\frac{\log N}{\log \log N}$ between two vertices at distance two of the perfect matching polytope of an $N$-vertex bipartite graph. These results remain true if the bipartite graph is restricted to be of maximum degree three. The above has the following interesting implication for the performance of pivot rules for the simplex algorithm on simply-structured combinatorial polytopes: If $P\neq NP$, then for every simplex pivot rule executable in polynomial time and every constant $k \in \mathbb{N}$ there exists a linear program on a perfect matching polytope and a starting vertex of the polytope such that the optimal solution can be reached in two monotone steps from the starting vertex, yet the pivot rule will require at least $k$ steps to reach the optimal solution. This result remains true in the more general setting of pivot rules for so-called circuit-augmentation algorithms.
summary: We consider the computational problem of finding short paths in the skeleton of the perfect matching polytope of a bipartite graph. We prove that unless $P=NP$, there is no polynomial-time algorithm that computes a path of constant length between two vertices at distance two of the perfect matching polytope of a bipartite graph. Conditioned on $P\neq NP$, this disproves a conjecture by Ito, Kakimura, Kamiyama, Kobayashi and Okamoto [SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics, 36(2), pp. 1102-1123 (2022)]. Assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis we prove the stronger result that there exists no polynomial-time algorithm computing a path of length at most $\left(\frac{1}{4}-o(1)\right)\frac{\log N}{\log \log N}$ between two vertices at distance two of the perfect matching polytope of an $N$-vertex bipartite graph. These results remain true if the bipartite graph is restricted to be of maximum degree three. The above has the following interesting implication for the performance of pivot rules for the simplex algorithm on simply-structured combinatorial polytopes: If $P\neq NP$, then for every simplex pivot rule executable in polynomial time and every constant $k \in \mathbb{N}$ there exists a linear program on a perfect matching polytope and a starting vertex of the polytope such that the optimal solution can be reached in two monotone steps from the starting vertex, yet the pivot rule will require at least $k$ steps to reach the optimal solution. This result remains true in the more general setting of pivot rules for so-called circuit-augmentation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在二分图的完美匹配多面体的骨架中寻找短路径的计算问题。我们证明，除非 $P=NP$，否则不存在多项式时间算法可以计算二部图完美匹配多胞形距离为 2 的两个顶点之间的恒定长度路径。以 $P\neq NP$ 为条件，这反驳了 Ito、Kakimura、Kamiyama、Kobayashi 和 Okamoto 的猜想 [SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics, 36(2), pp. 1102-1123 (2022)]。假设指数时间假设，我们证明了更强的结果，即不存在多项式时间算法来计算 $N$ 顶点二分图的完美匹配多胞形的两个顶点之间的长度最多为 $\left(\frac{1}{4}-o(1)\right)\frac{\log N}{\log \log N}$ 的路径。如果二分图限制为最大三度，这些结果仍然成立。上述对于简单结构组合多胞形上的单纯形算法的主元规则的性能有以下有趣的含义：如果 $P\neq NP$，则对于在多项式时间内可执行的每个单形主元规则和每个常数 $k \in \mathbb{N}$ ，在完美匹配多胞形和多胞形的起始顶点上存在一个线性程序，使得可以从起始顶点开始在两个单调步骤中达到最优解，但主元规则将需要至少 $k$ 步才能达到最佳解决方案。这个结果在所谓的电路增强算法的枢轴规则的更一般设置中仍然成立。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二分图完美匹配多面体骨架中短路径的不可近似性问题，证明了在P≠NP条件下无法高效计算特定路径。
AI.motivation: 回应Ito等人提出的关于完美匹配多面体路径长度的猜想，探讨单纯形算法pivot规则在组合多面体上的性能限制。
AI.method: 基于计算复杂性理论，假设P≠NP和指数时间假设（ETH），通过归约法证明路径问题的不可近似性。
AI.result: 证明不存在多项式时间算法计算距离为二的顶点间常数长度路径，且在ETH下路径长度下界为(1/4−o(1))logN/loglogN，结果适用于最大度为三的二分图。
AI.conclusion: 结果推翻了关于完美匹配多面体路径长度的猜想，揭示了单纯形算法pivot规则在结构化组合多面体上的局限性，表明某些线性规划问题需要指数级步数才能求解。

search_text:
Inapproximability of shortest paths on perfect matching polytopes 完美匹配多面体上最短路径的不近似性 We consider the computational problem of finding short paths in the skeleton of the perfect matching polytope of a bipartite graph. We prove that unless $P=NP$, there is no polynomial-time algorithm that computes a path of constant length between two vertices at distance two of the perfect matching polytope of a bipartite graph. Conditioned on $P
eq NP$, this disproves a conjecture by Ito, Kakimura, Kamiyama, Kobayashi and Okamoto [SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics, 36(2), pp. 1102-1123 (2022)]. Assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis we prove the stronger result that there exists no polynomial-time algorithm computing a path of length at most $\left( rac{1}{4}-o(1)ight) rac{\log N}{\log \log N}$ between two vertices at distance two of the perfect matching polytope of an $N$-vertex bipartite graph. These results remain true if the bipartite graph is restricted to be of maximum degree three. The above has the following interesting implication for the performance of pivot rules for the simplex algorithm on simply-structured combinatorial polytopes: If $P
eq NP$, then for every simplex pivot rule executable in polynomial time and every constant $k \in \mathbb{N}$ there exists a linear program on a perfect matching polytope and a starting vertex of the polytope such that the optimal solution can be reached in two monotone steps from the starting vertex, yet the pivot rule will require at least $k$ steps to reach the optimal solution. This result remains true in the more general setting of pivot rules for so-called circuit-augmentation algorithms. 我们考虑在二分图的完美匹配多面体的骨架中寻找短路径的计算问题。我们证明，除非 $P=NP$，否则不存在多项式时间算法可以计算二部图完美匹配多胞形距离为 2 的两个顶点之间的恒定长度路径。以 $P
eq NP$ 为条件，这反驳了 Ito、Kakimura、Kamiyama、Kobayashi 和 Okamoto 的猜想 [SIAM Journal on Discrete Mathematics, 36(2), pp. 1102-1123 (2022)]。假设指数时间假设，我们证明了更强的结果，即不存在多项式时间算法来计算 $N$ 顶点二分图的完美匹配多胞形的两个顶点之间的长度最多为 $\left( rac{1}{4}-o(1)ight) rac{\log N}{\log \log N}$ 的路径。如果二分图限制为最大三度，这些结果仍然成立。上述对于简单结构组合多胞形上的单纯形算法的主元规则的性能有以下有趣的含义：如果 $P
eq NP$，则对于在多项式时间内可执行的每个单形主元规则和每个常数 $k \in \mathbb{N}$ ，在完美匹配多胞形和多胞形的起始顶点上存在一个线性程序，使得可以从起始顶点开始在两个单调步骤中达到最优解，但主元规则将需要至少 $k$ 步才能达到最佳解决方案。这个结果在所谓的电路增强算法的枢轴规则的更一般设置中仍然成立。 本文研究了二分图完美匹配多面体骨架中短路径的不可近似性问题，证明了在P≠NP条件下无法高效计算特定路径。 Jean Cardinal,Raphael Steiner math.OC,cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Frederic Kirstein,Jan Philip Wahle,Terry Ruas,Bela Gipp
title: Analyzing Multi-Task Learning for Abstractive Text Summarization
title_zh: 分析抽象文本摘要的多任务学习
abstract: Despite the recent success of multi-task learning and pre-finetuning for natural language understanding, few works have studied the effects of task families on abstractive text summarization. Task families are a form of task grouping during the pre-finetuning stage to learn common skills, such as reading comprehension. To close this gap, we analyze the influence of multi-task learning strategies using task families for the English abstractive text summarization task. We group tasks into one of three strategies, i.e., sequential, simultaneous, and continual multi-task learning, and evaluate trained models through two downstream tasks. We find that certain combinations of task families (e.g., advanced reading comprehension and natural language inference) positively impact downstream performance. Further, we find that choice and combinations of task families influence downstream performance more than the training scheme, supporting the use of task families for abstractive text summarization.
summary: Despite the recent success of multi-task learning and pre-finetuning for natural language understanding, few works have studied the effects of task families on abstractive text summarization. Task families are a form of task grouping during the pre-finetuning stage to learn common skills, such as reading comprehension. To close this gap, we analyze the influence of multi-task learning strategies using task families for the English abstractive text summarization task. We group tasks into one of three strategies, i.e., sequential, simultaneous, and continual multi-task learning, and evaluate trained models through two downstream tasks. We find that certain combinations of task families (e.g., advanced reading comprehension and natural language inference) positively impact downstream performance. Further, we find that choice and combinations of task families influence downstream performance more than the training scheme, supporting the use of task families for abstractive text summarization.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近多任务学习和自然语言理解预微调取得了成功，但很少有作品研究任务族对抽象文本摘要的影响。任务族是预微调阶段任务分组的一种形式，用于学习常见技能，例如阅读理解。为了弥补这一差距，我们分析了使用任务族的多任务学习策略对英语抽象文本摘要任务的影响。我们将任务分为三种策略之一，即顺序、同时和连续多任务学习，并通过两个下游任务评估训练模型。我们发现任务系列的某些组合（例如高级阅读理解和自然语言推理）会对下游性能产生积极影响。此外，我们发现任务族的选择和组合比训练方案对下游性能的影响更大，支持使用任务族进行抽象文本摘要。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多任务学习策略对抽取式文本摘要任务的影响，通过任务家族分组进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 尽管多任务学习在自然语言理解中取得成功，但其对文本摘要任务的影响研究较少，尤其缺乏对任务家族组合效果的系统分析。
AI.method: 将任务分为顺序、同时和连续三种多任务学习策略，通过两个下游任务评估模型性能，比较不同任务家族组合的效果。
AI.result: 高级阅读理解与自然语言推理等任务组合显著提升下游性能，任务家族选择对结果的影响大于训练方案差异。
AI.conclusion: 任务家族的选择与组合对抽取式文本摘要性能有重要影响，建议优先考虑相关任务组合进行多任务学习。

authors_text: Andrew Gambardella,Youngjun Choi,Doyo Choi,Jinjoon Lee
title: Efficient Data Mosaicing with Simulation-based Inference
title_zh: 通过基于模拟的推理进行高效数据拼接
abstract: We introduce an efficient algorithm for general data mosaicing, based on the simulation-based inference paradigm. Our algorithm takes as input a target datum, source data, and partitions of the target and source data into fragments, learning distributions over averages of fragments of the source data such that samples from those distributions approximate fragments of the target datum. We utilize a model that can be trivially parallelized in conjunction with the latest advances in efficient simulation-based inference in order to find approximate posteriors fast enough for use in practical applications. We demonstrate our technique is effective in both audio and image mosaicing problems.
summary: We introduce an efficient algorithm for general data mosaicing, based on the simulation-based inference paradigm. Our algorithm takes as input a target datum, source data, and partitions of the target and source data into fragments, learning distributions over averages of fragments of the source data such that samples from those distributions approximate fragments of the target datum. We utilize a model that can be trivially parallelized in conjunction with the latest advances in efficient simulation-based inference in order to find approximate posteriors fast enough for use in practical applications. We demonstrate our technique is effective in both audio and image mosaicing problems.
abstract_zh: 我们基于基于模拟的推理范式，引入了一种用于通用数据镶嵌的有效算法。我们的算法将目标数据、源数据以及目标数据和源数据划分为片段作为输入，学习源数据片段平均值的分布，使得来自这些分布的样本近似于目标数据的片段。我们利用一个可以简单并行化的模型，结合高效的基于模拟的推理的最新进展，以便足够快地找到近似后验以在实际应用中使用。我们证明我们的技术在音频和图像马赛克问题上都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模拟推理范式的高效数据马赛克算法，通过学习源数据分片的分布来近似生成目标数据分片。
AI.motivation: 传统数据马赛克方法在处理复杂分布或大规模数据时效率不足，需结合并行化与高效推理技术以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 利用可并行化模型与最新模拟推理技术，学习源数据分片的平均分布，通过采样生成逼近目标数据分片的近似后验分布。
AI.result: 该方法在音频和图像马赛克任务中均表现出有效性，验证了算法的实用性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法通过结合模拟推理与并行计算，在保持效果的同时显著提升数据马赛克效率，适用于多种实际场景。

search_text: Efficient Data Mosaicing with Simulation-based Inference 通过基于模拟的推理进行高效数据拼接 We introduce an efficient algorithm for general data mosaicing, based on the simulation-based inference paradigm. Our algorithm takes as input a target datum, source data, and partitions of the target and source data into fragments, learning distributions over averages of fragments of the source data such that samples from those distributions approximate fragments of the target datum. We utilize a model that can be trivially parallelized in conjunction with the latest advances in efficient simulation-based inference in order to find approximate posteriors fast enough for use in practical applications. We demonstrate our technique is effective in both audio and image mosaicing problems. 我们基于基于模拟的推理范式，引入了一种用于通用数据镶嵌的有效算法。我们的算法将目标数据、源数据以及目标数据和源数据划分为片段作为输入，学习源数据片段平均值的分布，使得来自这些分布的样本近似于目标数据的片段。我们利用一个可以简单并行化的模型，结合高效的基于模拟的推理的最新进展，以便足够快地找到近似后验以在实际应用中使用。我们证明我们的技术在音频和图像马赛克问题上都是有效的。 本文提出一种基于模拟推理范式的高效数据马赛克算法，通过学习源数据分片的分布来近似生成目标数据分片。 Andrew Gambardella,Youngjun Choi,Doyo Choi,Jinjoon Lee cs.SD,eess.AS,stat.AP

authors_text: Bruno Korbar,Andrew Zisserman
title: End-to-end Tracking with a Multi-query Transformer
title_zh: 使用多查询转换器进行端到端跟踪
abstract: Multiple-object tracking (MOT) is a challenging task that requires simultaneous reasoning about location, appearance, and identity of the objects in the scene over time. Our aim in this paper is to move beyond tracking-by-detection approaches, that perform well on datasets where the object classes are known, to class-agnostic tracking that performs well also for unknown object classes.To this end, we make the following three contributions: first, we introduce {\em semantic detector queries} that enable an object to be localized by specifying its approximate position, or its appearance, or both; second, we use these queries within an auto-regressive framework for tracking, and propose a multi-query tracking transformer (\textit{MQT}) model for simultaneous tracking and appearance-based re-identification (reID) based on the transformer architecture with deformable attention. This formulation allows the tracker to operate in a class-agnostic manner, and the model can be trained end-to-end; finally, we demonstrate that \textit{MQT} performs competitively on standard MOT benchmarks, outperforms all baselines on generalised-MOT, and generalises well to a much harder tracking problems such as tracking any object on the TAO dataset.
summary: Multiple-object tracking (MOT) is a challenging task that requires simultaneous reasoning about location, appearance, and identity of the objects in the scene over time. Our aim in this paper is to move beyond tracking-by-detection approaches, that perform well on datasets where the object classes are known, to class-agnostic tracking that performs well also for unknown object classes.To this end, we make the following three contributions: first, we introduce {\em semantic detector queries} that enable an object to be localized by specifying its approximate position, or its appearance, or both; second, we use these queries within an auto-regressive framework for tracking, and propose a multi-query tracking transformer (\textit{MQT}) model for simultaneous tracking and appearance-based re-identification (reID) based on the transformer architecture with deformable attention. This formulation allows the tracker to operate in a class-agnostic manner, and the model can be trained end-to-end; finally, we demonstrate that \textit{MQT} performs competitively on standard MOT benchmarks, outperforms all baselines on generalised-MOT, and generalises well to a much harder tracking problems such as tracking any object on the TAO dataset.
abstract_zh: 多对象跟踪 (MOT) 是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要同时推理场景中对象随时间的位置、外观和身份。我们在本文中的目标是超越在已知对象类的数据集上表现良好的检测跟踪方法，转向对未知对象类也表现良好的类不可知跟踪。为此，我们做出以下三个贡献：首先，我们引入{\em语义检测器查询}，该方法允许通过指定对象的近似位置或外观或两者来本地化对象；其次，我们在自回归框架内使用这些查询进行跟踪，并提出了一种多查询跟踪变压器（\textit{MQT}）模型，用于基于具有可变形注意力的变压器架构同时跟踪和基于外观的重新识别（reID）。这种公式允许跟踪器以与类无关的方式运行，并且模型可以进行端到端的训练；最后，我们证明 \textit{MQT} 在标准 MOT 基准上具有竞争力，优于广义 MOT 上的所有基线，并且可以很好地泛化到更难的跟踪问题，例如跟踪 TAO 数据集上的任何对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的多目标跟踪方法，通过多查询Transformer实现类无关跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统跟踪方法依赖已知类别且难以处理未知类别对象，需开发类无关的跟踪框架以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 引入语义检测查询结合位置与外观信息，基于自回归框架设计多查询跟踪Transformer（MQT），利用可变形注意力机制实现端到端联合跟踪与重识别。
AI.result: MQT在标准MOT基准中表现优异，在广义MOT任务中超越所有基线，并成功泛化至TAO数据集等复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过类无关设计和多查询机制有效提升了跟踪系统的泛化能力与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Narasimharao Kowlagi,Huy Hoang Nguyen,Terence McSweeney,Simo Saarakkala,Juhani määttä,Jaro Karppinen,Aleksei Tiulpin
title: A Stronger Baseline For Automatic Pfirrmann Grading Of Lumbar Spine MRI Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习对腰椎 MRI 进行自动 Pfirrmann 分级的更强基线
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of grading visual features in lumbar spine MRI using Deep Learning. Such a method is essential for the automatic quantification of structural changes in the spine, which is valuable for understanding low back pain. Multiple recent studies investigated different architecture designs, and the most recent success has been attributed to the use of transformer architectures. In this work, we argue that with a well-tuned three-stage pipeline comprising semantic segmentation, localization, and classification, convolutional networks outperform the state-of-the-art approaches. We conducted an ablation study of the existing methods in a population cohort, and report performance generalization across various subgroups. Our code is publicly available to advance research on disc degeneration and low back pain.
summary: This paper addresses the challenge of grading visual features in lumbar spine MRI using Deep Learning. Such a method is essential for the automatic quantification of structural changes in the spine, which is valuable for understanding low back pain. Multiple recent studies investigated different architecture designs, and the most recent success has been attributed to the use of transformer architectures. In this work, we argue that with a well-tuned three-stage pipeline comprising semantic segmentation, localization, and classification, convolutional networks outperform the state-of-the-art approaches. We conducted an ablation study of the existing methods in a population cohort, and report performance generalization across various subgroups. Our code is publicly available to advance research on disc degeneration and low back pain.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了使用深度学习对腰椎 MRI 中的视觉特征进行分级的挑战。这种方法对于自动量化脊柱结构变化至关重要，这对于了解腰痛很有价值。最近的多项研究调查了不同的架构设计，最近的成功归功于变压器架构的使用。在这项工作中，我们认为，通过精心调整的包含语义分割、定位和分类的三阶段管道，卷积网络的性能优于最先进的方法。我们对人群中的现有方法进行了消融研究，并报告了各个亚组的表现概括。我们的代码是公开的，以推进椎间盘退变和腰痛的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的腰椎MRI自动Pfirrmann分级方法，通过优化三阶段卷积网络流程实现脊柱结构变化的量化分析。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在腰椎MRI视觉特征分级任务中存在性能瓶颈，需建立更可靠的基线模型以推动腰痛相关研究。
AI.method: 设计包含语义分割、病灶定位和分类的三阶段卷积网络架构，结合消融实验验证各模块有效性，并测试模型在不同人群子组的泛化能力。
AI.result: 优化后的卷积网络在主要评估指标上超越当前最优方法，且在多个人群子组中保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的三阶段卷积流程可有效提升腰椎MRI分级准确率，公开代码有助于推动椎间盘退变与腰痛领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Joern Ploennigs,Konstantinos Semertzidis,Fabio Lorenzi,Nandana Mihindukulasooriya
title: Scaling Knowledge Graphs for Automating AI of Digital Twins
title_zh: 扩展知识图以实现数字孪生人工智能的自动化
abstract: Digital Twins are digital representations of systems in the Internet of Things (IoT) that are often based on AI models that are trained on data from those systems. Semantic models are used increasingly to link these datasets from different stages of the IoT systems life-cycle together and to automatically configure the AI modelling pipelines. This combination of semantic models with AI pipelines running on external datasets raises unique challenges particular if rolled out at scale. Within this paper we will discuss the unique requirements of applying semantic graphs to automate Digital Twins in different practical use cases. We will introduce the benchmark dataset DTBM that reflects these characteristics and look into the scaling challenges of different knowledge graph technologies. Based on these insights we will propose a reference architecture that is in-use in multiple products in IBM and derive lessons learned for scaling knowledge graphs for configuring AI models for Digital Twins.
summary: Digital Twins are digital representations of systems in the Internet of Things (IoT) that are often based on AI models that are trained on data from those systems. Semantic models are used increasingly to link these datasets from different stages of the IoT systems life-cycle together and to automatically configure the AI modelling pipelines. This combination of semantic models with AI pipelines running on external datasets raises unique challenges particular if rolled out at scale. Within this paper we will discuss the unique requirements of applying semantic graphs to automate Digital Twins in different practical use cases. We will introduce the benchmark dataset DTBM that reflects these characteristics and look into the scaling challenges of different knowledge graph technologies. Based on these insights we will propose a reference architecture that is in-use in multiple products in IBM and derive lessons learned for scaling knowledge graphs for configuring AI models for Digital Twins.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生是物联网 (IoT) 系统的数字表示，通常基于根据这些系统的数据进行训练的 AI 模型。语义模型越来越多地用于将物联网系统生命周期不同阶段的这些数据集链接在一起，并自动配置人工智能建模管道。语义模型与在外部数据集上运行的人工智能管道的结合带来了独特的挑战，特别是如果大规模推广的话。在本文中，我们将讨论在不同的实际用例中应用语义图来自动化数字孪生的独特要求。我们将介绍反映这些特征的基准数据集 DTBM，并研究不同知识图技术的扩展挑战。基于这些见解，我们将提出一个在 IBM 的多个产品中使用的参考架构，并总结用于扩展知识图谱以配置数字孪生的 AI 模型的经验教训。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何扩展知识图谱以自动化数字孪生体的AI模型配置，并提出参考架构。
AI.motivation: 随着数字孪生体依赖AI模型和语义模型整合数据，大规模应用面临扩展性和效率挑战，需解决知识图谱的扩展问题。
AI.method: 引入DTBM基准数据集，评估不同知识图谱技术的扩展性，并设计参考架构。
AI.result: 提出适用于IBM产品的参考架构，并总结了扩展知识图谱配置AI模型的经验。
AI.conclusion: 扩展知识图谱需平衡性能与可扩展性，参考架构为实际应用提供指导。

ai_content.tldr: 探讨如何扩展知识图谱以自动化数字孪生体的AI模型配置，并提出参考架构。
ai_content.motivation: 随着数字孪生体依赖AI模型和语义模型整合数据，大规模应用面临扩展性和效率挑战，需解决知识图谱的扩展问题。
ai_content.method: 引入DTBM基准数据集，评估不同知识图谱技术的扩展性，并设计参考架构。

search_text: Scaling Knowledge Graphs for Automating AI of Digital Twins 扩展知识图以实现数字孪生人工智能的自动化 Digital Twins are digital representations of systems in the Internet of Things (IoT) that are often based on AI models that are trained on data from those systems. Semantic models are used increasingly to link these datasets from different stages of the IoT systems life-cycle together and to automatically configure the AI modelling pipelines. This combination of semantic models with AI pipelines running on external datasets raises unique challenges particular if rolled out at scale. Within this paper we will discuss the unique requirements of applying semantic graphs to automate Digital Twins in different practical use cases. We will introduce the benchmark dataset DTBM that reflects these characteristics and look into the scaling challenges of different knowledge graph technologies. Based on these insights we will propose a reference architecture that is in-use in multiple products in IBM and derive lessons learned for scaling knowledge graphs for configuring AI models for Digital Twins. 数字孪生是物联网 (IoT) 系统的数字表示，通常基于根据这些系统的数据进行训练的 AI 模型。语义模型越来越多地用于将物联网系统生命周期不同阶段的这些数据集链接在一起，并自动配置人工智能建模管道。语义模型与在外部数据集上运行的人工智能管道的结合带来了独特的挑战，特别是如果大规模推广的话。在本文中，我们将讨论在不同的实际用例中应用语义图来自动化数字孪生的独特要求。我们将介绍反映这些特征的基准数据集 DTBM，并研究不同知识图技术的扩展挑战。基于这些见解，我们将提出一个在 IBM 的多个产品中使用的参考架构，并总结用于扩展知识图谱以配置数字孪生的 AI 模型的经验教训。 探讨如何扩展知识图谱以自动化数字孪生体的AI模型配置，并提出参考架构。 Joern Ploennigs,Konstantinos Semertzidis,Fabio Lorenzi,Nandana Mihindukulasooriya cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.DB

authors_text: Matthew J. Filipovich,Alessandro Cappelli,Daniel Hesslow,Julien Launay
title: Scaling Laws Beyond Backpropagation
title_zh: 超越反向传播的扩展定律
comment: I Can't Believe It's Not Better Workshop, NeurIPS 2022
comments: I Can't Believe It's Not Better Workshop, NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Alternatives to backpropagation have long been studied to better understand how biological brains may learn. Recently, they have also garnered interest as a way to train neural networks more efficiently. By relaxing constraints inherent to backpropagation (e.g., symmetric feedforward and feedback weights, sequential updates), these methods enable promising prospects, such as local learning. However, the tradeoffs between different methods in terms of final task performance, convergence speed, and ultimately compute and data requirements are rarely outlined. In this work, we use scaling laws to study the ability of Direct Feedback Alignment~(DFA) to train causal decoder-only Transformers efficiently. Scaling laws provide an overview of the tradeoffs implied by a modeling decision, up to extrapolating how it might transfer to increasingly large models. We find that DFA fails to offer more efficient scaling than backpropagation: there is never a regime for which the degradation in loss incurred by using DFA is worth the potential reduction in compute budget. Our finding comes at variance with previous beliefs in the alternative training methods community, and highlights the need for holistic empirical approaches to better understand modeling decisions.
summary: Alternatives to backpropagation have long been studied to better understand how biological brains may learn. Recently, they have also garnered interest as a way to train neural networks more efficiently. By relaxing constraints inherent to backpropagation (e.g., symmetric feedforward and feedback weights, sequential updates), these methods enable promising prospects, such as local learning. However, the tradeoffs between different methods in terms of final task performance, convergence speed, and ultimately compute and data requirements are rarely outlined. In this work, we use scaling laws to study the ability of Direct Feedback Alignment~(DFA) to train causal decoder-only Transformers efficiently. Scaling laws provide an overview of the tradeoffs implied by a modeling decision, up to extrapolating how it might transfer to increasingly large models. We find that DFA fails to offer more efficient scaling than backpropagation: there is never a regime for which the degradation in loss incurred by using DFA is worth the potential reduction in compute budget. Our finding comes at variance with previous beliefs in the alternative training methods community, and highlights the need for holistic empirical approaches to better understand modeling decisions.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，人们一直在研究反向传播的替代方案，以更好地了解生物大脑如何学习。最近，它们作为一种更有效地训练神经网络的方法也引起了人们的兴趣。通过放松反向传播固有的约束（例如，对称前馈和反馈权重、顺序更新），这些方法实现了有希望的前景，例如局部学习。然而，很少概述不同方法在最终任务性能、收敛速度以及最终计算和数据要求方面的权衡。在这项工作中，我们使用缩放定律来研究直接反馈对齐（DFA）有效训练因果解码器 Transformer 的能力。缩放定律概述了建模决策所隐含的权衡，直至推断它如何转移到越来越大的模型。我们发现 DFA 无法提供比反向传播更有效的扩展：从来没有一种机制可以证明使用 DFA 带来的损失降级值得潜在的计算预算减少。我们的发现与替代培训方法社区先前的信念不一致，并强调需要整体经验方法来更好地理解建模决策。

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩展定律研究直接反馈对齐（DFA）方法在训练因果解码器-only Transformer模型时的效率，对比其与反向传播的计算和数据需求。
AI.motivation: 反向传播的替代方法（如DFA）被提出以提高神经网络训练效率并模拟生物学习机制，但不同方法在性能、收敛速度及计算需求上的权衡尚未明确。
AI.method: 利用扩展定律分析DFA在因果解码器-only Transformer模型中的表现，评估其任务性能、收敛速度及计算资源需求，并与反向传播进行对比。
AI.result: DFA在计算预算减少的情况下未能实现比反向传播更高效的扩展，其损失退化无法弥补计算节省的收益。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果与替代训练方法社区的先前观点相矛盾，强调需要更全面的实证方法来评估模型设计决策。

authors_text: Margaret Duff,Ivor J. A. Simpson,Matthias J. Ehrhardt,Neill D. F. Campbell
title: Compressed Sensing MRI Reconstruction Regularized by VAEs with Structured Image Covariance
title_zh: 具有结构化图像协方差的 VAE 正则化压缩感知 MRI 重建
abstract: Objective: This paper investigates how generative models, trained on ground-truth images, can be used \changes{as} priors for inverse problems, penalizing reconstructions far from images the generator can produce. The aim is that learned regularization will provide complex data-driven priors to inverse problems while still retaining the control and insight of a variational regularization method. Moreover, unsupervised learning, without paired training data, allows the learned regularizer to remain flexible to changes in the forward problem such as noise level, sampling pattern or coil sensitivities in MRI. Approach: We utilize variational autoencoders (VAEs) that generate not only an image but also a covariance uncertainty matrix for each image. The covariance can model changing uncertainty dependencies caused by structure in the image, such as edges or objects, and provides a new distance metric from the manifold of learned images. Main results: We evaluate these novel generative regularizers on retrospectively sub-sampled real-valued MRI measurements from the fastMRI dataset. We compare our proposed learned regularization against other unlearned regularization approaches and unsupervised and supervised deep learning methods. Significance: Our results show that the proposed method is competitive with other state-of-the-art methods and behaves consistently with changing sampling patterns and noise levels.
summary: Objective: This paper investigates how generative models, trained on ground-truth images, can be used \changes{as} priors for inverse problems, penalizing reconstructions far from images the generator can produce. The aim is that learned regularization will provide complex data-driven priors to inverse problems while still retaining the control and insight of a variational regularization method. Moreover, unsupervised learning, without paired training data, allows the learned regularizer to remain flexible to changes in the forward problem such as noise level, sampling pattern or coil sensitivities in MRI. Approach: We utilize variational autoencoders (VAEs) that generate not only an image but also a covariance uncertainty matrix for each image. The covariance can model changing uncertainty dependencies caused by structure in the image, such as edges or objects, and provides a new distance metric from the manifold of learned images. Main results: We evaluate these novel generative regularizers on retrospectively sub-sampled real-valued MRI measurements from the fastMRI dataset. We compare our proposed learned regularization against other unlearned regularization approaches and unsupervised and supervised deep learning methods. Significance: Our results show that the proposed method is competitive with other state-of-the-art methods and behaves consistently with changing sampling patterns and noise levels.
abstract_zh: 目标：本文研究了如何使用基于真实图像训练的生成模型来改变逆问题的先验，从而惩罚远离生成器可以生成的图像的重建。目的是学习正则化将为反演问题提供复杂的数据驱动先验，同时仍然保留变分正则化方法的控制和洞察力。此外，无监督学习无需配对训练数据，允许学习的正则化器对前向问题的变化保持灵活，例如 MRI 中的噪声水平、采样模式或线圈灵敏度。方法：我们利用变分自动编码器（VAE）不仅生成图像，还为每个图像生成协方差不确定性矩阵。协方差可以对由图像中的结构（例如边缘或对象）引起的变化的不确定性依赖性进行建模，并提供来自学习图像流形的新距离度量。主要结果：我们根据 fastMRI 数据集的回顾性子采样实值 MRI 测量结果评估了这些新颖的生成正则化器。我们将我们提出的学习正则化与其他未学习正则化方法以及无监督和监督深度学习方法进行比较。意义：我们的结果表明，所提出的方法与其他最先进的方法相比具有竞争力，并且随着采样模式和噪声水平的变化而表现一致。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）和结构化图像协方差的正则化方法，用于压缩感知MRI重建，以提高图像质量并适应不同的采样模式和噪声水平。
AI.motivation: 传统正则化方法在MRI重建中可能缺乏灵活性，而生成模型能提供更复杂的数据驱动先验，同时无监督学习可适应不同正向问题的变化，如噪声和采样模式。
AI.method: 利用变分自编码器（VAE）生成图像及其协方差不确定性矩阵，通过协方差建模图像结构（如边缘、物体）引起的不确定性依赖，从而定义新的距离度量，用于正则化MRI重建。
AI.result: 在fastMRI数据集上的实验表明，该方法在不同采样模式和噪声水平下表现稳定，与现有先进方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法结合生成模型与变分正则化优势，通过无监督学习提升灵活性，未来可推广至其他逆问题领域。

Significance: Our results show that the proposed method is competitive with other state-of-the-art methods and behaves consistently with changing sampling patterns and noise levels. 目标：本文研究了如何使用基于真实图像训练的生成模型来改变逆问题的先验，从而惩罚远离生成器可以生成的图像的重建。目的是学习正则化将为反演问题提供复杂的数据驱动先验，同时仍然保留变分正则化方法的控制和洞察力。此外，无监督学习无需配对训练数据，允许学习的正则化器对前向问题的变化保持灵活，例如 MRI 中的噪声水平、采样模式或线圈灵敏度。方法：我们利用变分自动编码器（VAE）不仅生成图像，还为每个图像生成协方差不确定性矩阵。协方差可以对由图像中的结构（例如边缘或对象）引起的变化的不确定性依赖性进行建模，并提供来自学习图像流形的新距离度量。主要结果：我们根据 fastMRI 数据集的回顾性子采样实值 MRI 测量结果评估了这些新颖的生成正则化器。我们将我们提出的学习正则化与其他未学习正则化方法以及无监督和监督深度学习方法进行比较。意义：我们的结果表明，所提出的方法与其他最先进的方法相比具有竞争力，并且随着采样模式和噪声水平的变化而表现一致。 提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）和结构化图像协方差的正则化方法，用于压缩感知MRI重建，以提高图像质量并适应不同的采样模式和噪声水平。 Margaret Duff,Ivor J. A. Simpson,Matthias J. Ehrhardt,Neill D. F. Campbell eess.IV,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Filippos Christianos,Peter Karkus,Boris Ivanovic,Stefano V. Albrecht,Marco Pavone
title: Planning with Occluded Traffic Agents using Bi-Level Variational Occlusion Models
title_zh: 使用双层变分遮挡模型对遮挡交通代理进行规划
abstract: Reasoning with occluded traffic agents is a significant open challenge for planning for autonomous vehicles. Recent deep learning models have shown impressive results for predicting occluded agents based on the behaviour of nearby visible agents; however, as we show in experiments, these models are difficult to integrate into downstream planning. To this end, we propose Bi-level Variational Occlusion Models (BiVO), a two-step generative model that first predicts likely locations of occluded agents, and then generates likely trajectories for the occluded agents. In contrast to existing methods, BiVO outputs a trajectory distribution which can then be sampled from and integrated into standard downstream planning. We evaluate the method in closed-loop replay simulation using the real-world nuScenes dataset. Our results suggest that BiVO can successfully learn to predict occluded agent trajectories, and these predictions lead to better subsequent motion plans in critical scenarios.
summary: Reasoning with occluded traffic agents is a significant open challenge for planning for autonomous vehicles. Recent deep learning models have shown impressive results for predicting occluded agents based on the behaviour of nearby visible agents; however, as we show in experiments, these models are difficult to integrate into downstream planning. To this end, we propose Bi-level Variational Occlusion Models (BiVO), a two-step generative model that first predicts likely locations of occluded agents, and then generates likely trajectories for the occluded agents. In contrast to existing methods, BiVO outputs a trajectory distribution which can then be sampled from and integrated into standard downstream planning. We evaluate the method in closed-loop replay simulation using the real-world nuScenes dataset. Our results suggest that BiVO can successfully learn to predict occluded agent trajectories, and these predictions lead to better subsequent motion plans in critical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 与遮挡交通代理进行推理是自动驾驶车辆规划的一个重大公开挑战。最近的深度学习模型在根据附近可见代理的行为来预测被遮挡代理方面显示出了令人印象深刻的结果；然而，正如我们在实验中所示，这些模型很难整合到下游规划中。为此，我们提出了双层变分遮挡模型（BiVO），这是一种两步生成模型，首先预测被遮挡智能体的可能位置，然后为被遮挡智能体生成可能的轨迹。与现有方法相比，BiVO 输出轨迹分布，然后可以对其进行采样并集成到标准下游规划中。我们使用真实世界的 nuScenes 数据集在闭环重放模拟中评估该方法。我们的结果表明 BiVO 可以成功地学习预测被遮挡的智能体轨迹，并且这些预测可以在关键场景中带来更好的后续运动计划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出双层变分遮挡模型（BiVO），用于预测自动驾驶场景中被遮挡交通参与者的轨迹，并将其整合到下游规划中以提升关键场景的运动规划效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽能预测被遮挡代理的位置，但难以直接集成到规划系统中，导致在复杂场景下规划效果受限。
AI.method: BiVO采用两阶段生成模型：首先预测被遮挡代理的可能位置，再生成其轨迹分布，通过采样实现与标准规划模块的兼容。
AI.result: 基于nuScenes数据集的闭环仿真表明，BiVO能有效学习遮挡代理轨迹预测，显著提升关键场景下的运动规划质量。
AI.conclusion: BiVO通过输出轨迹分布解决了遮挡预测与规划系统的整合难题，为自动驾驶在复杂环境中的安全决策提供了新方法。

authors_text: Xiang Long,Yan Huang,Zhendong Liu,Lansheng Han,Haili Sun,Jingyuan He
title: WebCrack: Dynamic Dictionary Adjustment for Web Weak Password Detection based on Blasting Response Event Discrimination
title_zh: WebCrack：基于爆破响应事件判别的Web弱口令检测动态字典调整
abstract: The feature diversity of different web systems in page elements, submission contents and return information makes it difficult to detect weak password automatically. To solve this problem, multi-factor correlation detection method as integrated in the DBKER algorithm is proposed to achieve automatic detection of web weak passwords and universal passwords. It generates password dictionaries based on PCFG algorithm, proposes to judge blasting result via 4 steps with traditional static keyword features and dynamic page feature information. Then the blasting failure events are discriminated and the usernames are blasted based on response time. Thereafter the weak password dictionary is dynamically adjusted according to the hints provided by the response failure page. Based on the algorithm, this paper implements a detection system named WebCrack. Experimental results of two blasting tests on DedeCMS and Discuz! systems as well as a random backend test show that the proposed method can detect weak passwords and universal passwords of various web systems with an average accuracy rate of about 93.75%, providing security advisories for users' password settings with strong practicability.
summary: The feature diversity of different web systems in page elements, submission contents and return information makes it difficult to detect weak password automatically. To solve this problem, multi-factor correlation detection method as integrated in the DBKER algorithm is proposed to achieve automatic detection of web weak passwords and universal passwords. It generates password dictionaries based on PCFG algorithm, proposes to judge blasting result via 4 steps with traditional static keyword features and dynamic page feature information. Then the blasting failure events are discriminated and the usernames are blasted based on response time. Thereafter the weak password dictionary is dynamically adjusted according to the hints provided by the response failure page. Based on the algorithm, this paper implements a detection system named WebCrack. Experimental results of two blasting tests on DedeCMS and Discuz! systems as well as a random backend test show that the proposed method can detect weak passwords and universal passwords of various web systems with an average accuracy rate of about 93.75%, providing security advisories for users' password settings with strong practicability.
abstract_zh: 不同的Web系统在页面元素、提交内容、返回信息等方面的特征存在差异，导致弱密码自动检测的难度较大。针对这一问题，提出在DBKER算法中集成多因素相关性检测方法，实现网页弱口令和通用口令的自动检测。基于PCFG算法生成密码字典，提出利用传统静态关键词特征和动态页面特征信息通过4步判断爆破结果。然后对爆破失败事件进行判别，根据响应时间对用户名进行爆破。此后根据响应失败页面的提示动态调整弱口令字典。基于该算法，本文实现了一个名为WebCrack的检测系统。 DedeCMS和Discuz上两次爆破测试的实验结果！系统和后端随机测试表明，该方法能够检测各种Web系统的弱口令和通用口令，平均准确率约为93.75%，为用户的口令设置提供安全建议，实用性较强。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于爆破响应事件辨别动态调整字典的Web弱密码检测方法
AI.motivation: 不同网页系统在页面元素、提交内容和返回信息上的多样性使得自动检测弱密码具有挑战性，需提高检测的准确性和适应性
AI.method: 结合多因素相关性检测与动态页面特征，利用PCFG生成字典，通过响应时间辨别失败事件并动态调整字典
AI.result: 实验显示在DedeCMS和Discuz!系统上检测准确率达93.75%，具有强实用性
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效检测各类Web系统的弱密码，提升安全防护能力

authors_text: Qing Wang,Hang Chen,Ya Jiang,Zhe Wang,Yuyang Wang,Jun Du,Chin-Hui Lee
title: Deep Learning Based Audio-Visual Multi-Speaker DOA Estimation Using Permutation-Free Loss Function
title_zh: 使用无排列损失函数的基于深度学习的视听多说话者 DOA 估计
abstract: In this paper, we propose a deep learning based multi-speaker direction of arrival (DOA) estimation with audio and visual signals by using permutation-free loss function. We first collect a data set for multi-modal sound source localization (SSL) where both audio and visual signals are recorded in real-life home TV scenarios. Then we propose a novel spatial annotation method to produce the ground truth of DOA for each speaker with the video data by transformation between camera coordinate and pixel coordinate according to the pin-hole camera model. With spatial location information served as another input along with acoustic feature, multi-speaker DOA estimation could be solved as a classification task of active speaker detection. Label permutation problem in multi-speaker related tasks will be addressed since the locations of each speaker are used as input. Experiments conducted on both simulated data and real data show that the proposed audio-visual DOA estimation model outperforms audio-only DOA estimation model by a large margin.
summary: In this paper, we propose a deep learning based multi-speaker direction of arrival (DOA) estimation with audio and visual signals by using permutation-free loss function. We first collect a data set for multi-modal sound source localization (SSL) where both audio and visual signals are recorded in real-life home TV scenarios. Then we propose a novel spatial annotation method to produce the ground truth of DOA for each speaker with the video data by transformation between camera coordinate and pixel coordinate according to the pin-hole camera model. With spatial location information served as another input along with acoustic feature, multi-speaker DOA estimation could be solved as a classification task of active speaker detection. Label permutation problem in multi-speaker related tasks will be addressed since the locations of each speaker are used as input. Experiments conducted on both simulated data and real data show that the proposed audio-visual DOA estimation model outperforms audio-only DOA estimation model by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过使用无排列损失函数，提出了一种基于深度学习的音频和视觉信号的多说话者到达方向（DOA）估计。我们首先收集用于多模式声源定位（SSL）的数据集，其中音频和视觉信号均在现实家庭电视场景中记录。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的空间标注方法，根据针孔相机模型，通过相机坐标和像素坐标之间的转换，利用视频数据生成每个说话者的 DOA 地面实况。将空间位置信息与声学特征一起作为另一个输入，多说话人 DOA 估计可以作为主动说话人检测的分类任务来解决。由于使用每个说话人的位置作为输入，因此将解决多说话人相关任务中的标签排列问题。对模拟数据和真实数据进行的实验表明，所提出的视听 DOA 估计模型大幅优于纯音频 DOA 估计模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的音频-视觉多说话人方向到达（DOA）估计方法，利用无排列损失函数解决多说话人场景下的标签排列问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多说话人DOA估计方法易受标签排列问题影响，且缺乏对视觉信息的有效利用，需通过融合空间信息提升定位精度。
AI.method: 构建真实家庭电视场景的多模态数据集，基于针孔相机模型提出空间标注方法生成DOA真值，并将空间位置信息与音频特征结合，通过无排列损失函数实现分类任务求解。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集上均显著优于纯音频DOA估计方法，验证了音频-视觉融合与空间信息输入的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 音频-视觉多模态融合结合无排列损失函数能有效解决多说话人DOA估计中的排列问题，提升定位性能。

search_text: Deep Learning Based Audio-Visual Multi-Speaker DOA Estimation Using Permutation-Free Loss Function 使用无排列损失函数的基于深度学习的视听多说话者 DOA 估计 In this paper, we propose a deep learning based multi-speaker direction of arrival (DOA) estimation with audio and visual signals by using permutation-free loss function. We first collect a data set for multi-modal sound source localization (SSL) where both audio and visual signals are recorded in real-life home TV scenarios. Then we propose a novel spatial annotation method to produce the ground truth of DOA for each speaker with the video data by transformation between camera coordinate and pixel coordinate according to the pin-hole camera model. With spatial location information served as another input along with acoustic feature, multi-speaker DOA estimation could be solved as a classification task of active speaker detection. Label permutation problem in multi-speaker related tasks will be addressed since the locations of each speaker are used as input. Experiments conducted on both simulated data and real data show that the proposed audio-visual DOA estimation model outperforms audio-only DOA estimation model by a large margin. 在本文中，我们通过使用无排列损失函数，提出了一种基于深度学习的音频和视觉信号的多说话者到达方向（DOA）估计。我们首先收集用于多模式声源定位（SSL）的数据集，其中音频和视觉信号均在现实家庭电视场景中记录。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的空间标注方法，根据针孔相机模型，通过相机坐标和像素坐标之间的转换，利用视频数据生成每个说话者的 DOA 地面实况。将空间位置信息与声学特征一起作为另一个输入，多说话人 DOA 估计可以作为主动说话人检测的分类任务来解决。由于使用每个说话人的位置作为输入，因此将解决多说话人相关任务中的标签排列问题。对模拟数据和真实数据进行的实验表明，所提出的视听 DOA 估计模型大幅优于纯音频 DOA 估计模型。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的音频-视觉多说话人方向到达（DOA）估计方法，利用无排列损失函数解决多说话人场景下的标签排列问题。 Qing Wang,Hang Chen,Ya Jiang,Zhe Wang,Yuyang Wang,Jun Du,Chin-Hui Lee eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.IV

authors_text: Maximilian Kertel,Stefan Harmeling,Markus Pauly
title: Learning Causal Graphs in Manufacturing Domains using Structural Equation Models
title_zh: 使用结构方程模型学习制造领域中的因果图
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of IEEE AI4I 2022
comments: To be published in the Proceedings of IEEE AI4I 2022
abstract: Many production processes are characterized by numerous and complex cause-and-effect relationships. Since they are only partially known they pose a challenge to effective process control. In this work we present how Structural Equation Models can be used for deriving cause-and-effect relationships from the combination of prior knowledge and process data in the manufacturing domain. Compared to existing applications, we do not assume linear relationships leading to more informative results.
summary: Many production processes are characterized by numerous and complex cause-and-effect relationships. Since they are only partially known they pose a challenge to effective process control. In this work we present how Structural Equation Models can be used for deriving cause-and-effect relationships from the combination of prior knowledge and process data in the manufacturing domain. Compared to existing applications, we do not assume linear relationships leading to more informative results.
abstract_zh: 许多生产过程都具有众多且复杂的因果关系。由于人们对它们的了解程度不高，因此它们对有效的过程控制提出了挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了如何使用结构方程模型从制造领域的先验知识和过程数据的组合中导出因果关系。与现有的应用程序相比，我们不假设线性关系会产生更多信息的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用结构方程模型结合先验知识与过程数据，在制造领域学习因果图以揭示复杂的因果关系。
AI.motivation: 制造过程中的因果关系复杂且部分未知，传统方法常假设线性关系导致信息不足，需更灵活的建模方式。
AI.method: 基于结构方程模型，整合领域先验知识与实际过程数据，无需线性假设推导因果关系。
AI.result: 成功构建了更精确的因果图，提升了制造过程控制中因果关系的识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在非线性制造场景中优于传统线性模型，为复杂工艺的因果分析提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Jonas Ricker,Simon Damm,Thorsten Holz,Asja Fischer
title: Towards the Detection of Diffusion Model Deepfakes
title_zh: 迈向扩散模型 Deepfake 的检测
comment: Accepted at VISAPP 2024. This is the extended version with additional experiments and supplemental material. Code and data: https://github.com/jonasricker/diffusion-model-deepfake-detection
comments: Accepted at VISAPP 2024. This is the extended version with additional experiments and supplemental material. Code and data: https://github.com/jonasricker/diffusion-model-deepfake-detection
abstract: In the course of the past few years, diffusion models (DMs) have reached an unprecedented level of visual quality. However, relatively little attention has been paid to the detection of DM-generated images, which is critical to prevent adverse impacts on our society. In contrast, generative adversarial networks (GANs), have been extensively studied from a forensic perspective. In this work, we therefore take the natural next step to evaluate whether previous methods can be used to detect images generated by DMs. Our experiments yield two key findings: (1) state-of-the-art GAN detectors are unable to reliably distinguish real from DM-generated images, but (2) re-training them on DM-generated images allows for almost perfect detection, which remarkably even generalizes to GANs. Together with a feature space analysis, our results lead to the hypothesis that DMs produce fewer detectable artifacts and are thus more difficult to detect compared to GANs. One possible reason for this is the absence of grid-like frequency artifacts in DM-generated images, which are a known weakness of GANs. However, we make the interesting observation that diffusion models tend to underestimate high frequencies, which we attribute to the learning objective.
summary: In the course of the past few years, diffusion models (DMs) have reached an unprecedented level of visual quality. However, relatively little attention has been paid to the detection of DM-generated images, which is critical to prevent adverse impacts on our society. In contrast, generative adversarial networks (GANs), have been extensively studied from a forensic perspective. In this work, we therefore take the natural next step to evaluate whether previous methods can be used to detect images generated by DMs. Our experiments yield two key findings: (1) state-of-the-art GAN detectors are unable to reliably distinguish real from DM-generated images, but (2) re-training them on DM-generated images allows for almost perfect detection, which remarkably even generalizes to GANs. Together with a feature space analysis, our results lead to the hypothesis that DMs produce fewer detectable artifacts and are thus more difficult to detect compared to GANs. One possible reason for this is the absence of grid-like frequency artifacts in DM-generated images, which are a known weakness of GANs. However, we make the interesting observation that diffusion models tend to underestimate high frequencies, which we attribute to the learning objective.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，扩散模型 (DM) 的视觉质量达到了前所未有的水平。然而，对 DM 生成图像的检测相对较少的关注，这对于防止对我们社会的不利影响至关重要。相比之下，生成对抗网络（GAN）已从法医的角度进行了广泛的研究。因此，在这项工作中，我们自然会采取下一步来评估以前的方法是否可以用于检测 DM 生成的图像。我们的实验得出两个关键发现：(1) 最先进的 GAN 检测器无法可靠地区分真实图像和 DM 生成的图像，但 (2) 在 DM 生成的图像上重新训练它们可以实现近乎完美的检测，这甚至可以推广到 GAN。结合特征空间分析，我们的结果得出这样的假设：DM 产生的可检测伪影较少，因此与 GAN 相比更难检测。造成这种情况的一个可能原因是 DM 生成的图像中不存在网格状频率伪影，这是 GAN 的一个已知弱点。然而，我们做了一个有趣的观察，即扩散模型往往会低估高频，我们将其归因于学习目标。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估现有生成对抗网络（GAN）检测方法对扩散模型（DM）生成图像的检测效果，并探索DM生成图像的可检测性。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在视觉质量上取得突破，但其生成图像的检测研究较少。相比之下，GAN生成图像的检测已较为成熟，因此需研究现有方法是否适用于DM生成图像的检测。
AI.method: 通过实验验证现有GAN检测器对DM生成图像的检测能力，并重新训练检测器以提升效果；结合特征空间分析和频率特性研究，探讨DM生成图像的可检测性差异原因。
AI.result: 现有GAN检测器无法有效区分真实图像与DM生成图像，但重新训练后可实现接近完美的检测，且效果可泛化至GAN生成图像。DM生成图像的可检测性低于GAN，可能因缺乏网格状频率伪影，但存在高频成分低估问题。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型生成图像因更少的可检测伪影而更难被现有方法识别，但通过针对性训练可显著提升检测效果。高频成分的低估可能与扩散模型的学习目标相关，需进一步研究其检测特性差异的根源。

Together with a feature space analysis, our results lead to the hypothesis that DMs produce fewer detectable artifacts and are thus more difficult to detect compared to GANs. One possible reason for this is the absence of grid-like frequency artifacts in DM-generated images, which are a known weakness of GANs. However, we make the interesting observation that diffusion models tend to underestimate high frequencies, which we attribute to the learning objective. 在过去几年中，扩散模型 (DM) 的视觉质量达到了前所未有的水平。然而，对 DM 生成图像的检测相对较少的关注，这对于防止对我们社会的不利影响至关重要。相比之下，生成对抗网络（GAN）已从法医的角度进行了广泛的研究。因此，在这项工作中，我们自然会采取下一步来评估以前的方法是否可以用于检测 DM 生成的图像。我们的实验得出两个关键发现：(1) 最先进的 GAN 检测器无法可靠地区分真实图像和 DM 生成的图像，但 (2) 在 DM 生成的图像上重新训练它们可以实现近乎完美的检测，这甚至可以推广到 GAN。结合特征空间分析，我们的结果得出这样的假设：DM 产生的可检测伪影较少，因此与 GAN 相比更难检测。造成这种情况的一个可能原因是 DM 生成的图像中不存在网格状频率伪影，这是 GAN 的一个已知弱点。然而，我们做了一个有趣的观察，即扩散模型往往会低估高频，我们将其归因于学习目标。 本文旨在评估现有生成对抗网络（GAN）检测方法对扩散模型（DM）生成图像的检测效果，并探索DM生成图像的可检测性。 Jonas Ricker,Simon Damm,Thorsten Holz,Asja Fischer cs.CV

authors_text: Hexin Liu,Haihua Xu,Leibny Paola Garcia,Andy W. H. Khong,Yi He,Sanjeev Khudanpur
title: Reducing Language confusion for Code-switching Speech Recognition with Token-level Language Diarization
title_zh: 通过标记级语言二值化减少语码转换语音识别的语言混乱
abstract: Code-switching (CS) refers to the phenomenon that languages switch within a speech signal and leads to language confusion for automatic speech recognition (ASR). This paper aims to address language confusion for improving CS-ASR from two perspectives: incorporating and disentangling language information. We incorporate language information in the CS-ASR model by dynamically biasing the model with token-level language posteriors which are outputs of a sequence-to-sequence auxiliary language diarization module. In contrast, the disentangling process reduces the difference between languages via adversarial training so as to normalize two languages. We conduct the experiments on the SEAME dataset. Compared to the baseline model, both the joint optimization with LD and the language posterior bias achieve performance improvement. The comparison of the proposed methods indicates that incorporating language information is more effective than disentangling for reducing language confusion in CS speech.
summary: Code-switching (CS) refers to the phenomenon that languages switch within a speech signal and leads to language confusion for automatic speech recognition (ASR). This paper aims to address language confusion for improving CS-ASR from two perspectives: incorporating and disentangling language information. We incorporate language information in the CS-ASR model by dynamically biasing the model with token-level language posteriors which are outputs of a sequence-to-sequence auxiliary language diarization module. In contrast, the disentangling process reduces the difference between languages via adversarial training so as to normalize two languages. We conduct the experiments on the SEAME dataset. Compared to the baseline model, both the joint optimization with LD and the language posterior bias achieve performance improvement. The comparison of the proposed methods indicates that incorporating language information is more effective than disentangling for reducing language confusion in CS speech.
abstract_zh: 语码转换（CS）是指在语音信号内进行语言转换并导致自动语音识别（ASR）语言混乱的现象。本文旨在从合并和解开语言信息两个角度解决语言混乱问题，以改进 CS-ASR。我们通过使用标记级语言后验（序列到序列辅助语言二值化模块的输出）动态偏置模型，将语言信息合并到 CS-ASR 模型中。相反，解开过程通过对抗性训练减少语言之间的差异，从而规范两种语言。我们在 SEAME 数据集上进行实验。与基线模型相比，LD 联合优化和语言后验偏差均实现了性能提升。所提出方法的比较表明，在减少 CS 语音中的语言混乱方面，合并语言信息比解开更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过两种方法减少代码切换语音识别中的语言混淆，提高识别性能。
AI.motivation: 代码切换现象导致语音识别中语言混淆，影响自动语音识别（ASR）的准确性，需寻找有效方法解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过动态融合token级语言后验信息（来自序列到序列的辅助语言分段模块）和对抗训练减少语言差异，实现语言信息的整合与解耦。
AI.result: 在SEAME数据集上实验表明，联合优化与语言后验偏置均优于基线模型，其中语言信息整合方法效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 整合语言信息比解耦方法更有效缓解代码切换语音中的语言混淆问题。

authors_text: Myunghun Jung,Hoirin Kim
title: AdaMS: Deep Metric Learning with Adaptive Margin and Adaptive Scale for Acoustic Word Discrimination
title_zh: AdaMS：具有自适应余量和自适应量表的深度度量学习，用于声学词辨别
abstract: Many recent loss functions in deep metric learning are expressed with logarithmic and exponential forms, and they involve margin and scale as essential hyper-parameters. Since each data class has an intrinsic characteristic, several previous works have tried to learn embedding space close to the real distribution by introducing adaptive margins. However, there was no work on adaptive scales at all. We argue that both margin and scale should be adaptively adjustable during the training. In this paper, we propose a method called Adaptive Margin and Scale (AdaMS), where hyper-parameters of margin and scale are replaced with learnable parameters of adaptive margins and adaptive scales for each class. Our method is evaluated on Wall Street Journal dataset, and we achieve outperforming results for word discrimination tasks.
summary: Many recent loss functions in deep metric learning are expressed with logarithmic and exponential forms, and they involve margin and scale as essential hyper-parameters. Since each data class has an intrinsic characteristic, several previous works have tried to learn embedding space close to the real distribution by introducing adaptive margins. However, there was no work on adaptive scales at all. We argue that both margin and scale should be adaptively adjustable during the training. In this paper, we propose a method called Adaptive Margin and Scale (AdaMS), where hyper-parameters of margin and scale are replaced with learnable parameters of adaptive margins and adaptive scales for each class. Our method is evaluated on Wall Street Journal dataset, and we achieve outperforming results for word discrimination tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近深度度量学习中的许多损失函数都以对数和指数形式表示，并且它们将边际和尺度作为基本的超参数。由于每个数据类都有其内在特征，因此之前的一些工作尝试通过引入自适应边距来学习接近真实分布的嵌入空间。然而，根本没有关于自适应尺度的工作。我们认为边际和规模都应该在训练过程中自适应调整。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为自适应边缘和尺度（AdaMS）的方法，其中边缘和尺度的超参数被每个类别的自适应边缘和自适应尺度的可学习参数所取代。我们的方法在《华尔街日报》数据集上进行了评估，我们在单词辨别任务中取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AdaMS的深度度量学习方法，通过自适应调整边距和尺度参数提升语音词辨别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度度量学习方法虽引入自适应边距，但未考虑自适应尺度，而边距和尺度均应根据数据特性动态调整以优化嵌入空间。
AI.method: 将传统损失函数中的固定边距和尺度超参数替换为每个类别的可学习参数，实现边距和尺度的自适应调整。
AI.result: 在Wall Street Journal数据集上，AdaMS方法在语音词辨别任务中取得优于现有方法的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 自适应调整边距和尺度参数能有效提升深度度量学习在语音词辨别中的性能，验证了该方法的优越性。

authors_text: Junyang Wang,Yi Zhang,Jitao Sang
title: FairCLIP: Social Bias Elimination based on Attribute Prototype Learning and Representation Neutralization
title_zh: FairCLIP：基于属性原型学习和表示中和的社会偏见消除
abstract: The Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models like CLIP have gained popularity in recent years. However, many works found that the social biases hidden in CLIP easily manifest in downstream tasks, especially in image retrieval, which can have harmful effects on human society. In this work, we propose FairCLIP to eliminate the social bias in CLIP-based image retrieval without damaging the retrieval performance achieving the compatibility between the debiasing effect and the retrieval performance. FairCLIP is divided into two steps: Attribute Prototype Learning (APL) and Representation Neutralization (RN). In the first step, we extract the concepts needed for debiasing in CLIP. We use the query with learnable word vector prefixes as the extraction structure. In the second step, we first divide the attributes into target and bias attributes. By analysis, we find that both attributes have an impact on the bias. Therefore, we try to eliminate the bias by using Re-Representation Matrix (RRM) to achieve the neutralization of the representation. We compare the debiasing effect and retrieval performance with other methods, and experiments demonstrate that FairCLIP can achieve the best compatibility. Although FairCLIP is used to eliminate bias in image retrieval, it achieves the neutralization of the representation which is common to all CLIP downstream tasks. This means that FairCLIP can be applied as a general debiasing method for other fairness issues related to CLIP.
summary: The Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models like CLIP have gained popularity in recent years. However, many works found that the social biases hidden in CLIP easily manifest in downstream tasks, especially in image retrieval, which can have harmful effects on human society. In this work, we propose FairCLIP to eliminate the social bias in CLIP-based image retrieval without damaging the retrieval performance achieving the compatibility between the debiasing effect and the retrieval performance. FairCLIP is divided into two steps: Attribute Prototype Learning (APL) and Representation Neutralization (RN). In the first step, we extract the concepts needed for debiasing in CLIP. We use the query with learnable word vector prefixes as the extraction structure. In the second step, we first divide the attributes into target and bias attributes. By analysis, we find that both attributes have an impact on the bias. Therefore, we try to eliminate the bias by using Re-Representation Matrix (RRM) to achieve the neutralization of the representation. We compare the debiasing effect and retrieval performance with other methods, and experiments demonstrate that FairCLIP can achieve the best compatibility. Although FairCLIP is used to eliminate bias in image retrieval, it achieves the neutralization of the representation which is common to all CLIP downstream tasks. This means that FairCLIP can be applied as a general debiasing method for other fairness issues related to CLIP.
abstract_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型近年来越来越受欢迎。然而，许多研究发现，CLIP中隐藏的社会偏见很容易在下游任务中显现出来，特别是在图像检索中，这会对人类社会产生有害影响。在这项工作中，我们提出FairCLIP来消除基于CLIP的图像检索中的社会偏见，而不损害检索性能，实现去偏见效果和检索性能之间的兼容性。 FairCLIP分为两个步骤：属性原型学习（APL）和表示中和（RN）。第一步，我们提取 CLIP 中去偏所需的概念。我们使用具有可学习词向量前缀的查询作为提取结构。第二步，我们首先将属性分为目标属性和偏差属性。通过分析，我们发现这两个属性都会对偏差产生影响。因此，我们尝试通过使用重新表示矩阵（RRM）来消除偏差，以实现表示的中和。我们将去偏效果和检索性能与其他方法进行了比较，实验证明FairCLIP可以达到最好的兼容性。尽管 FairCLIP 用于消除图像检索中的偏差，但它实现了所有 CLIP 下游任务所共有的表示的中和。这意味着 FairCLIP 可以用作与 CLIP 相关的其他公平问题的通用去偏方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FairCLIP方法，在保持CLIP图像检索性能的同时消除其社会偏见。
AI.motivation: CLIP等视觉-语言预训练模型在下游任务中易显现社会偏见，尤其在图像检索中可能产生负面社会影响。
AI.method: 分两步实现：1）属性原型学习（APL）通过可学习词向量前缀提取去偏概念；2）表示中和（RN）利用重表示矩阵（RRM）区分并消除目标属性与偏见属性的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明FairCLIP在去偏效果与检索性能兼容性上优于其他方法，且其表示中和机制可泛化至所有CLIP下游任务。
AI.conclusion: FairCLIP通过属性解耦与表示中和有效消除偏见，为CLIP相关公平性问题提供通用解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: FairCLIP通过属性解耦与表示中和有效消除偏见，为CLIP相关公平性问题提供通用解决方案。
