search_text: FairCLIP: Social Bias Elimination based on Attribute Prototype Learning and Representation Neutralization FairCLIP：基于属性原型学习和表示中和的社会偏见消除 The Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models like CLIP have gained popularity in recent years. However, many works found that the social biases hidden in CLIP easily manifest in downstream tasks, especially in image retrieval, which can have harmful effects on human society. In this work, we propose FairCLIP to eliminate the social bias in CLIP-based image retrieval without damaging the retrieval performance achieving the compatibility between the debiasing effect and the retrieval performance. FairCLIP is divided into two steps: Attribute Prototype Learning (APL) and Representation Neutralization (RN). In the first step, we extract the concepts needed for debiasing in CLIP. We use the query with learnable word vector prefixes as the extraction structure. In the second step, we first divide the attributes into target and bias attributes. By analysis, we find that both attributes have an impact on the bias. Therefore, we try to eliminate the bias by using Re-Representation Matrix (RRM) to achieve the neutralization of the representation. We compare the debiasing effect and retrieval performance with other methods, and experiments demonstrate that FairCLIP can achieve the best compatibility. Although FairCLIP is used to eliminate bias in image retrieval, it achieves the neutralization of the representation which is common to all CLIP downstream tasks. This means that FairCLIP can be applied as a general debiasing method for other fairness issues related to CLIP. 像 CLIP 这样的视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型近年来越来越受欢迎。然而，许多研究发现，CLIP中隐藏的社会偏见很容易在下游任务中显现出来，特别是在图像检索中，这会对人类社会产生有害影响。在这项工作中，我们提出FairCLIP来消除基于CLIP的图像检索中的社会偏见，而不损害检索性能，实现去偏见效果和检索性能之间的兼容性。 FairCLIP分为两个步骤：属性原型学习（APL）和表示中和（RN）。第一步，我们提取 CLIP 中去偏所需的概念。我们使用具有可学习词向量前缀的查询作为提取结构。第二步，我们首先将属性分为目标属性和偏差属性。通过分析，我们发现这两个属性都会对偏差产生影响。因此，我们尝试通过使用重新表示矩阵（RRM）来消除偏差，以实现表示的中和。我们将去偏效果和检索性能与其他方法进行了比较，实验证明FairCLIP可以达到最好的兼容性。尽管 FairCLIP 用于消除图像检索中的偏差，但它实现了所有 CLIP 下游任务所共有的表示的中和。这意味着 FairCLIP 可以用作与 CLIP 相关的其他公平问题的通用去偏方法。 本文提出FairCLIP方法，在保持CLIP图像检索性能的同时消除其社会偏见。 Junyang Wang,Yi Zhang,Jitao Sang cs.CV

authors_text: Qingyi Si,Yuanxin Liu,Zheng Lin,Peng Fu,Weiping Wang
title: Compressing And Debiasing Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视觉问答的视觉语言预训练模型的压缩和去偏
abstract: Despite the excellent performance of vision-language pre-trained models (VLPs) on conventional VQA task, they still suffer from two problems: First, VLPs tend to rely on language biases in datasets and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Second, they are inefficient in terms of memory footprint and computation. Although promising progress has been made in both problems, most existing works tackle them independently. To facilitate the application of VLP to VQA tasks, it is imperative to jointly study VLP compression and OOD robustness, which, however, has not yet been explored. This paper investigates whether a VLP can be compressed and debiased simultaneously by searching sparse and robust subnetworks. To this end, we systematically study the design of a training and compression pipeline to search the subnetworks, as well as the assignment of sparsity to different modality-specific modules. Our experiments involve 3 VLPs, 2 compression methods, 4 training methods, 2 datasets and a range of sparsity levels and random seeds. Our results show that there indeed exist sparse and robust subnetworks, which are competitive with the debiased full VLP and clearly outperform the debiasing SoTAs with fewer parameters on OOD datasets VQA-CP v2 and VQA-VS. The codes can be found at https://github.com/PhoebusSi/Compress-Robust-VQA.
summary: Despite the excellent performance of vision-language pre-trained models (VLPs) on conventional VQA task, they still suffer from two problems: First, VLPs tend to rely on language biases in datasets and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Second, they are inefficient in terms of memory footprint and computation. Although promising progress has been made in both problems, most existing works tackle them independently. To facilitate the application of VLP to VQA tasks, it is imperative to jointly study VLP compression and OOD robustness, which, however, has not yet been explored. This paper investigates whether a VLP can be compressed and debiased simultaneously by searching sparse and robust subnetworks. To this end, we systematically study the design of a training and compression pipeline to search the subnetworks, as well as the assignment of sparsity to different modality-specific modules. Our experiments involve 3 VLPs, 2 compression methods, 4 training methods, 2 datasets and a range of sparsity levels and random seeds. Our results show that there indeed exist sparse and robust subnetworks, which are competitive with the debiased full VLP and clearly outperform the debiasing SoTAs with fewer parameters on OOD datasets VQA-CP v2 and VQA-VS. The codes can be found at https://github.com/PhoebusSi/Compress-Robust-VQA.
abstract_zh: 尽管视觉语言预训练模型（VLP）在传统的 VQA 任务上表现出色，但它们仍然存在两个问题：首先，VLP 往往依赖于数据集中的语言偏差，并且无法泛化到分布外（OOD）数据。其次，它们在内存占用和计算方面效率低下。尽管在这两个问题上都取得了可喜的进展，但大多数现有的工作都是独立解决它们的。为了促进 VLP 在 VQA 任务中的应用，有必要共同研究 VLP 压缩和 OOD 鲁棒性，但这方面尚未得到探索。本文研究了 VLP 是否可以通过搜索稀疏子网络和鲁棒子网络同时进行压缩和去偏。为此，我们系统地研究了用于搜索子网络的训练和压缩管道的设计，以及对不同模态特定模块的稀疏性分配。我们的实验涉及 3 个 VLP、2 种压缩方法、4 种训练方法、2 个数据集以及一系列稀疏级别和随机种子。我们的结果表明，确实存在稀疏且鲁棒的子网络，它们与去偏的完整 VLP 具有竞争力，并且在 OOD 数据集 VQA-CP v2 和 VQA-VS 上明显优于参数较少的去偏 SoTA。这些代码可以在 https://github.com/PhoebusSi/Compress-Robust-VQA 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何同时压缩和去偏见视觉-语言预训练模型（VLP），以提升视觉问答（VQA）任务的效率和分布外（OOD）数据泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLP模型在VQA任务中存在两个问题：1）依赖语言偏差导致泛化能力差；2）计算和内存效率低。现有方法多独立处理这两个问题，缺乏联合优化。
AI.method: 设计训练与压缩流程，通过搜索稀疏且鲁棒的子网络，并分配不同模态特定模块的稀疏度，实现模型压缩与去偏见的联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，稀疏鲁棒子网络在参数更少时优于去偏见全模型，且在VQA-CP v2和VQA-VS等OOD数据集上显著超越现有去偏方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合压缩与去偏见策略有效提升VLP在VQA任务中的性能，为模型轻量化与鲁棒性优化提供新方向。

authors_text: Ronghao Lin,Haifeng Hu
title: Multimodal Contrastive Learning via Uni-Modal Coding and Cross-Modal Prediction for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 通过单模态编码和跨模态预测进行多模态情感分析的多模态对比学习
abstract: Multimodal representation learning is a challenging task in which previous work mostly focus on either uni-modality pre-training or cross-modality fusion. In fact, we regard modeling multimodal representation as building a skyscraper, where laying stable foundation and designing the main structure are equally essential. The former is like encoding robust uni-modal representation while the later is like integrating interactive information among different modalities, both of which are critical to learning an effective multimodal representation. Recently, contrastive learning has been successfully applied in representation learning, which can be utilized as the pillar of the skyscraper and benefit the model to extract the most important features contained in the multimodal data. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named MultiModal Contrastive Learning (MMCL) for multimodal representation to capture intra- and inter-modality dynamics simultaneously. Specifically, we devise uni-modal contrastive coding with an efficient uni-modal feature augmentation strategy to filter inherent noise contained in acoustic and visual modality and acquire more robust uni-modality representations. Besides, a pseudo siamese network is presented to predict representation across different modalities, which successfully captures cross-modal dynamics. Moreover, we design two contrastive learning tasks, instance- and sentiment-based contrastive learning, to promote the process of prediction and learn more interactive information related to sentiment. Extensive experiments conducted on two public datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Multimodal representation learning is a challenging task in which previous work mostly focus on either uni-modality pre-training or cross-modality fusion. In fact, we regard modeling multimodal representation as building a skyscraper, where laying stable foundation and designing the main structure are equally essential. The former is like encoding robust uni-modal representation while the later is like integrating interactive information among different modalities, both of which are critical to learning an effective multimodal representation. Recently, contrastive learning has been successfully applied in representation learning, which can be utilized as the pillar of the skyscraper and benefit the model to extract the most important features contained in the multimodal data. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named MultiModal Contrastive Learning (MMCL) for multimodal representation to capture intra- and inter-modality dynamics simultaneously. Specifically, we devise uni-modal contrastive coding with an efficient uni-modal feature augmentation strategy to filter inherent noise contained in acoustic and visual modality and acquire more robust uni-modality representations. Besides, a pseudo siamese network is presented to predict representation across different modalities, which successfully captures cross-modal dynamics. Moreover, we design two contrastive learning tasks, instance- and sentiment-based contrastive learning, to promote the process of prediction and learn more interactive information related to sentiment. Extensive experiments conducted on two public datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 多模态表示学习是一项具有挑战性的任务，之前的工作主要集中在单模态预训练或跨模态融合。事实上，我们将多模态表示建模视为建造摩天大楼，奠定稳定的基础和设计主体结构同样重要。前者就像编码鲁棒的单模态表示，而后者就像集成不同模态之间的交互信息，这两者对于学习有效的多模态表示都至关重要。最近，对比学习已成功应用于表示学习，它可以作为摩天大楼的支柱，有利于模型提取多模态数据中包含的最重要的特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为多模态对比学习（MMCL）的新颖框架，用于多模态表示，以同时捕获模态内和模态间动态。具体来说，我们设计了具有有效单模态特征增强策略的单模态对比编码，以过滤声学和视觉模态中包含的固有噪声并获得更鲁棒的单模态表示。此外，提出了伪暹罗网络来预测不同模态的表示，成功地捕获了跨模态动态。此外，我们设计了两种对比学习任务，即基于实例的对比学习和基于情感的对比学习，以促进预测过程并学习更多与情感相关的交互信息。在两个公共数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法超越了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MMCL的多模态对比学习框架，通过单模态编码和跨模态预测同时捕捉多模态情感分析中的模态内和模态间动态关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单模态预训练或跨模态融合，但作者认为构建稳定基础（单模态表征）与设计主体结构（跨模态交互）同样关键，需同时优化以提升多模态表征效果。
AI.method: 设计单模态对比编码器结合高效特征增强策略以过滤声学和视觉模态噪声；引入伪孪生网络预测跨模态表征；提出实例对比学习和情感对比学习两种任务以增强模态间交互与情感相关性。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多模态情感分析任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MMCL通过联合优化单模态鲁棒性与跨模态交互性，有效提升了多模态表征能力，为多模态情感分析提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为MMCL的多模态对比学习框架，通过单模态编码和跨模态预测同时捕捉多模态情感分析中的模态内和模态间动态关系。
motivation: 现有研究多关注单模态预训练或跨模态融合，但作者认为构建稳定基础（单模态表征）与设计主体结构（跨模态交互）同样关键，需同时优化以提升多模态表征效果。
method: 设计单模态对比编码器结合高效特征增强策略以过滤声学和视觉模态噪声；引入伪孪生网络预测跨模态表征；提出实例对比学习和情感对比学习两种任务以增强模态间交互与情感相关性。
result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多模态情感分析任务中优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: MMCL通过联合优化单模态鲁棒性与跨模态交互性，有效提升了多模态表征能力，为多模态情感分析提供了新思路。
search_text: Multimodal Contrastive Learning via Uni-Modal Coding and Cross-Modal Prediction for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis 通过单模态编码和跨模态预测进行多模态情感分析的多模态对比学习 Multimodal representation learning is a challenging task in which previous work mostly focus on either uni-modality pre-training or cross-modality fusion. In fact, we regard modeling multimodal representation as building a skyscraper, where laying stable foundation and designing the main structure are equally essential. The former is like encoding robust uni-modal representation while the later is like integrating interactive information among different modalities, both of which are critical to learning an effective multimodal representation. Recently, contrastive learning has been successfully applied in representation learning, which can be utilized as the pillar of the skyscraper and benefit the model to extract the most important features contained in the multimodal data. In this paper, we propose a novel framework named MultiModal Contrastive Learning (MMCL) for multimodal representation to capture intra- and inter-modality dynamics simultaneously. Specifically, we devise uni-modal contrastive coding with an efficient uni-modal feature augmentation strategy to filter inherent noise contained in acoustic and visual modality and acquire more robust uni-modality representations. Besides, a pseudo siamese network is presented to predict representation across different modalities, which successfully captures cross-modal dynamics. Moreover, we design two contrastive learning tasks, instance- and sentiment-based contrastive learning, to promote the process of prediction and learn more interactive information related to sentiment. Extensive experiments conducted on two public datasets demonstrate that our method surpasses the state-of-the-art methods. 多模态表示学习是一项具有挑战性的任务，之前的工作主要集中在单模态预训练或跨模态融合。事实上，我们将多模态表示建模视为建造摩天大楼，奠定稳定的基础和设计主体结构同样重要。前者就像编码鲁棒的单模态表示，而后者就像集成不同模态之间的交互信息，这两者对于学习有效的多模态表示都至关重要。最近，对比学习已成功应用于表示学习，它可以作为摩天大楼的支柱，有利于模型提取多模态数据中包含的最重要的特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为多模态对比学习（MMCL）的新颖框架，用于多模态表示，以同时捕获模态内和模态间动态。具体来说，我们设计了具有有效单模态特征增强策略的单模态对比编码，以过滤声学和视觉模态中包含的固有噪声并获得更鲁棒的单模态表示。此外，提出了伪暹罗网络来预测不同模态的表示，成功地捕获了跨模态动态。此外，我们设计了两种对比学习任务，即基于实例的对比学习和基于情感的对比学习，以促进预测过程并学习更多与情感相关的交互信息。在两个公共数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法超越了最先进的方法。 本文提出一种名为MMCL的多模态对比学习框架，通过单模态编码和跨模态预测同时捕捉多模态情感分析中的模态内和模态间动态关系。 Ronghao Lin,Haifeng Hu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: David Diaz-Guerra,Archontis Politis,Tuomas Virtanen
title: Position tracking of a varying number of sound sources with sliding permutation invariant training
title_zh: 通过滑动排列不变训练对不同数量的声源进行位置跟踪
comment: Accepted for publication at the 31st European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 31st European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2023)
abstract: Recent data- and learning-based sound source localization (SSL) methods have shown strong performance in challenging acoustic scenarios. However, little work has been done on adapting such methods to track consistently multiple sources appearing and disappearing, as would occur in reality. In this paper, we present a new training strategy for deep learning SSL models with a straightforward implementation based on the mean squared error of the optimal association between estimated and reference positions in the preceding time frames. It optimizes the desired properties of a tracking system: handling a time-varying number of sources and ordering localization estimates according to their trajectories, minimizing identity switches (IDSs). Evaluation on simulated data of multiple reverberant moving sources and on two model architectures proves its effectiveness on reducing identity switches without compromising frame-wise localization accuracy.
summary: Recent data- and learning-based sound source localization (SSL) methods have shown strong performance in challenging acoustic scenarios. However, little work has been done on adapting such methods to track consistently multiple sources appearing and disappearing, as would occur in reality. In this paper, we present a new training strategy for deep learning SSL models with a straightforward implementation based on the mean squared error of the optimal association between estimated and reference positions in the preceding time frames. It optimizes the desired properties of a tracking system: handling a time-varying number of sources and ordering localization estimates according to their trajectories, minimizing identity switches (IDSs). Evaluation on simulated data of multiple reverberant moving sources and on two model architectures proves its effectiveness on reducing identity switches without compromising frame-wise localization accuracy.
abstract_zh: 最近基于数据和学习的声源定位（SSL）方法在具有挑战性的声学场景中表现出了强大的性能。然而，在采用此类方法来持续跟踪出现和消失的多个源方面，几乎没有做任何工作，就像现实中会发生的那样。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于深度学习 SSL 模型的新训练策略，该策略具有基于先前时间帧中估计位置和参考位置之间最佳关联的均方误差的简单实现。它优化了跟踪系统的所需属性：处理随时间变化的源数量并根据其轨迹对定位估计进行排序，从而最大限度地减少身份切换 (IDS)。对多个混响移动源的模拟数据和两种模型架构的评估证明了其在不影响逐帧定位精度的情况下减少身份切换的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于滑动排列不变训练策略的深度学习声源定位方法，用于跟踪数量变化的多个移动声源的位置。
AI.motivation: 现有声源定位方法难以有效处理现实场景中声源数量动态变化及身份切换问题，需优化跟踪系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用基于前一时间帧估计位置与参考位置最佳关联的均方误差优化方法，结合滑动排列不变训练策略，实现对时变数量声源的轨迹排序与身份切换最小化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个混响移动声源模拟数据及两种模型架构上有效减少身份切换，且不牺牲逐帧定位准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该训练策略成功提升了动态声源跟踪系统的鲁棒性，验证了其在减少身份切换与保持定位精度方面的有效性。

authors_text: Gongyang Li,Yike Wang,Zhi Liu,Xinpeng Zhang,Dan Zeng
title: RGB-T Semantic Segmentation with Location, Activation, and Sharpening
title_zh: 具有位置、激活和锐化功能的 RGB-T 语义分割
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2022
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2022
abstract: Semantic segmentation is important for scene understanding. To address the scenes of adverse illumination conditions of natural images, thermal infrared (TIR) images are introduced. Most existing RGB-T semantic segmentation methods follow three cross-modal fusion paradigms, i.e. encoder fusion, decoder fusion, and feature fusion. Some methods, unfortunately, ignore the properties of RGB and TIR features or the properties of features at different levels. In this paper, we propose a novel feature fusion-based network for RGB-T semantic segmentation, named \emph{LASNet}, which follows three steps of location, activation, and sharpening. The highlight of LASNet is that we fully consider the characteristics of cross-modal features at different levels, and accordingly propose three specific modules for better segmentation. Concretely, we propose a Collaborative Location Module (CLM) for high-level semantic features, aiming to locate all potential objects. We propose a Complementary Activation Module for middle-level features, aiming to activate exact regions of different objects. We propose an Edge Sharpening Module (ESM) for low-level texture features, aiming to sharpen the edges of objects. Furthermore, in the training phase, we attach a location supervision and an edge supervision after CLM and ESM, respectively, and impose two semantic supervisions in the decoder part to facilitate network convergence. Experimental results on two public datasets demonstrate that the superiority of our LASNet over relevant state-of-the-art methods. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/LASNet.
summary: Semantic segmentation is important for scene understanding. To address the scenes of adverse illumination conditions of natural images, thermal infrared (TIR) images are introduced. Most existing RGB-T semantic segmentation methods follow three cross-modal fusion paradigms, i.e. encoder fusion, decoder fusion, and feature fusion. Some methods, unfortunately, ignore the properties of RGB and TIR features or the properties of features at different levels. In this paper, we propose a novel feature fusion-based network for RGB-T semantic segmentation, named \emph{LASNet}, which follows three steps of location, activation, and sharpening. The highlight of LASNet is that we fully consider the characteristics of cross-modal features at different levels, and accordingly propose three specific modules for better segmentation. Concretely, we propose a Collaborative Location Module (CLM) for high-level semantic features, aiming to locate all potential objects. We propose a Complementary Activation Module for middle-level features, aiming to activate exact regions of different objects. We propose an Edge Sharpening Module (ESM) for low-level texture features, aiming to sharpen the edges of objects. Furthermore, in the training phase, we attach a location supervision and an edge supervision after CLM and ESM, respectively, and impose two semantic supervisions in the decoder part to facilitate network convergence. Experimental results on two public datasets demonstrate that the superiority of our LASNet over relevant state-of-the-art methods. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/LASNet.
abstract_zh: 语义分割对于场景理解很重要。为了解决自然图像光照条件不利的场景，引入了热红外（TIR）图像。大多数现有的RGB-T语义分割方法遵循三种跨模态融合范式，即编码器融合、解码器融合和特征融合。不幸的是，一些方法忽略了 RGB 和 TIR 特征的属性或不同级别的特征的属性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 RGB-T 语义分割的新型基于特征融合的网络，名为 \emph{LASNet}，它遵循定位、激活和锐化三个步骤。 LASNet的亮点在于我们充分考虑了不同层次的跨模态特征的特点，并相应地提出了三个具体模块以实现更好的分割。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于高级语义特征的协作定位模块（CLM），旨在定位所有潜在的对象。我们提出了一个用于中层特征的补充激活模块，旨在激活不同对象的精确区域。我们针对低级纹理特征提出了边缘锐化模块（ESM），旨在锐化对象的边缘。此外，在训练阶段，我们在CLM和ESM之后分别附加位置监督和边缘监督，并在解码器部分施加两个语义监督以促进网络收敛。两个公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 LASNet 相对于相关最先进方法的优越性。我们方法的代码和结果可在 https://github.com/MathLee/LASNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于位置、激活和锐化的RGB-T语义分割方法LASNet，旨在提升复杂光照条件下场景理解的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-T语义分割方法未充分考虑RGB与热红外特征在不同层次的特性，导致分割效果受限。
AI.method: 设计LASNet网络，包含协作定位模块（CLM）、互补激活模块和边缘锐化模块（ESM），分别处理高层语义、中层特征和低层纹理，并引入位置与边缘监督机制。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，LASNet优于现有先进方法，代码和结果已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层特征优化与多监督策略，LASNet有效提升了跨模态语义分割性能，为复杂环境下的视觉任务提供新思路。

We propose a Complementary Activation Module for middle-level features, aiming to activate exact regions of different objects. We propose an Edge Sharpening Module (ESM) for low-level texture features, aiming to sharpen the edges of objects. Furthermore, in the training phase, we attach a location supervision and an edge supervision after CLM and ESM, respectively, and impose two semantic supervisions in the decoder part to facilitate network convergence. Experimental results on two public datasets demonstrate that the superiority of our LASNet over relevant state-of-the-art methods. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/LASNet. 语义分割对于场景理解很重要。为了解决自然图像光照条件不利的场景，引入了热红外（TIR）图像。大多数现有的RGB-T语义分割方法遵循三种跨模态融合范式，即编码器融合、解码器融合和特征融合。不幸的是，一些方法忽略了 RGB 和 TIR 特征的属性或不同级别的特征的属性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 RGB-T 语义分割的新型基于特征融合的网络，名为 \emph{LASNet}，它遵循定位、激活和锐化三个步骤。 LASNet的亮点在于我们充分考虑了不同层次的跨模态特征的特点，并相应地提出了三个具体模块以实现更好的分割。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于高级语义特征的协作定位模块（CLM），旨在定位所有潜在的对象。我们提出了一个用于中层特征的补充激活模块，旨在激活不同对象的精确区域。我们针对低级纹理特征提出了边缘锐化模块（ESM），旨在锐化对象的边缘。此外，在训练阶段，我们在CLM和ESM之后分别附加位置监督和边缘监督，并在解码器部分施加两个语义监督以促进网络收敛。两个公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 LASNet 相对于相关最先进方法的优越性。我们方法的代码和结果可在 https://github.com/MathLee/LASNet 上获取。 本文提出一种基于位置、激活和锐化的RGB-T语义分割方法LASNet，旨在提升复杂光照条件下场景理解的准确性。 Gongyang Li,Yike Wang,Zhi Liu,Xinpeng Zhang,Dan Zeng cs.CV

authors_text: Jie Cao,Yin Zhang
title: OTSeq2Set: An Optimal Transport Enhanced Sequence-to-Set Model for Extreme Multi-label Text Classification
title_zh: OTSeq2Set：用于极端多标签文本分类的最优传输增强序列到集模型
abstract: Extreme multi-label text classification (XMTC) is the task of finding the most relevant subset labels from an extremely large-scale label collection. Recently, some deep learning models have achieved state-of-the-art results in XMTC tasks. These models commonly predict scores for all labels by a fully connected layer as the last layer of the model. However, such models can't predict a relatively complete and variable-length label subset for each document, because they select positive labels relevant to the document by a fixed threshold or take top k labels in descending order of scores. A less popular type of deep learning models called sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) focus on predicting variable-length positive labels in sequence style. However, the labels in XMTC tasks are essentially an unordered set rather than an ordered sequence, the default order of labels restrains Seq2Seq models in training. To address this limitation in Seq2Seq, we propose an autoregressive sequence-to-set model for XMTC tasks named OTSeq2Set. Our model generates predictions in student-forcing scheme and is trained by a loss function based on bipartite matching which enables permutation-invariance. Meanwhile, we use the optimal transport distance as a measurement to force the model to focus on the closest labels in semantic label space. Experiments show that OTSeq2Set outperforms other competitive baselines on 4 benchmark datasets. Especially, on the Wikipedia dataset with 31k labels, it outperforms the state-of-the-art Seq2Seq method by 16.34% in micro-F1 score. The code is available at https://github.com/caojie54/OTSeq2Set.

A less popular type of deep learning models called sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) focus on predicting variable-length positive labels in sequence style. However, the labels in XMTC tasks are essentially an unordered set rather than an ordered sequence, the default order of labels restrains Seq2Seq models in training. To address this limitation in Seq2Seq, we propose an autoregressive sequence-to-set model for XMTC tasks named OTSeq2Set. Our model generates predictions in student-forcing scheme and is trained by a loss function based on bipartite matching which enables permutation-invariance. Meanwhile, we use the optimal transport distance as a measurement to force the model to focus on the closest labels in semantic label space. Experiments show that OTSeq2Set outperforms other competitive baselines on 4 benchmark datasets. Especially, on the Wikipedia dataset with 31k labels, it outperforms the state-of-the-art Seq2Seq method by 16.34% in micro-F1 score. The code is available at https://github.com/caojie54/OTSeq2Set.
abstract_zh: 极限多标签文本分类（XMTC）是从超大规模标签集合中找到最相关的子集标签的任务。最近，一些深度学习模型在XMTC任务中取得了state-of-the-art的结果。这些模型通常通过作为模型最后一层的全连接层来预测所有标签的分数。然而，此类模型无法预测每个文档的相对完整且可变长度的标签子集，因为它们通过固定阈值选择与文​​档相关的正标签或按分数降序排列前 k 个标签。一种不太流行的深度学习模型称为序列到序列（Seq2Seq），专注于预测序列样式中的可变长度正标签。然而，XMTC任务中的标签本质上是无序集合而不是有序序列，标签的默认顺序限制了Seq2Seq模型的训练。为了解决 Seq2Seq 中的这一限制，我们为 XMTC 任务提出了一种名为 OTSeq2Set 的自回归序列到集合模型。我们的模型以学生强迫方案生成预测，并通过基于二分匹配的损失函数进行训练，从而实现排列不变性。同时，我们使用最佳传输距离作为衡量标准，迫使模型关注语义标签空间中最接近的标签。实验表明，OTSeq2Set 在 4 个基准数据集上优于其他竞争基线。特别是，在具有 31k 个标签的 Wikipedia 数据集上，它在 micro-F1 分数上比最先进的 Seq2Seq 方法高出 16.34%。代码可在 https://github.com/caojie54/OTSeq2Set 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTSeq2Set模型，通过最优传输增强的序列到集合方法解决极端多标签文本分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通过固定阈值或Top-K选择标签，难以生成可变长度的无序标签集合，而序列到序列模型因标签顺序限制无法适应XMTC任务的无序特性。
AI.method: 设计自回归序列到集合模型OTSeq2Set，采用二分图匹配损失实现排列不变性，并引入最优传输距离强化语义相近标签的预测。
AI.result: 在4个基准数据集上优于其他方法，尤其在31k标签的Wikipedia数据集上微F1分数比最佳Seq2Seq方法提升16.34%。
AI.conclusion: OTSeq2Set通过解决标签顺序限制和语义对齐问题，有效提升了极端多标签文本分类的性能。

authors_text: Frédéric de Gournay,Alban Gossard
title: Adaptive scaling of the learning rate by second order automatic differentiation
title_zh: 通过二阶自动微分自适应缩放学习率
abstract: In the context of the optimization of Deep Neural Networks, we propose to rescale the learning rate using a new technique of automatic differentiation. This technique relies on the computation of the {\em curvature}, a second order information whose computational complexity is in between the computation of the gradient and the one of the Hessian-vector product. If (1C,1M) represents respectively the computational time and memory footprint of the gradient method, the new technique increase the overall cost to either (1.5C,2M) or (2C,1M). This rescaling has the appealing characteristic of having a natural interpretation, it allows the practitioner to choose between exploration of the parameters set and convergence of the algorithm. The rescaling is adaptive, it depends on the data and on the direction of descent. The numerical experiments highlight the different exploration/convergence regimes.
summary: In the context of the optimization of Deep Neural Networks, we propose to rescale the learning rate using a new technique of automatic differentiation. This technique relies on the computation of the {\em curvature}, a second order information whose computational complexity is in between the computation of the gradient and the one of the Hessian-vector product. If (1C,1M) represents respectively the computational time and memory footprint of the gradient method, the new technique increase the overall cost to either (1.5C,2M) or (2C,1M). This rescaling has the appealing characteristic of having a natural interpretation, it allows the practitioner to choose between exploration of the parameters set and convergence of the algorithm. The rescaling is adaptive, it depends on the data and on the direction of descent. The numerical experiments highlight the different exploration/convergence regimes.
abstract_zh: 在深度神经网络优化的背景下，我们建议使用自动微分新技术来重新调整学习率。该技术依赖于曲率的计算，这是一种二阶信息，其计算复杂度介于梯度计算和 Hessian 向量乘积之间。如果（1C，1M）分别表示梯度方法的计算时间和内存占用，则新技术将总体成本增加到（1.5C，2M）或（2C，1M）。这种重新调整具有自然解释的吸引人的特征，它允许从业者在参数集的探索和算法的收敛之间进行选择。重新缩放是自适应的，它取决于数据和下降方向。数值实验强调了不同的探索/收敛机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二阶自动微分的自适应学习率调整方法，用于深度神经网络优化。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法依赖一阶梯度存在收敛速度与参数探索的权衡问题，需引入二阶信息提升优化效率。
AI.method: 通过计算曲率这一二阶信息实现学习率自适应缩放，计算复杂度介于梯度与Hessian向量积之间，提供两种资源消耗模式。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了方法在参数探索与算法收敛之间的调节效果，展示了不同优化模式的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为优化过程提供了可解释的探索-收敛控制机制，适应不同数据与下降方向需求。

authors_text: Li Fu,Siqi Li,Qingtao Li,Liping Deng,Fangzhu Li,Lu Fan,Meng Chen,Xiaodong He
title: UFO2: A unified pre-training framework for online and offline speech recognition
title_zh: UFO2：在线和离线语音识别的统一预训练框架
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Unified pre-training Framework for Online and Offline (UFO2) Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), which 1) simplifies the two separate training workflows for online and offline modes into one process, and 2) improves the Word Error Rate (WER) performance with limited utterance annotating. Specifically, we extend the conventional offline-mode Self-Supervised Learning (SSL)-based ASR approach to a unified manner, where the model training is conditioned on both the full-context and dynamic-chunked inputs. To enhance the pre-trained representation model, stop-gradient operation is applied to decouple the online-mode objectives to the quantizer. Moreover, in both the pre-training and the downstream fine-tuning stages, joint losses are proposed to train the unified model with full-weight sharing for the two modes. Experimental results on the LibriSpeech dataset show that UFO2 outperforms the SSL-based baseline method by 29.7% and 18.2% relative WER reduction in offline and online modes, respectively.
summary: In this paper, we propose a Unified pre-training Framework for Online and Offline (UFO2) Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), which 1) simplifies the two separate training workflows for online and offline modes into one process, and 2) improves the Word Error Rate (WER) performance with limited utterance annotating. Specifically, we extend the conventional offline-mode Self-Supervised Learning (SSL)-based ASR approach to a unified manner, where the model training is conditioned on both the full-context and dynamic-chunked inputs. To enhance the pre-trained representation model, stop-gradient operation is applied to decouple the online-mode objectives to the quantizer. Moreover, in both the pre-training and the downstream fine-tuning stages, joint losses are proposed to train the unified model with full-weight sharing for the two modes. Experimental results on the LibriSpeech dataset show that UFO2 outperforms the SSL-based baseline method by 29.7% and 18.2% relative WER reduction in offline and online modes, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种在线和离线（UFO2）自动语音识别（ASR）的统一预训练框架，该框架1）将在线和离线模式的两个单独的训练工作流程简化为一个过程，2）通过有限的话语注释提高了词错误率（WER）性能。具体来说，我们将传统的基于离线模式自监督学习（SSL）的 ASR 方法扩展到统一的方式，其中模型训练以全上下文和动态分块输入为条件。为了增强预训练的表示模型，应用停止梯度操作来将在线模式目标与量化器解耦。此外，在预训练和下游微调阶段，都提出了联合损失来训练两种模式全权重共享的统一模型。 LibriSpeech 数据集上的实验结果表明，UFO2 的性能优于基于 SSL 的基线方法，在离线和在线模式下相对 WER 分别降低了 29.7% 和 18.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的预训练框架UFO2，用于同时优化在线和离线语音识别任务，通过减少训练流程复杂度并提升有限标注下的词错误率性能。
AI.motivation: 传统在线与离线语音识别需分别训练，流程复杂且标注数据不足时性能受限，亟需统一高效的方法。
AI.method: 扩展SSL方法以同时处理全上下文与动态分块输入，引入停止梯度操作解耦在线目标，并采用联合损失函数与全权重共享机制。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，UFO2离线模式相对基线降低29.7% WER，在线模式降低18.2% WER。
AI.conclusion: UFO2通过统一框架有效提升两种模式性能，为语音识别预训练提供新方向。

search_text: UFO2: A unified pre-training framework for online and offline speech recognition UFO2：在线和离线语音识别的统一预训练框架 In this paper, we propose a Unified pre-training Framework for Online and Offline (UFO2) Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), which 1) simplifies the two separate training workflows for online and offline modes into one process, and 2) improves the Word Error Rate (WER) performance with limited utterance annotating. Specifically, we extend the conventional offline-mode Self-Supervised Learning (SSL)-based ASR approach to a unified manner, where the model training is conditioned on both the full-context and dynamic-chunked inputs. To enhance the pre-trained representation model, stop-gradient operation is applied to decouple the online-mode objectives to the quantizer. Moreover, in both the pre-training and the downstream fine-tuning stages, joint losses are proposed to train the unified model with full-weight sharing for the two modes. Experimental results on the LibriSpeech dataset show that UFO2 outperforms the SSL-based baseline method by 29.7% and 18.2% relative WER reduction in offline and online modes, respectively. 在本文中，我们提出了一种在线和离线（UFO2）自动语音识别（ASR）的统一预训练框架，该框架1）将在线和离线模式的两个单独的训练工作流程简化为一个过程，2）通过有限的话语注释提高了词错误率（WER）性能。具体来说，我们将传统的基于离线模式自监督学习（SSL）的 ASR 方法扩展到统一的方式，其中模型训练以全上下文和动态分块输入为条件。为了增强预训练的表示模型，应用停止梯度操作来将在线模式目标与量化器解耦。此外，在预训练和下游微调阶段，都提出了联合损失来训练两种模式全权重共享的统一模型。 LibriSpeech 数据集上的实验结果表明，UFO2 的性能优于基于 SSL 的基线方法，在离线和在线模式下相对 WER 分别降低了 29.7% 和 18.2%。 本文提出一种统一的预训练框架UFO2，用于同时优化在线和离线语音识别任务，通过减少训练流程复杂度并提升有限标注下的词错误率性能。 Li Fu,Siqi Li,Qingtao Li,Liping Deng,Fangzhu Li,Lu Fan,Meng Chen,Xiaodong He eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Xuan-Phi Nguyen,Sravya Popuri,Changhan Wang,Yun Tang,Ilia Kulikov,Hongyu Gong
title: Improving Speech-to-Speech Translation Through Unlabeled Text
title_zh: 通过未标记的文本改进语音到语音翻译
abstract: Direct speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) is among the most challenging problems in the translation paradigm due to the significant scarcity of S2ST data. While effort has been made to increase the data size from unlabeled speech by cascading pretrained speech recognition (ASR), machine translation (MT) and text-to-speech (TTS) models; unlabeled text has remained relatively under-utilized to improve S2ST. We propose an effective way to utilize the massive existing unlabeled text from different languages to create a large amount of S2ST data to improve S2ST performance by applying various acoustic effects to the generated synthetic data. Empirically our method outperforms the state of the art in Spanish-English translation by up to 2 BLEU. Significant gains by the proposed method are demonstrated in extremely low-resource settings for both Spanish-English and Russian-English translations.
summary: Direct speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) is among the most challenging problems in the translation paradigm due to the significant scarcity of S2ST data. While effort has been made to increase the data size from unlabeled speech by cascading pretrained speech recognition (ASR), machine translation (MT) and text-to-speech (TTS) models; unlabeled text has remained relatively under-utilized to improve S2ST. We propose an effective way to utilize the massive existing unlabeled text from different languages to create a large amount of S2ST data to improve S2ST performance by applying various acoustic effects to the generated synthetic data. Empirically our method outperforms the state of the art in Spanish-English translation by up to 2 BLEU. Significant gains by the proposed method are demonstrated in extremely low-resource settings for both Spanish-English and Russian-English translations.
abstract_zh: 由于直接语音到语音翻译（S2ST）数据的严重稀缺，直接语音到语音翻译（S2ST）是翻译范式中最具挑战性的问题之一。虽然已经通过级联预训练语音识别（ASR）、机器翻译（MT）和文本转语音（TTS）模型来努力增加未标记语音的数据大小；未标记文本在改进 S2ST 方面的利用率相对较低。我们提出了一种有效的方法，利用来自不同语言的大量现有未标记文本来创建大量 S2ST 数据，通过对生成的合成数据应用各种声学效果来提高 S2ST 性能。根据经验，我们的方法在西班牙语-英语翻译中比最先进的方法高出 2 BLEU。在西班牙语-英语和俄语-英语翻译的资源极少的环境中，所提出的方法取得了显着的成果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过利用大量未标注文本生成合成数据，提升语音到语音翻译（S2ST）性能。
AI.motivation: 直接语音到语音翻译因数据稀缺而极具挑战性，现有方法主要依赖未标注语音，未充分利用未标注文本的潜力。
AI.method: 通过级联预训练的语音识别（ASR）、机器翻译（MT）和文本到语音（TTS）模型，结合多种声学效果处理生成的合成数据，以增强S2ST数据集。
AI.result: 在西班牙语-英语翻译中，该方法比现有最佳模型提升最高2个BLEU值；在极低资源场景下，对西班牙语-英语和俄语-英语翻译均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 利用未标注文本生成带声学多样性的合成数据，能有效提升S2ST性能，尤其在低资源条件下表现突出。

authors_text: Huda Alamri,Anthony Bilic,Michael Hu,Apoorva Beedu,Irfan Essa
title: End-to-End Multimodal Representation Learning for Video Dialog
title_zh: 视频对话的端到端多模态表示学习
abstract: Video-based dialog task is a challenging multimodal learning task that has received increasing attention over the past few years with state-of-the-art obtaining new performance records. This progress is largely powered by the adaptation of the more powerful transformer-based language encoders. Despite this progress, existing approaches do not effectively utilize visual features to help solve tasks. Recent studies show that state-of-the-art models are biased toward textual information rather than visual cues. In order to better leverage the available visual information, this study proposes a new framework that combines 3D-CNN network and transformer-based networks into a single visual encoder to extract more robust semantic representations from videos. The visual encoder is jointly trained end-to-end with other input modalities such as text and audio. Experiments on the AVSD task show significant improvement over baselines in both generative and retrieval tasks.
summary: Video-based dialog task is a challenging multimodal learning task that has received increasing attention over the past few years with state-of-the-art obtaining new performance records. This progress is largely powered by the adaptation of the more powerful transformer-based language encoders. Despite this progress, existing approaches do not effectively utilize visual features to help solve tasks. Recent studies show that state-of-the-art models are biased toward textual information rather than visual cues. In order to better leverage the available visual information, this study proposes a new framework that combines 3D-CNN network and transformer-based networks into a single visual encoder to extract more robust semantic representations from videos. The visual encoder is jointly trained end-to-end with other input modalities such as text and audio. Experiments on the AVSD task show significant improvement over baselines in both generative and retrieval tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的对话任务是一项具有挑战性的多模态学习任务，在过去几年中受到越来越多的关注，最先进的技术获得了新的性能记录。这一进步很大程度上得益于更强大的基于 Transformer 的语言编码器的适应。尽管取得了这些进展，现有的方法并不能有效地利用视觉特征来帮助解决任务。最近的研究表明，最先进的模型偏向于文本信息而不是视觉线索。为了更好地利用可用的视觉信息，本研究提出了一种新框架，将 3D-CNN 网络和基于 Transformer 的网络结合到单个视觉编码器中，以从视频中提取更强大的语义表示。视觉编码器与其他输入模式（例如文本和音频）进行端到端联合训练。 AVSD 任务的实验表明，生成任务和检索任务均较基线有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的多模态框架，结合视觉、文本和音频信息提升视频对话任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型过度依赖文本信息而忽视视觉特征，导致未能充分利用多模态数据。
AI.method: 设计融合3D-CNN与Transformer的视觉编码器，并与文本/音频模态进行联合端到端训练。
AI.result: 在AVSD任务中，生成和检索任务表现均显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 多模态联合训练框架能有效提升视频对话任务中视觉信息的利用效率。

In order to better leverage the available visual information, this study proposes a new framework that combines 3D-CNN network and transformer-based networks into a single visual encoder to extract more robust semantic representations from videos. The visual encoder is jointly trained end-to-end with other input modalities such as text and audio. Experiments on the AVSD task show significant improvement over baselines in both generative and retrieval tasks. 基于视频的对话任务是一项具有挑战性的多模态学习任务，在过去几年中受到越来越多的关注，最先进的技术获得了新的性能记录。这一进步很大程度上得益于更强大的基于 Transformer 的语言编码器的适应。尽管取得了这些进展，现有的方法并不能有效地利用视觉特征来帮助解决任务。最近的研究表明，最先进的模型偏向于文本信息而不是视觉线索。为了更好地利用可用的视觉信息，本研究提出了一种新框架，将 3D-CNN 网络和基于 Transformer 的网络结合到单个视觉编码器中，以从视频中提取更强大的语义表示。视觉编码器与其他输入模式（例如文本和音频）进行端到端联合训练。 AVSD 任务的实验表明，生成任务和检索任务均较基线有了显着改进。 本文提出一种端到端的多模态框架，结合视觉、文本和音频信息提升视频对话任务的性能。 Huda Alamri,Anthony Bilic,Michael Hu,Apoorva Beedu,Irfan Essa cs.CV

authors_text: Anastasios Foliadis,Mario H. Castañeda Garcia,Richard A. Stirling-Gallacher,Reiner S. Thomä
title: Multi-Environment based Meta-Learning with CSI Fingerprints for Radio Based Positioning
title_zh: 基于多环境的元学习和 CSI 指纹用于基于无线电的定位
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures, submitted for publication at IEEE WCNC2023
comments: 6 pages, 9 figures, submitted for publication at IEEE WCNC2023
abstract: Radio based positioning of a user equipment (UE) based on deep learning (DL) methods using channel state information (CSI) fingerprints have shown promising results. DL models are able to capture complex properties embedded in the CSI about a particular environment and map UE's CSI to the UE's position. However, the CSI fingerprints and the DL models trained on such fingerprints are highly dependent on a particular propagation environment, which generally limits the transfer of knowledge of the DL models from one environment to another. In this paper, we propose a DL model consisting of two parts: the first part aims to learn environment independent features while the second part combines those features depending on the particular environment. To improve transfer learning, we propose a meta learning scheme for training the first part over multiple environments. We show that for positioning in a new environment, initializing a DL model with the meta learned environment independent function achieves higher UE positioning accuracy compared to regular transfer learning from one environment to the new environment, or compared to training the DL model from scratch with only fingerprints from the new environment. Our proposed scheme is able to create an environment independent function which can embed knowledge from multiple environments and more effectively learn from a new environment.

DL models are able to capture complex properties embedded in the CSI about a particular environment and map UE's CSI to the UE's position. However, the CSI fingerprints and the DL models trained on such fingerprints are highly dependent on a particular propagation environment, which generally limits the transfer of knowledge of the DL models from one environment to another. In this paper, we propose a DL model consisting of two parts: the first part aims to learn environment independent features while the second part combines those features depending on the particular environment. To improve transfer learning, we propose a meta learning scheme for training the first part over multiple environments. We show that for positioning in a new environment, initializing a DL model with the meta learned environment independent function achieves higher UE positioning accuracy compared to regular transfer learning from one environment to the new environment, or compared to training the DL model from scratch with only fingerprints from the new environment. Our proposed scheme is able to create an environment independent function which can embed knowledge from multiple environments and more effectively learn from a new environment.
abstract_zh: 基于使用信道状态信息 (CSI) 指纹的深度学习 (DL) 方法的用户设备 (UE) 无线电定位已显示出有希望的结果。 DL 模型能够捕获嵌入在有关特定环境的 CSI 中的复杂属性，并将 UE 的 CSI 映射到 UE 的位置。然而，CSI 指纹和在此类指纹上训练的深度学习模型高度依赖于特定的传播环境，这通常限制了深度学习模型的知识从一种环境到另一种环境的转移。在本文中，我们提出了一个由两部分组成的深度学习模型：第一部分旨在学习​​与环境无关的特征，第二部分根据特定环境组合这些特征。为了改进迁移学习，我们提出了一种元学习方案，用于在多个环境中训练第一部分。我们表明，对于在新环境中进行定位，与从一个环境到新环境的常规迁移学习相比，或者与仅使用来自新环境的指纹从头开始训练 DL 模型相比，使用元学习环境独立函数初始化 DL 模型可以实现更高的 UE 定位精度。我们提出的方案能够创建一个独立于环境的函数，该函数可以嵌入来自多个环境的知识并更有效地从新环境中学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多环境元学习的深度学习模型，利用CSI指纹实现跨环境的无线定位。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型依赖特定传播环境的CSI指纹，导致知识无法跨环境迁移，限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计双模块DL模型：第一模块学习环境无关特征，第二模块适配具体环境；通过元学习在多环境中训练第一模块以提升迁移能力。
AI.result: 新环境定位精度优于传统迁移学习和从零训练，验证了元学习模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过多环境知识融合构建环境无关函数，显著提升了模型在新环境中的学习效率与定位精度。

authors_text: Jianqiao Cui,Stefan Bleeck
title: Parallel Gated Neural Network With Attention Mechanism For Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 具有注意力机制的并行门控神经网络用于语音增强
abstract: Deep learning algorithm are increasingly used for speech enhancement (SE). In supervised methods, global and local information is required for accurate spectral mapping. A key restriction is often poor capture of key contextual information. To leverage long-term for target speakers and compensate distortions of cleaned speech, this paper adopts a sequence-to-sequence (S2S) mapping structure and proposes a novel monaural speech enhancement system, consisting of a Feature Extraction Block (FEB), a Compensation Enhancement Block (ComEB) and a Mask Block (MB). In the FEB a U-net block is used to extract abstract features using complex-valued spectra with one path to suppress the background noise in the magnitude domain using masking methods and the MB takes magnitude features from the FEBand compensates the lost complex-domain features produced from ComEB to restore the final cleaned speech. Experiments are conducted on the Librispeech dataset and results show that the proposed model obtains better performance than recent models in terms of ESTOI and PESQ scores.
summary: Deep learning algorithm are increasingly used for speech enhancement (SE). In supervised methods, global and local information is required for accurate spectral mapping. A key restriction is often poor capture of key contextual information. To leverage long-term for target speakers and compensate distortions of cleaned speech, this paper adopts a sequence-to-sequence (S2S) mapping structure and proposes a novel monaural speech enhancement system, consisting of a Feature Extraction Block (FEB), a Compensation Enhancement Block (ComEB) and a Mask Block (MB). In the FEB a U-net block is used to extract abstract features using complex-valued spectra with one path to suppress the background noise in the magnitude domain using masking methods and the MB takes magnitude features from the FEBand compensates the lost complex-domain features produced from ComEB to restore the final cleaned speech. Experiments are conducted on the Librispeech dataset and results show that the proposed model obtains better performance than recent models in terms of ESTOI and PESQ scores.
abstract_zh: 深度学习算法越来越多地用于语音增强（SE）。在监督方法中，精确的光谱映射需要全局和局部信息。一个关键的限制通常是关键上下文信息的捕获不力。为了利用目标说话人的长期特征并补偿干净语音的失真，本文采用序列到序列（S2S）映射结构，并提出了一种新颖的单声道语音增强系统，由特征提取块（FEB）、补偿增强块（ComEB）和掩模块（MB）组成。在 FEB 中，U-net 块用于使用复值频谱提取抽象特征，通过一条路径使用掩蔽方法抑制幅度域中的背景噪声，MB 从 FEB 中获取幅度特征，并补偿 ComEB 产生的丢失的复数域特征，以恢复最终的干净语音。在 Librispeech 数据集上进行实验，结果表明，所提出的模型在 ESTOI 和 PESQ 分数方面比现有模型获得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制的并行门控神经网络，用于提升语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有监督方法在捕捉关键上下文信息时存在局限，导致语音增强效果不佳，需通过长时序建模和失真补偿提升性能。
AI.method: 设计包含特征提取块(FEB)、补偿增强块(ComEB)和掩码块(MB)的序列到序列框架，利用复数谱特征提取抽象信息，并通过掩码和补偿机制恢复清晰语音。
AI.result: 在Librispeech数据集上，模型在ESTOI和PESQ指标上优于最新方法，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过长时序建模与多模块协同补偿，显著提升了语音增强性能。

authors_text: Zhi Lv,Bo Lin,Siyuan Liang,Lihua Wang,Mochen Yu,Yao Tang,Jiajun Liang
title: SimpleDG: Simple Domain Generalization Baseline without Bells and Whistles
title_zh: SimpleDG：没有花哨的简单域泛化基线
abstract: We present a simple domain generalization baseline, which wins second place in both the common context generalization track and the hybrid context generalization track respectively in NICO CHALLENGE 2022. We verify the founding in recent literature, domainbed, that ERM is a strong baseline compared to recent state-of-the-art domain generalization methods and propose SimpleDG which includes several simple yet effective designs that further boost generalization performance. Code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/SimpleDG
summary: We present a simple domain generalization baseline, which wins second place in both the common context generalization track and the hybrid context generalization track respectively in NICO CHALLENGE 2022. We verify the founding in recent literature, domainbed, that ERM is a strong baseline compared to recent state-of-the-art domain generalization methods and propose SimpleDG which includes several simple yet effective designs that further boost generalization performance. Code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/SimpleDG
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单的领域泛化基线，该基线在 NICO CHALLENGE 2022 中分别在公共上下文泛化赛道和混合上下文泛化赛道中获得第二名。我们验证了最近文献domainbed的基础，即与最近最先进的领域泛化方法相比，ERM 是一个强大的基线，并提出了 SimpleDG，其中包括几种简单而有效的设计，可进一步提高泛化性能。代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/SimpleDG 获取

AI.tldr: 提出一个简单的领域泛化基线方法SimpleDG，旨在提升模型在未知领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 验证ERM作为领域泛化强基线的有效性，并通过简单设计进一步提升泛化性能。
AI.method: 基于ERM框架，结合简单而有效的设计（如数据增强、正则化等）来增强模型的领域适应能力。
AI.result: 在NICO CHALLENGE 2022的两个领域泛化赛道中分别获得第二名，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 证明了简单方法在领域泛化任务中的竞争力，为后续研究提供了有效的基线。

ai_content.motivation: 验证ERM作为领域泛化强基线的有效性，并通过简单设计进一步提升泛化性能。
ai_content.method: 基于ERM框架，结合简单而有效的设计（如数据增强、正则化等）来增强模型的领域适应能力。
ai_content.result: 在NICO CHALLENGE 2022的两个领域泛化赛道中分别获得第二名，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: SimpleDG: Simple Domain Generalization Baseline without Bells and Whistles SimpleDG：没有花哨的简单域泛化基线 We present a simple domain generalization baseline, which wins second place in both the common context generalization track and the hybrid context generalization track respectively in NICO CHALLENGE 2022. We verify the founding in recent literature, domainbed, that ERM is a strong baseline compared to recent state-of-the-art domain generalization methods and propose SimpleDG which includes several simple yet effective designs that further boost generalization performance. Code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/SimpleDG 我们提出了一个简单的领域泛化基线，该基线在 NICO CHALLENGE 2022 中分别在公共上下文泛化赛道和混合上下文泛化赛道中获得第二名。我们验证了最近文献domainbed的基础，即与最近最先进的领域泛化方法相比，ERM 是一个强大的基线，并提出了 SimpleDG，其中包括几种简单而有效的设计，可进一步提高泛化性能。代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/SimpleDG 获取 提出一个简单的领域泛化基线方法SimpleDG，旨在提升模型在未知领域的泛化能力。 Zhi Lv,Bo Lin,Siyuan Liang,Lihua Wang,Mochen Yu,Yao Tang,Jiajun Liang cs.CV

authors_text: Bagus Tris Atmaja,Akira Sasou
title: Effect of different splitting criteria on the performance of speech emotion recognition
title_zh: 不同分割标准对语音情感识别性能的影响
abstract: Traditional speech emotion recognition (SER) evaluations have been performed merely on a speaker-independent condition; some of them even did not evaluate their result on this condition. This paper highlights the importance of splitting training and test data for SER by script, known as sentence-open or text-independent criteria. The results show that employing sentence-open criteria degraded the performance of SER. This finding implies the difficulties of recognizing emotion from speech in different linguistic information embedded in acoustic information. Surprisingly, text-independent criteria consistently performed worse than speaker+text-independent criteria. The full order of difficulties for splitting criteria on SER performances from the most difficult to the easiest is text-independent, speaker+text-independent, speaker-independent, and speaker+text-dependent. The gap between speaker+text-independent and text-independent was smaller than other criteria, strengthening the difficulties of recognizing emotion from speech in different sentences.
summary: Traditional speech emotion recognition (SER) evaluations have been performed merely on a speaker-independent condition; some of them even did not evaluate their result on this condition. This paper highlights the importance of splitting training and test data for SER by script, known as sentence-open or text-independent criteria. The results show that employing sentence-open criteria degraded the performance of SER. This finding implies the difficulties of recognizing emotion from speech in different linguistic information embedded in acoustic information. Surprisingly, text-independent criteria consistently performed worse than speaker+text-independent criteria. The full order of difficulties for splitting criteria on SER performances from the most difficult to the easiest is text-independent, speaker+text-independent, speaker-independent, and speaker+text-dependent. The gap between speaker+text-independent and text-independent was smaller than other criteria, strengthening the difficulties of recognizing emotion from speech in different sentences.
abstract_zh: 传统的语音情感识别（SER）评估仅在独立于说话人的条件下进行；他们中的一些人甚至没有在这种情况下评价自己的结果。本文强调了通过脚本分割 SER 训练和测试数据的重要性，称为句子开放或文本无关标准。结果表明，采用句子开放标准会降低 SER 的性能。这一发现意味着从嵌入声学信息的不同语言信息中的语音中识别情感是困难的。令人惊讶的是，与文本无关的标准始终比与说话者+文本无关的标准表现得更差。将 SER 性能标准从最难到最简单划分的全部困难顺序是与文本无关、与说话者+文本无关、与说话者无关以及与说话者+文本相关。说话者+文本无关和文本无关之间的差距比其他标准更小，这加大了从不同句子中的语音中识别情感的难度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同数据分割标准对语音情感识别（SER）性能的影响，重点分析了句子开放（文本无关）等标准的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统SER评估多采用说话人独立条件，但未充分考虑其他分割标准（如文本无关）对性能的影响，导致结果可能存在偏差。
AI.method: 通过对比实验，评估文本无关、说话人+文本无关、说话人独立、说话人+文本相关四种分割标准在SER任务中的性能差异。
AI.result: 文本无关标准性能最差，其次为说话人+文本无关，随后是说话人独立和说话人+文本相关；文本无关与说话人+文本无关的性能差距较小，表明跨句子情感识别难度较高。
AI.conclusion: 分割标准的选择显著影响SER性能，文本无关标准因需处理不同语言信息嵌入的声学特征而最具挑战性，需在实际应用中谨慎选择数据分割策略。

authors_text: Bagus Tris Atmaja,Masato Akagi
title: Two-stage dimensional emotion recognition by fusing predictions of acoustic and text networks using SVM
title_zh: 使用 SVM 融合声学和文本网络的预测进行二维情感识别
abstract: Automatic speech emotion recognition (SER) by a computer is a critical component for more natural human-machine interaction. As in human-human interaction, the capability to perceive emotion correctly is essential to take further steps in a particular situation. One issue in SER is whether it is necessary to combine acoustic features with other data such as facial expressions, text, and motion capture. This research proposes to combine acoustic and text information by applying a late-fusion approach consisting of two steps. First, acoustic and text features are trained separately in deep learning systems. Second, the prediction results from the deep learning systems are fed into a support vector machine (SVM) to predict the final regression score. Furthermore, the task in this research is dimensional emotion modeling because it can enable a deeper analysis of affective states. Experimental results show that this two-stage, late-fusion approach, obtains higher performance than that of any one-stage processing, with a linear correlation from one-stage to two-stage processing. This late-fusion approach improves previous early fusion results measured in concordance correlation coefficients score.
summary: Automatic speech emotion recognition (SER) by a computer is a critical component for more natural human-machine interaction. As in human-human interaction, the capability to perceive emotion correctly is essential to take further steps in a particular situation. One issue in SER is whether it is necessary to combine acoustic features with other data such as facial expressions, text, and motion capture. This research proposes to combine acoustic and text information by applying a late-fusion approach consisting of two steps. First, acoustic and text features are trained separately in deep learning systems. Second, the prediction results from the deep learning systems are fed into a support vector machine (SVM) to predict the final regression score. Furthermore, the task in this research is dimensional emotion modeling because it can enable a deeper analysis of affective states. Experimental results show that this two-stage, late-fusion approach, obtains higher performance than that of any one-stage processing, with a linear correlation from one-stage to two-stage processing. This late-fusion approach improves previous early fusion results measured in concordance correlation coefficients score.
abstract_zh: 计算机自动语音情感识别（SER）是实现更自然的人机交互的关键组成部分。正如在人与人的互动中一样，正确感知情绪的能力对于在特定情况下采取进一步措施至关重要。 SER 的一个问题是是否有必要将声学特征与其他数据（例如面部表情、文本和动作捕捉）相结合。这项研究建议通过应用由两个步骤组成的后期融合方法来结合声音和文本信息。首先，声音和文本特征在深度学习系统中分开训练。其次，深度学习系统的预测结果被输入支持向量机（SVM）以预测最终的回归分数。此外，本研究的任务是维度情感建模，因为它可以对情感状态进行更深入的分析。实验结果表明，这种两阶段后期融合方法比任何单阶段处理获得了更高的性能，并且从一阶段到两阶段处理具有线性相关性。这种后期融合方法改善了之前以一致性相关系数得分衡量的早期融合结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段融合声学和文本信息的维度情绪识别方法，通过支持向量机（SVM）整合深度学习模型的预测结果。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪识别研究需解决是否应融合多模态数据（如声学、文本）以提升准确率的问题，而传统早期融合方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段晚期融合框架：首先分别用深度学习模型提取声学和文本特征，再将二者预测结果输入SVM进行回归评分预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法较单阶段处理提升线性相关性，且在一致性相关系数指标上优于早期融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 晚期融合策略能有效提升维度情绪建模性能，为更自然的人机交互提供技术支持。

authors_text: Masato Hagiwara
title: AVES: Animal Vocalization Encoder based on Self-Supervision
title_zh: AVES：基于自我监督的动物发声编码器
abstract: The lack of annotated training data in bioacoustics hinders the use of large-scale neural network models trained in a supervised way. In order to leverage a large amount of unannotated audio data, we propose AVES (Animal Vocalization Encoder based on Self-Supervision), a self-supervised, transformer-based audio representation model for encoding animal vocalizations. We pretrain AVES on a diverse set of unannotated audio datasets and fine-tune them for downstream bioacoustics tasks. Comprehensive experiments with a suite of classification and detection tasks have shown that AVES outperforms all the strong baselines and even the supervised "topline" models trained on annotated audio classification datasets. The results also suggest that curating a small training subset related to downstream tasks is an efficient way to train high-quality audio representation models. We open-source our models at \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/aves}.
summary: The lack of annotated training data in bioacoustics hinders the use of large-scale neural network models trained in a supervised way. In order to leverage a large amount of unannotated audio data, we propose AVES (Animal Vocalization Encoder based on Self-Supervision), a self-supervised, transformer-based audio representation model for encoding animal vocalizations. We pretrain AVES on a diverse set of unannotated audio datasets and fine-tune them for downstream bioacoustics tasks. Comprehensive experiments with a suite of classification and detection tasks have shown that AVES outperforms all the strong baselines and even the supervised "topline" models trained on annotated audio classification datasets. The results also suggest that curating a small training subset related to downstream tasks is an efficient way to train high-quality audio representation models. We open-source our models at \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/aves}.
abstract_zh: 生物声学中缺乏带注释的训练数据阻碍了以监督方式训练的大规模神经网络模型的使用。为了利用大量未注释的音频数据，我们提出了 AVES（基于自我监督的动物发声编码器），这是一种自我监督、基于变压器的音频表示模型，用于对动物发声进行编码。我们在一组不同的未注释音频数据集上对 AVES 进行预训练，并针对下游生物声学任务对其进行微调。一系列分类和检测任务的综合实验表明，AVES 的性能优于所有强基线，甚至优于在带注释的音频分类数据集上训练的监督“顶线”模型。结果还表明，策划与下游任务相关的小型训练子集是训练高质量音频表示模型的有效方法。我们在 \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/aves} 开源我们的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AVES，一种基于自监督的动物声音编码器，用于解决生物声学领域标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 生物声学研究中缺乏足够的标注数据，限制了监督学习模型的应用，需利用大量未标注数据训练高效模型。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的自监督模型AVES，通过预训练未标注音频数据，再针对下游任务微调模型参数。
AI.result: 在多个分类与检测任务中，AVES超越现有强基线及监督模型，且小规模任务相关数据集即可高效训练高质量模型。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习有效提升动物声音表征能力，结合任务相关小数据集可高效优化模型性能。

search_text: AVES: Animal Vocalization Encoder based on Self-Supervision AVES：基于自我监督的动物发声编码器 The lack of annotated training data in bioacoustics hinders the use of large-scale neural network models trained in a supervised way. In order to leverage a large amount of unannotated audio data, we propose AVES (Animal Vocalization Encoder based on Self-Supervision), a self-supervised, transformer-based audio representation model for encoding animal vocalizations. We pretrain AVES on a diverse set of unannotated audio datasets and fine-tune them for downstream bioacoustics tasks. Comprehensive experiments with a suite of classification and detection tasks have shown that AVES outperforms all the strong baselines and even the supervised "topline" models trained on annotated audio classification datasets. The results also suggest that curating a small training subset related to downstream tasks is an efficient way to train high-quality audio representation models. We open-source our models at \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/aves}. 生物声学中缺乏带注释的训练数据阻碍了以监督方式训练的大规模神经网络模型的使用。为了利用大量未注释的音频数据，我们提出了 AVES（基于自我监督的动物发声编码器），这是一种自我监督、基于变压器的音频表示模型，用于对动物发声进行编码。我们在一组不同的未注释音频数据集上对 AVES 进行预训练，并针对下游生物声学任务对其进行微调。一系列分类和检测任务的综合实验表明，AVES 的性能优于所有强基线，甚至优于在带注释的音频分类数据集上训练的监督“顶线”模型。结果还表明，策划与下游任务相关的小型训练子集是训练高质量音频表示模型的有效方法。我们在 \url{https://github.com/earthspecies/aves} 开源我们的模型。 本文提出AVES，一种基于自监督的动物声音编码器，用于解决生物声学领域标注数据不足的问题。 Masato Hagiwara cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Andrew Bennett,Dipendra Misra,Nathan Kallus
title: Provable Safe Reinforcement Learning with Binary Feedback
title_zh: 具有二元反馈的可证明安全强化学习
abstract: Safety is a crucial necessity in many applications of reinforcement learning (RL), whether robotic, automotive, or medical. Many existing approaches to safe RL rely on receiving numeric safety feedback, but in many cases this feedback can only take binary values; that is, whether an action in a given state is safe or unsafe. This is particularly true when feedback comes from human experts. We therefore consider the problem of provable safe RL when given access to an offline oracle providing binary feedback on the safety of state, action pairs. We provide a novel meta algorithm, SABRE, which can be applied to any MDP setting given access to a blackbox PAC RL algorithm for that setting. SABRE applies concepts from active learning to reinforcement learning to provably control the number of queries to the safety oracle. SABRE works by iteratively exploring the state space to find regions where the agent is currently uncertain about safety. Our main theoretical results shows that, under appropriate technical assumptions, SABRE never takes unsafe actions during training, and is guaranteed to return a near-optimal safe policy with high probability. We provide a discussion of how our meta-algorithm may be applied to various settings studied in both theoretical and empirical frameworks.
summary: Safety is a crucial necessity in many applications of reinforcement learning (RL), whether robotic, automotive, or medical. Many existing approaches to safe RL rely on receiving numeric safety feedback, but in many cases this feedback can only take binary values; that is, whether an action in a given state is safe or unsafe. This is particularly true when feedback comes from human experts. We therefore consider the problem of provable safe RL when given access to an offline oracle providing binary feedback on the safety of state, action pairs. We provide a novel meta algorithm, SABRE, which can be applied to any MDP setting given access to a blackbox PAC RL algorithm for that setting. SABRE applies concepts from active learning to reinforcement learning to provably control the number of queries to the safety oracle. SABRE works by iteratively exploring the state space to find regions where the agent is currently uncertain about safety. Our main theoretical results shows that, under appropriate technical assumptions, SABRE never takes unsafe actions during training, and is guaranteed to return a near-optimal safe policy with high probability. We provide a discussion of how our meta-algorithm may be applied to various settings studied in both theoretical and empirical frameworks.
abstract_zh: Safety is a crucial necessity in many applications of reinforcement learning (RL), whether robotic, automotive, or medical.许多现有的安全强化学习方法依赖于接收数字安全反馈，但在许多情况下，这种反馈只能采用二进制值； that is, whether an action in a given state is safe or unsafe.当反馈来自人类专家时尤其如此。因此，当允许访问离线预言机并提供有关状态、动作对安全性的二进制反馈时，我们会考虑可证明安全的强化学习问题。 We provide a novel meta algorithm, SABRE, which can be applied to any MDP setting given access to a blackbox PAC RL algorithm for that setting. SABRE applies concepts from active learning to reinforcement learning to provably control the number of queries to the safety oracle. SABRE works by iteratively exploring the state space to find regions where the agent is currently uncertain about safety.我们的主要理论结果表明，在适当的技术假设下，SABRE 在训练过程中不会采取不安全的动作，并且保证以高概率返回接近最优的安全策略。 We provide a discussion of how our meta-algorithm may be applied to various settings studied in both theoretical and empirical frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SABRE的元算法，用于在仅获得二元安全反馈的情况下实现可证明的安全强化学习。
AI.motivation: 在许多实际应用中，强化学习的安全性至关重要，但传统的安全强化学习方法依赖于数值反馈，而实际中可能只能获得二元反馈，因此需要一种新的方法来处理这种情况。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为SABRE的元算法，该算法利用主动学习的概念，通过迭代探索状态空间来控制对安全 oracle 的查询次数，并确保在训练过程中不会采取不安全的动作。
AI.result: SABRE算法在适当的假设下，能够确保在训练过程中不会采取不安全动作，并以高概率返回一个接近最优的安全策略。
AI.conclusion: SABRE算法为在二元安全反馈条件下实现安全强化学习提供了一种有效且可证明的方法，并可以应用于各种理论和实证框架。

authors_text: Tongkun Liu,Bing Li,Zhuo Zhao,Xiao Du,Bingke Jiang,Leqi Geng
title: Reconstruction from edge image combined with color and gradient difference for industrial surface anomaly detection
title_zh: 边缘图像结合颜色和梯度差重建用于工业表面异常检测
abstract: Reconstruction-based methods are widely explored in industrial visual anomaly detection. Such methods commonly require the model to well reconstruct the normal patterns but fail in the anomalies, and thus the anomalies can be detected by evaluating the reconstruction errors. However, in practice, it's usually difficult to control the generalization boundary of the model. The model with an overly strong generalization capability can even well reconstruct the abnormal regions, making them less distinguishable, while the model with a poor generalization capability can not reconstruct those changeable high-frequency components in the normal regions, which ultimately leads to false positives. To tackle the above issue, we propose a new reconstruction network where we reconstruct the original RGB image from its gray value edges (EdgRec). Specifically, this is achieved by an UNet-type denoising autoencoder with skip connections. The input edge and skip connections can well preserve the high-frequency information in the original image. Meanwhile, the proposed restoration task can force the network to memorize the normal low-frequency and color information. Besides, the denoising design can prevent the model from directly copying the original high-frequent components. To evaluate the anomalies, we further propose a new interpretable hand-crafted evaluation function that considers both the color and gradient differences. Our method achieves competitive results on the challenging benchmark MVTec AD (97.8\% for detection and 97.7\% for localization, AUROC). In addition, we conduct experiments on the MVTec 3D-AD dataset and show convincing results using RGB images only. Our code will be available at https://github.com/liutongkun/EdgRec.
summary: Reconstruction-based methods are widely explored in industrial visual anomaly detection. Such methods commonly require the model to well reconstruct the normal patterns but fail in the anomalies, and thus the anomalies can be detected by evaluating the reconstruction errors. However, in practice, it's usually difficult to control the generalization boundary of the model. The model with an overly strong generalization capability can even well reconstruct the abnormal regions, making them less distinguishable, while the model with a poor generalization capability can not reconstruct those changeable high-frequency components in the normal regions, which ultimately leads to false positives. To tackle the above issue, we propose a new reconstruction network where we reconstruct the original RGB image from its gray value edges (EdgRec). Specifically, this is achieved by an UNet-type denoising autoencoder with skip connections. The input edge and skip connections can well preserve the high-frequency information in the original image. Meanwhile, the proposed restoration task can force the network to memorize the normal low-frequency and color information. Besides, the denoising design can prevent the model from directly copying the original high-frequent components. To evaluate the anomalies, we further propose a new interpretable hand-crafted evaluation function that considers both the color and gradient differences. Our method achieves competitive results on the challenging benchmark MVTec AD (97.8\% for detection and 97.7\% for localization, AUROC). In addition, we conduct experiments on the MVTec 3D-AD dataset and show convincing results using RGB images only. Our code will be available at https://github.com/liutongkun/EdgRec.
abstract_zh: 基于重建的方法在工业视觉异常检测中得到了广泛的探索。此类方法通常要求模型能够很好地重建正常模式，但在异常情况下会失败，因此可以通过评估重建误差来检测异常情况。然而，在实践中，模型的泛化边界通常很难控制。泛化能力过强的模型甚至可以很好地重建异常区域，使其难以区分，而泛化能力差的模型则无法重建正常区域中那些变化的高频成分，最终导致误报。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的重建网络，从灰度值边缘重建原始 RGB 图像 (EdgRec)。具体来说，这是通过具有跳跃连接的 UNet 型去噪自动编码器来实现的。输入的边缘和跳跃连接可以很好地保留原始图像中的高频信息。同时，所提出的恢复任务可以迫使网络记住正常的低频和颜色信息。此外，去噪设计可以防止模型直接复制原始高频成分。为了评估异常情况，我们进一步提出了一种新的可解释的手工评估函数，该函数考虑了颜色和梯度差异。我们的方法在具有挑战性的基准 MVTec AD 上取得了有竞争力的结果（检测为 97.8%，定位为 97.7%，AUROC）。此外，我们在 MVTec 3D-AD 数据集上进行了实验，并仅使用 RGB 图像显示了令人信服的结果。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/liutongkun/EdgRec 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合边缘图像、颜色和梯度差异的重建方法，用于工业表面缺陷检测。
AI.motivation: 传统重建方法因模型泛化能力边界难以控制，导致异常区域重建效果差或产生误报，需改进重建策略以提升检测准确性。
AI.method: 设计基于边缘灰度值的UNet去噪自编码器（EdgRec），通过跳过连接保留高频信息，强制网络记忆正常区域的低频与颜色特征，并引入颜色与梯度差异的可解释评估函数。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD数据集上达到97.8%检测率和97.7%定位率（AUROC），仅用RGB图像在MVTec 3D-AD上也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过边缘重建与多特征评估结合，有效解决了传统方法的泛化边界问题，实现了高精度工业缺陷检测。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过边缘重建与多特征评估结合，有效解决了传统方法的泛化边界问题，实现了高精度工业缺陷检测。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合边缘图像、颜色和梯度差异的重建方法，用于工业表面缺陷检测。
motivation: 传统重建方法因模型泛化能力边界难以控制，导致异常区域重建效果差或产生误报，需改进重建策略以提升检测准确性。
method: 设计基于边缘灰度值的UNet去噪自编码器（EdgRec），通过跳过连接保留高频信息，强制网络记忆正常区域的低频与颜色特征，并引入颜色与梯度差异的可解释评估函数。
result: 在MVTec AD数据集上达到97.8%检测率和97.7%定位率（AUROC），仅用RGB图像在MVTec 3D-AD上也表现优异。
conclusion: 通过边缘重建与多特征评估结合，有效解决了传统方法的泛化边界问题，实现了高精度工业缺陷检测。
search_text: Reconstruction from edge image combined with color and gradient difference for industrial surface anomaly detection 边缘图像结合颜色和梯度差重建用于工业表面异常检测 Reconstruction-based methods are widely explored in industrial visual anomaly detection. Such methods commonly require the model to well reconstruct the normal patterns but fail in the anomalies, and thus the anomalies can be detected by evaluating the reconstruction errors. However, in practice, it's usually difficult to control the generalization boundary of the model. The model with an overly strong generalization capability can even well reconstruct the abnormal regions, making them less distinguishable, while the model with a poor generalization capability can not reconstruct those changeable high-frequency components in the normal regions, which ultimately leads to false positives. To tackle the above issue, we propose a new reconstruction network where we reconstruct the original RGB image from its gray value edges (EdgRec). Specifically, this is achieved by an UNet-type denoising autoencoder with skip connections. The input edge and skip connections can well preserve the high-frequency information in the original image. Meanwhile, the proposed restoration task can force the network to memorize the normal low-frequency and color information. Besides, the denoising design can prevent the model from directly copying the original high-frequent components. To evaluate the anomalies, we further propose a new interpretable hand-crafted evaluation function that considers both the color and gradient differences. Our method achieves competitive results on the challenging benchmark MVTec AD (97.8\% for detection and 97.7\% for localization, AUROC). In addition, we conduct experiments on the MVTec 3D-AD dataset and show convincing results using RGB images only. Our code will be available at https://github.com/liutongkun/EdgRec. 基于重建的方法在工业视觉异常检测中得到了广泛的探索。此类方法通常要求模型能够很好地重建正常模式，但在异常情况下会失败，因此可以通过评估重建误差来检测异常情况。然而，在实践中，模型的泛化边界通常很难控制。泛化能力过强的模型甚至可以很好地重建异常区域，使其难以区分，而泛化能力差的模型则无法重建正常区域中那些变化的高频成分，最终导致误报。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的重建网络，从灰度值边缘重建原始 RGB 图像 (EdgRec)。具体来说，这是通过具有跳跃连接的 UNet 型去噪自动编码器来实现的。输入的边缘和跳跃连接可以很好地保留原始图像中的高频信息。同时，所提出的恢复任务可以迫使网络记住正常的低频和颜色信息。此外，去噪设计可以防止模型直接复制原始高频成分。为了评估异常情况，我们进一步提出了一种新的可解释的手工评估函数，该函数考虑了颜色和梯度差异。我们的方法在具有挑战性的基准 MVTec AD 上取得了有竞争力的结果（检测为 97.8%，定位为 97.7%，AUROC）。此外，我们在 MVTec 3D-AD 数据集上进行了实验，并仅使用 RGB 图像显示了令人信服的结果。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/liutongkun/EdgRec 上提供。 本文提出一种结合边缘图像、颜色和梯度差异的重建方法，用于工业表面缺陷检测。 Tongkun Liu,Bing Li,Zhuo Zhao,Xiao Du,Bingke Jiang,Leqi Geng cs.CV

authors_text: Jiwoong Park,Jisu Jeong,Kyungmin Kim,Jin Young Choi
title: Meta-node: A Concise Approach to Effectively Learn Complex Relationships in Heterogeneous Graphs
title_zh: 元节点：一种有效学习异构图中复杂关系的简洁方法
abstract: Existing message passing neural networks for heterogeneous graphs rely on the concepts of meta-paths or meta-graphs due to the intrinsic nature of heterogeneous graphs. However, the meta-paths and meta-graphs need to be pre-configured before learning and are highly dependent on expert knowledge to construct them. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel concept of meta-node for message passing that can learn enriched relational knowledge from complex heterogeneous graphs without any meta-paths and meta-graphs by explicitly modeling the relations among the same type of nodes. Unlike meta-paths and meta-graphs, meta-nodes do not require any pre-processing steps that require expert knowledge. Going one step further, we propose a meta-node message passing scheme and apply our method to a contrastive learning model. In the experiments on node clustering and classification tasks, the proposed meta-node message passing method outperforms state-of-the-arts that depend on meta-paths. Our results demonstrate that effective heterogeneous graph learning is possible without the need for meta-paths that are frequently used in this field.
summary: Existing message passing neural networks for heterogeneous graphs rely on the concepts of meta-paths or meta-graphs due to the intrinsic nature of heterogeneous graphs. However, the meta-paths and meta-graphs need to be pre-configured before learning and are highly dependent on expert knowledge to construct them. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel concept of meta-node for message passing that can learn enriched relational knowledge from complex heterogeneous graphs without any meta-paths and meta-graphs by explicitly modeling the relations among the same type of nodes. Unlike meta-paths and meta-graphs, meta-nodes do not require any pre-processing steps that require expert knowledge. Going one step further, we propose a meta-node message passing scheme and apply our method to a contrastive learning model. In the experiments on node clustering and classification tasks, the proposed meta-node message passing method outperforms state-of-the-arts that depend on meta-paths. Our results demonstrate that effective heterogeneous graph learning is possible without the need for meta-paths that are frequently used in this field.
abstract_zh: 由于异构图的内在本质，现有的异构图消息传递神经网络依赖于元路径或元图的概念。然而，元路径和元图需要在学习之前预先配置，并且高度依赖于专家知识来构建它们。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种用于消息传递的元节点的新概念，它可以通过对同一类型节点之间的关系进行显式建模，从复杂的异构图中学习丰富的关系知识，而无需任何元路径和元图。与元路径和元图不同，元节点不需要任何需要专业知识的预处理步骤。更进一步，我们提出了一种元节点消息传递方案，并将我们的方法应用于对比学习模型。在节点聚类和分类任务的实验中，所提出的元节点消息传递方法优于依赖元路径的最新技术。我们的结果表明，有效的异构图学习是可能的，而不需要该领域经常使用的元路径。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需预定义元路径的异构图学习方法，通过显式建模同类节点关系来学习复杂关系
AI.motivation: 现有异构图神经网络依赖需要专家知识预定义的元路径/元图结构，限制了模型的灵活性和自动化程度
AI.method: 提出元节点概念及消息传递机制，无需预处理步骤，结合对比学习模型进行训练
AI.result: 在节点聚类和分类任务中超越依赖元路径的最先进方法，验证了元节点的有效性
AI.conclusion: 证明无需依赖元路径即可实现有效的异构图学习，为复杂关系建模提供新思路

authors_text: Ben Hayes,Charalampos Saitis,György Fazekas
title: Sinusoidal Frequency Estimation by Gradient Descent
title_zh: 通过梯度下降进行正弦频率估计
abstract: Sinusoidal parameter estimation is a fundamental task in applications from spectral analysis to time-series forecasting. Estimating the sinusoidal frequency parameter by gradient descent is, however, often impossible as the error function is non-convex and densely populated with local minima. The growing family of differentiable signal processing methods has therefore been unable to tune the frequency of oscillatory components, preventing their use in a broad range of applications. This work presents a technique for joint sinusoidal frequency and amplitude estimation using the Wirtinger derivatives of a complex exponential surrogate and any first order gradient-based optimizer, enabling end to-end training of neural network controllers for unconstrained sinusoidal models.
summary: Sinusoidal parameter estimation is a fundamental task in applications from spectral analysis to time-series forecasting. Estimating the sinusoidal frequency parameter by gradient descent is, however, often impossible as the error function is non-convex and densely populated with local minima. The growing family of differentiable signal processing methods has therefore been unable to tune the frequency of oscillatory components, preventing their use in a broad range of applications. This work presents a technique for joint sinusoidal frequency and amplitude estimation using the Wirtinger derivatives of a complex exponential surrogate and any first order gradient-based optimizer, enabling end to-end training of neural network controllers for unconstrained sinusoidal models.
abstract_zh: 正弦参数估计是从谱分析到时间序列预测等应用中的一项基本任务。然而，通过梯度下降来估计正弦频率参数通常是不可能的，因为误差函数是非凸的并且密集地具有局部最小值。因此，越来越多的可微分信号处理方法无法调整振荡组件的频率，从而阻碍了它们在广泛的应用中的使用。这项工作提出了一种使用复杂指数代理的 Wirtinger 导数和任何基于一阶梯度的优化器来联合正弦频率和幅度估计的技术，从而能够对无约束正弦模型的神经网络控制器进行端到端训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度下降的正弦频率和振幅联合估计方法，解决传统方法因误差函数非凸性导致的局部极小值问题。
AI.motivation: 现有可微信号处理方法无法有效估计正弦信号频率参数，因误差函数非凸且存在密集局部极小值，限制了其在频谱分析等领域的应用。
AI.method: 利用复指数代理的Wirtinger导数与任意一阶梯度优化器，实现正弦频率和振幅的联合估计，并支持神经网络控制器的端到端训练。
AI.result: 提出的方法成功克服了传统梯度下降在正弦频率估计中的局限性，实现了无约束正弦模型的参数估计。
AI.conclusion: 该技术填补了可微信号处理方法在频率调谐能力上的空白，为复杂应用场景提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Vasily Zadorozhnyy,Qiang Ye,Kazuhito Koishida
title: SCP-GAN: Self-Correcting Discriminator Optimization for Training Consistency Preserving Metric GAN on Speech Enhancement Tasks
title_zh: SCP-GAN：用于语音增强任务的训练一致性保持指标 GAN 的自校正判别器优化
comment: 5 pages (4 - manuscript and 1 - references), 2 figures, 2 tables
comments: 5 pages (4 - manuscript and 1 - references), 2 figures, 2 tables
abstract: In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have produced significantly improved results in speech enhancement (SE) tasks. They are difficult to train, however. In this work, we introduce several improvements to the GAN training schemes, which can be applied to most GAN-based SE models. We propose using consistency loss functions, which target the inconsistency in time and time-frequency domains caused by Fourier and Inverse Fourier Transforms. We also present self-correcting optimization for training a GAN discriminator on SE tasks, which helps avoid "harmful" training directions for parts of the discriminator loss function. We have tested our proposed methods on several state-of-the-art GAN-based SE models and obtained consistent improvements, including new state-of-the-art results for the Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset.
summary: In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have produced significantly improved results in speech enhancement (SE) tasks. They are difficult to train, however. In this work, we introduce several improvements to the GAN training schemes, which can be applied to most GAN-based SE models. We propose using consistency loss functions, which target the inconsistency in time and time-frequency domains caused by Fourier and Inverse Fourier Transforms. We also present self-correcting optimization for training a GAN discriminator on SE tasks, which helps avoid "harmful" training directions for parts of the discriminator loss function. We have tested our proposed methods on several state-of-the-art GAN-based SE models and obtained consistent improvements, including new state-of-the-art results for the Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）在语音增强（SE）任务中取得了显着改善的结果。然而，它们很难训练。在这项工作中，我们介绍了对 GAN 训练方案的几项改进，这些改进可以应用于大多数基于 GAN 的 SE 模型。我们建议使用一致性损失函数，该函数针对由傅里叶变换和傅里叶逆变换引起的时域和时频域的不一致。我们还提出了在 SE 任务上训练 GAN 判别器的自我校正优化，这有助于避免判别器损失函数部分的“有害”训练方向。我们已经在几种最先进的基于 GAN 的 SE 模型上测试了我们提出的方法，并获得了一致的改进，包括 Voice Bank+DEMAND 数据集的新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出SCP-GAN方法，通过改进GAN训练方案解决语音增强任务中的训练困难问题
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN在语音增强中表现优异，但训练困难，存在时间及时频域不一致性和判别器损失函数中的有害训练方向问题，需改进训练方案
AI.method: 引入一致性损失函数以消除傅里叶变换引起的时及时频域不一致，并采用自纠正优化策略避免判别器损失函数中的有害训练方向
AI.result: 在多个先进GAN模型上测试，实现一致提升，尤其在Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集上取得新SOTA结果
AI.conclusion: SCP-GAN方法有效提升GAN在语音增强任务的训练稳定性与性能，适用于多种模型，具有广泛适用性
